capabilities.name: Data Modelling
capabilities.headline: Advanced Data Modeling
capabilities.shortDescription: Pimcore's advanced data modeling allows businesses to create tailored, scalable, and highly adaptable data models for any industry. With over 45 customizable data components, Pimcore’s no-code interface simplifies the creation and management of complex data relationships across structured, unstructured, and binary assets.
capabilities.longDescription: Pimcore’s advanced data modeling is a groundbreaking feature that distinguishes it from all other data management solutions. Designed to meet the specific needs of any industry, Pimcore’s data modeling allows businesses to create precisely tailored, scalable, and adaptable models using a no-code visual interface. The platform supports over 45 customizable data components, enabling the seamless integration of structured data, unstructured content, and binary assets. This flexibility allows businesses to establish complex relationships between different data types, ensuring that their data model fits their unique requirements perfectly. Once a model is built, it can be managed effortlessly within Pimcore and is instantly available via APIs, making it easy to integrate into broader data strategies. This powerful capability transforms how businesses approach data management, offering a robust, user-friendly solution that drives innovation and efficiency.

features.name: Attribute Management
features.headline: Unlimited, No-Code Attribute Management
features.shortDescription: Enhance your data entities with unlimited, no-code attribute management in Pimcore's PIM. Supports 45+ data types, dynamic fields, and category-specific attributes, enabling flexible and scalable data models.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore's Attribute Management is a powerful, no-code feature that allows you to enhance your entities with an unlimited number of data attributes. It supports a wide array of data types—over 45 in total—including category-specific attributes and dynamic data fields such as calculated fields. This flexibility enables businesses to create detailed, customized data models that can evolve over time, perfectly matching their unique needs.

The feature supports multiple dimensions of attribute organization, including blocks, field collections, object bricks, and the Classification Store, allowing you to manage and structure your data efficiently. These options provide the versatility to accommodate a wide range of use cases, from simple product categorization to complex data hierarchies.

With Pimcore’s Attribute Management, you can grow your data model incrementally, adding attributes as your business needs evolve. The system automatically generates APIs based on the attributes you create, ensuring seamless integration with other systems and enabling dynamic data management across your organization. This no-code approach not only accelerates the development process but also empowers non-technical users to take control of their data models, making it easier to maintain and expand over time. Whether you're managing the data lifecycle of a simple product or a complex portfolio, Pimcore's Attribute Management provides the tools you need to stay agile and competitive.
features.description: Pimcore’s Attribute Management feature empowers users to add unlimited data attributes to any entity without writing a single line of code. With support for over 45 data types and category-specific attributes, it provides unparalleled flexibility. Whether using dynamic data fields like calculated fields, or organizing attributes in blocks, field collections, object bricks, or the Classification Store, this feature is tailored to handle diverse use cases. Additionally, APIs are automatically generated based on your attributes, simplifying integration and ensuring that your data model can evolve and scale over time.

features.name: Editor Layout Management
features.headline: No-Code Editor Interfaces
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s visual data modeling includes a powerful feature for constructing custom editor GUI interfaces without code. Using intuitive GUI components, you can create optimized interfaces tailored to the exact needs of editors and content managers.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore's visual data modeling capabilities include a unique feature that allows users to construct editor GUI interfaces in a no-code, visually-driven manner. This feature enables businesses to design and customize interfaces using a variety of GUI components such as panels, regions, tab panels, and accordions. These components can be arranged and configured to create intuitive and efficient interfaces that perfectly align with the specific needs of editors, content managers, and other key stakeholders.

The ability to design these interfaces visually means that even non-technical users can participate in the customization process, ensuring that the resulting GUIs are closely aligned with the actual workflows and processes of the users. Moreover, Pimcore allows the creation of multiple interfaces for a single data model, providing even greater flexibility to tailor the experience to different user groups or tasks. This capability ensures that each user has access to a streamlined, optimized interface that enhances productivity and reduces the complexity of managing data.

Whether it's simplifying the process of content editing, managing product information, or overseeing complex datasets, Pimcore’s visual interface construction tool empowers businesses to deliver the exact tools their teams need to succeed, all without writing a single line of code.
features.description: Pimcore’s visual data modeling capabilities empower users to construct custom editor GUI interfaces through a no-code, visual approach. By leveraging GUI components like panels, regions, tab panels, and accordions, businesses can design highly efficient and user-friendly interfaces tailored to the specific workflows of editors and content managers. Additionally, multiple interfaces can be created for a single data model to cater to different stakeholders, ensuring that every key user group has the tools they need to work effectively.

features.name: Bill of Materials (BOM) Management
features.headline: Comprehensive Bill of Materials (BOM) Management
features.shortDescription: Streamline and optimize product data with comprehensive Bill of Materials (BOM) management in Pimcore's PIM. This feature supports BOMs, explosion drawings, and granular product relations, ensuring precise data integration across channels.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore's Bill of Materials (BOM) management feature in the Product Information Management (PIM) system is engineered to address the intricate demands of modern product data management. This feature supports the comprehensive creation and management of BOMs, allowing businesses to define, manage, and maintain a detailed structure of components, subassemblies, and finished goods. With the ability to include explosion drawings and link them directly to products, users can visualize and navigate the relationships within a product's structure more effectively.

The feature also allows for highly granular relationships between BOM products, ensuring that all dependencies and interactions are accurately represented. Data models within Pimcore are perfectly aligned to match BOM data, providing a seamless and cohesive integration across the platform. This robust BOM management capability is also versatile, extending its utility to the development of configurators and CPQ (Configure, Price, Quote) applications, making it an indispensable tool for businesses managing complex products and variants.

By leveraging Pimcore’s BOM management, companies can enhance their product lifecycle management, improve data accuracy, and streamline operations, all while ensuring that product data is consistently accurate and accessible across all distribution and sales channels. This not only reduces errors and improves compliance but also accelerates time-to-market for new products and configurations.
features.description: Pimcore’s Bill of Materials (BOM) management within its Product Information Management (PIM) system offers a robust solution for structuring and organizing complex product data. This feature supports the creation and management of BOMs, explosion drawings, and the establishment of granular relationships between BOM components. Additionally, data models are perfectly tailored to match BOM data, ensuring seamless integration. Pimcore’s BOM management also serves as a foundational tool for building configurators and CPQ applications, allowing businesses to handle complex product configurations with precision and ease.

features.name: EU Digital Product Passport (DPP) Management
features.headline: Prepare for the EU Digital Product Passport with Pimcore
features.shortDescription: Pimcore enables you to kickstart your EU Digital Product Passport (DPP) initiative by building a comprehensive, end-to-end product graph. This prepares your business for future regulatory requirements, ensuring you stay ahead of the curve, even before the final standards are set.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore is at the forefront of helping businesses prepare for the upcoming EU Digital Product Passport (DPP) requirements. While the final regulatory formats, interfaces, and definitions are yet to be finalized, Pimcore allows you to begin building your product graph in a comprehensive, end-to-end manner. By starting this initiative now, you lay a solid foundation that will facilitate easier adaptation to the finalized DPP standards when they are released.

Pimcore’s platform supports the creation of a detailed product graph that captures all necessary product information, ensuring that data is structured, accurate, and ready to meet future regulatory demands. This approach not only future-proofs your business against upcoming legal requirements but also enhances transparency, traceability, and sustainability of your products. By being proactive, you reduce the risk of non-compliance and gain a competitive advantage, positioning your business as a leader in sustainability and regulatory adherence. Pimcore’s flexible and scalable architecture ensures that no matter how the DPP standards evolve, your data remains adaptable, complete, and compliant, enabling you to seamlessly transition into full DPP compliance as soon as the final requirements are set.
features.description: Pimcore provides the tools necessary to start your EU Digital Product Passport (DPP) initiative today, despite the finalization of regulatory formats and interfaces still pending. By leveraging Pimcore’s powerful data management capabilities, you can begin building a detailed and comprehensive product graph that will serve as the backbone for your DPP. This proactive approach ensures that your business is well-prepared for future compliance, allowing you to adapt swiftly once the official standards are established.

features.name: Relation Management
features.headline: Build Powerful Data Relationships Across Domains
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s data relation modeling allows you to create intricate, graph-centric data models that connect entities across PIM, MDM, DAM, and DXP. This powerful feature ensures a single point of truth by linking everything without duplicating data, facilitating efficient management and seamless integration.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s Modeling Data Relations feature is integral to its advanced data management capabilities, offering businesses the ability to design and manage complex, interconnected data models across various domains like PIM, MDM, DAM, and DXP. This feature allows users to create graph-centric models where every piece of data can relate to any other, establishing a true single point of truth within the organization.

Using Pimcore’s extensive suite of relational data types, including objects, object bricks, field collections, and advanced many-to-one and many-to-many relationships, users can craft detailed data relationships that reflect their specific business requirements. The flexibility of this system means you can build a knowledge graph that spans across your entire data ecosystem, linking digital assets like images, PDFs, and videos to products, categories, and other entities without needing to duplicate data.

This capability extends across Pimcore’s domains, allowing you to relate everything to everything else. For example, you can associate a digital asset in DAM with a product category in PIM, or link a landing page in DXP to a master data record in MDM. This interconnectivity eliminates redundancy, ensuring that all data is managed efficiently and consistently across your business operations.

Additionally, Pimcore’s support for multi-medial relations makes it easy to associate products with various media types, enhancing the richness and utility of your data. You can also create connections between products for cross-selling, up-selling, and more, or group products into bundles or packages, optimizing your product management strategies.

By incorporating these robust relational data types, Pimcore empowers businesses to maintain data integrity, streamline management processes, and make informed decisions based on a comprehensive view of related data entities. For more details on Pimcore’s relational data types and their applications, you can explore the Pimcore documentation.
features.description: Pimcore’s Modeling Data Relations is a core feature designed to optimize data management by creating sophisticated, graph-centric models that interconnect entities across different domains, including PIM, MDM, DAM, and DXP. By leveraging Pimcore’s advanced relational data types, such as object bricks, field collections, and many-to-one/many-to-many relationships, users can build complex data structures tailored to their industry needs. This system allows for seamless connections between digital assets, products, categories, and more, eliminating the need for data duplication and ensuring consistency. Pimcore supports multi-medial relations, enabling businesses to link products with images, PDFs, videos, and other digital assets, creating a unified, scalable, and efficient data management framework.

features.name: Customer Data Modeling
features.headline: Flexible Customer Data Modeling for Personalized Insights
features.shortDescription: Pimcore CDP’s Customer Data Modeling allows businesses to create detailed, adaptable customer data models that capture interactions and attributes for tailored insights, enabling personalized experiences across industries and business domains.
features.longDescription: Pimcore CDP’s Customer Data Modeling feature enables businesses to create versatile, high-resolution data models that capture each interaction and customer attribute relevant to their operations. Built for adaptability, this feature allows businesses to tailor models to suit any industry-specific needs, from retail and finance to B2B manufacturing, supporting a holistic view of customer data that drives engagement and personalization. As business operations evolve, Pimcore’s data models can be continuously updated to include new attributes, insights, and behaviors, ensuring that data remains aligned with current and future processes. This ongoing flexibility enhances the quality and depth of insights available, allowing companies to deliver targeted, relevant customer experiences based on a rich understanding of individual preferences and engagement histories. By providing a robust foundation for customer data, Pimcore empowers businesses to make informed, data-driven decisions and foster stronger, more personalized relationships.
features.description: Pimcore CDP’s Customer Data Modeling provides businesses with the flexibility to design and maintain in-depth customer data models that capture every interaction, behavior, and attribute, allowing for precise insights and highly personalized experiences. This capability is ideal for any industry, enabling organizations to adapt models to current and evolving needs, creating a comprehensive view of customer journeys that supports strategic decision-making and dynamic engagement.

features.name: Hierarchy and Catalog Management
features.headline: Flexible Hierarchy & Catalog Management
features.shortDescription: Pimcore's Hierarchy and Catalog Management feature allows you to create multiple, complex category and product hierarchies, and manage multiple catalogs effortlessly. This flexibility reduces data maintenance efforts and ensures consistent data inheritance across all output channels.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s Hierarchy and Catalog Management in PIM and MDM offers a highly flexible solution for organizing and managing your product and category data. This feature enables the creation of multiple additional category and product hierarchies through the use of relation attributes, allowing you to customize structures that meet the specific needs of various output channels. With no restrictions on hierarchy depth, you can build intricate networks of categories that reflect the complexity of your product offerings. Furthermore, it supports the management of multiple catalogs, ensuring that each one can be tailored to different markets, channels, or user groups.

The system’s main taxonomy serves as the backbone for data inheritance, allowing attribute values to be passed down through hierarchies automatically. This minimizes the need for repetitive data entry and reduces the overall effort required for data maintenance. By centralizing and streamlining these processes, you achieve greater data consistency and accuracy across all platforms, leading to more efficient PIM and MDM operations. Whether you are managing a global product portfolio or simply organizing complex product data, Pimcore’s Hierarchy and Catalog Management feature provides the tools you need to maintain control and flexibility.
features.description: Pimcore’s Hierarchy and Catalog Management feature empowers you to define multiple, complex category and product hierarchies using relation attributes, with no limits on hierarchy depth. You can manage multiple catalogs and tailor different hierarchies or category trees for each output channel, all while maintaining one main taxonomy for seamless data inheritance. This capability significantly reduces data maintenance efforts and ensures consistency across all platforms, enabling efficient product information management (PIM) and master data management (MDM).

features.name: Data Security, Masking & Encrypting
features.headline: Robust Data Security with Advanced Encryption
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s Data Security capabilities ensure critical data is fully protected through encryption and masking. With options for field-level and object-level encryption at rest, plus infrastructure-wide encryption, your data remains secure, compliant, and trustworthy across all use cases.
features.longDescription:
With Pimcore’s comprehensive Data Security, Masking & Encrypting feature, businesses gain a robust toolkit for protecting sensitive data within their data models. Designed to address the complex security requirements of modern organizations, this capability provides multi-layered encryption, allowing encryption at rest at both the single-field and entire object levels, as well as at the infrastructure level. Field-level encryption enables the protection of specific sensitive data points such as personal identifiers, while object-level encryption allows full protection of complete data objects, which is ideal for industries requiring stringent data governance. Infrastructure-wide encryption fortifies the underlying systems, adding another layer of defense.

Additionally, this feature offers data masking options, effectively concealing sensitive information while enabling safe data usage for testing, analytics, or collaboration without compromising privacy. By maintaining strict compliance with security standards, Pimcore’s Data Security and Encryption tools enable companies to confidently manage and scale their data operations while minimizing risk and protecting customer trust.
features.description: Pimcore’s Data Security, Masking, and Encrypting features provide a multi-tiered approach to data protection, making it easier for organizations to secure sensitive information. Offering encryption at both the single-field and entire object levels, data remains secure and compliant at rest, enhancing privacy across the organization. This capability also supports encryption at the infrastructure level, providing an additional layer of security across the platform. These measures protect data from unauthorized access while meeting stringent industry regulations, ensuring that your business can safely manage data across diverse environments and applications.

benefits.name: Enhanced Data Protection
benefits.description: Pimcore’s encryption features offer a robust framework for data security, allowing businesses to apply encryption at both the field and object levels, along with infrastructure-wide protection. This layered approach ensures sensitive data is safeguarded, meeting industry standards and enhancing regulatory compliance.

benefits.name: Improved Compliance and Risk Mitigation
benefits.description: With comprehensive encryption and masking, Pimcore’s Data Security tools help businesses easily meet regulatory standards, reducing risks associated with non-compliance and securing sensitive data against breaches. These tools provide flexible options to meet specific industry and regional standards, making it easy to demonstrate compliance in audits.

benefits.name: Flexible Data Masking for Secure Collaboration
benefits.description: Pimcore’s data masking capabilities enable businesses to collaborate and conduct data-driven tasks securely, providing access to essential information while concealing sensitive fields. This capability facilitates safe testing, analytics, and cross-departmental projects without exposing protected data.

features.name: Visual Data Modeling
features.headline: Smart and Customizable Data Modeling
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s Visual Data Modeling allows users to easily create, modify, and customize data models to fit any industry needs. With over 45 data entry components, users can design their data models and editing interfaces visually, ensuring flexibility and scalability without limits on complexity or volume.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s Visual Data Modeling is a revolutionary feature that simplifies the creation and management of complex data models, tailored to meet the specific needs of any industry. This tool allows users to design their data models directly within Pimcore using a visual editor, which offers more than 45 versatile data entry components. Whether you're dealing with extensive datasets or intricate relationships between data points, Pimcore's Visual Data Modeling handles it all with ease, ensuring that your data models are as unique and detailed as your business demands.

One of the standout aspects of this feature is its ability to adapt and evolve. Data models are not static; they can be modified throughout their lifecycle to accommodate new requirements or changes in the business environment. As soon as a data model is created, Pimcore automatically prepares all related APIs and integrates with the Pimcore Datahub, ensuring that the new model is ready for immediate use across the platform.

Furthermore, Pimcore supports the versioning, importing, and exporting of data model definitions, allowing for better control and flexibility in data management. The integration with Pimcore Copilot offers an additional layer of efficiency by assisting users in the data model creation process, making even the most complex configurations more accessible and manageable.
features.description: Pimcore’s Visual Data Modeling feature provides a powerful and intuitive way to create and customize data models directly within the system. Users can visually design data models, incorporating attributes and relationships, using over 45 data entry components. This flexibility allows the creation of complex and industry-specific data models. Once created, these models can be modified over time, and are instantly integrated with APIs and Pimcore Datahub, ensuring seamless data management and accessibility. Additionally, data models can be versioned, imported, exported, and even generated with the help of Pimcore Copilot, streamlining the entire process.

features.name: Customer Activities Modeling
features.headline: Customer Activity Modeling for Personalized, Event-Driven Engagement
features.shortDescription: Pimcore CDP’s Customer Activity Modeling captures event-based customer activities, allowing businesses to track and aggregate interactions for personalized marketing triggers and automation, enhancing the user journey with dynamic, data-driven engagement.
features.longDescription: Pimcore’s Customer Activity Modeling feature offers an advanced, event-based system that captures every customer interaction or event essential to the user journey. Whether customers are browsing products, engaging with content, or making purchases, these activities can be tracked directly in Pimcore or aggregated from third-party systems to create a unified view of customer engagement. Each tracked activity provides valuable insights that support highly personalized triggers for marketing automation and other engagement strategies, enabling businesses to respond in real time to customer actions. This level of detailed activity tracking allows for the creation of dynamic, data-driven experiences that adapt to individual preferences and behaviors, making customer interactions more meaningful and impactful. By leveraging activity data to drive timely, relevant engagement, Pimcore empowers businesses to enhance customer satisfaction, build loyalty, and create a seamless journey that resonates with each user.
features.description: With Pimcore’s Customer Activity Modeling, businesses can capture and aggregate any customer activity or event relevant to the user journey. This flexible, event-based system allows for personalized engagement by tracking interactions in real time within Pimcore or through third-party integrations, supporting targeted triggers for marketing automation and personalization that respond to customer behaviors.

features.name: Channel Management
features.headline: Seamless Multi-Channel Content Management
features.shortDescription: Pimcore's Channel Management in PIM & MDM enables businesses to efficiently manage and syndicate content across multiple channels. By tailoring data to each channel's unique requirements and target audience, businesses can deliver personalized, impactful product experiences with minimal maintenance effort.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s Channel Management within PIM & MDM is designed to streamline the complex task of managing and syndicating content across multiple channels, each with its unique requirements and target audiences. Whether delivering product information to marketplaces, e-commerce platforms, social media channels, or corporate websites, Pimcore enables businesses to customize data and content to meet the specific demands of each channel.

This feature supports the maintenance of different data sets, media formats, and dimensions tailored to the needs of various channels, ensuring that content is always optimized for its intended platform. Additionally, Pimcore provides tools for managing lifecycle states and defining publishing rules and flags per channel, allowing for precise control over when and how content is published.

Moreover, the integration of generative AI via Pimcore Copilot allows for advanced personalization of content, ensuring that messaging is adapted to the diverse target groups encountered on different platforms. This personalized approach enhances user engagement by delivering content in the language and style most relevant to each audience. Pimcore's flexible data modeling capabilities, supported by variant management, data inheritance, and additional attributes, reduce maintenance efforts while ensuring that all content is consistently accurate and up-to-date. The result is a powerful and efficient multi-channel management system that helps businesses deliver personalized, high-quality product experiences across all digital touchpoints.
features.description: Pimcore’s Channel Management feature within PIM & MDM empowers businesses to deliver tailored content across a wide array of channels, including marketplaces, websites, social media, and e-commerce portals. This feature allows for the management of different data sets, formats, and media requirements specific to each channel, ensuring optimal content delivery. With built-in tools for lifecycle management, publishing rules, and data inheritance, Pimcore minimizes maintenance efforts while maximizing the personalization and effectiveness of content, especially through the use of generative AI and Pimcore Copilot for content customization.

features.name: Metadata Management
features.headline: Comprehensive and Intelligent Metadata Management
features.shortDescription: Pimcore's DAM Metadata Management, enhanced by the AI-powered Pimcore Copilot, automates the enrichment of digital asset metadata. This feature combines robust manual controls with AI/ML-driven automation, ensuring your assets are perfectly categorized and easily accessible across all platforms.
features.longDescription: Pimcore DAM Metadata Management, enhanced by the innovative Pimcore Copilot, brings the future of digital asset management to your fingertips. This feature enables comprehensive management of metadata while introducing AI-driven automation to the process. With Pimcore Copilot, AI/ML algorithms analyze and enrich metadata, automatically tagging and categorizing assets based on predefined standards and learned patterns. This automation ensures that metadata is consistent and accurate across all assets, drastically reducing the time and effort required for manual data entry. By combining human oversight with intelligent automation, this feature significantly enhances the discoverability and organization of digital assets, supporting more efficient workflows and better content management across all channels.
features.description: Pimcore DAM Metadata Management now includes Pimcore Copilot, an AI/ML-powered assistant that automates metadata enrichment. This powerful combination allows businesses to manage complex metadata structures while leveraging AI to automatically generate, tag, and optimize metadata. The result is a streamlined process where assets are consistently categorized, tagged, and easily searchable, boosting efficiency and reducing manual effort.

features.name: Multi-Lingual Data Management
features.headline: Effortlessly Manage Multilingual Content
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s Multilingual Data Management enables seamless management and translation of content across multiple languages. With support for localized attributes, fallback languages, and advanced AI/ML-powered translation management via Pimcore Copilot, it ensures global content is consistent, accurate, and easy to manage across all markets.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s Multilingual Data Management offers a comprehensive solution for businesses looking to efficiently manage and translate content across multiple languages and regions. The system’s capabilities include managing localized attributes, supporting all languages—including country-specific variations—and offering fallback languages to minimize translation workload.

One of the standout features of Pimcore’s multilingual management is its integration with Translation Management Systems (TMS). This integration enables seamless translation workflows, ensuring that your content is translated quickly and accurately while maintaining consistency across all platforms. Additionally, Pimcore Copilot enhances this process by providing AI/ML-powered automatic translation management. By leveraging machine learning algorithms, Pimcore Copilot can automatically translate content, reducing the time and resources needed for manual translation efforts.

Pimcore also supports Localized Fields, which allow you to manage content variations specific to each language directly within your data model. This feature is essential for maintaining consistency and accuracy across all markets, ensuring that your content is appropriately localized to meet the needs of your global audience. The Shared Translations feature centralizes common translations, reducing redundancy and ensuring that frequently used terms and phrases are consistently applied across the entire platform.

To further simplify content management, Pimcore offers fallback languages, which automatically fill in gaps where specific translations might be missing, reducing the need for exhaustive translation efforts. The platform’s robust permission system allows businesses to control who can edit or access language-specific content, ensuring that only authorized users can make changes. This safeguards the integrity and accuracy of your multilingual data.

Pimcore’s Multilingual Data Management supports a wide range of data types and is designed to be scalable, making it suitable for any domain or industry. Whether managing product information, digital assets, or customer data, Pimcore ensures that your global content strategy is efficient, accurate, and adaptable to the needs of your business.
features.description: Pimcore’s Multilingual Data Management is designed to streamline the complex process of managing and translating content across multiple languages. It supports localized attributes, country-specific language variations, and includes powerful tools like Localized Fields and Shared Translations. The system integrates with Translation Management Systems (TMS) for seamless translation workflows and leverages Pimcore Copilot’s AI/ML capabilities for automatic translation management. Fallback languages reduce the need for redundant translations, and a robust permission system ensures that only authorized users can modify language-specific content, making it easier to maintain accuracy and consistency across global markets.

features.name: Consent Management
features.headline: Comprehensive Consent Management for Compliance and Trust
features.shortDescription: Pimcore CDP’s Consent Management feature enables seamless integration with third-party solutions, managing customer consent and preferences in line with regulatory requirements and maintaining an audit trail to ensure transparency and compliance.
features.longDescription: Pimcore CDP’s Consent Management feature empowers businesses to manage customer consents and preferences effectively while ensuring adherence to evolving data privacy regulations. By supporting seamless integration with third-party consent management tools, Pimcore enables centralized oversight and streamlined handling of user permissions, from data collection to processing and storage. With a comprehensive audit trail tracking each consent action, businesses maintain a secure and transparent record of customer approvals, allowing them to quickly demonstrate compliance with GDPR, CCPA, and other legal standards. This reliable consent management system not only simplifies regulatory adherence but also instills confidence in customers, who can manage their preferences transparently and trust that their data is being handled responsibly.
features.description: Pimcore CDP’s Consent Management provides businesses with a robust system to manage customer consents and preferences securely, supporting integration with third-party consent solutions and tracking an audit trail for compliance. This capability ensures businesses can align with data privacy regulations, fostering customer trust and upholding transparency across all interactions.

features.name: Multi-Domain Data Models
features.headline: Flexible Data Modeling for Any Industry
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s advanced data modeling capabilities allow you to efficiently create, extend, and scale data models for any domain or industry. Whether in retail, manufacturing, finance, or travel, Pimcore handles any type, complexity, and volume of data, ensuring high performance and flexibility in complex business environments.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s Data Modeling for Different Domains and Industries is designed to meet the diverse needs of businesses across various sectors, offering a level of flexibility and scalability that is unmatched in the market. Whether you operate in retail, wholesale, manufacturing, finance, travel, or any other industry, Pimcore’s advanced data modeling capabilities allow you to efficiently create, extend, and manage data models that align with your specific business requirements.

One of the key strengths of Pimcore’s data modeling is its ability to handle any type of data—structured, unstructured, or binary—regardless of the complexity or volume. The platform is built on a graph-like, high-performance data model that supports complex relationships between entities, making it possible to manage large-scale data environments with ease. This architecture allows businesses to create intricate data models that reflect their real-world processes and relationships, providing a true single point of truth across the organization.

Pimcore’s flexibility is particularly evident in its ability to scale. Customers managing millions of complex records, digital assets, and attributes in highly dynamic business environments rely on Pimcore’s robust infrastructure to ensure their data models remain performant and responsive as their needs grow. This scalability is crucial for businesses operating in sectors with large data volumes or rapidly changing data requirements, as it ensures that their data models can evolve alongside their operations without sacrificing performance.

Additionally, Pimcore’s data modeling capabilities are not confined to any single domain or industry. The platform’s adaptable nature means that it can be tailored to fit the specific needs of any business, whether it’s creating a detailed product catalog for a retail company, managing complex financial data, or organizing extensive digital assets in a manufacturing environment. Pimcore provides the tools necessary to build data models that support your unique workflows, making it an essential component of any modern data management strategy.
features.description: Pimcore offers unparalleled flexibility in data modeling, enabling businesses to create and manage data models for any domain or industry—be it retail, wholesale, manufacturing, travel, or finance. With its advanced capabilities, Pimcore efficiently handles structured, unstructured, and binary data, no matter the complexity or scale. The platform’s graph-like high-performance data model supports intricate relationships between entities, allowing businesses to manage millions of records, digital assets, and attributes seamlessly. Pimcore’s core strength lies in its adaptability: Any Data. Any Data Model. No matter the industry, Pimcore empowers you to build and manage data models that fit your unique business needs.

features.name: Powerful and Flexible Data Model
features.headline: Unleash the Full Potential of Your Data
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s powerful and flexible data models allow you to manage and relate any entity across PIM, MDM, DAM, CDP, DXP, and E-Commerce. With advanced data types like object bricks, field collections, and key-value stores, you can create scalable, multi-lingual models that bridge data and experience management for any domain or industry.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s Powerful and Flexible Data Models are at the heart of its platform, providing unparalleled versatility in managing and relating data across various domains, including PIM, MDM, DAM, CDP, DXP, and E-Commerce. These models are not limited to products and categories but can encompass any entity, making them applicable to a wide range of industries and use cases.

What sets Pimcore apart is its ability to bridge data management with experience management, allowing for a seamless flow of information that supports both backend data operations and frontend user experiences. This is achieved through the use of advanced data types, such as object bricks, field collections, and key-value stores, which offer maximum flexibility in how data is structured and managed. These data types allow you to customize models to fit your specific needs, ensuring that your data infrastructure can grow and adapt as your business evolves.

Moreover, Pimcore’s data models are inherently multi-lingual, making them suitable for global enterprises that require content and data management in multiple languages. The platform supports more than 45 different data types, including relational and multi-medial types, which means that you can build complex, interrelated models that incorporate everything from text and numbers to images, videos, and documents.

As your data needs grow, so too can your data models. Pimcore’s scalable architecture ensures that your models can expand over time, accommodating new entities, relationships, and data types without compromising performance. This flexibility is crucial for businesses that need to stay agile and responsive to changing market demands.
features.description: Pimcore’s Powerful and Flexible Data Models enable you to manage and relate any entity, whether it’s products, categories, or other forms of data across PIM, MDM, DAM, CDP, DXP, and E-Commerce. These models bridge the gap between data and experience management, allowing for seamless integration and interaction. Advanced data types, such as object bricks, field collections, and key-value stores, provide maximum flexibility, while multi-lingual support ensures global usability. With more than 45 different data types, including relational and multi-medial types, these models can scale and evolve over time, making them suitable for any domain or industry.

features.name: Enterprise Metadata
features.headline: Advanced Metadata Management for Enterprise DAM
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s Enterprise Metadata feature elevates DAM capabilities with flexible metadata structures and data objects for streamlined visualization and management. With customizable class definitions and advanced data types, it supports rich, multi-layered metadata management for complex asset requirements.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s Enterprise Metadata feature in DAM provides an advanced framework for defining, managing, and visualizing complex metadata for digital assets. This feature introduces a new level of flexibility through customizable Asset class definitions, which enable businesses to structure metadata similarly to Pimcore’s class definitions for data objects. Enterprises can assign multiple metadata schemas to a single asset, allowing different layers of contextual data that support diverse use cases and asset types. This multi-schema capability is particularly useful for organizations managing varied content types or metadata requirements, as it allows them to adapt metadata structures dynamically.

In addition to traditional metadata fields, Enterprise Metadata supports advanced data types like multi-select options, many-to-many relationships, and calculated values, enriching metadata capabilities and enabling more granular data control. With metadata stored alongside standard asset metadata, Pimcore ensures seamless integration, allowing metadata to be easily accessible and managed within the DAM system. This feature transforms digital asset metadata into a powerful tool for enhancing searchability, relevance, and context, making it easier for enterprises to organize, retrieve, and leverage their digital assets effectively across complex workflows and digital channels.
features.description: Pimcore’s Enterprise Metadata feature offers a robust solution for managing and structuring DAM metadata, providing enterprises with flexibility and power to handle complex metadata needs. Users can define metadata structures using Asset class definitions, similar to Pimcore’s class definition system, and assign multiple metadata schemas to each asset. Supporting advanced data types like multi-select, many-to-many relations, and calculated values, this feature enhances the organization, retrieval, and contextualization of digital assets. With all metadata stored in the same secure storage system as standard asset metadata, enterprises achieve consistency and scalability for efficient DAM operations.

benefits.name: Enhanced Asset Organization and Searchability
benefits.description: With advanced metadata structures, Pimcore’s Enterprise Metadata feature enhances asset organization by supporting detailed, layered metadata fields. This enables businesses to create precise, contextual metadata, making assets more searchable and easier to locate in extensive digital libraries.

benefits.name: Flexibility for Complex Metadata Requirements
benefits.description: The ability to assign multiple metadata schemas to a single asset provides flexibility for organizations with complex data requirements. Pimcore’s Enterprise Metadata supports varied use cases by allowing teams to define unique metadata structures, ensuring precise metadata handling across asset types.

benefits.name: Scalable and Consistent Metadata Storage
benefits.description: Pimcore’s advanced metadata is stored alongside standard metadata, providing consistency and scalability in metadata management. This unified storage system supports efficient access, secure storage, and seamless integration of metadata across the entire DAM, making it ideal for enterprise-scale digital asset management.

features.name: Classification System Management
features.headline: Unified Management of Industry Classifications
features.shortDescription: Pimcore's Industry Classifications feature supports global standards like ETIM, eCl@ss, GS1, and UNSPSC, enabling businesses to efficiently categorize products and data across multiple industry frameworks within a single, unified platform.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s Industry Classifications feature is designed to simplify the management of multiple global classification systems across your product and data management workflows. Supporting key standards such as ETIM, eCl@ss, GS1, and UNSPSC, this feature allows businesses to categorize and organize products and data according to various industry frameworks within a single, unified platform.

The Classification Store in Pimcore serves as a centralized repository where users can define and manage these classifications, ensuring that product information is consistently and accurately categorized across all channels and touchpoints. This capability is especially important for businesses operating in diverse markets or industries where adherence to specific classification standards is mandatory. By integrating multiple classification systems into one platform, Pimcore reduces the complexity of maintaining compliance and streamlines the process of managing product data, ultimately leading to more efficient operations and better alignment with industry regulations. This feature ensures that your business can easily adapt to different market requirements, maintain data consistency, and enhance product traceability across the entire supply chain.
features.description: Pimcore’s Industry Classifications feature allows businesses to manage and apply global classification standards, including ETIM, eCl@ss, GS1, and UNSPSC, all within a single platform. Through the Classification Store, users can organize and categorize products and data according to these industry standards, ensuring consistency, compliance, and streamlined operations across all channels. This feature is crucial for businesses that need to adhere to multiple industry standards, providing a comprehensive solution for managing complex classification requirements efficiently.

features.name: Variant Management
features.headline: Effortlessly Manage Complex Product Variants
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s Product Variant Management allows seamless handling of complex product structures with limitless hierarchies. Supporting diverse industry needs, this feature uses data inheritance and hierarchy management to simplify variant setup and maintenance, ensuring consistent, efficient data handling for even the most intricate product portfolios.
features.longDescription: Pimcore’s Product Variant Management feature is a robust solution tailored to handle the complexities of products with multiple variants across PIM and E-Commerce channels. Offering unlimited hierarchical levels, it supports the creation, configuration, and management of highly structured variant models, making it ideal for businesses needing to deliver precise product information in high-volume environments. By leveraging data inheritance, shared attributes are automatically populated across variants, reducing data duplication and ensuring consistency. Teams can configure specific characteristics unique to each variant without needing to duplicate the entire dataset, thus improving efficiency and accuracy across product data. Compatible with diverse industry standards, this tool easily integrates into various business domains, allowing companies to scale and adapt their product data without sacrificing quality or efficiency. This capability enhances the user experience with reliable, detailed, and uniform product information that supports enriched browsing and purchasing interactions.
features.description: Pimcore’s Product Variant Management streamlines the complexities of managing diverse product versions. With support for intricate hierarchies, this capability handles an unlimited number of product variants, ensuring consistency and efficiency across PIM and E-Commerce channels. Leveraging data inheritance, it simplifies data entry and updates by automatically populating shared attributes across variants, allowing teams to focus on unique specifications. Designed for compatibility across industries, this flexible solution easily adapts to dynamic business needs, improving both operational efficiency and the quality of product data on digital platforms.

capabilities.name: Data Management
capabilities.headline: Data Management
capabilities.shortDescription: Pimcore unifies structured, unstructured, and binary data into customizable models, forming the backbone of a smart data management strategy. This powerful framework is central to Pimcore, making it the ideal solution for managing any data type, complexity, or volume.
capabilities.longDescription: At the core of Pimcore’s platform lies a revolutionary data management framework that unifies all types of data—structured, unstructured, and binary—into highly customizable and interconnected models. This comprehensive approach enables businesses to develop a smart data management strategy that can adapt to any level of complexity or scale. Pimcore’s rich data management capabilities provide the necessary tools to efficiently handle vast amounts of diverse data, ensuring that all information is accessible, connected, and usable. By breaking down traditional data silos and integrating all data into a cohesive system, Pimcore not only simplifies data management but also enhances the strategic value of your data. Whether you're managing complex product information, digital assets, or customer data, Pimcore's flexible and scalable models ensure that your data management practices are optimized for efficiency, accuracy, and future growth.

features.name: Data Exploration
features.headline: Effortlessly Explore and Navigate Your Data
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s Data Exploration feature empowers users to find and navigate content seamlessly. Utilize search and advanced search, navigate with trees, open content by IDs, find items within trees, and view data in grids or detailed pages for an intuitive data exploration experience.
features.longDescription:
Navigating and finding content within a complex data environment can be challenging, but Pimcore’s Data Exploration feature is designed to simplify this process, providing users with a variety of powerful tools to locate and access data efficiently. Whether you’re working with extensive data repositories or need to pinpoint specific information quickly, Pimcore offers a range of options to suit your needs.

At the core of this feature is Pimcore’s search and advanced search capabilities. The basic search function allows you to locate content quickly by entering relevant keywords or phrases, while the advanced search offers more granular control by enabling you to apply filters and criteria tailored to your specific needs. This ensures that you can narrow down results effectively and find exactly what you’re looking for, even within large and complex datasets.

In addition to search, navigation options like trees provide an intuitive way to explore data hierarchies. These customizable trees allow you to visualize and navigate through different layers of your data, making it easier to understand the structure and relationships between data items. Whether you’re organizing products in a catalog, managing digital assets, or exploring customer data, tree navigation offers a clear and organized view of your content.

For users who prefer direct access, Pimcore also supports opening content by IDs. This feature allows you to jump straight to a specific data item by entering its unique identifier, saving time and streamlining access, particularly in scenarios where you already know the exact item you need.

The find in tree option is another powerful tool, allowing you to locate specific items within your navigation trees. This feature is especially useful when dealing with large, complex hierarchies where manual navigation might be cumbersome. Simply enter the criteria, and Pimcore will highlight the relevant item within the tree, making it easy to find and access.

Once you’ve located your data, Pimcore provides flexible viewing options. Data can be displayed in grid views, offering an Excel-like interface where you can sort, filter, and edit multiple records simultaneously. This is particularly useful for managing large volumes of data, as it provides a clear and organized overview of all relevant items.

For more detailed exploration, opening detail pages allows you to view and edit individual data items comprehensively. These pages provide all the information and tools you need to manage each item, from basic attributes to complex relationships and metadata.

Pimcore’s Data Exploration feature is designed to make finding, navigating, and managing your content as straightforward and efficient as possible. Whether you’re dealing with large datasets, hierarchical structures, or specific items, these tools ensure that you can explore your data with ease, enhancing productivity and empowering you to make informed decisions based on accurate and accessible information.
features.description: Pimcore’s Data Exploration feature offers a robust set of tools to help you find and navigate content efficiently. With powerful search and advanced search capabilities, you can quickly locate specific data items. Navigate through data using customizable trees, open content directly by IDs, or find items within hierarchical trees. Data can be displayed in intuitive grid views or detailed pages, providing flexible and comprehensive access to your content. This feature ensures that you can explore your data with ease, whether you’re managing large datasets or searching for specific information.

features.name: Asset Preview
features.headline: Comprehensive Media Asset Preview for 200+ Formats
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s Media Asset Preview feature provides seamless, in-platform previews for over 200 file formats, including documents, images, videos, audio, and specialized formats like 3D and AR. Customizable for industry-specific needs, this feature ensures smooth, accurate visualization of diverse media assets.
features.longDescription:
The Media Asset Preview feature in Pimcore offers an advanced, flexible solution for viewing a vast array of media files directly within the platform. Supporting more than 200 different file formats, this feature allows teams to preview assets such as Microsoft Office documents, Adobe PDFs, bitmap and vector images, as well as video and audio files without leaving Pimcore. This wide compatibility simplifies asset management, enabling users to verify, select, and organize content efficiently, whether it’s product images, marketing materials, or technical documentation.

Additionally, Pimcore’s preview functionality is extendable, allowing businesses to incorporate custom or industry-specific file formats for specialized requirements. With support for 3D and AR files, the platform accommodates innovative content types that are increasingly relevant in fields like eCommerce, real estate, and manufacturing. By offering comprehensive preview capabilities, Pimcore ensures that organizations across DAM, PIM, DXP, and other domains can work confidently with diverse media assets, reducing dependency on third-party tools and improving workflow efficiency.
features.description: Pimcore’s Media Asset Preview supports instant, in-platform previews for a wide range of media and document types, offering compatibility with over 200 file formats. From Microsoft Office and Adobe PDFs to bitmap and vector images, videos, and sound files, this feature enables teams to view and manage assets directly within Pimcore. Extendable to support industry-specific or custom formats, including 3D and AR, the preview functionality provides comprehensive versatility and accuracy for diverse media requirements. Ideal for teams across domains like DAM, PIM, and DXP, this feature allows businesses to manage and assess assets efficiently without needing external viewers.

benefits.name: Streamlined Workflow with In-Platform Previews
benefits.description: By supporting in-platform previews for diverse file types, Pimcore’s Media Asset Preview feature streamlines workflows and enhances productivity. Teams can view, assess, and organize media assets immediately, eliminating the need for separate tools and reducing time spent on asset management.

benefits.name: Versatile Media Support for Comprehensive Management
benefits.description: Pimcore’s Media Asset Preview feature supports an extensive range of file types, including documents, images, videos, and audio, making it a versatile tool for managing diverse media. This flexibility ensures that users can easily view, organize, and assess content regardless of file format.

benefits.name: Extendable Previews for Specialized Formats
benefits.description: With support for custom, 3D, and AR file previews, Pimcore’s Media Asset Preview feature is ideal for industries that require unique content formats. This extendable capability enables businesses to seamlessly manage innovative and specialized media assets within Pimcore.

features.name: Variant Management
features.headline: Efficient and Intelligent Variant Management
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s Product Variant Management allows seamless handling of unlimited product hierarchies and variants. Through powerful content inheritance and dynamic variant generation, users can efficiently manage variations like color, size, and type, while reducing data maintenance efforts. Pimcore Copilot further automates variant generation based on predefined rules.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s Product Variant Management in the PIM context is designed to handle even the most complex product structures with ease and precision. It enables users to manage an unlimited number of product variants, including nested hierarchies, which is essential for illustrating variations like colors, sizes, and types. The feature of content inheritance is particularly powerful, allowing attributes and information to be inherited across variants. This significantly reduces the effort required for data maintenance, as common data only needs to be updated in one place.

Moreover, Pimcore supports dynamic variant generation based on CPQ (Configure, Price, Quote) configurations, allowing for real-time creation and management of variants that adapt to specific configurations. The built-in audit trail ensures transparency and accountability by tracking all changes made to the product variants.

One of the standout capabilities is the integration with Pimcore Copilot, which can generate variants almost automatically. When combined with a specific ruleset, Pimcore Copilot can fully automate the variant generation process, further enhancing efficiency and ensuring consistency across all product offerings.
features.description: In Pimcore's PIM, Product Variant Management is a critical feature that simplifies the handling of complex product structures and variations. The system supports unlimited nested hierarchies, allowing users to effectively manage and generate product variants such as different colors, sizes, and types. Content inheritance ensures that data can be reused across variants, minimizing maintenance efforts. Additionally, dynamic variants can be generated in real-time based on CPQ configurations. The Pimcore Copilot enhances this process by automating variant creation, streamlining operations, and ensuring consistency across product lines.

features.name: Recycle Bin
features.headline: Securely Manage Deleted Content
features.shortDescription: The Recycle Bin in Pimcore acts as a safeguard, allowing administrators and advanced users to recover deleted content. This tool captures any user's deleted elements, ensuring that accidental deletions can be easily reversed, though it should be handled with care due to the complexity of the restoration process.
features.longDescription: The Recycle Bin feature in Pimcore offers a robust safety mechanism for managing deleted content, but it comes with a warning. This tool is specifically designed for administrators and advanced users due to the complexity involved in the deletion and restoration processes. When a content element is deleted by any user, it is moved to the Recycle Bin instead of being permanently erased, allowing for potential recovery. However, the restoration process can be intricate, requiring a thorough understanding of Pimcore’s content structure and dependencies. Therefore, this tool should be used with caution to avoid unintended data complications. The Recycle Bin ensures that valuable content is not irrevocably lost, providing a last line of defense in content management, but it demands careful and knowledgeable handling to ensure successful recovery.
features.description: Pimcore’s Recycle Bin is a powerful administrative tool designed for advanced users and administrators. It captures and stores deleted elements, providing an opportunity to restore them if needed. However, due to the intricate nature of content deletion and restoration, this tool is recommended for use only by those with a deep understanding of the system. It ensures that no content is permanently lost, giving administrators control over data integrity while minimizing the risk of accidental data loss.

features.name: Data Governance & Compliance Management
features.headline: Ensure Data Integrity and Compliance with Robust Governance
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s Data Governance & Compliance Management feature ensures that data remains accurate, validated, and compliant during enrichment. Implement validation rules, enforce mandatory fields, and conduct privacy checks to protect personal identifiable information (PII) in line with regulations like GDPR.
features.longDescription:
In today’s data-driven world, maintaining data integrity and ensuring compliance with regulations like GDPR is more critical than ever. Pimcore’s Data Governance & Compliance Management feature provides a comprehensive suite of tools designed to enforce data accuracy and regulatory adherence throughout the data enrichment process. This feature ensures that your organization can confidently manage data while minimizing risks associated with data breaches, inaccuracies, or regulatory non-compliance.

Data validation is at the core of this feature, offering customizable validation rules for fields within your data model. These rules allow you to define specific criteria that data must meet before being accepted into the system, ensuring that all information is accurate, consistent, and reliable. Whether it’s validating numerical ranges, enforcing specific formats for text fields, or checking relationships between data entities, Pimcore’s validation tools provide the flexibility needed to maintain high data quality standards.

Mandatory fields add an additional layer of data governance by requiring that certain fields must be filled out before a data record can be saved. This feature is particularly useful for ensuring that critical information is always captured, reducing the risk of incomplete data entries that could lead to errors or omissions in your datasets.

To address the growing concerns around data privacy, particularly with regulations like GDPR, Pimcore includes privacy and profile checks for personal identifiable information (PII). These checks help identify and manage sensitive data, ensuring that your organization handles PII in compliance with legal requirements. Pimcore allows you to set up rules for anonymizing or encrypting PII, conducting regular audits to ensure that all personal data is properly managed and protected. This not only helps safeguard individuals' privacy but also shields your organization from the severe penalties associated with data breaches and non-compliance.

Pimcore’s Data Governance & Compliance Management feature is designed to integrate seamlessly into your existing data workflows, providing continuous oversight and control throughout the data lifecycle. By automating these governance processes, Pimcore reduces the burden on your team, allowing them to focus on more strategic tasks while ensuring that data integrity and compliance are consistently maintained.

Whether you’re enriching product information, managing customer data, or handling large volumes of digital assets, Pimcore’s Data Governance & Compliance Management tools provide the confidence and control you need to manage your data responsibly and effectively.
features.description: Pimcore’s Data Governance & Compliance Management feature provides essential tools to maintain data integrity and ensure regulatory compliance. During data enrichment, validation rules and mandatory fields enforce accuracy, while privacy checks help protect personal identifiable information (PII), ensuring adherence to regulations such as GDPR. This robust governance framework ensures that data not only meets quality standards but also complies with legal requirements, safeguarding your organization from potential risks.

features.name: Advanced Data Exploration Options
features.headline: Customize Your Data Navigation with Advanced Exploration Tools
features.shortDescription: Enhance your data management experience with Pimcore’s advanced exploration options. Build alternative navigation trees and bookmark essential data views to create a personalized and efficient workspace that suits your workflow.
features.longDescription:
Data management in Pimcore is designed to be both efficient and adaptable, ensuring that users can navigate and manage their data in a way that best suits their workflow. Beyond the platform’s excellent search capabilities and standard navigation trees, Pimcore offers advanced exploration options that allow for an even more personalized data management experience.

One of the standout features is the ability to build alternative navigation trees. This functionality enables you to create custom hierarchies and organizational structures for your data, providing a tailored view that aligns with your specific needs. Whether you need to organize products, assets, or any other type of data, alternative trees give you the flexibility to structure your data in a way that makes the most sense for your business processes. This is particularly useful for managing large datasets where standard navigation might not be sufficient to meet complex organizational requirements.

In addition to alternative trees, Pimcore’s bookmarking feature allows you to save and quickly access important data views. By bookmarking specific data lists or elements, you can easily return to critical information without needing to search or navigate through the entire dataset. This feature is designed to enhance productivity by reducing the time spent on repetitive navigation tasks, enabling you to focus on data analysis and decision-making.

These advanced exploration options are part of Pimcore’s broader commitment to providing a flexible, user-centric data management platform. By enabling users to customize their navigation and create a workspace that reflects their individual preferences, Pimcore ensures that data management is not only more efficient but also more intuitive. Whether you’re a data manager, marketer, or developer, these tools empower you to interact with your data in a way that best supports your role, ultimately leading to better outcomes for your organization.
features.description: Pimcore’s Advanced Data Exploration Options offer a customizable approach to data management, allowing you to build alternative navigation trees and create bookmarks for quick access to essential data views. These features complement Pimcore’s robust search functionalities and standard navigation, enabling you to tailor your workspace to your unique workflow needs. By providing these additional tools, Pimcore ensures that data management is not only efficient but also intuitive, empowering users to navigate large datasets with ease and precision.

features.name: Online Image Editing
features.headline: Edit Images Directly in Pimcore with Integrated Tools
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s Online Image Editing feature allows users to edit images directly within the platform using a web-based editor. Based on the miniPaint project, this integrated editor supports basic image manipulations and can be customized or replaced to handle various media types, eliminating the need for third-party applications.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s Online Image Editing feature is designed to provide a convenient and efficient way to manage and edit images directly within the platform, eliminating the need for external image editing software. The integrated editor, based on the open-source miniPaint project, offers a range of basic image manipulation tools that cater to everyday editing needs, making it easy for users to perform quick adjustments without leaving the Pimcore environment.

The web-based editor supports essential editing functions such as cropping, resizing, rotating, and color adjustments, allowing users to fine-tune images to meet specific requirements. These tools are ideal for preparing images for use across various channels, whether it’s for digital assets, product images, or marketing materials. The simplicity and accessibility of the editor ensure that users can quickly and efficiently edit images as part of their regular workflows.

One of the standout features of Pimcore’s Online Image Editing is its customizability. While the default editor provides robust functionality for basic tasks, Pimcore allows organizations to customize or replace the editor to suit their specific needs. This flexibility means that if your team requires more advanced editing capabilities or needs to work with different media types (such as vector graphics or video stills), you can integrate an alternative editor directly into the Pimcore platform. This ensures that all your image editing needs are met without the need for separate applications, streamlining your workflow and keeping everything centralized within Pimcore.

Additionally, because the editor is fully integrated into Pimcore, any edits made are immediately available across the platform. This integration supports the quick deployment of images in various contexts, from e-commerce platforms and marketing campaigns to print and digital channels, ensuring that your visual content is always ready to go without delays or additional processing.

By offering a fully integrated, customizable image editing tool, Pimcore enhances productivity and ensures that users have the flexibility to manage and edit images directly within the platform. This capability not only saves time but also simplifies the process of maintaining high-quality visual content across all channels.
features.description: Pimcore’s Online Image Editing feature provides a seamless way to edit images directly within the platform, using a web-based editor based on the miniPaint project. This integrated tool offers basic image manipulation capabilities, such as cropping, resizing, and color adjustments, without requiring any third-party software. For more specialized needs, the editor can be customized or replaced within Pimcore to support different media types, ensuring flexibility and adaptability to various editing requirements. This feature streamlines the image editing process, enhancing productivity and maintaining workflow efficiency.

features.name: Batch Editing
features.headline: Streamline Data Management with Batch Editing
features.shortDescription: Easily manage large datasets with Pimcore’s Batch Editing feature. Access an Excel-like grid view to sort, filter, edit, and export data records. Enjoy seamless bulk editing, inline editing, and customizable column configurations for efficient data handling.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s Batch Editing feature is designed to enhance the efficiency and ease of managing large volumes of data within the platform. By clicking on any folder in the system, users are presented with an Excel-like tabular grid view that displays all the data records contained within. This intuitive interface offers a comprehensive set of tools for sorting, filtering, searching, and editing data, making it an indispensable asset for data managers, marketers, and developers alike.

One of the standout capabilities of the grid view is inline editing, which allows users to make quick, on-the-spot changes to individual data records without navigating away from the list view. For more extensive updates, the bulk editing feature enables simultaneous modifications to multiple records, saving significant time and reducing the risk of errors that can occur when updating records one by one.

Additionally, the grid view supports exporting data directly to Microsoft Excel, facilitating further analysis or reporting outside the Pimcore environment. This export feature is particularly useful for teams that need to share data insights with stakeholders who prefer working within familiar spreadsheet applications.

The integrated query builder further enhances the grid view by allowing users to predefine and customize column configurations. These configurations can be tailored to specific use cases and shared across the team, ensuring that everyone works with the same data structure and reducing inconsistencies. This level of customization not only improves team collaboration but also streamlines the data management process by providing a consistent and user-friendly interface for all team members.

Pimcore’s Batch Editing feature offers a powerful, efficient, and flexible approach to managing data. Whether you need to make quick edits, perform bulk updates, or export data for further use, the grid view and its associated tools ensure that you can handle your data with ease and precision, ultimately leading to more informed decisions and better business outcomes.
features.description: Pimcore’s Batch Editing feature provides an Excel-like tabular grid view that allows users to efficiently manage and edit large datasets. From this grid view, users can sort, filter, search, and perform inline or bulk editing of data records. The integrated query builder enables predefined column configurations, which can be shared across teams for consistent data management. Whether exporting data to Excel or making quick updates to multiple records, Pimcore’s Batch Editing ensures a smooth and powerful data management experience.

features.name: Single Customer View
features.headline: Comprehensive 360-Degree Customer View for In-Depth Insights
features.shortDescription: Pimcore CDP’s 360-Degree Customer View consolidates customer data into a unified profile, enhanced with activity history, audit trails, and customizable personas, providing businesses with a detailed, adaptable view of each customer’s journey.
features.longDescription: Pimcore CDP’s 360-Degree Customer View creates a unified, detailed profile for each customer by consolidating data from various interactions, activities, and sources. This robust profile model integrates the full history of customer activities, providing an audit trail that offers insights into behaviors and engagement over time. Each customer profile is structured around a flexible, customizable data model that can be tailored to industry-specific needs and individualized to align with the business domain. Additionally, customers can be segmented into personalizable personas and user groups, enabling targeted engagement and relevant content delivery. Pimcore ships with a blueprint for an adaptable customer view, which businesses can modify, extend, and tailor to their unique requirements. This comprehensive, holistic view empowers businesses to make informed, data-driven decisions, create highly personalized experiences, and build meaningful, long-lasting relationships by understanding each customer on a deeper level.
features.description: The 360-Degree Customer View feature within Pimcore CDP enables businesses to integrate all customer data into a comprehensive profile, offering insights into individual behaviors, interactions, and preferences. Built with flexible, customizable blueprints, this feature supports industry-specific data models and persona-based segmentation, allowing for personalized customer engagement and in-depth understanding of customer journeys, preferences, and histories.

features.name: Customized Views
features.headline: Personalize Your Workspace with Customized Views
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s Customized Views feature offers a personalized user interface tailored to roles, preferences, and languages. With Custom Layouts, Perspectives, and Views, along with customizable branding and white-labeling, you can create a UI that perfectly aligns with your workflow and brand identity.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s Customized Views feature is designed to provide users with a personalized and intuitive workspace that aligns with their specific roles, preferences, and organizational needs. Recognizing that every user has unique requirements, Pimcore offers a range of tools and options that allow you to customize the user interface (UI) to create the most effective and comfortable working environment.
