One of the key components of this customization is Pimcore Custom Layouts, which allows you to design specific layouts for different types of data, ensuring that users only see the information relevant to their tasks. These layouts can be tailored to various roles within the organization, making it easier for users to navigate the data they need without distraction or complexity. This is particularly useful in environments with large datasets or complex workflows, where a clear and focused UI can significantly enhance productivity.

Pimcore Perspectives further enhances this personalization by enabling users to create and switch between different UI perspectives based on their role or the task at hand. For example, a marketing manager might need a different interface than a product manager, and Pimcore allows each to have a customized view that highlights the tools and data they use most frequently. Perspectives streamline the user experience, ensuring that each user’s workspace is optimized for their specific needs.

In addition to Custom Layouts and Perspectives, Pimcore Custom Views offer the ability to create predefined views of objects and data classes. These views can be configured to display only the most relevant information, filtered according to specific criteria, and saved for repeated use. This feature is particularly valuable for users who need to regularly access specific subsets of data, as it allows them to do so quickly and efficiently without navigating through unnecessary information.

Pimcore also supports a multi-language UI, with over 40 languages available, ensuring that users around the globe can interact with the platform in their preferred language. This not only improves user satisfaction but also supports international teams by providing a consistent and localized user experience.

To further align the platform with your organization’s identity, Pimcore offers customizable branding and white-labeling options. This allows you to modify the appearance of the UI to match your company’s branding, including logos, colors, and other visual elements. By customizing the branding, you ensure that the Pimcore environment feels like a natural extension of your company’s digital ecosystem, reinforcing brand consistency across all user touchpoints.

Overall, Pimcore’s Customized Views feature provides a comprehensive set of tools that empower users to create a workspace tailored to their individual needs and organizational roles. This level of customization not only enhances productivity and user satisfaction but also ensures that the platform can adapt to the diverse and evolving requirements of any organization.
features.description: Pimcore’s Customized Views enable a highly personalized user experience by allowing you to tailor the interface to specific roles, preferences, and languages. With over 40 language options and tools like Custom Layouts, Perspectives, and Custom Views, users can design a workspace that suits their needs. Additionally, Pimcore supports customizable branding and white-labeling, allowing organizations to align the UI with their brand identity. This flexibility ensures that every user has access to an intuitive, efficient, and brand-consistent workspace.

features.name: Search and Filter
features.headline: Efficiently Discover and Manage Content
features.shortDescription: Pimcore's robust Search and Filtering capabilities allow users to efficiently locate and manage data. With full-text searching, advanced object search, customizable filters, and options to save searches and filters, users can streamline their content discovery process and even export data with ease.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s Search and Filtering feature is a cornerstone of efficient content discovery and data management, offering users a comprehensive set of tools to locate, organize, and manage information with precision. At the heart of this feature is full-text searching, enabling users to quickly search through large datasets and retrieve relevant content in seconds. For more specific requirements, the Advanced Object Search provides a powerful interface to perform complex searches across multiple data objects, tailored to meet diverse needs.

Filtering further enhances the user experience, offering customizable options that can be extended as needed to refine search results. Users can save these filters and searches for future use, making repeated tasks more efficient and reducing time spent on data retrieval. Additionally, the ability to export search results or filtered data adds an extra layer of functionality, enabling users to leverage their findings in external applications or reports.

Whether you’re dealing with vast amounts of content or need to perform intricate searches, Pimcore’s Search and Filtering feature ensures that you can efficiently manage and access the data you need, empowering better decision-making and streamlined workflows.
features.description: Pimcore’s Search and Filtering feature is designed to enhance content discovery and data management. It offers powerful tools such as full-text searching and advanced object search, allowing users to pinpoint specific data quickly. The system supports creating and extending filters, saving searches, and filters for future use, and exporting results. These capabilities make it an essential tool for efficiently managing large volumes of content and data within Pimcore, empowering users to find exactly what they need without hassle.

features.name: Pimcore Direct Edit
features.headline: Seamless Content Editing with Pimcore DirectEdit
features.shortDescription: Pimcore DirectEdit enables instant editing of documents stored within Pimcore by integrating directly with desktop applications, including Adobe Creative Cloud and Microsoft Office 365. Open and edit files such as PDFs, Word documents, and images directly from the Pimcore backend, streamlining your workflow.
features.description:
Pimcore Direct Edit transforms the way you manage and edit documents within the Pimcore platform by providing direct integration with leading desktop applications, including Adobe Creative Cloud and Microsoft Office 365. This feature allows you to edit files such as PDFs, Word documents, Excel spreadsheets, and creative assets directly from the Pimcore backend, streamlining the entire content management process.

With Direct Edit, when you select a document within Pimcore, it automatically opens in the appropriate application—be it Adobe Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign, Microsoft Word, Excel, or PowerPoint. This seamless integration ensures that you can work within the familiar environments of your preferred software, making edits in real-time without the hassle of downloading and re-uploading files.

Once you've made your changes, simply saving the file ensures that the updated version is automatically synchronized back to Pimcore, ensuring that all your content remains up-to-date and consistent across the platform. This direct connection between Pimcore and applications like Adobe Creative Cloud and Office 365 not only enhances productivity but also reduces the risk of errors associated with manual file management.

For creative teams, the ability to directly edit assets within Adobe Creative Cloud applications means that design files can be updated and managed in a central location, streamlining collaboration and ensuring that the latest versions are always accessible. Similarly, for business and administrative users, the integration with Microsoft Office 365 allows for quick and efficient updates to documents, spreadsheets, and presentations, ensuring that all critical business documents are accurate and current.

Additionally, Pimcore Direct Edit supports version control, allowing you to track changes and revert to previous versions if necessary. This feature is particularly valuable in collaborative environments where multiple users may need to work on the same document, as it ensures that all edits are documented and the integrity of the content is maintained.

By providing a direct, integrated solution for editing documents within Pimcore, Direct Edit enhances workflow efficiency, reduces the potential for errors, and ensures that your content is always aligned with your business needs. Whether you're working on creative assets, business documents, or digital assets, Pimcore DirectEdit provides a powerful, streamlined solution for content management.

features.name: Versioning, Publishing & Audit Trail
features.headline: Comprehensive Versioning, Publishing, and Audit Control
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s Versioning, Publishing & Audit Trail feature empowers users to manage, track, and control data with precision. With version history, comparisons, scheduling, and audit capabilities, teams can confidently prepare, preview, and publish data in a fully permission-based, user-friendly environment.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s Versioning, Publishing & Audit Trail feature offers a comprehensive framework for managing data lifecycle and publishing processes across PIM, MDM, DAM, and DXP platforms. This capability provides version control that records detailed version histories, allowing users to compare and revert to previous states if needed. The draft version functionality enables individual users to prepare and edit content in isolation, ensuring that work remains private until ready for review or publication. Integrated preview tools allow teams to visualize unpublished versions, reducing errors and improving content accuracy.

For streamlined publishing workflows, Pimcore supports scheduled publishing, enabling users to plan releases and updates in advance, enhancing operational efficiency. The audit trail function tracks all user actions, providing transparency and accountability, essential for compliance and data governance. Permissions can be configured to align with roles or user groups, ensuring secure, controlled access across teams. This feature gives businesses a reliable way to manage complex data with precision, supporting efficient collaboration and secure publishing practices for teams working with high volumes of digital assets and information.
features.description: Pimcore’s Versioning, Publishing & Audit Trail provides robust data control tools across PIM, MDM, DAM, and DXP platforms. This feature allows users to prepare data with draft versions, compare historical versions, and schedule content for future publication. It includes version history tracking, restore options, and a preview function for unpublished content, making data management transparent and flexible. The audit trail ensures every action is tracked and attributable, while integration with user and group permissions offers secure, customizable access for teams. With these capabilities, businesses can maintain data integrity and control over publishing workflows.

benefits.name: Improved Data Integrity and Control
benefits.description: With version history, data comparisons, and restore options, Pimcore’s versioning tools offer businesses enhanced control over data integrity. Users can track changes over time, verify content before publishing, and confidently revert to previous versions as needed.

benefits.name: Flexible and Efficient Publishing Workflows
benefits.description: With the ability to schedule content publishing and preview unpublished versions, Pimcore’s Versioning & Publishing feature supports efficient workflows and enhances quality control. These tools enable teams to plan updates in advance, ensuring accuracy and consistency across all channels.

benefits.name: Transparency and Accountability with Audit Trails
benefits.description: Pimcore’s audit trail logs every action taken within the system, offering visibility into data modifications and ensuring full accountability. Integrated with user and group permissions, this feature supports data security, compliance, and precise monitoring across teams.

features.name: GDPR Compliance & Privacy
features.headline: Comprehensive Customer Data Compliance for Privacy and Security
features.shortDescription: Pimcore CDP’s Customer Data Compliance ensures that all customer information is managed securely and in full compliance with privacy laws like GDPR, with governance tools to handle information requests and safeguard data integrity.
features.longDescription: Pimcore’s Customer Data Compliance feature is designed to help businesses manage customer information securely and transparently, ensuring full compliance with privacy regulations such as GDPR. This feature includes specialized tools that allow businesses to search, export, and respond efficiently to data requests, facilitating quick responses to customer inquiries about their data usage. With strong governance capabilities, Pimcore safeguards customer data, supporting secure storage, responsible usage, and controlled access. Businesses benefit from a streamlined, compliant data management process, reducing the complexity of regulatory adherence while fostering trust with customers who know their data is handled responsibly. Pimcore’s compliance tools provide a reliable framework that not only meets today’s stringent legal requirements but also adapts to evolving regulations, ensuring long-term data governance and security.
features.description: Pimcore’s Customer Data Compliance feature enables businesses to manage customer data in strict alignment with privacy regulations such as GDPR. Equipped with specialized tools for searching, exporting, and fulfilling data requests, Pimcore provides robust governance to protect sensitive customer information and supports businesses in meeting legal compliance standards seamlessly.

features.name: Data Preview
features.headline: Visualize Your Data Across Channels with Dynamic Previews
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s Data Preview feature allows you to visualize how data will appear across various output channels, including websites, e-commerce platforms, print, and more. Preview content in different languages, on various devices, and generate teasers to ensure a consistent, high-quality experience.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s Data Preview feature is designed to bring data management and experience management together, offering a comprehensive view of how your data will be presented across multiple output channels. This feature is essential for organizations looking to maintain consistency and quality in their content delivery, ensuring that data looks and feels right, no matter where it’s displayed.

With Pimcore, you can preview how your data will appear on different channels, including websites, e-commerce platforms, and print/PDF outputs. This functionality allows you to ensure that the content is formatted correctly and that it aligns with your brand’s visual and textual standards. For example, when preparing product information for an e-commerce site, you can preview how it will look within the site’s layout, ensuring that descriptions, images, and other elements are displayed correctly.

Multi-language previews are another crucial aspect of this feature, allowing you to see how content appears in different languages. This is particularly important for global businesses that need to ensure that translations are accurate and that text flows naturally in each language, without causing layout issues or misalignments.

Device-specific previews further enhance this capability, enabling you to check how your data looks on various devices, from desktop monitors to tablets and smartphones. This ensures that content is responsive and provides a seamless user experience across all screen sizes and resolutions.

For print and PDF outputs, Pimcore allows you to generate previews that show exactly how the final document will appear. Whether you’re preparing catalogs, brochures, or other printed materials, you can verify that all elements are correctly positioned, and that the content meets your design specifications.

Additionally, Pimcore’s Data Preview feature supports the creation of teaser previews. This functionality lets you generate previews of promotional content, such as banners or featured product teasers, ensuring that they fit well within the overall layout and meet your marketing goals.

By offering a comprehensive and flexible preview capability, Pimcore ensures that your data not only meets technical requirements but also aligns with your strategic objectives, delivering a consistent and engaging experience to your audience across all channels.
features.description: Pimcore’s Data Preview feature bridges data management with experience management, allowing you to see how your data will be presented across different output channels. Whether it’s a website, e-commerce platform, or print/PDF, you can preview how content looks in various languages and on different devices. This ensures that the data you manage is accurately represented in the final output, providing a consistent and high-quality user experience. Additionally, you can generate previews for teasers, ensuring that promotional content aligns perfectly with the overall presentation.

features.name: Data Enrichment
features.headline: Enhance Data Precision with Customizable Data Enrichment
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s Data Enrichment feature offers flexible and usability-optimized editing interfaces, fully customizable to your needs. Enrich data with over 25 different data types, smart inline editing, and drag-and-drop capabilities, ensuring precise and efficient data management.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s Data Enrichment feature is designed to provide a comprehensive and flexible approach to managing and enhancing your data. Recognizing the diverse needs of organizations, Pimcore offers highly customizable and usability-optimized editing interfaces that can be tailored to suit specific workflows and user preferences. These interfaces enable users to add detailed data in a way that is both intuitive and efficient, ensuring that data management processes are aligned with business needs.

One of the key strengths of Pimcore’s Data Enrichment is its support for more than 25 different data types, allowing for a wide range of data entries. Whether you need to add text using a WYSIWYG editor, input numerical data, create relations between data objects, manage key-value stores, or organize media assets, Pimcore provides the tools to do so with precision. Additionally, advanced features like Bricks and Fieldcollections offer modular and reusable data structures that can be easily adapted to complex data models, further enhancing the flexibility of the platform.

The user experience is further enhanced with smart grid editing capabilities, where users can quickly update data across multiple records in an Excel-like grid view. This is complemented by the ability to assign relations between data objects, making it easier to create meaningful connections within your data. Pimcore also supports full drag-and-drop functionality, allowing users to organize categories, catalogs, hierarchies, and other data structures effortlessly. This functionality is augmented by inline search features, which enable users to find and link data quickly and efficiently, reducing the time spent on manual data entry tasks.

Moreover, Pimcore’s data inheritance feature streamlines data management by allowing specific data attributes to be inherited across related data objects. This means that once a data item is updated, all related items automatically inherit the new information, significantly improving efficiency and reducing the risk of inconsistencies.

Whether you’re managing product catalogs, customer data, digital assets, or any other type of information, Pimcore’s Data Enrichment feature provides a smart, comfortable, and powerful solution for ensuring that your data is accurate, detailed, and easy to manage.
features.description: Pimcore’s Data Enrichment feature allows for detailed and precise data entry through fully customizable and user-friendly editing interfaces. With support for more than 25 data types, including WYSIWYG editors, numbers, relations, key-value stores, and media, this feature ensures that data can be enriched and managed with ease. Users can also benefit from grid editing, relation assignment, and data inheritance, all enhanced with smart inline search and drag-and-drop functionality, making data enrichment both efficient and intuitive.

features.name: Multiple Usage Scenario (Operational/Analytical) Support
features.headline: Versatile Support for Operational and Analytical Workflows
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s Multiple Usage Scenario Support feature caters to both operational and analytical needs. Whether you’re editing and enhancing data or filtering and generating reports, Pimcore provides the tools and flexibility to manage your data effectively across all scenarios.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s Multiple Usage Scenario Support feature offers a comprehensive solution for organizations that need to manage data across both operational and analytical contexts. Understanding that different scenarios require different approaches, Pimcore provides the tools and flexibility needed to handle the demands of both day-to-day operations and strategic data analysis, all within a unified platform.

For operational usage scenarios, Pimcore excels in facilitating data editing and enhancement tasks. The platform’s user-friendly interface allows for easy and efficient data entry, enabling teams to update, refine, and manage data with precision. Whether you’re adding new products to a catalog, updating customer records, or enhancing digital assets, Pimcore’s operational tools are designed to make these tasks straightforward and manageable. The ability to quickly edit and enhance data ensures that your datasets remain current and accurate, supporting smooth and efficient business operations.

On the other hand, analytical usage scenarios are equally well-supported within Pimcore. The platform offers robust tools for filtering data, allowing users to sort through large datasets to find the specific information needed for analysis. Advanced filtering options make it easy to isolate data by various criteria, enabling detailed insights and more precise decision-making. Additionally, Pimcore’s reporting capabilities provide the means to generate comprehensive reports that summarize key data points and trends. These reports can be customized to meet specific business requirements, delivering actionable insights that drive strategic decisions.

By seamlessly integrating both operational and analytical functionalities, Pimcore empowers organizations to manage their data more effectively across all scenarios. The ability to transition effortlessly between managing day-to-day tasks and conducting in-depth analysis within the same platform not only saves time but also ensures consistency and accuracy across all data-related activities. This dual support system enhances the overall efficiency of your data management processes, enabling you to leverage your data for both operational excellence and strategic advantage.
features.description: Pimcore’s Multiple Usage Scenario Support feature is designed to accommodate a wide range of data management needs, from operational tasks like data editing and enhancement to analytical activities such as data filtering and reporting. This dual functionality allows users to seamlessly switch between managing day-to-day operations and conducting in-depth data analysis, all within a single, integrated platform. By supporting both operational and analytical scenarios, Pimcore ensures that your data is always accurate, accessible, and ready to drive informed decision-making.

features.name: Product Comparison & Data Consolidation
features.headline: Compare and Consolidate Data with Precision
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s Data Comparison and Data Consolidation feature enables you to compare different data versions, elements, and variants. Utilize grid comparisons, the object compare feature, and advanced tools to efficiently consolidate data, ensuring accuracy and consistency across your datasets.
features.longDescription:
Managing complex datasets often requires a detailed understanding of how data elements, versions, and variants differ from one another. Pimcore’s Data Comparison and Data Consolidation feature is designed to provide comprehensive tools that allow you to easily compare and consolidate data, ensuring that your information remains accurate, consistent, and reliable across the entire platform.

One of the key capabilities of this feature is the ability to compare different versions of data elements. Whether you're tracking changes in product information, customer records, or digital assets, Pimcore allows you to quickly and easily compare historical versions of data, helping you identify changes, track updates, and ensure data integrity. This is particularly useful in collaborative environments where multiple users may be editing the same data over time.

Pimcore also enables the comparison of different data elements and variants. For example, you might need to compare multiple product variants to analyze differences in attributes such as pricing, descriptions, or specifications. Pimcore’s comparison tools provide a clear, side-by-side view of these differences, allowing you to make informed decisions about which variant to prioritize or modify.

The grid comparison feature further enhances your ability to compare large datasets by presenting data in an Excel-like grid view. This view allows you to sort, filter, and analyze data in a structured format, making it easier to identify discrepancies and inconsistencies across multiple records.

Additionally, the object compare feature is a powerful tool within Pimcore that enables in-depth comparison of complex objects, including their attributes, relations, and metadata. This feature is particularly valuable for comparing detailed data structures, helping you ensure that all aspects of your data are aligned and consistent.

Beyond comparison, this feature also supports data consolidation—the process of merging and unifying data elements to create a single, coherent dataset. Whether you’re consolidating data from multiple sources or merging different versions into one, Pimcore provides the tools needed to combine data accurately and efficiently. This ensures that your datasets are not only consistent but also optimized for decision-making and operational use.

Pimcore’s Data Comparison and Data Consolidation feature is designed to help organizations manage their data with precision and confidence. By providing robust comparison and consolidation tools, Pimcore ensures that your data is always accurate, consistent, and ready to support your business needs.
features.description: Pimcore’s Data Comparison and Data Consolidation feature offers powerful tools to compare different versions, elements, and variants of your data. Whether you’re comparing data in grids or using the object compare feature, Pimcore makes it easy to identify discrepancies and make informed decisions. This feature also supports data consolidation, allowing you to merge and unify data elements, ensuring that your datasets remain accurate, consistent, and up-to-date across all systems.

features.name: Centralized Data Repository
features.headline: Centralized Data and Experience Management
features.shortDescription: Pimcore serves as a central content repository, seamlessly blending data management (PIM, MDM, DAM, CDP) with experience management (DXP, Commerce). Acting as the "golden record" and single source of truth, Pimcore ensures accurate, interconnected, and streamlined data management across all channels.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s role as a Central Content Repository is integral to its effectiveness as both a data management and experience management platform. By seamlessly integrating Product Information Management (PIM), Master Data Management (MDM), Digital Asset Management (DAM), and Customer Data Platform (CDP) capabilities with Digital Experience Platform (DXP) and Commerce functionalities, Pimcore provides a comprehensive solution that serves as the backbone of an organization’s digital ecosystem.

At the heart of Pimcore’s Central Content Repository is the concept of the "golden record"—a single source of truth that ensures all data is accurate, consistent, and up-to-date. This is particularly crucial for content distribution and multi-channel publishing, where delivering the right information to the right channel at the right time is essential. Unlike traditional systems that duplicate data across different silos, Pimcore stores data in a relational graph structure. This approach means that data is linked and interconnected, rather than copied, ensuring that each piece of information exists only once within the system.

This relational data structure significantly reduces complexity in data management. When you update a single data item in Pimcore, all related entities are automatically updated as well. This ensures that changes are propagated across the entire system in real-time, maintaining data integrity and consistency. For instance, if a product description is updated in the PIM, all instances where that product is referenced—whether in an e-commerce store, marketing campaign, or customer profile—are instantly refreshed with the new information. This not only improves data quality but also streamlines workflows, as it eliminates the need for manual updates across multiple systems.

By acting as the central repository for all content and data, Pimcore empowers organizations to manage their digital assets and customer experiences from a single, unified platform. This centralized approach enhances operational efficiency, reduces the risk of errors, and ensures that all channels are aligned with the latest, most accurate information. Whether you’re managing complex product catalogs, coordinating global marketing campaigns, or delivering personalized customer experiences, Pimcore’s Central Content Repository provides the foundation needed to achieve your business goals with confidence and precision.
features.description: Pimcore functions as a central content repository, combining robust data management capabilities (PIM, MDM, DAM, CDP) with advanced experience management (DXP, Commerce). By holding the "golden record" and acting as the single source of truth, Pimcore simplifies content distribution and multi-channel publishing. Data is stored like a graph, linking all related entities without duplication, ensuring consistency and quality. When a single data item is updated, all connected entities are automatically updated, reducing complexity and enhancing the efficiency of data management processes.

features.name: Unification & Deduplication
features.headline: Unification & Deduplication for a Single Source of Customer Truth
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s Unification & Deduplication feature ensures clean, unified customer data by detecting and resolving duplicate records, creating a single, reliable customer profile that accurately reflects each individual’s interactions and preferences.
features.longDescription: Pimcore’s Unification & Deduplication feature provides businesses with a comprehensive solution to clean, unify, and manage customer data effectively. Equipped with the Customer Duplicates Service, Pimcore enables precise detection of duplicates through a three-step process: searching for customers, indexing duplicates, and reviewing them in a dedicated duplicates view. The duplicates search identifies potential matches based on key attributes like name and address, while the Duplicates Index searches globally for fuzzy matches, giving users a central view of potential duplicates. The Duplicates View allows users to manually review, unite, or reject identified duplicates, enabling businesses to merge fragmented records, resolve inconsistencies, and consolidate customer data from multiple devices and third-party sources into a single account. By maintaining a single, accurate profile for each customer, businesses benefit from clearer insights, improved engagement, and a robust, data-driven understanding of each individual’s journey.
features.description: Pimcore’s Unification & Deduplication feature combines advanced duplicate detection strategies and flexible tools to create a single source of truth for customer profiles. Through the Customer Duplicates Service, businesses can search, identify, and merge duplicate records, consolidating multiple interactions and third-party data points into a unified customer account. This comprehensive solution improves data accuracy and strengthens customer insights across devices and interactions.

features.name: Commenting and Notes
features.headline: Enhance Collaboration with Commenting and Notes
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s Commenting and Notes feature enables seamless collaboration and documentation by allowing users to add notes to data elements. Track audit trails, document changes, and send notifications to team members, ensuring efficient and transparent data management.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s Commenting and Notes feature is designed to enhance collaboration, documentation, and auditability within your organization. By allowing users to add notes to any data element within the platform, this feature provides a powerful tool for improving communication, maintaining detailed records, and ensuring that all team members are on the same page.

Each note attached to a data element serves as a documentation point, making it easier to track changes, decisions, and important details over time. This is particularly useful for complex data management tasks where multiple users may need to interact with the same data elements. By documenting these interactions, Pimcore helps create a comprehensive audit trail that enhances transparency and accountability.

Collaboration is further enhanced by the ability to send notifications to other users when notes are added or updated. This ensures that relevant team members are immediately informed of changes or important updates, allowing for timely responses and coordination. Whether you’re working on a product launch, managing customer data, or coordinating a marketing campaign, the Commenting and Notes feature helps keep everyone aligned and informed.

In addition to supporting collaboration, this feature also plays a critical role in maintaining data integrity and compliance. By providing a clear record of who made changes, when they were made, and why, Pimcore’s Commenting and Notes feature supports robust audit trails that are essential for regulatory compliance and internal governance.

Overall, the Commenting and Notes feature in Pimcore is a versatile tool that enhances communication, supports detailed documentation, and ensures that data management processes are both transparent and efficient. Whether used for collaboration, documentation, or auditing, it helps create a more organized and accountable environment, ultimately contributing to better decision-making and more effective data management.
features.description: Pimcore’s Commenting and Notes feature facilitates collaboration and documentation by allowing users to add detailed notes to any data element within the platform. These notes serve as a valuable tool for tracking audit trails, documenting changes, and enhancing communication among team members. Additionally, users can send notifications to others, keeping everyone informed and aligned. Whether for collaboration, documentation, or auditing, this feature ensures that all team members have access to essential information and can contribute to a transparent and efficient data management process.

features.name: Data Tagging
features.headline: Classify and Organize Data with Powerful Tagging
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s Data Tagging feature allows you to efficiently classify and categorize your data using tags. With support for multiple tag hierarchies, batch tagging, filtering by tags, and AI-powered auto-tagging via Pimcore Copilot, organizing your data has never been easier.
features.longDescription:
Organizing and managing large volumes of data can be a daunting task, but Pimcore’s Data Tagging feature simplifies this process by offering a flexible and intuitive way to classify and categorize your data. Whether you’re managing products, digital assets, or customer information, tagging provides a powerful tool for ensuring that your data is organized, searchable, and easy to manage.

Manual tagging allows you to apply specific tags to data items, giving you complete control over how your data is categorized. This is particularly useful for creating custom classifications that align with your business needs. For more complex data structures, multiple tag hierarchies can be used to create layered classifications, enabling you to organize data in a way that reflects its relationships and dependencies. These hierarchies allow for deep categorization, making it easier to manage and retrieve data in large, complex systems.

Pimcore also supports batch tagging, which lets you assign tags to entire folders or groups of data items simultaneously. This feature is ideal for quickly organizing large datasets, ensuring that all relevant items are categorized correctly without the need for manual tagging of each individual item.

Once your data is tagged, filtering by tags makes it easy to locate and retrieve specific data items. Whether you’re searching for all assets tagged with a particular product category or filtering customer records by region, tag-based filtering provides a fast and efficient way to narrow down your search results and find the exact data you need.

To further enhance efficiency, Pimcore includes auto-tagging capabilities powered by Pimcore Copilot. This AI-driven feature automatically assigns tags to data items based on their content and context, reducing the time and effort required for manual tagging. Auto-tagging is especially valuable for managing large and dynamic datasets, where manual tagging would be too time-consuming or prone to errors. By leveraging AI, Pimcore Copilot ensures that your data is accurately tagged and organized, improving the overall efficiency of your data management processes.

Pimcore’s Data Tagging feature is designed to make data organization intuitive and effective, providing the tools you need to classify, categorize, and retrieve your data with ease. Whether you’re working with simple data structures or complex, multi-layered hierarchies, Pimcore’s tagging system ensures that your data is always well-organized and accessible, supporting better decision-making and more efficient operations.
features.description: Pimcore’s Data Tagging feature offers a versatile approach to classifying and categorizing data. Users can manually tag data, utilize multiple tag hierarchies for complex categorization, and batch assign tags to entire folders. Additionally, data can be easily filtered by tags, making it simple to find relevant information. For added efficiency, Pimcore Copilot provides AI-powered auto-tagging, automatically assigning tags to data based on content and context. This powerful tagging system enhances data organization and retrieval, streamlining data management processes.

features.name: WebDAV support
features.headline: Seamless Remote File Management
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s WebDAV support empowers users to manage files remotely with ease, including uploading, updating, and deleting assets. User permissions, versioning, and audit trails apply, ensuring secure, controlled, and trackable file management.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s WebDAV support extends the platform’s remote file management capabilities, providing users with the ability to upload, update, and delete digital assets from any WebDAV-enabled client, such as Windows Explorer, macOS Finder, or other compatible applications. This functionality ensures that users can interact with their Pimcore-stored assets as if they were working on a local drive, streamlining file management tasks and enhancing overall workflow efficiency.

User permissions are fully integrated, meaning that access controls set within Pimcore are respected even when files are managed via WebDAV. This ensures that only authorized users can perform specific actions, maintaining the security and integrity of your digital assets.

Furthermore, versioning and audit trails are automatically applied to all changes made through WebDAV. Each update or deletion is tracked, allowing administrators to view the history of changes and restore previous versions if necessary. This level of transparency is crucial for maintaining control over your content, particularly in collaborative settings where multiple users may interact with the same files.

Pimcore’s WebDAV support, with its comprehensive management, security, and tracking features, provides a powerful tool for businesses looking to maintain flexibility in their workflows while ensuring robust oversight and control over their digital assets.
features.description: Pimcore’s WebDAV support offers robust remote file management capabilities, enabling users to upload, update, and delete digital assets directly from any WebDAV-enabled client. This feature integrates seamlessly with Pimcore's existing security protocols, ensuring that user permissions are enforced throughout the process. Additionally, versioning and audit trails apply, allowing for complete transparency and control over changes made to any file, making it an ideal solution for collaborative environments that require stringent oversight.

features.name: Lifecycle Management
features.headline: Comprehensive Control Over Content Lifecycle
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s Lifecycle Management feature empowers you to manage the full lifecycle of your content with precision. Prepare, preview, and schedule content for publishing, track and compare versions, and maintain a detailed audit trail to ensure accuracy, compliance, and optimal content management.
features.longDescription:
Managing the lifecycle of content effectively is crucial for ensuring that it remains relevant, accurate, and compliant throughout its existence. Pimcore’s Lifecycle Management feature offers a comprehensive suite of tools that give you full control over your content, from its initial creation through to its eventual archiving or deletion.

Preparing data before publishing is an essential first step in the content lifecycle. Pimcore allows you to refine and perfect content before it goes live, ensuring that all details are accurate and aligned with your organizational standards. Whether it’s product information, digital assets, or customer data, this feature ensures that content is thoroughly vetted and ready for public consumption.

Once content is ready, publish scheduling enables you to plan when content will go live. This is particularly useful for time-sensitive campaigns, product launches, or seasonal content, allowing you to set specific dates and times for publishing, ensuring that content is released exactly when it’s needed.

Pimcore’s versioning history is a critical component of content lifecycle management. As content evolves, every change is tracked and stored, allowing you to see a complete history of all versions. This is particularly valuable in collaborative environments where multiple users contribute to content updates.

For added control, Pimcore offers versioning comparison tools that allow you to compare different versions of the same content side-by-side. This feature highlights changes, helping you understand how content has evolved and ensuring that any edits align with your objectives. If necessary, you can easily restore previous versions, ensuring that you can revert to an earlier state if a mistake is made or if previous content is more suitable.

To support ongoing content development, Pimcore provides draft versions per user. This feature allows individual users to work on their own drafts without affecting the live version or other users’ drafts. Each user can refine their draft until it’s ready for approval or publishing, ensuring that content development is orderly and efficient.

One of the standout features of Pimcore’s Lifecycle Management is the ability to preview unpublished versions. Before making content live, you can see exactly how it will appear across different channels and devices. This ensures that all content meets your standards and is fully optimized before it reaches your audience.

Maintaining full accountability and compliance is crucial in content management, which is why Pimcore includes versions and audit trails. Every action taken on a piece of content, from edits to approvals, is logged, providing a comprehensive record that can be reviewed at any time. This is essential for maintaining compliance with internal policies or external regulations, as well as for ensuring that all content decisions are fully documented.

Pimcore’s Lifecycle Management feature provides a powerful, flexible, and comprehensive solution for managing the entire lifecycle of your content. From preparation and scheduling to version control and auditing, this feature ensures that your content is always accurate, compliant, and ready to support your business goals.
features.description: Pimcore’s Lifecycle Management feature provides a robust framework to manage content from creation to archiving. Easily prepare data before publishing, schedule content releases, and manage lifecycle states with attributes. Versioning history, version comparisons, and draft versions per user ensure content integrity, while previews of unpublished versions and the ability to restore previous versions enhance control. Maintain full traceability with notes for a detailed audit trail, ensuring that all content decisions are tracked and compliant with internal or regulatory standards.

capabilities.name: Data Quality, Semantics & Profiling
capabilities.headline: Data Quality, Semantics & Profiling
capabilities.shortDescription: Pimcore’s integrated Data Quality Management offers a comprehensive toolset to ensure the highest standards of data quality, leveraging real-time reporting, automated enforcement, and AI-powered insights to maintain data integrity and accuracy.
capabilities.longDescription:
Managing data quality is a cornerstone of any successful data management strategy, and Pimcore excels in providing the tools necessary to achieve this. With its comprehensive Data Quality Management framework, Pimcore ensures that "garbage in, garbage out" becomes a thing of the past. This system offers real-time data quality reporting, allowing businesses to constantly monitor the accuracy and integrity of their data. Automated data quality enforcement and integrity constraints prevent errors from creeping into the system, while visual data quality checks offer an intuitive way to validate data correctness and completeness.

Moreover, Pimcore’s integration with Copilot introduces AI and machine learning capabilities into the mix, enabling the automation of many data quality tasks. This intelligent automation can identify, correct, and even prevent data quality issues, allowing businesses to maintain high standards with minimal manual intervention. Whether you’re dealing with complex datasets or large volumes of data, Pimcore’s Data Quality Management ensures that your data remains trustworthy, actionable, and aligned with your business needs.

features.name: Data Quality Scores
features.headline: Dynamic Data Quality Scoring
features.shortDescription: Elevate your data management with customizable Data Quality Scores in Pimcore. Define rules, visualize scores across multiple channels, and leverage insights to enhance data accuracy and integrity.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore's Data Quality Scores feature offers a powerful tool for evaluating and enhancing the quality of your data. By allowing you to define specific rules for calculating data quality scores, this feature provides a tailored approach to measuring data integrity. Each data element can have multiple quality scores, enabling you to assess data performance across different channels or use cases. These scores are seamlessly integrated into Pimcore’s UI, with visualizations available in trees, object editors, and grids, making it easy to monitor and manage data quality in real time.

Beyond simply scoring data, this feature provides actionable recommendations for improving quality, guiding users on how to correct errors and optimize data integrity. The ability to export data quality scores means they can be leveraged in external reports, dashboards, and workflows, ensuring that data quality metrics are a core component of your business intelligence and operational strategies. By integrating these scores into the workflow engine, businesses can automate data quality management, triggering actions or alerts based on predefined quality thresholds. This dynamic, comprehensive approach to data quality not only enhances accuracy and consistency but also supports ongoing data governance and continuous improvement efforts.
features.description: Pimcore’s Data Quality Scores feature empowers businesses to assess and improve data quality by defining custom rules to calculate scores for each data element. This feature supports multiple scores per element, tailored to different channels. Scores are visually represented in the UI across trees, object editors, and grids, with actionable recommendations provided to enhance data quality. These scores can be exported and integrated into reports, dashboards, and workflows, driving continuous improvement and data-driven decision-making.

features.name: Data Quality Reporting
features.headline: Effortless Data Quality Insights
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s Data Quality Reporting brings clarity and control to data management, displaying real-time quality scores across data grids, object trees, and editors. With filtering and report integration, businesses can continuously monitor and improve data quality.
features.longDescription: Pimcore’s Data Quality Reporting delivers a streamlined, UI-embedded solution to monitor and manage data quality across all data assets. Visualize real-time data quality scores directly in data object trees, editors, and grids, ensuring immediate insights at every data interaction point. Users can filter by quality score in grids, allowing efficient identification and prioritization of data that needs improvement. Seamlessly integrate these scores into Pimcore’s reporting capabilities to make informed decisions based on data quality trends. The Copilot-powered notifications further enhance this feature by automating alerts when quality issues arise, ensuring data remains reliable and optimized. With Data Quality Reporting, teams have the tools to establish a proactive, robust data quality management process.
features.description: Pimcore’s Data Quality Reporting enables businesses to visualize, filter, and analyze data quality scores directly in the UI, including object trees, data grids, and the object editor. This empowers users to quickly identify quality issues, leverage scores in reports, and set automated notifications for real-time updates on data integrity. With integrated capabilities for filtering and quality metrics, this feature supports higher-quality data management for all digital touchpoints.

features.name: Data Quality Enforcing
features.headline: Automated Data Quality Enforcement
features.shortDescription: Ensure only high-quality data is published with Pimcore’s Data Quality Enforcing. Integrate automated quality checks into workflows, leveraging validations and quality scores to maintain data integrity.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s Data Quality Enforcing feature is a robust solution designed to ensure that only data meeting strict quality standards is published or made available for use. This feature integrates seamlessly into your existing workflows, automatically enforcing data quality through preconfigured validations and quality scores. Before any data element is published, it undergoes a rigorous quality check to confirm that it adheres to the required standards. If the data fails to meet these standards, it is flagged for review, preventing the dissemination of inaccurate or incomplete information.

By embedding these quality enforcement mechanisms into your workflows, Pimcore ensures that data quality is maintained at every stage of the data lifecycle. This process is not only automated but also highly customizable, allowing businesses to define the specific quality criteria that data must meet before it can be published. The use of quality scores and validations as benchmarks further strengthens this enforcement, providing a clear, quantifiable measure of data quality that can be consistently applied across all data elements.

This approach to data quality management significantly reduces the risk of errors, improves compliance with data governance policies, and ensures that your business is always working with the most accurate and reliable data. Whether you’re managing product information, customer data, or other critical business information, Pimcore’s Data Quality Enforcing feature provides the assurance that your data is of the highest possible quality before it reaches your stakeholders.
features.description: Pimcore’s Data Quality Enforcing feature ensures that only data meeting predefined quality standards is published. By integrating automatic quality checks into workflows, this feature uses data validations and quality scores to enforce data quality at every step, preventing the release of incomplete or inaccurate data. This automation guarantees that your data remains consistent, reliable, and compliant, enhancing overall data governance.

features.name: Visual Data Quality Checking
features.headline: Visual Data Quality Assurance
features.shortDescription: Ensure data accuracy with Pimcore’s Visual Data Quality Checking. Define alternative trees, validate hierarchies for consistency, and easily correct errors with drag-and-drop simplicity.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore's Visual Data Quality Checking feature offers a powerful and user-friendly solution for maintaining high data quality standards. This feature allows users to define and manage various alternative hierarchical trees, providing a clear visual representation of data structures. By visually inspecting these hierarchies, users can easily check for consistency and plausibility, ensuring that all data points are logically aligned and accurate.

The intuitive drag-and-drop functionality enables users to swiftly correct any identified errors by assigning correct values directly within the interface. This approach not only makes data correction faster and more efficient but also significantly reduces the risk of human error. By simplifying the process of data validation and correction, Pimcore’s Visual Data Quality Checking enhances overall data governance, making it easier for businesses to maintain clean, reliable data across their entire digital ecosystem. Whether you are managing product information, customer data, or any other critical business information, this feature ensures that your data remains accurate, consistent, and trustworthy.
features.description: Pimcore’s Visual Data Quality Checking feature provides an intuitive interface for ensuring data accuracy and integrity. Users can define various alternative hierarchical trees and check for consistency and plausibility by visually validating these structures. Faulty values can be quickly identified and corrected using a simple drag-and-drop method, making data quality management both efficient and user-friendly.

features.name: Data Integrity Constraints
features.headline: Configurable Data Integrity Constraints
features.shortDescription: Ensure robust data governance with Pimcore’s no-code Data Integrity Constraints. Administrators can easily configure rules like mandatory fields, unique data, regex validation, and more, ensuring consistent and reliable data.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore's Data Integrity Constraints feature provides a powerful, no-code solution for ensuring that your data adheres to the highest standards of accuracy and consistency. Designed for ease of use, this feature allows administrators to configure a wide array of data validation rules directly within the data model, without the need for programming expertise. Among the constraints that can be applied are mandatory fields, unique data entries, regular expression validations, minimum and maximum value limits, default values, and length limitations.

In addition to these basic constraints, Pimcore also supports more complex requirements, such as specifying types of related entities and content, defining media sizes, and using calculated fields for dynamic integrity checks. These constraints ensure that every piece of data entered into your system meets specific criteria, reducing the risk of errors and enhancing overall data quality.

Furthermore, the system can be configured to notify users when data does not meet the defined integrity constraints, providing immediate feedback and helping to maintain compliance with data governance policies. This proactive approach to data integrity not only improves the quality of your data but also supports more reliable and efficient business operations. By leveraging Pimcore's Data Integrity Constraints, businesses can ensure that their data is not only accurate and consistent but also fully compliant with internal and external standards.
features.description: Pimcore’s Data Integrity Constraints feature allows administrators to easily configure and enforce a wide range of data validation rules within the data model, all without coding. Covering mandatory fields, unique data, regular expression validations, and more, this feature ensures that data integrity is maintained across your systems. Additionally, dynamic constraints such as calculated fields and notifications enhance flexibility and user awareness, making it easier to maintain high data quality standards.

capabilities.name: Data Onboarding
capabilities.headline: Flexible Data Onboarding Capabilities
capabilities.shortDescription: Pimcore’s API-first approach offers flexible and powerful tools for data onboarding, including integrated ETL processes, data matching, cleansing, and various interfaces like the Pimcore Data Hub and Product Experience Portals.
capabilities.longDescription:
Data onboarding is a critical component of any data management strategy, and Pimcore excels in providing the necessary tools to ensure this process is efficient, flexible, and adaptable to any scenario. With its API-first approach, Pimcore offers a range of capabilities designed to meet diverse data onboarding needs. Integrated ETL (Extract, Transform, Load) processes allow businesses to automate and streamline data import, ensuring that data is accurately transformed and loaded into the system. Smart data cleansing and matching functionalities further enhance data quality, ensuring that all data entering the system is accurate, consistent, and ready for use.

For more complex onboarding scenarios, Pimcore's Data Hub offers an API-based solution that enables seamless integration with other systems, allowing for real-time data exchange and synchronization. Additionally, Pimcore’s Product Experience Portals provide a user-friendly interface for managing product data, making it easier to onboard and distribute data across various channels. For organizations requiring even more customization, Pimcore offers interfaces to third-party data onboarding solutions, ensuring that no matter the source or format, data can be efficiently onboarded into the Pimcore ecosystem. This comprehensive approach to data onboarding makes Pimcore a powerful solution for managing data from diverse sources, ensuring that businesses can maintain high-quality, consistent data across their operations.

features.name: File Based Data Importing
features.headline: Seamless File-Based Data Onboarding for PIM & E-Commerce
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s File-Based Data Onboarding streamlines product data integration, supporting multiple file formats like CSV, XML, JSON, and XLSX. With push/pull, bulk, and single-import capabilities, this flexible onboarding approach includes mapping, transformation, and automation to adapt to diverse data strategies.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s File-Based Data Onboarding is a robust solution designed to handle the demands of modern PIM and E-Commerce data integration. This feature supports multiple file formats, including CSV, XML, JSON, and XLSX, enabling businesses to onboard diverse data types with ease. Offering flexibility with push and pull options, it allows for bulk or single imports, catering to various data strategies and volumes.

To enhance accuracy and consistency, Pimcore’s File-Based Data Onboarding includes powerful mapping and transformation tools that let users define how incoming data aligns with existing structures, while also offering manual or automated execution to fit operational preferences. For example, data can be scheduled for regular updates or triggered on demand, ensuring that product information remains timely and precise. Additionally, the onboarding process is enhanced by extensive logging, providing full visibility into every data transaction and allowing for quick troubleshooting if needed. With these comprehensive capabilities, Pimcore’s File-Based Data Onboarding is a crucial tool for any organization looking to improve data management efficiency and precision, while seamlessly delivering accurate product information across digital commerce platforms.
features.description: Pimcore’s File-Based Data Onboarding simplifies product data integration across PIM and E-Commerce platforms by supporting a wide range of file types, including CSV, XML, JSON, and XLSX. This feature allows businesses to configure data mapping, define transformations, and choose between manual or automated onboarding, making it highly adaptable to various data workflows. With options for push/pull, bulk, and single import strategies, Pimcore ensures data consistency and integrity while offering extensive logging for a clear record of all data operations. This flexible onboarding approach accelerates data readiness and enables error-free, efficient data management across multiple channels.

benefits.name: Flexibility Across File Formats
benefits.description: Pimcore’s File-Based Data Onboarding supports a wide range of file types, including CSV, XML, JSON, and XLSX. This versatility enables businesses to onboard data from multiple sources without extensive reformatting, reducing data preparation time and improving operational efficiency across PIM and E-Commerce systems.

benefits.name: Comprehensive Data Mapping and Transformation
benefits.description: With Pimcore’s File-Based Data Onboarding, businesses can define specific data mappings and transformations that align with their unique PIM and E-Commerce structures. This eliminates manual adjustments and ensures that data is consistently formatted and ready for use upon import, streamlining workflows.

benefits.name: Automated & Secure Onboarding with Extensive Logging
benefits.description: Pimcore’s File-Based Data Onboarding includes automation options and extensive logging features, providing full transparency for all data imports. This secure, well-documented approach supports compliance, facilitates troubleshooting, and ensures reliable data integrity throughout the onboarding process.

features.name: ETL and Workflow Automation
features.headline: Streamlined ETL and Workflow Automation for Data Onboarding
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s ETL and Workflow Automation capabilities simplify data onboarding with integrated ETL tooling, iPaaS support, and workflow automation engines like n8n and Zapier. This feature seamlessly connects to third-party ETL engines, accelerating and securing data flow across PIM and E-Commerce platforms.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s ETL and Workflow Automation feature brings robust data transformation and automation capabilities to PIM and E-Commerce systems, helping businesses streamline data onboarding. With built-in light ETL tools powered by Pimcore’s Data Importer and Datahub, this feature allows businesses to transform, enrich, and validate data within Pimcore itself. To facilitate broader integration needs, Pimcore connects seamlessly with leading iPaaS (Integration Platform as a Service) providers, creating flexibility in data handling across various cloud applications and databases.

For advanced workflow automation, Pimcore supports integration with automation engines like n8n and Zapier, enabling dynamic task automation for data onboarding and data flow between systems. Additionally, Pimcore is compatible with third-party ETL engines, ensuring that even the most complex data needs are supported, including high-volume data transformations, migration, and synchronization tasks. With these tools, businesses can automate repetitive processes, reduce manual errors, and ensure timely, accurate data across digital channels. This ETL and automation capability in Pimcore significantly enhances operational efficiency, accuracy, and control, empowering organizations to focus on data-driven growth strategies with reliable, ready-to-use data.
features.description: Pimcore’s ETL and Workflow Automation feature integrates light ETL tooling with Pimcore’s Data Importer and Datahub, enabling flexible, secure data transformation and automation within PIM and E-Commerce environments. Supporting connections with popular iPaaS solutions and automation engines such as n8n and Zapier, Pimcore streamlines complex workflows. Additionally, it allows integration with third-party ETL engines, providing a comprehensive data pipeline that scales easily with business growth. This integration enhances operational efficiency by automating data processing and simplifying the movement of data between systems, optimizing data accuracy, compliance, and readiness across all digital channels.

benefits.name: Simplified Data Transformation and Loading
benefits.description: Pimcore’s integrated ETL tooling allows businesses to transform and load data directly within the platform, streamlining data preparation for PIM and E-Commerce. This simplifies the onboarding process, reduces dependency on external tools, and ensures data is fully aligned with system requirements.

benefits.name: Effortless Integration with Automation Engines
benefits.description: By integrating with workflow automation engines like n8n and Zapier, Pimcore empowers businesses to automate repetitive tasks and streamline data workflows across systems. This enhances productivity and maintains data integrity by reducing manual intervention and ensuring real-time data updates across platforms.

benefits.name: Flexibility with Third-Party ETL and iPaaS Solutions
benefits.description: Supporting third-party ETL engines and iPaaS solutions, Pimcore’s ETL and Workflow Automation feature offers flexibility to meet complex data needs. Whether for high-volume transformations or intricate system integrations, Pimcore enables businesses to adapt their data workflows precisely to their operational demands.

features.name: Custom APIs
features.headline: Customizable API Data Onboarding for Complex Models
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s Custom API Data Onboarding allows businesses to create specialized APIs and importers using the Core API, providing ultimate flexibility for integrating even the most complex data models. Supporting any API protocol and optimized for high-performance onboarding of large data sets, this feature empowers teams to tackle advanced data needs.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s Custom API Data Onboarding feature empowers businesses to build bespoke APIs and importers tailored to their unique data needs by leveraging the robust Pimcore Core API. This capability provides unmatched flexibility, supporting any API protocol and communication method—whether push, pull, or real-time updates—enabling seamless integration of even the most complex data models. Ideal for data-intensive applications, Custom API Data Onboarding is optimized for high performance, ensuring rapid handling of large data sets and minimizing latency for extensive product catalogs or intricate data hierarchies.

With the ability to code custom API configurations, developers can create precise data workflows that fit their organizational structures and processes, achieving efficient data transformation and alignment within PIM and E-Commerce platforms. This coding-driven approach provides a powerful toolkit for developers, offering both granular control over data and high-speed processing capabilities. As a result, businesses can confidently manage complex data sources, ensure data accuracy, and maintain consistency across digital channels, all while preserving the agility needed to respond to evolving data requirements.
features.description: With Custom API Data Onboarding, Pimcore enables businesses to design APIs and importers tailored to their specific data requirements using the Pimcore Core API. This approach supports any communication protocol, including push, pull, and real-time interactions, offering full flexibility for even the most intricate data models. Optimized for high performance, this feature is ideal for handling large-scale data imports where customization and speed are essential. Though coding is required, this functionality provides the adaptability to integrate unique data structures seamlessly into PIM and E-Commerce systems, supporting efficient and reliable data onboarding at scale.

benefits.name: Ultimate Flexibility in Data Integration
benefits.description: With the ability to use any API protocol and create custom APIs, Pimcore’s Custom API Data Onboarding feature empowers businesses to onboard data in a way that aligns with their specific requirements. This flexibility ensures that even the most complex data models can be fully integrated, providing tailored support for diverse onboarding needs.

benefits.name: Optimized for High-Volume Data Sets
benefits.description: Pimcore’s Custom API Data Onboarding is optimized for performance, making it ideal for businesses handling high-volume data. Whether for extensive product catalogs or detailed data structures, this feature ensures that data is imported rapidly and reliably, minimizing processing time and supporting timely data availability across channels.

benefits.name: Developer-Driven Precision and Control
benefits.description: Pimcore’s coding-enabled Custom API Data Onboarding feature allows developers to create precise and controlled data workflows. This customization provides the ability to meet highly specific data requirements, adapt workflows on demand, and support efficient, reliable data integration for even the most complex use cases.

features.name: Manual Asset Import
features.headline: Effortless Digital Asset Import with Drag-and-Drop
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s Manual Digital Asset Import feature enables seamless drag-and-drop uploading of files, folders, and archives. With single and batch upload options, assets are instantly accessible across PIM, DAM, and DXP for streamlined data onboarding and content management.
features.longDescription:
The Manual Digital Asset Import feature in Pimcore provides a flexible and efficient way to onboard digital assets, supporting both single-file and batch uploads as well as entire folders through a convenient drag-and-drop interface. Users can upload a variety of file types, from CSV and XLSX files for PIM purposes to images, videos, and documents for DAM and DXP applications. With automatic extraction of zip archives, this feature allows for the quick and easy import of compressed files, enabling teams to unpack and access large volumes of assets with minimal effort.

Once uploaded, assets are immediately available across Pimcore’s modules, making them usable for product data management, digital content, and marketing purposes. The intuitive drag-and-drop function reduces the time spent on asset onboarding and organization, while the platform’s flexible file handling capabilities ensure compatibility with diverse business needs. Whether managing bulk product data files or media assets, Pimcore’s Manual Digital Asset Import feature is designed to accelerate workflows and enhance productivity, allowing teams to maintain a streamlined content ecosystem.
features.description: Pimcore’s Manual Digital Asset Import feature simplifies the data onboarding process by allowing users to drag and drop files, folders, and compressed archives directly into the platform. Supporting single and batch uploads, as well as automatic extraction of zip files, this feature makes it easy to import a wide range of digital assets, including product data files like CSVs for PIM, and media assets for DAM and DXP applications. This flexible, user-friendly upload method enhances productivity, allowing teams to quickly organize and deploy assets across Pimcore’s integrated modules.

benefits.name: Simplified Upload Process
benefits.description: With intuitive drag-and-drop support, Pimcore’s Manual Digital Asset Import feature enables users to upload files, folders, and compressed archives with ease. This streamlined process enhances efficiency and minimizes manual steps, helping teams onboard assets quickly.

benefits.name: Flexible File and Folder Management
benefits.description: Pimcore’s Manual Digital Asset Import feature enables users to upload individual files, multiple files, and entire folders, providing flexibility for asset management. The auto-extract function for zip archives further simplifies onboarding by allowing teams to handle large volumes of assets efficiently.

benefits.name: Cross-Functional Asset Utilization
benefits.description: Pimcore’s Manual Digital Asset Import feature supports cross-functional asset usage, ensuring that imported files—such as CSVs for product data or media assets for marketing—are immediately available for PIM, DAM, and DXP applications, streamlining content access across teams.

features.name: API Based Data Importing
features.headline: Efficient, Secure API-Based Data Onboarding
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s API-Based Data Onboarding accelerates the onboarding process with GraphQL and REST integrations, using the Datahub to handle product data with speed and precision. With flexible push/pull options, easy configuration, secure access, and defined API schemas, your data is onboarded efficiently and safely.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s API-Based Data Onboarding offers a powerful solution for efficiently managing product data integration across PIM and E-Commerce systems. Utilizing GraphQL or REST APIs via the Datahub, this feature provides a flexible setup that can handle both push and pull integrations, accommodating diverse data volumes and sources. Through a straightforward configuration process, teams can define API schemas, manage multiple endpoints, and set granular permissions for secure data access, streamlining onboarding without compromising security.

This feature also ensures interoperability with a defined API format and schema, allowing quick adaptation to new data sources or systems. Permissions and security protocols are built-in to safeguard sensitive information while allowing rapid data synchronization, significantly reducing time-to-market for product data updates. Ideal for organizations that rely on extensive, complex product data, Pimcore’s API-Based Data Onboarding maximizes data management efficiency, enabling businesses to deliver up-to-date information across digital commerce platforms swiftly and securely.
features.description: With API-Based Data Onboarding, Pimcore enables rapid and flexible integration of product data through secure, customizable GraphQL and REST API endpoints via the Datahub. Configurable for both push and pull methods, it supports seamless onboarding for large or diverse data sets. This feature allows businesses to define API formats and schemas, manage multiple endpoints, and establish permissions for secure data handling. Designed to accelerate data readiness, this onboarding approach supports efficient data flow into PIM and E-Commerce channels while maintaining full control and compliance with security protocols.

benefits.name: Accelerated Data Integration
benefits.description: Pimcore’s API-Based Data Onboarding enables fast data integration by supporting flexible GraphQL and REST API configurations, both of which can be customized to suit push and pull data strategies. By simplifying the onboarding process, this feature minimizes setup time and speeds up the availability of new or updated product data across all platforms.

benefits.name: Enhanced Data Accuracy and Control
benefits.description: With defined API schemas and multiple configurable endpoints, Pimcore’s Data Onboarding ensures accuracy and consistency across product data. By allowing businesses to tailor API interactions, this feature enhances data control and reduces discrepancies, helping to maintain high-quality, precise product information in PIM and E-Commerce systems.

benefits.name: Secure and Compliant Data Handling
benefits.description: Pimcore’s API-Based Data Onboarding prioritizes security with robust access control and permissions, ensuring that data onboarding remains compliant with industry regulations. With the ability to assign role-based permissions, businesses can prevent unauthorized access and maintain strict data security across systems.

features.name: Data Mapping
features.headline: Streamline Data Integration with Advanced Mapping
features.shortDescription: Data Mapping in Pimcore Datahub automates the transformation of data for import and distribution. It formats and aligns content to fit the needs of systems like e-commerce platforms, ERPs, and APIs. With flexible field-level rules and logic, it ensures accurate, consistent, and scalable data delivery across all channels.
features.longDescription:
The Data Mapping feature within Pimcore Datahub plays a pivotal role not only during data import, but also when distributing data across various channels and systems. In the context of data distribution, Data Mapping ensures that structured content from Pimcore is transformed, formatted, and aligned to meet the unique requirements of each target system — be it an e-commerce platform, mobile app, ERP, or third-party marketplace.
With its advanced configuration options, the Data Mapping feature allows you to define how internal Pimcore data should be translated into the structure expected by downstream systems. This includes adjusting field names, converting data types, and formatting values to comply with external standards. Whether you're exporting product catalogs, customer data, or digital assets, the Data Mapping functionality ensures that your data is always delivered in the right format and context.
One of the key strengths of Pimcore's approach is its support for field-level transformations during export. You can apply logic such as conditional mappings, value translations, or dynamic calculations to tailor the outgoing data.
