This enables organizations to create highly customized data feeds without the need for manual intervention or external transformation layers - making the process more efficient and less error-prone.
By automating the transformation of data for distribution, the Data Mapping feature significantly reduces complexity in multi-channel publishing scenarios. It ensures consistency and accuracy across all endpoints, helping businesses maintain a strong, reliable presence in every digital channel they serve. Whether you're pushing data to external APIs, generating export files, or feeding third-party systems in real time, Pimcore’s Data Mapping makes the entire process seamless, scalable, and robust.
features.description: The Data Mapping feature in Pimcore Datahub simplifies data transformation for both import and distribution across multiple systems. It allows you to tailor and format structured Pimcore content to meet the unique requirements of target platforms like e-commerce sites, mobile apps, ERPs, and marketplaces. With support for field-level transformations, conditional logic, and value formatting, it enables highly customized, automated data exports—eliminating manual effort and reducing errors. This ensures consistent, accurate, and scalable multi-channel data delivery.

capabilities.name: Data Distribution
capabilities.headline: Seamless Data Distribution
capabilities.shortDescription: Pimcore’s data distribution capabilities ensure efficient, real-time data sharing across various channels and systems. By leveraging flexible integration options and automated workflows, it streamlines data distribution for enhanced operational efficiency and consistency.
capabilities.longDescription:
Pimcore’s data distribution capabilities are designed to ensure seamless and efficient sharing of data across various channels and systems. This feature leverages flexible integration options, allowing businesses to connect Pimcore with their existing IT infrastructure, ensuring that data flows smoothly between different platforms. Automated workflows enhance the distribution process, minimizing manual intervention and reducing the risk of errors.

By enabling real-time data distribution, Pimcore ensures that all systems and channels are consistently updated with the latest information. This not only enhances operational efficiency but also ensures data accuracy and reliability, supporting better decision-making and improving overall business performance. Whether distributing product information, customer data, or digital assets, Pimcore’s data distribution capabilities provide a robust and scalable solution for modern enterprises.

features.name: API Based Data Distribution via Rest API
features.headline: Efficient Data Management with Pimcore REST API
features.shortDescription: Integrate and manage data seamlessly using Pimcore’s REST API. Designed for fast and secure data delivery, this API supports easy configuration, simple data transformations, and is optimized for frontend app integration, ensuring smooth and responsive application performance.
features.longDescription:
The Pimcore REST API is a versatile and highly efficient tool designed to streamline data integration and management across all of Pimcore’s domains, including PIM, MDM, DAM, CDP, and DXP. Leveraging the power of Pimcore’s Datahub, this API offers a straightforward configuration process, allowing developers to define and distribute data according to their specific needs. This flexibility reduces data complexity and enhances the efficiency of data handling across various applications.

Built with frontend app integration in mind, the Pimcore REST API ensures fast and reliable data delivery, essential for creating responsive and dynamic user experiences. It supports a range of data operations, including tree navigation for exploring hierarchical data structures, listing and searching for efficient data retrieval, and detailed access to individual elements. These capabilities are accessible through three main endpoints, which can be customized to suit the specific requirements of your project.

Security and control are paramount in the design of the Pimcore REST API. The API provides robust permissions and access controls, ensuring that sensitive data is protected from unauthorized access. Additionally, the API is fully documented and can be tested via Swagger UI, providing developers with the tools they need to implement and troubleshoot the API effectively. This thorough documentation ensures that even complex integrations can be handled smoothly, reducing development time and enhancing the reliability of the applications built on Pimcore’s platform.
features.description: Pimcore’s REST API offers a powerful, easy-to-configure solution for managing and integrating data across the platform. It supports rapid data delivery and simple transformations, making it ideal for frontend applications. The API provides multiple endpoints, including tree navigation, listing and searching, and element details, all secured with robust permissions. Comprehensive documentation and testing capabilities are available via Swagger UI, ensuring a smooth development experience and reliable integration.

features.name: Headless PIM
features.headline: Empower Data Management with Headless PIM/MDM
features.shortDescription: Enhance your data management strategy with Pimcore’s Headless PIM and MDM. Utilize API-driven delivery via GraphQL and RESTful interfaces, seamlessly integrating product and master data into your digital ecosystem with flexible, composable infrastructure.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s Headless PIM and MDM solutions provide a robust and flexible approach to managing product information and master data, essential for businesses that require seamless integration across multiple platforms and channels. By adopting a headless architecture, Pimcore allows you to decouple data management from presentation layers, enabling the API-driven delivery of data to any digital touchpoint.

At the heart of Pimcore’s Headless PIM/MDM is the Datahub, which provides defined APIs through GraphQL and RESTful interfaces. These APIs allow you to integrate your product and master data directly into various digital systems, including e-commerce platforms, mobile apps, websites, and other enterprise applications. This integration ensures that your data remains consistent, accurate, and easily accessible across all channels.

The composable infrastructure offered by Pimcore’s Headless PIM/MDM allows for maximum flexibility and scalability. You can build and customize your data management architecture to suit your specific needs, whether you’re managing a vast product catalog, consolidating master data, or synchronizing information across global systems. This flexibility ensures that your data management processes can evolve alongside your business, adapting to new challenges and opportunities without the need for a complete system overhaul.

Moreover, Pimcore’s Headless PIM/MDM solutions can be integrated with third-party systems, including Content Delivery Networks (CDNs), to optimize the global delivery of product and master data. This ensures that your data reaches its intended audience quickly and efficiently, regardless of location, enhancing the overall performance and reliability of your digital operations.
features.description: Pimcore’s Headless PIM (Product Information Management) and MDM (Master Data Management) offer a powerful, API-first approach to managing and delivering data across any platform. By leveraging GraphQL and RESTful APIs via Pimcore Datahub, these solutions enable seamless integration of product and master data into your digital ecosystem. The composable infrastructure supports flexible, scalable architectures that can easily adapt to changing business requirements, ensuring that your data is always accessible, consistent, and up-to-date.

features.name: Headless DAM
features.headline: Empower Digital Experiences with Headless DAM
features.shortDescription: Deliver digital assets and metadata seamlessly with Pimcore’s Headless DAM. Leverage composable infrastructure and defined APIs via Datahub, utilizing GraphQL and RESTful interfaces. Integrate effortlessly with CDNs for optimized global delivery.
features.longDescription:
In today’s fast-paced digital landscape, the ability to deliver digital assets quickly and efficiently across multiple channels is critical. Pimcore’s Headless DAM (Digital Asset Management) is designed to meet this need by providing a robust, API-first approach to asset and metadata distribution. This headless delivery model allows you to manage and distribute your digital content without the constraints of traditional CMS frameworks, making it ideal for composable and modular digital architectures.

At the core of Pimcore’s Headless DAM is the powerful Datahub, which provides defined APIs using both GraphQL and RESTful interfaces. These APIs enable you to seamlessly integrate digital assets and metadata into any application, whether it’s a website, mobile app, or other digital platform. This flexibility allows developers to access and deliver content in real-time, ensuring that your digital experiences are always up-to-date and responsive.

Furthermore, Pimcore’s Headless DAM supports integration with Content Delivery Networks (CDNs), enabling the optimized global delivery of your digital assets. By leveraging CDNs, you can ensure that your content is delivered from the closest edge server to the end user, significantly reducing load times and improving the overall user experience. This capability is especially valuable for businesses with a global audience, as it ensures that digital assets are always available quickly and reliably, regardless of the user’s location.

Whether you’re managing images, videos, documents, or any other type of digital content, Pimcore’s Headless DAM provides a flexible, scalable, and efficient solution for distributing your assets and metadata. By combining a composable infrastructure with powerful APIs and CDN integration, it empowers you to create and deliver seamless digital experiences across any platform or device.
features.description: Pimcore’s Headless DAM enables the efficient, API-driven delivery of digital assets and metadata across any channel. With a composable infrastructure, this feature offers flexible integration using GraphQL and RESTful APIs via Datahub. Designed for modern digital ecosystems, it supports seamless integration with Content Delivery Networks (CDNs) to optimize the global distribution of assets, ensuring fast, reliable access to your digital content.

features.name: File Based Data Distribution - ad-hoc Data Exports
features.headline: Effortless Data Export with File-Based Sync
features.shortDescription: Easily export data from Pimcore’s UI grids to CSV and XLSX files. Define data columns, apply simple transformations, and save configurations for streamlined, repeatable data exports.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s File-Based Data Sync feature provides a powerful and user-friendly solution for exporting data from the platform’s UI grids. Designed with flexibility and ease of use in mind, this feature enables you to export data directly into CSV and XLSX formats, making it simple to share, analyze, or integrate your data with other systems.

The export process is highly customizable. You can define which data columns are included in the export, ensuring that only the relevant information is extracted. Additionally, you can apply simple transformations to the data during the export process, such as reformatting dates, concatenating fields, or performing basic calculations. This allows you to tailor the exported data to meet specific needs without requiring additional data processing after export.

One of the key benefits of the File-Based Data Sync feature is the ability to save your export configurations. This means that once you’ve set up the perfect export template—selecting columns, applying transformations, and choosing the file format—you can save this configuration for future use. This is particularly useful for regular data exports, as it eliminates the need to reconfigure settings each time, significantly speeding up the process and ensuring consistency across exports.

Whether you need to export data for reporting, analysis, or integration with other systems, Pimcore’s File-Based Data Sync feature offers a streamlined, efficient, and customizable solution. By providing intuitive data export capabilities directly within the Pimcore platform, it empowers users to maintain control over their data, enhance productivity, and ensure that their data sync processes are both accurate and repeatable.
features.description: Pimcore’s File-Based Data Sync feature allows you to export data directly from UI grids into CSV and XLSX formats. You can define the data columns to be included and apply simple transformations during the export process. Configurations can be saved for future use, making regular data exports quick and efficient. This feature simplifies data management by providing an intuitive way to sync data across systems and formats, tailored to your specific needs.

features.name: Custom Distribution
features.headline: Unleash Full Flexibility with Pimcore Core API
features.shortDescription: Extend and customize Pimcore to fit your exact needs with the powerful Pimcore Core API. Built on the Symfony framework and the latest PHP technology, this API enables you to create custom APIs, exporters, and more, offering unmatched flexibility and performance.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s Core API is the backbone of the platform, offering developers the ultimate toolset for customizing and extending Pimcore to meet specific business needs. Unlike standard APIs, the Pimcore Core API provides deep integration capabilities, allowing you to adapt every aspect of the platform. Built on the latest PHP technology and leveraging the globally recognized Symfony framework, the Core API ensures that your customizations are both robust and high-performing.

Whether you need to create custom APIs, develop unique exporters, or integrate third-party services, the Pimcore Core API offers the full flexibility required to make Pimcore your own. This API doesn’t just interact with the platform—it powers it, meaning that everything you build is seamlessly integrated into the core functionality of Pimcore. This deep level of customization allows you to tailor the platform to your exact specifications, ensuring that it meets the unique demands of your business.

The Pimcore Core API is designed for developers who require maximum control and performance. By using this API, you can optimize the platform’s behavior, create complex data workflows, and enhance existing features to deliver a truly customized digital experience. However, it does require coding expertise, making it an ideal choice for development teams looking to push the boundaries of what Pimcore can do.
features.description: ´In addition to the robust GraphQL and RESTful interfaces provided by Pimcore Datahub, the Pimcore Core API offers unparalleled flexibility for adapting and extending the entire Pimcore platform. Built on the cutting-edge Symfony framework and the latest PHP technology, the Pimcore Core API allows developers to fully customize the platform by creating custom APIs, exporters, and integrations. This API powers the entire platform, offering developers the tools they need to achieve the best performance while maintaining full control over their digital ecosystem.

features.name: Cross-Channel Orchestration
features.headline: Seamless Cross-Channel Orchestration for Unified Customer Engagement
features.shortDescription: Pimcore CDP’s Cross-Channel Orchestration synchronizes customer interactions across multiple platforms, providing a cohesive and personalized experience at every touchpoint for consistent, impactful engagement.
features.longDescription: Pimcore CDP’s Cross-Channel Orchestration feature enables businesses to deliver a seamless, integrated customer experience across all digital and physical touchpoints, from websites and mobile apps to in-store kiosks and customer support. By synchronizing interactions and adapting messaging to each customer’s journey, Pimcore ensures that every engagement is relevant, timely, and personalized, regardless of channel. This cohesive approach enhances consistency, reinforcing brand identity and building customer trust through interactions that reflect a complete understanding of each individual’s preferences and behaviors. As a result, businesses can create impactful, customer-centric experiences that transition smoothly from one platform to the next, strengthening relationships and supporting a more engaged, loyal customer base.
features.description: Pimcore’s Cross-Channel Orchestration feature empowers businesses to seamlessly manage customer interactions across various channels, ensuring a unified and personalized experience that adapts to each customer’s journey. This feature supports consistent messaging, engagement, and personalization, creating a connected experience that enhances customer satisfaction and loyalty.

features.name: File Based Data Distribution - Prepared Data Exports
features.headline: Efficient File-Based Data Distribution with Custom Exports
features.shortDescription: Streamline data distribution with Pimcore’s File-Based Data Distribution feature. Easily configure, schedule, and deliver data exports in various formats like CSV, XML, and JSON. Utilize caching for faster distribution, and seamlessly integrate pull and push data delivery.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s File-Based Data Distribution feature is designed to make exporting and distributing data from your Pimcore platform both flexible and efficient. Through Datahub, this feature provides a powerful set of tools for managing data exports, allowing you to define exactly which data columns to include, apply simple transformations to format the data as needed, and choose from various file formats such as CSV, XML, and JSON.

The configuration process is straightforward, enabling you to tailor your exports to meet specific requirements without unnecessary complexity. Once configured, you can schedule these exports to run automatically at specified intervals, ensuring that your data is always up-to-date and ready for distribution when needed. This automation is particularly beneficial for businesses that need to regularly synchronize data across multiple platforms or deliver updated datasets to external partners.

Pimcore’s File-Based Data Distribution feature also supports both pull and push delivery methods. You can set up exports that external systems can pull on demand, or you can push data directly to specified destinations, such as cloud storage, FTP servers, or other enterprise systems. This flexibility allows you to integrate seamlessly with a wide range of data ecosystems, ensuring that your data reaches its intended recipients without manual intervention.

To further enhance performance, the feature includes caching capabilities, which store export data temporarily for faster distribution. This ensures that large or frequently accessed datasets can be delivered more quickly, reducing latency and improving the efficiency of your data distribution workflows.

Whether you’re exporting data for reporting, analysis, or integration with other systems, Pimcore’s File-Based Data Distribution feature offers a comprehensive solution that combines ease of use with powerful functionality. By integrating advanced scheduling, flexible delivery options, and efficient data handling, this feature helps you manage your data exports more effectively, ensuring that your business operations remain smooth and synchronized.
features.description: Pimcore’s File-Based Data Distribution feature enables the efficient export and distribution of data through Datahub. With easy configuration options, you can define data columns, apply simple transformations, and schedule exports in formats like CSV, XML, and JSON. This feature supports both pull and push data delivery methods and uses caching to speed up distribution. Whether you need to automate regular exports or distribute data to multiple systems, Pimcore ensures a flexible, fast, and reliable data distribution process.

features.name: Real-time Data
features.headline: Instant Data Synchronization Across Systems
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s Real-time Data Flows enable seamless, immediate data availability through event-based distribution setups. Supporting integrations with ERPs, CRMs, and eCommerce platforms, this feature ensures that all data changes are instantly accessible for enhanced synchronization and consistency.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s Real-time Data Flows offer a powerful solution for businesses requiring immediate data availability and synchronization across PIM and E-Commerce channels. Through event-based distribution setups, including Enterprise Webhooks and APIs, data changes are instantly accessible across integrated systems, such as ERPs, CRMs, and eCommerce platforms. This real-time capability ensures that every update—whether it’s new product information, customer details, or inventory levels—is available for distribution and synchronization as soon as it happens, reducing latency and enhancing data accuracy.

Designed for robust scalability, Pimcore’s real-time data flow capability supports businesses managing high volumes of constantly changing data. With seamless connectivity to essential business systems, it provides a dependable, event-driven framework for synchronized data, improving operational transparency and efficiency. By ensuring consistency across channels, Pimcore helps organizations deliver accurate, up-to-date information, enabling them to respond to changes with agility and enhancing customer experience across all digital platforms.
features.description: Pimcore’s Real-time Data Flows provide instantaneous data updates across PIM and E-Commerce systems, leveraging event-based setups such as Enterprise Webhooks and APIs. By enabling real-time integrations with ERPs, CRMs, and eCommerce applications, this feature ensures that every data change is immediately available for distribution, maintaining consistency and accuracy across platforms. Ideal for businesses with dynamic data needs, Pimcore’s real-time data distribution enhances operational efficiency by keeping product, customer, and order data synchronized and up-to-date across all digital touchpoints.

benefits.name: Immediate Data Consistency Across Channels
benefits.description: With real-time updates, Pimcore’s Real-time Data Flows guarantee that any data change—whether in inventory, pricing, or customer profiles—is immediately reflected across ERPs, CRMs, and eCommerce platforms. This immediate consistency provides customers and teams with accurate, synchronized information, supporting a reliable and unified experience across touchpoints.

benefits.name: Enhanced Operational Efficiency with Automated Sync
benefits.description: Pimcore’s Real-time Data Flows automate the synchronization of data changes, eliminating the need for manual updates. By instantly distributing data to integrated systems, this feature streamlines operations, reduces errors, and enables teams to focus on strategic tasks rather than data reconciliation.

benefits.name: Scalability and Adaptability for Evolving Business Needs
benefits.description: Built to support scalability, Pimcore’s Real-time Data Flows adapt to increasing data demands and complex integration requirements. This flexibility allows businesses to maintain performance, even as data volumes grow, supporting reliable, real-time data availability across all integrated systems.

features.name: Export Data to Marketing Platforms
features.headline: Seamless Integration with Marketing Platforms for Targeted Engagement
features.shortDescription: Pimcore CDP’s integration capabilities allow businesses to connect seamlessly with third-party marketing platforms like newsletter and analytics software, accessing unified customer data through Pimcore DataHub, Workflow Automation Engine, or Core API.
features.longDescription: Pimcore’s Integration with Marketing Platforms feature provides businesses with a flexible, efficient way to connect unified customer data with a variety of third-party marketing tools, from email newsletter services to analytics software. Through options like the Pimcore DataHub, Workflow Automation Engine, and Core API, businesses can access and synchronize customer data across platforms, ensuring seamless communication and engagement across every channel. By leveraging Pimcore’s connectivity capabilities, businesses can utilize up-to-date customer insights to create personalized, timely campaigns, making their marketing efforts more impactful. This integration allows for data-rich, responsive marketing strategies that adapt to customer preferences and behaviors, supporting more effective campaigns and a cohesive experience across all marketing channels.
features.description: Pimcore’s Integration with Marketing Platforms enables businesses to connect customer data with external marketing tools such as newsletter and analytics software, leveraging DataHub, Workflow Automation, or Core API for streamlined access. This integration empowers businesses to deliver targeted, data-driven campaigns by synchronizing insights across platforms, enhancing engagement and optimizing marketing strategies.

features.name: Event Based Data Distribution
features.headline: Real-Time Event-Driven Integrations with Pimcore
features.shortDescription: Automate and streamline your digital ecosystem with Pimcore’s event-based data distribution. Trigger webhooks on key events like data updates or workflow changes to integrate and synchronize with ERP, CRM, and e-commerce applications in real-time.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s event-based data distribution and integration capabilities empower organizations to build a dynamic, real-time digital ecosystem. With the ability to trigger automated requests to and from external systems based on specific events within Pimcore, such as data updates or workflow changes, you can ensure that your business processes are always in sync. This feature leverages webhooks via Pimcore Datahub to create seamless, event-driven workflows that connect Pimcore with essential enterprise systems like ERP, CRM, and e-commerce applications.

Setting up these real-time integrations is straightforward and highly customizable. You can configure webhooks to respond to various triggers, such as when a data element is updated or when a workflow status changes. Once triggered, these webhooks can send requests to external systems, ensuring that data is immediately synchronized across all platforms. This approach minimizes data latency and ensures that your systems are always working with the most up-to-date information, crucial for maintaining operational efficiency and accuracy.

Moreover, Pimcore allows you to fully configure the payloads sent in these requests, giving you complete control over what data is transmitted and how it is formatted. This flexibility is essential for integrating with diverse systems and ensuring that the data exchange process is smooth and error-free.

Experience the transformative capabilities of Pimcore Enterprise Edition’s webhooks, designed to deliver instant data synchronization, swift and efficient integrations, and reduced data latency. With Pimcore, you can seamlessly connect with ERP, CRM, and other enterprise systems, driving event-based workflows that are modular, flexible, and responsive to your business’s ever-evolving needs. This feature is a cornerstone of Pimcore’s ability to create a cohesive, automated, and integrated digital ecosystem, where all your systems communicate and operate in harmony.
features.description: Pimcore’s event-based data distribution allows you to trigger requests to and from external systems based on specific events within the platform, such as data updates or workflow changes. Through webhooks via Datahub, you can set up real-time integrations and synchronizations with ERP, CRM, and e-commerce applications. Configure custom payloads to ensure the right data is sent to the right place instantly. Experience the power of Pimcore Enterprise Edition’s webhooks, delivering instant data synchronization, swift integrations, and reduced latency for a responsive and interconnected digital ecosystem.

features.name: Data Mapping
features.headline: Streamline Data Integration with Advanced Mapping
features.shortDescription: Data Mapping in Pimcore Datahub automates the transformation of data for import and distribution. It formats and aligns content to fit the needs of systems like e-commerce platforms, ERPs, and APIs. With flexible field-level rules and logic, it ensures accurate, consistent, and scalable data delivery across all channels.
features.longDescription:
The Data Mapping feature within Pimcore Datahub plays a pivotal role not only during data import, but also when distributing data across various channels and systems. In the context of data distribution, Data Mapping ensures that structured content from Pimcore is transformed, formatted, and aligned to meet the unique requirements of each target system — be it an e-commerce platform, mobile app, ERP, or third-party marketplace.
With its advanced configuration options, the Data Mapping feature allows you to define how internal Pimcore data should be translated into the structure expected by downstream systems. This includes adjusting field names, converting data types, and formatting values to comply with external standards. Whether you're exporting product catalogs, customer data, or digital assets, the Data Mapping functionality ensures that your data is always delivered in the right format and context.
One of the key strengths of Pimcore's approach is its support for field-level transformations during export. You can apply logic such as conditional mappings, value translations, or dynamic calculations to tailor the outgoing data. This enables organizations to create highly customized data feeds without the need for manual intervention or external transformation layers - making the process more efficient and less error-prone.
By automating the transformation of data for distribution, the Data Mapping feature significantly reduces complexity in multi-channel publishing scenarios. It ensures consistency and accuracy across all endpoints, helping businesses maintain a strong, reliable presence in every digital channel they serve. Whether you're pushing data to external APIs, generating export files, or feeding third-party systems in real time, Pimcore’s Data Mapping makes the entire process seamless, scalable, and robust.
features.description: The Data Mapping feature in Pimcore Datahub simplifies data transformation for both import and distribution across multiple systems. It allows you to tailor and format structured Pimcore content to meet the unique requirements of target platforms like e-commerce sites, mobile apps, ERPs, and marketplaces. With support for field-level transformations, conditional logic, and value formatting, it enables highly customized, automated data exports—eliminating manual effort and reducing errors. This ensures consistent, accurate, and scalable multi-channel data delivery.

features.name: API Based Data Distribution GraphQL
features.headline: Powerful GraphQL APIs Across All Pimcore Domains
features.shortDescription: Access and manage data across Pimcore’s entire platform with robust GraphQL APIs. Seamlessly configure, transform, and secure your data while benefiting from real-time updates and multiple endpoints for PIM, MDM, DAM, CDP, and DXP.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s GraphQL APIs provide a comprehensive solution for accessing and managing data across the entire platform, covering every domain, including PIM, MDM, DAM, CDP, and DXP. Leveraging the power of GraphQL via Datahub, these APIs allow for real-time data interaction, ensuring that any changes to data models are immediately reflected in your API responses. This feature is particularly valuable for businesses that rely on up-to-the-minute data accuracy and need their integrations to be responsive and reliable.

Configuration of Pimcore’s GraphQL APIs is designed to be straightforward, allowing users to quickly set up and tailor APIs to their specific needs. The system supports defining and distributing data effectively, which is crucial for managing large and complex datasets. Simple transformations can be applied directly within the API layer, reducing the need for additional processing and streamlining data handling.

The APIs are defined by a clear format and schema, making it easy to understand and interact with the data. Multiple endpoints are supported, allowing for efficient data segmentation and targeted access. Additionally, robust permissions and security measures are built-in, ensuring that only authorized users can access or modify the data, protecting sensitive information from unauthorized access.

In essence, Pimcore’s GraphQL APIs provide a flexible, scalable, and secure framework for managing data across the platform. Whether you are integrating with external systems, building custom applications, or enhancing your digital experience, these APIs offer the tools and capabilities needed to achieve seamless, real-time data interaction.
features.description: Pimcore’s GraphQL APIs, available throughout the platform via Datahub, offer a powerful way to access and manage data across all domains—PIM, MDM, DAM, CDP, and DXP. These APIs provide real-time updates whenever data models change, ensuring that your integrations remain up-to-date and reliable. With easy configuration, the ability to define and distribute data efficiently, and support for simple transformations, Pimcore’s GraphQL APIs allow for a highly customizable and secure data management experience. The defined API format and schema, along with multiple endpoints and robust permission controls, ensure that your data is accessible and protected at all times.

features.name: ETL and Workflow Automation
features.headline: Streamline Data Integration with ETL and Workflow Automation
features.shortDescription: Pimcore enhances data integration with powerful ETL and Workflow Automation tools. Utilize Datahub, Data Importer, and API-based integration for seamless data management, and connect with third-party applications via n8n, Zapier, and iPaaS solutions like ipaas.com for comprehensive workflow automation.
features.longDescription:
In today’s data-driven world, effective integration and automation are key to a successful digital strategy. Pimcore stands out with its comprehensive ETL (Extract, Transform, Load) and Workflow Automation capabilities, making data integration seamless and highly customizable to meet your specific business needs.

Pimcore offers multiple avenues for integrating data into the platform. The Datahub and Data Importer are essential tools designed to handle complex ETL processes, efficiently ingesting and transforming data from various sources into Pimcore. These tools allow you to align imported data with your existing data models, ensuring accuracy and consistency across the platform.

For more dynamic data management, Pimcore’s RESTful and GraphQL APIs offer full control over data integration, allowing real-time data mutations and updates. This flexibility is crucial for businesses that require responsive and adaptable data management solutions.

Pimcore’s Workflow Automation engine enhances integration capabilities by connecting with services like n8n and Zapier, as well as iPaaS solutions such as ipaas.com. These integrations enable seamless communication with a wide range of third-party applications, including enterprise platforms like SAP, Salesforce, and HubSpot, as well as collaboration tools like MS Teams and Slack. This connectivity allows you to automate complex workflows, ensuring that your data remains in sync across your digital ecosystem.

Furthermore, Pimcore’s open architecture supports tight integration with AI/ML technology stacks, databases, third-party integration layers, and data warehouses. This ensures that your data ecosystem is interconnected, scalable, and capable of supporting advanced analytics and machine learning initiatives. By integrating with iPaaS solutions, Pimcore further extends its flexibility, allowing for easy connection to a vast array of enterprise applications and services, making it the most integrative data management platform on the market.
features.description: Pimcore’s ETL and Workflow Automation engine is central to its data management capabilities, offering various methods to integrate data depending on your needs. Use Datahub and Data Importer for efficient ETL processes, and RESTful or GraphQL APIs for flexible, API-based data integration. The platform’s Workflow Automation engine integrates with services like n8n, Zapier, and iPaaS solutions such as ipaas.com, enabling communication with enterprise applications like SAP, Salesforce, and more. Pimcore’s open architecture allows seamless integration with AI/ML stacks, databases, and enterprise systems, making it the most versatile and integrative data management platform available.

features.name: Content Delivery Networks (CDN)
features.headline: Seamless CDN Integration for Global Content Delivery
features.shortDescription: Distribute digital assets globally with Pimcore's CDN integration. Compatible with leading CDN providers like Amazon CloudFront, Fastly, and Cloudflare, Pimcore ensures fast and reliable content delivery, enhancing performance and user experience.
features.longDescription:
In the digital landscape, the ability to deliver content swiftly and efficiently to a global audience is paramount. Pimcore’s integration with Content Delivery Networks (CDNs) plays a crucial role in this process, ensuring that digital assets are distributed with speed and reliability. Pimcore’s open architecture is compatible with most CDN technology vendors, including industry leaders like Amazon CloudFront, Fastly, and Cloudflare, making it easy to integrate these services into your digital experience (DXP) and digital asset management (DAM) workflows.

When your digital assets are fully optimized and ready for publication—whether for an online store, PIM, or CMS—Pimcore simplifies the process of delivering these assets to the appropriate channels. The platform’s robust APIs facilitate easy publishing of digital content, while its omnichannel publishing capabilities ensure that the correct media assets are syndicated to the correct channels, tailored to the specific needs of each platform or device.

Pimcore’s support for CDNs means that your digital media assets, once ready, can be instantly distributed to users worldwide. This ensures that content is always close to the edge, significantly reducing load times and enhancing user experience. Whether you're delivering high-resolution images, videos, or other digital assets, Pimcore’s seamless CDN integration ensures that your content reaches your audience with maximum efficiency and reliability. This capability not only improves performance but also scales effortlessly as your content distribution needs grow, making Pimcore an ideal solution for businesses looking to enhance their global content delivery strategy.
features.description: Pimcore’s open architecture allows seamless integration with leading Content Delivery Networks (CDNs), including Amazon CloudFront, Fastly, and Cloudflare. As part of its DXP and DAM capabilities, Pimcore enables you to syndicate your digital assets globally, ensuring that content is delivered quickly and efficiently to users, no matter where they are. Whether you’re managing an online store, PIM, or CMS, Pimcore’s APIs make it easy to publish assets to the desired output channels. The omnichannel publishing feature ensures that the right media assets are delivered to the right channels, providing a consistent and high-performance experience across all touchpoints.

capabilities.name: Workflow & Business Process Management
capabilities.headline: Advanced Workflow & Business Process Management
capabilities.shortDescription: Pimcore’s Workflow Automation centralizes and streamlines data and experience management with a sophisticated workflow engine, visual designer, and integration with third-party tools like Teams and Slack. Pimcore Copilot further enhances automation through AI/ML-powered assistance.
capabilities.longDescription:
Workflow Automation is a cornerstone of Pimcore’s platform, enabling businesses to automate and streamline complex data and experience management processes. The foundation of this capability is Pimcore’s sophisticated workflow engine, which orchestrates workflows both within the Pimcore environment and with external systems through robust API and Webhook integrations. This allows for seamless interaction between Pimcore and third-party applications, ensuring that all aspects of your business processes are connected and efficient.

The visual workflow designer in Pimcore is a powerful tool that simplifies the creation of workflows, allowing you to design processes that are not only smart but also practical and aligned with your organizational goals. With its intuitive drag-and-drop interface, the designer enables users to map out intricate workflows that can be easily understood and managed, regardless of their complexity. This empowers businesses to accelerate management processes, reduce manual intervention, and ensure that tasks are completed in a timely and consistent manner.

Pimcore also integrates seamlessly with popular collaboration and communication platforms like Microsoft Teams and Slack. This integration allows for real-time communication and collaboration within workflows, making it easier for teams to stay connected and informed throughout the process. Whether it’s approving content, updating product information, or managing customer data, Pimcore’s workflow automation ensures that all stakeholders are on the same page, leading to more efficient and effective collaboration.

A game-changing feature of Pimcore’s Workflow Automation is the Pimcore Copilot, which brings the power of AI and machine learning into the mix. Pimcore Copilot can assist with automating repetitive tasks, analyzing data to identify patterns, and providing intelligent recommendations to optimize workflows. This not only accelerates work but also helps to minimize errors and improve the overall efficiency of your business processes.

In summary, Pimcore’s Workflow & Business Process Management capabilities provide a comprehensive solution for automating and optimizing your data and experience management processes. From its robust workflow engine and visual designer to seamless third-party integration and AI/ML-powered assistance, Pimcore equips your business with the tools needed to enhance productivity, collaboration, and operational efficiency.

features.name: Customized Views & Layouts
features.headline: Tailor Data Displays with Customized Views & Layouts
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s Customized Views & Layouts feature allows you to define unique views and layouts for data elements based on their workflow states. This ensures that users only see the most relevant information for their current tasks, streamlining their workflow and enhancing productivity.
features.longDescription:
In complex workflows, presenting the right information to the right users at the right time is crucial for maintaining efficiency and focus. Pimcore’s Customized Views & Layouts feature is designed to meet this need by allowing you to define specific data views and layouts that change dynamically based on the current workflow state of an element.

This feature allows administrators to create custom layouts that display only the most relevant data fields and elements, tailored to the needs of different users and roles within the workflow. For example, during the initial stages of a product development workflow, engineers might only need to see technical specifications and prototype data. As the workflow progresses to the marketing phase, the layout can shift to display market research, branding details, and promotional content, filtering out the technical data that is no longer relevant.

By customizing the views and layouts in this way, Pimcore ensures that each user is presented with a streamlined interface that aligns with their current tasks. This reduces cognitive load, minimizes distractions, and allows users to focus on the most important information, enhancing their productivity and decision-making.

Moreover, the Customized Views & Layouts feature supports a wide range of customization options. Administrators can define layouts for various data elements such as documents, assets, and objects, and specify how these layouts change as the workflow progresses. Whether you need to present a simplified view for quick reviews or a detailed layout for in-depth analysis, Pimcore provides the flexibility to tailor the interface to meet the specific needs of your workflow.

This feature is particularly valuable in environments where workflows involve multiple departments or stages, each requiring different types of information. By presenting users with only the data they need at each step, Pimcore helps ensure that workflows move forward smoothly and efficiently, without the clutter of irrelevant information.

Overall, Pimcore’s Customized Views & Layouts feature enhances workflow management by making data presentation more intuitive and role-specific. This not only improves user experience but also helps maintain the integrity and focus of complex workflows, ensuring that each task is completed with the highest level of efficiency.
features.description: Pimcore’s Customized Views & Layouts feature enables the creation of tailored data displays that adapt based on the current workflow state of an element. This powerful tool allows you to define different views and layouts for data elements, ensuring that users are presented with only the information relevant to their specific role and task. By filtering out unnecessary data, this feature simplifies user interactions and enhances efficiency across all stages of the workflow.

features.name: Workflow Transitions
features.headline: Seamlessly Manage State Changes with Workflow Transitions
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s Workflow Transitions feature enables users to transfer data elements between states within a workflow. Transitions can be controlled manually by editors or triggered automatically based on events, with permissions ensuring that only authorized users can make changes. This flexible system supports both manual and automated transitions, including integration with third-party applications via Webhooks or APIs.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s Workflow Transitions feature is a crucial component of its comprehensive workflow management system, designed to facilitate the seamless movement of data elements—such as documents, assets, or data objects—through different states within a workflow. Whether managing content approval, product lifecycles, or data maintenance processes, Workflow Transitions ensure that each element progresses according to the rules and conditions you’ve set.

One of the key advantages of Workflow Transitions is the ability to control how and when elements move from one state to another. Transitions can be triggered manually by authorized users, such as editors or managers, who have the necessary permissions to make these changes. This manual control is essential in scenarios where human judgment is required, such as reviewing content or approving a product for release.

In addition to manual transitions, Pimcore supports automated transitions that can be triggered by specific events or conditions. For example, a transition might be automatically initiated when a certain task is completed, a deadline is reached, or a predefined condition is met. This automation reduces the need for manual intervention, speeding up processes and ensuring that workflows progress efficiently.

Pimcore’s Workflow Transitions feature is also highly customizable, with the ability to define which transitions are allowed based on the workflow definition and user permissions. This ensures that only authorized users can move elements between states, maintaining the integrity and security of your workflows.

Furthermore, Pimcore allows for integration with third-party applications via Webhooks or APIs, enabling external systems to trigger transitions automatically. This capability is particularly useful for organizations that rely on a diverse ecosystem of tools and applications, as it ensures that workflows remain synchronized across platforms.

Overall, Pimcore’s Workflow Transitions feature provides the flexibility and control needed to manage complex workflows effectively, whether transitions are handled manually, automatically, or through integration with external systems. This ensures that your processes are not only streamlined but also secure and adaptable to your organization’s unique needs.
features.description: Pimcore’s Workflow Transitions feature empowers users to move data elements from one state to another within a defined workflow, ensuring that processes progress smoothly and according to plan. Transitions can be managed manually by editors or triggered automatically through events, with permissions controlling who can initiate these changes. This feature also supports integration with third-party applications, allowing transitions to be triggered via Webhooks or APIs, enhancing the flexibility and automation of your workflows.

features.name: Permission Management
features.headline: Tailor Permissions Based on User Roles and Workflow States
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s Dynamic Permission Management feature allows you to define and control actions and updates based on user roles and the current state of workflows. This ensures that only authorized users can perform specific actions at each stage of the process, enhancing security and maintaining process integrity.
features.longDescription:
Effective permission management is crucial for maintaining the integrity and security of complex workflows. Pimcore’s Dynamic Permission Management feature provides a powerful solution by allowing administrators to define permissions that adapt dynamically based on both user roles and the current state of a workflow.

With Dynamic Permission Management, you can precisely control what actions users are allowed to perform at each stage of a workflow. For example, during the “Draft” state of a document workflow, only editors may have permission to edit content, while in the “Review” state, only managers might have the authority to approve changes. This ensures that each step of the process is handled by the appropriate personnel, reducing the risk of unauthorized actions and maintaining strict process controls.

This feature also allows for nuanced permission settings that can vary depending on the user’s role. For instance, a senior editor may have broader editing rights compared to a junior editor, even within the same workflow state. This role-based permission control helps organizations manage complex hierarchies and workflows more effectively, ensuring that all actions align with company policies and workflow requirements.

In addition to role-based controls, Dynamic Permission Management supports state-specific permissions, allowing actions to be restricted or enabled based on the current status of a workflow. This capability is particularly useful for managing transitions between critical workflow stages, such as moving from “In Review” to “Approved” or from “Pending” to “Published.” By restricting actions based on workflow state, you can prevent premature updates or unauthorized changes, ensuring that your processes adhere to established guidelines.

Overall, Pimcore’s Dynamic Permission Management feature provides a robust framework for securing and managing workflows. By defining permissions that adapt to both user roles and workflow states, you can maintain tighter control over your processes, protect sensitive data, and ensure that only authorized users can perform specific actions, enhancing both security and operational efficiency.
features.description: Pimcore’s Dynamic Permission Management feature offers precise control over user actions by allowing you to define permissions that adapt based on user roles and workflow states. This capability ensures that only the right users can make changes or take actions at each stage of a workflow, providing a secure and flexible approach to managing permissions. Whether managing content approvals, product lifecycles, or data updates, this feature helps maintain the integrity and security of your processes.

features.name: Workflow Messaging & Notifications
features.headline: Stay Informed with Automated Workflow Messaging & Notifications
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s Workflow Messaging & Notifications feature ensures that users and roles are promptly informed of workflow changes through automated notifications. Whether via in-platform messages, emails, or Webhooks to external systems, this feature keeps everyone aligned and ensures seamless process continuity.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s Workflow Messaging & Notifications feature is designed to keep your team informed and aligned by automatically notifying users and roles of important workflow changes. Whether you’re managing content approvals, product lifecycles, or any other complex process, timely communication is crucial for ensuring that workflows progress smoothly and without delay.

This feature allows you to configure notifications that are triggered whenever a workflow element changes state. For example, when a document moves from “In Review” to “Approved,” all relevant team members can be automatically notified, ensuring that they are aware of the update and can take the necessary next steps.

Notifications can be sent directly within the Pimcore platform, ensuring that users receive real-time updates without needing to switch between tools. Alternatively, notifications can be sent via email, making it easy for stakeholders to stay informed even when they’re not actively logged into the system. This flexibility ensures that critical updates reach the right people, no matter how they prefer to receive information.

In addition to internal notifications, Pimcore’s Workflow Messaging & Notifications feature supports the use of Webhooks to communicate with external systems. This is particularly valuable for organizations that rely on a network of integrated tools and platforms. By triggering Webhook messages, Pimcore can automatically update external systems or initiate actions based on workflow changes. For example, when a product is marked as “Ready for Launch,” a Webhook can trigger an update in your e-commerce platform, ensuring that the product goes live without manual intervention.

This integration capability not only ensures consistency across your digital ecosystem but also enhances the automation of your workflows, reducing the need for manual updates and minimizing the risk of errors.

Overall, Pimcore’s Workflow Messaging & Notifications feature is an essential tool for maintaining smooth and efficient operations. By ensuring that all stakeholders are promptly informed of workflow changes, this feature enhances communication, supports timely decision-making, and keeps your workflows on track.
features.description: Pimcore’s Workflow Messaging & Notifications feature provides automated alerts to users and roles whenever a workflow changes state, ensuring that key stakeholders are always informed. Notifications can be sent as in-platform messages or emails, and Webhooks can trigger updates in external systems. This feature enhances communication, keeping everyone in sync with ongoing processes and ensuring timely action on critical tasks.

features.name: Workflows & Workflow States
features.headline: Flexible Workflow Management for Seamless Process Automation
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s Workflows & Workflow States feature allows you to configure multiple, flexible workflows for managing documents, assets, and data objects. With support for both workflows and state machines, this feature is ideal for automating product lifecycles, approval processes, and more, while clearly displaying the current workflow state of each element.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s Workflows & Workflow States feature is a powerful tool designed to streamline and automate processes across your digital platform, providing flexibility and control over how documents, assets, and data objects move through your organization. Whether managing product lifecycles, approval processes, or data maintenance, this feature allows you to define and manage workflows that are perfectly aligned with your operational needs.

At the core of this feature is the ability to configure multiple workflows, each with its own set of states and transitions. These workflows can be as simple or as complex as needed, adapting to a wide range of scenarios. For example, a product lifecycle workflow might include states such as “Draft,” “In Review,” “Approved,” and “Published,” with transitions that move the product through each stage based on specific criteria or actions.

Pimcore supports both workflows, where an element can exist in multiple states simultaneously, and state machines, where an element can only be in one state at a time. This dual support provides the flexibility to model processes that require parallel progression or strict, linear advancement through stages.

One of the key benefits of Pimcore’s workflow management is its ability to clearly display the current workflow state of each element, whether it’s a document, asset, or data object. This visibility ensures that all stakeholders are aware of where an item is in its lifecycle, reducing confusion and improving collaboration across teams.

Workflows can be applied to a variety of processes, including product lifecycles, where different stages of a product’s development and release can be managed seamlessly. In approval processes, workflows ensure that content or data cannot move to the next stage until it has received the necessary approvals, maintaining quality control and compliance. Data maintenance processes benefit from workflows by ensuring that data is reviewed, updated, and validated systematically, while communication processes can use workflows to track and manage the flow of information across teams or departments.

Overall, Pimcore’s Workflows & Workflow States feature provides a comprehensive solution for automating and managing processes across your organization, enhancing efficiency, visibility, and control over critical workflows.
features.description: Pimcore’s Workflows & Workflow States feature provides a robust framework for automating and managing complex processes across your digital ecosystem. You can configure flexible workflows with various states and transitions, tailored to specific use cases such as product lifecycles, approval processes, and data maintenance. Supporting both workflows (multiple states at once) and state machines (one state at a time), Pimcore ensures that each element’s current workflow state is clearly displayed, enhancing visibility and control over your processes.

features.name: Workflow Designer
features.headline: Design Workflows Visually with No-Code Interface
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s Workflow Designer empowers you to create and manage workflows visually, without the need for coding. This integrated tool offers a no-code interface that allows you to define workflow places, transitions, and global actions using a visual planner. Import, export, and organize workflows with ease, all within a user-friendly environment.
features.longDescription:
The Workflow Designer in Pimcore is a revolutionary tool that transforms how workflows are created and managed within the platform. Designed to be intuitive and user-friendly, the Workflow Designer provides a no-code interface that empowers users to visually define, manage, and optimize workflows without writing a single line of code.

This integrated tool offers a visual wizard that simplifies the process of setting up workflows, making it accessible to users of all technical skill levels. Whether you’re designing complex approval processes, product lifecycle workflows, or data management routines, the Workflow Designer allows you to map out each step of the process visually. You can define workflow places, transitions, and global actions directly within the visual planner, ensuring that your workflows are both logical and efficient.

One of the key features of the Workflow Designer is its ability to organize workflow definitions within a folder structure. This organizational capability makes it easy to manage multiple workflows, keeping your processes streamlined and well-structured. Whether you’re managing workflows for different departments, projects, or products, the folder-based organization ensures that everything is easy to find and manage.

The Workflow Designer also supports importing and exporting workflows, adding another layer of flexibility to the tool. You can easily share workflows across different Pimcore instances, collaborate with team members, or back up your workflow configurations. This import/export functionality is particularly valuable for large organizations or agencies that need to standardize workflows across multiple projects or clients.

Furthermore, all settings within the Workflow Designer can be specified inline, providing a seamless and efficient workflow creation experience. This means that you can define the details of each workflow step, from setting permissions to specifying triggers, all within the same visual interface. The result is a workflow that is not only easy to create but also easy to manage and modify as your needs evolve.

Overall, Pimcore’s Workflow Designer is an essential tool for any organization looking to streamline and automate its processes. By offering a no-code, visual interface, Pimcore makes workflow design accessible to everyone, ensuring that your processes are optimized, efficient, and perfectly aligned with your business needs.
features.description: Pimcore’s Workflow Designer provides a powerful, no-code interface for visually designing and managing workflows. This tool integrates seamlessly with Pimcore's workflow engine, allowing you to create, edit, and organize workflow definitions in a folder structure. With the Workflow Designer, you can define workflow places, transitions, and global actions using a visual planner, making workflow creation intuitive and accessible. Additionally, the ability to import and export workflows enhances flexibility and facilitates collaboration across teams.

capabilities.name: Analytics & Reporting
capabilities.headline: Comprehensive Data Insights
capabilities.shortDescription: Pimcore’s Analytics & Reporting capability allows for robust data analysis, monitoring, and reporting. Leveraging integrated dashboards and third-party tools, it provides invaluable insights into data quality and intelligence, enhancing decision-making processes across various domains.
capabilities.longDescription:
Pimcore’s Analytics & Reporting capability empowers organizations to achieve an in-depth understanding of their data. This feature combines several functionalities, including Pimcore's sophisticated reporting engine, customizable dashboards, and the ability to integrate third-party analytics applications via versatile interfaces. These tools collectively enable users to analyze, monitor, and report on data across various domains and application scenarios.

Whether you are managing product information, digital assets, customer data, or web content, Pimcore’s Analytics & Reporting tools provide critical insights that help maintain data quality and enhance data intelligence. By delivering clear and actionable reports, this feature supports businesses in making data-driven decisions, optimizing processes, and ultimately driving growth. The flexibility and comprehensive nature of Pimcore’s analytics and reporting capabilities make it indispensable for any data and experience management strategy.

features.name: Dashboards
features.headline: Dashboards
features.shortDescription: Pimcore Dashboards offer real-time, customizable views of key metrics, supporting multiple personalized dashboards, predefined and custom reports, and the ability to create new dashboard widgets tailored to your needs.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore Dashboards serve as a central hub for visualizing and managing critical data, offering extensive customization options to meet the specific needs of different users and teams. With the ability to create multiple personalized dashboards, Pimcore ensures that each user can focus on the metrics that matter most to their role. These dashboards can integrate both predefined and custom reports, providing a detailed and comprehensive view of your business processes.

Pimcore also allows dashboards to be predefined within Pimcore perspectives, ensuring that every team member has access to the most relevant data and insights from the moment they log in. This predefined setup can be particularly useful for maintaining consistency across departments, ensuring that all users have a unified view of performance metrics and operational data.

The platform’s flexibility extends to the customization of dashboard widgets, enabling users to create and configure new widgets that display the data in the most useful format. Whether it’s tracking content performance, monitoring workflow efficiency, or overseeing data integrity, these widgets can be tailored to provide the exact information needed at a glance.

By offering these advanced capabilities, Pimcore Dashboards empower organizations to make data-driven decisions, optimize workflows, and maintain high levels of operational efficiency across all digital channels.
features.description: Pimcore Dashboards provide a flexible and powerful way to monitor and manage key data and performance metrics across your digital ecosystem. Users can create multiple personalized dashboards, each tailored to specific roles or tasks, ensuring that the most relevant data is always at hand. Dashboards can integrate both predefined and custom reports, allowing for a comprehensive view of your operations. Additionally, dashboards can be predefined within Pimcore perspectives, ensuring consistency across the organization. The platform also supports the creation and customization of new dashboard widgets, offering complete control over how data is displayed.

features.name: Product Lifecycylce Analytics
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s PIM enables comprehensive product management lifecycle reporting, integrating workflow states and lifecycle flags into reports and dashboards, offering an overview of data elements across different lifecycle stages.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s PIM platform is designed to provide comprehensive visibility into the product management lifecycle through detailed reporting and dashboard integration. With the ability to include workflow states and lifecycle flags in reports, users can monitor the exact status of each product or data element, tracking its journey from inception to retirement. This includes identifying which products are in active development, which are ready for market, and which are in decline or being phased out. By creating overviews of data elements in different lifecycle states, Pimcore ensures that businesses can manage their product portfolios with precision, ensuring that each product’s data is accurate, up-to-date, and aligned with its current lifecycle stage.

The platform’s reporting capabilities allow for custom reports that can highlight critical lifecycle stages, making it easier for teams to collaborate and make informed decisions based on real-time data. Dashboards can be configured to provide at-a-glance insights into product lifecycle states, helping organizations to stay agile and responsive to changes in the market or within their product lines. By integrating these lifecycle management features into its PIM, Pimcore empowers businesses to maintain a well-organized, efficiently managed product portfolio that supports long-term success.
features.description: Pimcore’s PIM platform offers powerful tools for managing and reporting on the product management lifecycle. By incorporating workflow states and lifecycle flags into reports and dashboards, users gain a clear overview of where each data element stands in its lifecycle. Whether a product is in development, ready for market, or being phased out, these insights allow for precise tracking and management of product data throughout its lifecycle. This level of visibility helps businesses optimize their product management strategies and ensure timely updates and transitions.

features.name: Integration of Advanced Ecommerce Trackings
features.headline: Advanced E-Commerce Tracking Integration for Enhanced Insights
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s Advanced E-Commerce Tracking Integration allows businesses to flexibly tag every aspect of the user journey, product data, and personalized checkout processes, enabling comprehensive analytics for both B2C and B2B operations and seamless integration with third-party analytics tools.
features.longDescription: Pimcore’s Advanced E-Commerce Tracking Integration offers a powerful solution for businesses looking to understand customer behaviors in detail, with flexible tagging capabilities that cover every touchpoint in the user journey. From product interactions to shopping cart activities and personalized checkout flows, businesses can apply custom tags to gather specific, actionable insights into how customers engage across the e-commerce platform. This functionality is ideal for complex e-commerce setups, as it allows for advanced tracking configurations tailored to the unique requirements of both B2C and B2B models. Pimcore’s seamless compatibility with third-party analytics solutions further enhances its value, enabling businesses to integrate with existing analytics systems and achieve a unified view of e-commerce performance. This data-rich approach supports effective decision-making, allowing businesses to optimize customer experiences and drive growth with insights derived from precise, flexible tracking.
features.description: With Pimcore’s Advanced E-Commerce Tracking Integration, businesses can gain deep insights into customer behaviors by tagging each step of the user journey, from product views to complex checkout processes. This flexible tracking approach supports integration with any third-party analytics solution, enabling data-driven decisions and granular reporting that reflects the intricacies of both B2C and B2B e-commerce environments.

features.name: Integrated Analytics & Reporting
features.headline: Integrated Analytics & Reporting
features.shortDescription: Pimcore's integrated analytics and reporting enable real-time data visualization, custom report creation via statistics explorer functionalities, and seamless integration with dashboards. Users can generate charts, tables, and export report data, sharing insights across teams.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s integrated analytics and reporting capabilities offer a powerful platform for real-time data visualization and in-depth analysis. With the ability to create custom reports via statistics explorer functionalities, users can tailor their data queries without using SQL to meet specific needs, ensuring that reports provide the most relevant insights. These reports can include detailed charts and tables for clear data representation and can be easily shared across teams, fostering collaboration and informed decision-making.

One of the standout features of Pimcore’s reporting tools is their seamless integration with dashboards. Users can embed reports directly into their dashboards, allowing for continuous monitoring of key metrics and real-time updates. This integration ensures that the most important data is always accessible and up-to-date, enabling more agile and responsive management.

Moreover, Pimcore supports the export of report data, giving users the flexibility to analyze data outside of the platform or to share insights with external stakeholders. This export capability, combined with the platform’s advanced reporting features, makes Pimcore an indispensable tool for businesses looking to leverage data for strategic advantage.
features.description: Pimcore’s integrated analytics and reporting provide a comprehensive suite of tools for data-driven decision-making. Users can create custom reports using statistics explorer functionalities, visualize data through charts and tables, and easily share reports across teams. Reports can be directly integrated into dashboards for real-time monitoring and personalized data views. Additionally, report data can be exported for external analysis, ensuring flexibility and accessibility of key insights. This robust feature set supports businesses in optimizing their operations with precise, actionable data.

capabilities.name: Multichannel Publishing
capabilities.headline: Innovative Multi-Channel Publishing
capabilities.shortDescription: Pimcore DXP empowers businesses with smart multi-channel publishing, enabling seamless content management, delivery, and syndication across all channels—digital, social, mobile, print, and POS—with integrated AI/ML capabilities for transformative and personalized experiences.
capabilities.longDescription:
As the digital landscape continues to expand, the need for efficient multi-channel publishing becomes paramount. Pimcore DXP addresses this need by offering an innovative and comprehensive solution for managing, delivering, and syndicating content across a diverse range of channels. Whether you’re targeting digital platforms, social media, mobile devices, print, or in-store POS systems, Pimcore’s multi-channel publishing capabilities allow you to create and distribute content seamlessly, ensuring consistent and impactful experiences across all touchpoints.

Pimcore’s multi-channel publishing isn’t just about pushing content to different platforms—it’s about creating extraordinary digital experiences tailored to each channel’s unique demands. With tools like the Pimcore multi-channel publishing editor, you can craft content that is optimized for each specific outlet, ensuring that your message is delivered effectively, no matter where your audience encounters it. The platform also supports single-source publishing, making it easy to manage and update content from a central repository, streamlining workflows and reducing redundancy.

One of the standout features of Pimcore’s multi-channel publishing is its integration of AI and machine learning through Pimcore Copilot. These advanced technologies enable intelligent data transformation, allowing content to be adapted and personalized for different channels with minimal manual effort. Whether you’re converting text for social media, resizing images for mobile devices, or tailoring product descriptions for marketplaces, AI/ML ensures that your content is always optimized for its intended audience.

Moreover, Pimcore’s Workflow Automation and Data Hub further enhance your multi-channel publishing capabilities by enabling seamless integration with a wide range of third-party applications, including Adobe Creative Cloud, Microsoft Office 365, Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, and more. This connectivity ensures that your content is not only published efficiently but also enriched with data-driven insights, making your marketing efforts smarter and more impactful. Pimcore’s comprehensive approach to multi-channel publishing provides businesses with the tools they need to stay ahead in a rapidly evolving digital world, delivering personalized, high-quality content across every channel, right out of the box.

features.name: Ecommerce
features.headline: Composable E-Commerce Framework for Seamless Digital Experiences
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s E-Commerce Framework is a highly customizable solution for B2C, B2B, and D2C e-commerce challenges. Seamlessly integrating data management with experience management, it enables the creation of dynamic digital storefronts, configurators, and commerce-centric portals.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s E-Commerce Framework is a robust, composable platform designed to meet the diverse and complex needs of modern e-commerce, whether in B2C, B2B, or D2C contexts. This framework serves as the critical transactional link between Pimcore’s powerful Data Management capabilities—spanning Product Information Management (PIM), Master Data Management (MDM), Digital Asset Management (DAM), and Customer Data Platform (CDP)—and its comprehensive Experience Management (DXP) system.

With the E-Commerce Framework, businesses can seamlessly access all relevant and permitted data within Pimcore’s ecosystem, ensuring that every aspect of their e-commerce operations is informed by accurate, up-to-date information. This tight integration facilitates the creation of highly personalized and dynamic digital experiences, from visually compelling digital storefronts to sophisticated product configurators and CPQ (Configure, Price, Quote) applications.

One of the framework’s standout features is its ability to support the creation of commerce-centric portals tailored to the needs of various stakeholders, whether they are customers, partners, or internal teams. For example, businesses can build B2C portals that offer personalized shopping experiences, B2B platforms that streamline procurement processes, or D2C channels that enhance direct customer engagement.

The E-Commerce Framework is fully integrated into Pimcore’s drag-and-drop environment, allowing marketers, product managers, and other stakeholders to easily create and manage content, products, and promotions without extensive technical knowledge. This user-friendly approach not only speeds up time-to-market but also ensures that the digital experience is always aligned with the latest business strategies and customer insights.

By bridging the gap between data management and digital experiences, Pimcore’s E-Commerce Framework stands out as the only solution that offers such a high level of integration and flexibility. Whether you’re looking to enhance customer engagement, streamline operations, or launch new digital channels, this framework provides the tools and capabilities to make it happen, all within a single, cohesive platform.
features.description: Pimcore’s E-Commerce Framework is a versatile, composable platform designed to address complex e-commerce needs across B2C, B2B, and D2C markets. Acting as the transactional glue between Pimcore’s Data Management (PIM, MDM, DAM, CDP) and Experience Management (DXP) modules, it allows for seamless access to all relevant data and integrates effortlessly into personalized experience management.
