This powerful framework enables businesses to create dynamic digital storefronts, product configurators, CPQ applications, and commerce-centric portals, bridging the gap between data management and digital experiences like no other solution.

features.name: Product Data Syndication - Custom
features.headline: Flexible Data Syndication Across Global Channels
features.shortDescription: Pimcore provides robust and versatile data syndication capabilities, empowering you to seamlessly deliver and distribute data across a variety of global channels. With its advanced tools, you can ensure consistent and efficient data sharing tailored to your unique business needs. Leverage the Pimcore Data Hub to create customized data exports, and streamline integrations.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s Data Syndication feature is designed to meet the diverse needs of businesses looking to distribute and syndicate their data across multiple global channels with efficiency and precision. As a highly integrative platform, Pimcore offers several powerful functionalities that make data syndication both flexible and robust.

One of the core components of this feature is the Pimcore Data Hub, which allows businesses to create custom data exports and APIs tailored to specific channels and requirements. Whether you need to deliver product information, digital assets, or customer data, the Data Hub provides the tools to manage and distribute your data with full control and optimal performance. You can define how data is formatted, filtered, and delivered, ensuring that it meets the exact standards and specifications of each target channel.

Moreover, Pimcore’s Data Syndication capabilities empower businesses to handle complex data requirements effortlessly. For organizations managing multiple brands, regions, or product lines, the system ensures that data can be segmented and customized for each audience without creating unnecessary duplication or manual work. This streamlined approach not only saves time but also minimizes the risk of errors, ensuring that accurate and consistent information is delivered to all stakeholders across the globe.

In addition, the platform’s ability to integrate seamlessly with external systems and third-party applications makes it an invaluable tool for achieving true digital transformation. From e-commerce platforms and marketplaces to CRM systems and analytics tools, Pimcore supports a wide range of integrations that enhance your ability to distribute data efficiently. This interoperability ensures that businesses can remain agile, responsive, and competitive in a rapidly evolving digital landscape.
features.description: Pimcore’s Data Syndication feature equips businesses with the ability to seamlessly deliver and distribute data across a vast array of global channels, ensuring consistent and efficient communication with partners, customers, and internal systems. This capability is particularly valuable for organizations operating in diverse markets or managing complex data ecosystems, as it simplifies the process of sharing critical information. By leveraging the powerful Pimcore Data Hub, you can design and implement tailored data exports and APIs that align perfectly with your unique operational requirements. These tools offer unparalleled flexibility and performance, enabling you to adapt to evolving business needs, streamline data management, and enhance overall operational efficiency. Whether integrating with external platforms, synchronizing with partners, or driving omnichannel strategies, Pimcore’s robust features ensure your data flows smoothly and reliably across the digital landscape.

features.name: Fully-automated Print Publishing
features.headline: Revolutionize Print Publishing with Full Automation
features.shortDescription: Pimcore DXP enables fully automated print publishing for catalogs, brochures, and price lists, leveraging integrated data and personalization from PIM/MDM/DAM and CDP. Save time and streamline production with automated layout and print-ready document creation.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore DXP sets a new standard in print publishing by enabling fully automated workflows for producing high-quality catalogs, brochures, price lists, and other sales and marketing collateral. This cutting-edge solution leverages Pimcore’s robust Digital Experience Platform (DXP) for layout and configuration, along with integrated data from its Product Information Management (PIM), Master Data Management (MDM), and Digital Asset Management (DAM) systems. For added personalization, Pimcore’s Customer Data Platform (CDP) can be utilized to tailor content based on customer segments, preferences, and behaviors.

This powerful combination allows businesses to automate the entire print publishing process, from layout creation to the production of print-ready documents, with minimal manual intervention. This is particularly beneficial for companies that need to produce complex product catalogs featuring personalized assortments, pricing, and content across multiple languages and markets. By automating these processes, businesses can save significant time and resources, ensuring that their printed materials are always up-to-date, accurate, and aligned with their digital content strategies.

Pimcore’s automation capabilities are further enhanced by its integration with commercial tools like PDFreactor and open-source solutions such as Gotenberg. These tools are used to generate print-compliant CMYK PDFs and other print-ready documents, ensuring that the final output meets the highest standards of quality and compliance. Whether you need to produce thousands of copies for a global product launch or a limited run of highly personalized sales materials, Pimcore’s fully automated print publishing solution makes it easier, faster, and more cost-effective to achieve your goals.

By eliminating manual processes and streamlining the production of printed materials, Pimcore DXP not only reduces errors and improves efficiency but also frees up valuable resources that can be redirected towards more strategic initiatives. This makes Pimcore an indispensable tool for businesses looking to optimize their print publishing operations and deliver consistent, high-quality collateral that drives sales and marketing success.
features.description: Pimcore DXP offers a revolutionary solution for fully automated print publishing, ideal for creating complex catalogs, brochures, price lists, and other sales collateral. By utilizing integrated data from PIM/MDM/DAM and optional personalization from the CDP, businesses can automate the production of print-ready documents like CMYK PDFs, significantly reducing manual effort. Pimcore’s automation capabilities, combined with powerful tools like PDFreactor or Gotenberg, streamline the entire process, making it faster and more efficient to produce multilingual and market-specific materials.

features.name: PIM-MDM Integration
features.headline: Seamless PIM-MDM Integration in DAM
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s PIM-MDM Integration enables seamless access to PIM and MDM data within DAM, supporting unified, single-source publishing across all channels. This feature fosters consistency, allowing DAM to leverage PIM/MDM data, metadata, and entity relations effortlessly.
features.longDescription: Pimcore’s PIM-MDM Integration within its DAM environment revolutionizes multi-channel publishing by enabling seamless connectivity and shared data access across PIM, MDM, and DAM. This integrated system ensures that DAM assets can directly access and interact with PIM and MDM data—such as metadata and entity relationships—without additional data transfers, enabling single-source publishing from a unified hub. This means users can effortlessly relate DAM assets to PIM or MDM entities, streamlining content enrichment and facilitating content consistency across channels. Additionally, all PIM and MDM functionalities, such as data enrichment and relationship management, are available within the DAM interface, allowing assets to maintain consistency, accuracy, and relevance at every digital touchpoint.
features.description: With Pimcore’s PIM-MDM Integration, the DAM system can interact directly with PIM and MDM data, creating a fully integrated, single-source publishing environment. This integration allows DAM to utilize PIM and MDM features, accessing metadata, relationships, and other data entities in real time. Such connectivity enhances multi-channel publishing by ensuring consistent and up-to-date content across all touchpoints while centralizing asset and data management within Pimcore.

features.name: Semi-automated Print Publishing
features.headline: Effortless Print Publishing with Semi-Automation
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s Semi-automated Print Publishing streamlines the production of print deliverables, allowing users to compose materials like catalogs and labels with automated building blocks. Using Pimcore DXP’s Renderlets and a drag-and-drop interface, teams can quickly generate polished, ready-to-print content without external tools.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s Semi-automated Print Publishing feature revolutionizes print content production by providing a seamless, partially automated solution for creating a wide variety of print deliverables directly within Pimcore DXP. With customizable building blocks and areas, users can design print materials such as product catalogs, labels, and marketing collateral, defining levels of automation based on content needs. Using Pimcore Renderlets, this feature enables automatic access to Pimcore Data Objects, so up-to-date product information flows directly into print layouts, reducing the need for manual data entry and minimizing errors.

The feature includes a highly intuitive drag-and-drop interface, allowing users to assemble layouts and adjust components with ease, all within Pimcore. By replacing traditional desktop publishing (DTP) software, like Adobe InDesign, Pimcore centralizes print production in a single platform, streamlining processes and reducing costs. This semi-automated solution ensures content accuracy, consistency, and efficiency, making it ideal for organizations that need to publish print-ready materials frequently. With Pimcore’s Semi-automated Print Publishing, businesses can achieve professional-grade results while maintaining control over content quality and speed-to-market.
features.description: Pimcore’s Semi-automated Print Publishing simplifies the creation of high-quality print deliverables by enabling users to compose materials with flexible building blocks. Leveraging Pimcore DXP features and Renderlets, teams can automate access to Pimcore Data Objects, defining levels of automation based on project needs. Ideal for producing product catalogs, labels, and marketing collateral, this feature offers a powerful alternative to traditional DTP software, such as Adobe InDesign, by centralizing print publishing within a user-friendly, drag-and-drop interface in Pimcore. This integrated approach accelerates print workflows and reduces reliance on multiple tools, making it easier to maintain brand consistency and data accuracy across print materials.

benefits.name: Streamlined Print Workflow
benefits.description: Pimcore’s Semi-automated Print Publishing significantly reduces time and effort in print production by automating data integration and offering configurable building blocks. By using real-time data access via Renderlets, businesses can ensure accurate, consistent information across all print deliverables, minimizing manual work and accelerating the publishing process.

benefits.name: Improved Brand Consistency and Data Accuracy
benefits.description: With access to Pimcore’s centralized Data Objects, Semi-automated Print Publishing ensures that every print deliverable reflects accurate, up-to-date information. This feature reinforces brand consistency across printed materials by eliminating data discrepancies, making it ideal for businesses that require high-quality, uniform print content.

benefits.name: Cost-effective, User-Friendly Print Solution
benefits.description: Pimcore’s Semi-automated Print Publishing offers a powerful alternative to traditional desktop publishing software, allowing teams to produce print-ready materials entirely within Pimcore. With its intuitive interface and automated features, this solution reduces costs associated with additional tools and makes print publishing accessible to non-specialists.

features.name: DTP (Desktop Publishing) Software Integration
features.headline: Seamless Database Publishing with DTP Integration
features.shortDescription: Leverage Pimcore’s robust API capabilities to integrate seamlessly with desktop publishing (DTP) software and tools. Maintain a single source of truth while connecting to Adobe Creative Cloud, InDesign, Xpress, and web-based design platforms like Figma, Canva, or Sketch.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s Digital Experience Platform (DXP) is designed to seamlessly integrate with third-party database publishing and desktop publishing (DTP) tools, ensuring a unified and efficient publishing workflow. By utilizing Pimcore’s robust API capabilities, businesses can connect with industry-leading design and publishing platforms, maintaining a single source of truth for all content and data.

Pimcore’s integration capabilities extend to well-known tools in the Adobe Creative Cloud suite, including InDesign and Xpress, making it easier to incorporate Pimcore-managed assets into high-quality print and digital publications. Additionally, Pimcore can serve as a central hub for web-based design applications such as Figma, Canva, and Sketch, ensuring that all design and publishing activities are synchronized and up-to-date.

For more specialized publishing needs, Pimcore offers ready-made integrations with third-party solutions like priint:suite and easyCatalog, which are particularly useful for catalog production workflows. These integrations allow businesses to streamline the process of creating, managing, and publishing complex catalogs, whether for print or digital distribution.

Pimcore’s commitment to a single source publishing approach means that all content and data originate from a central repository, ensuring consistency and accuracy across all channels. Whether you choose to rely on Pimcore’s native tools or integrate with external DTP solutions, you can be confident that your publishing workflows will be efficient, cohesive, and aligned with your overall content strategy.
features.description: Pimcore offers seamless integration with third-party database publishing and desktop publishing (DTP) tools, allowing businesses to maintain a single source of truth across all publishing workflows. Through Pimcore’s powerful API capabilities, you can connect with Adobe Creative Cloud, InDesign, Xpress, and popular web-based design tools like Figma, Canva, and Sketch. Ready-made integrations with solutions like priint:suite or easyCatalog ensure smooth catalog production, while Pimcore’s own tools can be used to create print production workflows.

features.name: DXP & CMS Publishing
features.headline: Comprehensive DXP for Omnichannel Content and Commerce
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s fully integrated Digital Experience Platform (DXP) offers seamless access to PIM/MDM and DAM data, ecommerce capabilities, and advanced personalization. Ideal for content production across all channels, Pimcore DXP supports both headless and coupled modes, delivering flexibility and power for any digital strategy.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s Digital Experience Platform (DXP) is a comprehensive solution designed to meet the demands of modern digital strategies. It offers a fully integrated system that brings together content management, ecommerce, and personalization into one powerful platform, providing businesses with the tools they need to deliver exceptional experiences across all channels.

Pimcore DXP allows seamless access to data from its Product Information Management (PIM), Master Data Management (MDM), and Digital Asset Management (DAM) systems. This integration ensures that all content, from product details to media assets, is centrally managed and easily accessible, enabling a single source publishing approach that guarantees consistency across all touchpoints.

For businesses looking to expand their digital footprint, Pimcore’s ecommerce framework provides robust capabilities for managing online sales, including advanced product catalog management, personalized shopping experiences, and integration with various payment and shipping services. Coupled with Pimcore’s connectivity to its Customer Data Platform (CDP) framework, businesses can leverage deep personalization and marketing automation to engage customers with relevant content and offers.

Pimcore DXP is versatile and suitable for any content production needs, from websites, portals, and landing pages to marketing automation campaigns, digital point-of-sale (POS) systems, apps, and even print publishing. The platform’s ability to deliver the right content to any channel, including social media and marketplaces, makes it an ideal solution for omnichannel strategies.

One of Pimcore’s standout features is its flexibility in deployment. Businesses can choose between a headless, API-driven approach that allows for composable digital experiences or a fully integrated DXP mode that supports direct publishing. This flexibility ensures that Pimcore DXP can be tailored to meet the specific needs of any digital strategy, whether you require a decoupled frontend or a tightly integrated content management system.

Additionally, Pimcore’s workflow engine provides sophisticated automation capabilities, streamlining content production processes and enhancing collaboration across teams. This ensures that all content is delivered efficiently and consistently, no matter the channel or format.

Pimcore DXP is not only a powerful tool for content and commerce but also fully compliant with any frontend technology, making it a future-proof solution that can evolve with your business. By offering both headless and coupled modes, Pimcore ensures that you have the flexibility to adapt your digital experiences to changing market demands while maintaining a unified and consistent approach to content management and delivery.
features.description: Pimcore DXP is a fully featured, integrated system that combines content management, ecommerce, and personalization within a single platform. Seamlessly access data from PIM/MDM and DAM, and utilize the ecommerce framework for robust online sales. Pimcore DXP supports all forms of content production, including websites, portals, apps, and print, delivering tailored experiences across all channels. With both headless and coupled DXP modes, Pimcore offers the flexibility to meet any digital strategy while maintaining a single source of truth for all data.

features.name: Product Data Syndication - Third Party
features.headline: Expand Product Reach with 3rd Party Data Syndication
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s 3rd Party Product Data Syndication feature, integrated with Productsup, enables seamless distribution of product data across 2,500+ channels. Embedded within Pimcore Datahub, this solution simplifies feed management and marketplace integration, extending product visibility with minimal effort.
features.longDescription:
With Pimcore’s 3rd Party Product Data Syndication feature, businesses can effortlessly scale their product reach across a vast network of digital channels. Through its seamless integration with Productsup, Pimcore enables connection to over 2,500 channels, including global marketplaces, social platforms, and specialized retail sites, allowing brands to meet customers where they shop. This feature, embedded within the Pimcore Datahub, centralizes feed management and channel integrations, empowering users to efficiently configure and maintain multiple syndication streams from one platform.

Productsup’s robust feed management capabilities enhance Pimcore’s data syndication process, ensuring product information meets each channel’s specifications, from content formatting to pricing and inventory updates. This ensures accuracy and consistency across channels, reducing time spent on manual updates and minimizing errors. For organizations seeking broad visibility with minimal management overhead, Pimcore’s 3rd Party Product Data Syndication delivers a comprehensive, integrated approach to multi-channel publishing, supporting business growth by driving product engagement on the most effective platforms.
features.description: Pimcore’s 3rd Party Product Data Syndication feature, powered by integration with Productsup, enables efficient and extensive product data distribution. With access to over 2,500 digital channels—including marketplaces, social media, and retail sites—businesses can optimize product reach and brand visibility across the most relevant platforms. Directly embedded within the Pimcore Datahub, this feature simplifies product feed management, offering centralized control over syndication settings and channel selection. This solution allows teams to tap into expansive multi-channel opportunities without leaving Pimcore, enhancing efficiency and maximizing data-driven sales potential.

benefits.name: Maximize Product Reach Across Channels
benefits.description: Pimcore’s integration with Productsup allows businesses to syndicate product data across 2,500+ channels, including top marketplaces and social networks. This extensive reach maximizes product visibility, engaging customers on their preferred platforms and improving brand awareness across digital touchpoints.

benefits.name: Streamlined Product Feed Management
benefits.description: Embedded within Pimcore Datahub, the 3rd Party Product Data Syndication feature centralizes feed management, making it easy for teams to control, adjust, and distribute product data across multiple channels from one location, simplifying syndication processes and reducing errors.

benefits.name: Enhanced Efficiency Through Automation
benefits.description: Pimcore’s integration with Productsup automates data syndication, enabling product information updates to reflect in real time across channels. This automation reduces manual tasks, ensures data consistency, and allows businesses to respond quickly to market changes with minimal effort.

capabilities.name: Digital Asset Management
capabilities.headline: Digital Asset Management
capabilities.shortDescription: Pimcore's DAM centralizes and manages all media assets, providing a scalable, high-performance platform that integrates with your data and digital experience management strategies.
capabilities.longDescription:
Pimcore Digital Asset Management (DAM) is a comprehensive solution that centralizes all your media assets, including images, graphics, documents, videos, and other media content, into a single, scalable platform. This DAM system is not just about storing and organizing digital assets; it is an integral part of Pimcore’s broader data and digital experience management ecosystem, enabling seamless integration and management of assets alongside other critical business data.

The platform’s consolidated digital media repository serves as the backbone for reusing and repurposing digital assets, significantly optimizing content dissemination and search processes across your organization. With its robust and flexible architecture, Pimcore DAM can manage any type and volume of digital assets, making it a true enabler of digital transformation. It supports automated workflows from production to distribution, ensuring operational efficiency and enhancing your multi-channel marketing strategy.

Pimcore DAM offers high performance and scalability, making it an ideal solution for businesses looking to streamline their digital asset management while driving innovation and growth. By placing digital asset management at the core of your data strategy, Pimcore equips your organization with the tools needed to maximize the value of your digital content, improve collaboration, and deliver consistent, high-quality digital experiences across all channels.

features.name: Built-in DAM System
features.headline: Seamless, Integrated Digital Asset Management (DAM)
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s award-winning Digital Asset Management (DAM) offers a comprehensive solution for managing, optimizing, and delivering media assets across channels, seamlessly accessible within the unified Pimcore Platform.
features.longDescription: Pimcore’s Digital Asset Management (DAM) offers a complete solution for managing, delivering, and optimizing digital assets across all output channels. Integrated into the Pimcore Platform, this award-winning DAM centralizes media assets, making them readily accessible and usable across the platform’s data and experience management applications. Designed as part of Pimcore’s best-of-suite approach, the DAM unifies core digital capabilities to minimize IT complexities and support efficient asset workflows within a single ecosystem. With a focus on flexibility, Pimcore’s DAM allows businesses to streamline the organization and delivery of assets, supporting diverse formats and enabling cross-channel consistency. This seamless integration across data and experience management functions reduces silos and optimizes content use, empowering brands to efficiently deliver impactful, high-quality digital experiences.
features.description: Pimcore’s built-in Digital Asset Management (DAM) enables businesses to centralize and streamline digital media management, from integration and optimization to multi-channel delivery. As part of Pimcore’s composable suite, the DAM integrates effortlessly with the platform’s data and experience management capabilities, supporting a best-of-suite approach that reduces IT complexities by consolidating essential functions within a single, powerful framework.

capabilities.name: Brand Portals
capabilities.headline: Brand Portals
capabilities.shortDescription: Pimcore’s Brand Portals offer a centralized, customizable platform for managing and distributing brand assets, ensuring consistency across all channels.
capabilities.longDescription:
Pimcore’s Brand Portals provide an all-encompassing solution for organizations looking to manage and distribute their brand assets effectively. This feature is integral to maintaining brand consistency across various digital and physical channels, ensuring that every stakeholder has access to the most up-to-date and approved assets. The portal allows for extensive customization, giving companies the flexibility to tailor the portal’s appearance and functionality to match their specific brand identity and requirements.

The platform is designed with user experience in mind, offering advanced features such as granular access permissions, which ensure that different users or teams can access only the assets relevant to their roles. Additionally, Pimcore’s integration with third-party tools like Adobe Creative Cloud enhances the workflow, allowing for seamless collaboration between design teams and other stakeholders. The ability to set up configurable asset views, apply advanced search and filtering options, and manage metadata comprehensively further enriches the portal’s functionality.

Moreover, the Brand Portals support white-labeling, which enables companies to fully brand the portal in line with their corporate identity, providing a cohesive and professional user experience. Whether used for internal teams, external partners, or global distribution, Pimcore’s Brand Portals are an essential tool for companies that prioritize brand integrity and streamlined asset management.

features.name: Portal Configuration
features.headline: Comprehensive Configuration for Fully Customized Portals
features.shortDescription: Pimcore Experience Portals offer complete configuration options, from a Setup Wizard to multi-language support and data pool access. Enjoy full design control with white labeling, advanced user management, and seamless integration with OpenID Connect for a tailored and secure portal experience.
features.longDescription:
The Configuration of Pimcore Experience Portals is designed to give businesses complete control over the creation and management of their digital portals. This feature-rich configuration process begins with a user-friendly Setup Wizard, guiding you through each step of portal creation, ensuring a smooth and efficient setup tailored to your specific needs. Once set up, the portals can be fully customized, including the ability to support multiple languages, making them accessible and user-friendly for a global audience.

One of the key aspects of this configuration is the flexible management of data pools. Whether you're dealing with asset data pools or object data pools, Pimcore allows you to configure exactly what data is accessible through the portal, ensuring that the right information is available to the right users. This is further enhanced by advanced user management features, which include seamless integration with OpenID Connect. This integration allows for secure user authentication and management, including options for guest user access, ensuring that your portals remain secure and user access is tightly controlled.

Additionally, the full design control and white-labeling capabilities allow you to create a portal that not only functions according to your needs but also reflects your brand identity perfectly. You can customize every element of the portal's appearance, ensuring a cohesive brand experience across all digital touchpoints. Whether you're setting up a portal for internal use, partners, or customers, the comprehensive configuration options provided by Pimcore ensure that your portal is as functional, secure, and brand-aligned as possible.
features.description: The Configuration of Pimcore Experience Portals provides businesses with powerful tools to fully customize their portals. From the intuitive Setup Wizard to multi-language support, every aspect of your portal can be configured to meet your exact needs. Access and manage data pools, control user permissions with advanced management tools, and utilize OpenID Connect for secure access. With full white labeling and design control, your portals can be branded to reflect your identity while offering a user-friendly and secure experience tailored to your audience.

features.name: Sharing
features.headline: Secure and Flexible Data Sharing for Enhanced Collaboration
features.shortDescription: Pimcore Experience Portals offer robust data and digital asset sharing features, enabling users to share content securely with others, including guest users without login. Define permissions, choose downloading options, and protect shared assets with watermarking, ensuring controlled and secure collaboration.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s Data and Digital Asset Sharing feature within Experience Portals is designed to facilitate secure and flexible sharing of content, whether it’s data, documents, or digital assets. This feature is particularly valuable for organizations that need to collaborate with various stakeholders, both internally and externally, while maintaining strict control over their content.

One of the key benefits of this feature is the ability to share data and assets with both registered users and guest users who do not have a login. This is especially useful for sharing content with clients, partners, or any external stakeholders who require access to specific information without needing full portal access. The process is simple and secure, allowing you to share content via a direct link, which can be accessed without a password, streamlining the sharing process.

To ensure that shared content is used appropriately, Pimcore allows you to define specific permissions for each share. These permissions can include viewing rights, downloading rights, and even editing rights, depending on the needs of the recipient. This level of control ensures that you can tailor the sharing experience to suit different levels of collaboration while keeping sensitive data protected.

In addition to defining permissions, users can choose specific downloading options, such as allowing downloads in different formats or restricting downloads altogether. This flexibility is crucial for controlling how your data and assets are distributed, ensuring that they are used in the intended manner.

To further enhance security, Pimcore’s sharing feature also supports watermarking. This is particularly important for protecting sensitive or proprietary content, such as images or documents, by marking them with identifying information that discourages unauthorized use or distribution. Watermarking provides an additional layer of security, ensuring that even if content is shared broadly, it remains protected.

Overall, Pimcore’s Data and Digital Asset Sharing feature combines ease of use with robust security controls, making it an ideal solution for organizations looking to collaborate effectively while safeguarding their valuable digital assets and data.
features.description: The Data and Digital Asset Sharing feature in Pimcore Experience Portals provides a powerful and flexible way to share content with others, both within your organization and externally. Users can share data and assets securely with other registered users or guest users without requiring a login. You can also define permissions for each share, control downloading options, and apply watermarking to protect sensitive content. This feature ensures that your data is shared efficiently and securely, supporting seamless collaboration while maintaining full control over your assets.

features.name: Mobile Ready
features.headline: Seamless Mobile Access to Data and Assets
features.shortDescription: Pimcore Experience Portals offer a fully responsive interface, ensuring seamless access to data and digital assets from any device. Whether on a smartphone, tablet, or desktop, users can efficiently interact with the portal’s content, maintaining productivity on the go.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s Mobile-Ready feature is designed to provide users with a seamless and consistent experience across all devices, ensuring that data and digital assets are accessible anytime, anywhere. As more business operations shift towards mobile, having a fully responsive interface that adapts to different screen sizes and devices is crucial. Whether your users are accessing the portal from a smartphone, tablet, or desktop, they will experience a smooth and intuitive interface that retains full functionality, regardless of the device.

This mobile-readiness is not just about scaling the interface to fit smaller screens; it’s about rethinking the user experience for mobile contexts. The interface is designed to be touch-friendly, with easy navigation and accessible controls that make interacting with data and assets effortless, even on smaller screens. This ensures that users can perform all necessary tasks, from viewing detailed data to downloading digital assets, with the same ease and efficiency they would have on a desktop.

Moreover, the ability to access the portal’s full range of features on mobile devices means that productivity doesn’t have to stop when users are away from their desks. Whether they’re in the field, at a client site, or commuting, users can stay connected to the information they need, making quick decisions and staying engaged with their work. This flexibility is invaluable in today’s fast-paced business environment, where the ability to act on information in real-time can provide a significant competitive advantage.
features.description: The Mobile-Ready feature in Pimcore Experience Portals ensures that users can access and manage data and digital assets from any device, thanks to a fully responsive interface. Designed to adapt to different screen sizes and orientations, this feature guarantees that your portal delivers a consistent and intuitive user experience whether accessed on a smartphone, tablet, or desktop. By enabling efficient access to critical information and assets on the go, this feature supports uninterrupted productivity and flexibility in today’s mobile-driven world.

features.name: Data Search and Filtering
features.headline: Advanced Search and Filtering for Precise Data Retrieval
features.shortDescription: Pimcore Experience Portals offer powerful search and filtering capabilities, including global full-text search, advanced filtering options, and the ability to save searches. Users can easily navigate result lists and grids, making data retrieval fast, precise, and user-friendly.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s Search and Filtering capabilities within Experience Portals are designed to offer users an intuitive and powerful way to access the information they need, precisely when they need it. The global full-text search feature allows users to search across the entire portal with just a few keystrokes, delivering comprehensive results that encompass all relevant data. This is especially useful for large datasets, where pinpointing specific information quickly is crucial.

To further refine search results, users can utilize advanced filtering options. These filters allow for narrowing down results based on specific criteria, such as date ranges, categories, or custom attributes, making it easier to sift through large volumes of data and focus on what matters most. This level of precision ensures that users spend less time searching and more time using the data effectively.

In addition to searching and filtering, this feature allows users to save their search queries. This is particularly beneficial for users who frequently search for the same type of information, as it saves time and ensures consistency in data retrieval. Saved searches can be accessed quickly, making repetitive tasks more efficient.

The feature also supports result lists and grids, which display search outcomes in a clear and organized manner. Whether you prefer a list view or a grid layout, the search results are presented in a way that is easy to navigate and understand. This combination of powerful search tools and user-friendly display options makes Pimcore’s Search and Filtering feature an invaluable asset for any portal user, enhancing both productivity and user experience.
features.description: The Search and Filtering feature in Pimcore Experience Portals provides users with robust tools to find exactly what they need. With global full-text search, advanced filtering options, and the ability to save searches, users can quickly access relevant data. This feature also supports result lists and grids, ensuring that search results are displayed clearly and organized effectively for enhanced usability and efficiency.

features.name: Dashboards & Content Pages
features.headline: Dynamic Dashboards and Content Pages for Customized Insights
features.shortDescription: Create and manage customized dashboards and content pages within Pimcore Portals. Compose pages using flexible content blocks, integrate reports and statistics, and leverage the full suite of DXP features for a seamless, data-driven experience.
features.longDescription:
The Dashboards & Content Pages feature in Pimcore Portals offers a robust and flexible solution for presenting data and content in a way that’s both impactful and easy to navigate. With this feature, you can create highly customized dashboards and content pages tailored to the specific needs of your users. Whether you're displaying KPIs, detailed reports, or engaging multimedia content, this feature enables you to design pages that are not only visually appealing but also packed with actionable insights.

This functionality allows you to compose pages from a variety of content blocks, each serving a specific purpose—from data visualization tools like charts and graphs to text blocks, media elements, and more. The ability to integrate reports and statistics directly into your dashboards means that users can access critical information at a glance, without needing to dive into complex systems or databases.

Additionally, Dashboards & Content Pages fully leverage Pimcore's Digital Experience Platform (DXP) features, ensuring that every page is not only informative but also aligned with your broader digital strategy. You can use personalization tools, multi-channel publishing, and advanced analytics to create content that resonates with your audience, offering them a tailored and cohesive experience across all touchpoints. Whether your goal is to inform, engage, or convert, this feature provides the tools you need to create portals that are both user-friendly and deeply informative.
features.description: Pimcore's Dashboards & Content Pages feature empowers you to create fully customized dashboards and content pages within your portals. By composing pages from versatile content blocks, you can tailor the presentation of data, reports, and statistics to meet the unique needs of your audience. This feature leverages all the powerful DXP capabilities of Pimcore, allowing you to deliver a dynamic, engaging, and personalized user experience that drives informed decision-making and enhances portal usability.

features.name: Data Views & Presentation
features.headline: Tailored Data Views for Enhanced Asset and Object Management
features.shortDescription: Pimcore Experience Portals offer specialized data views and presentation options for both digital assets and data objects. In the context of DAM, view detailed digital assets, while PIM/MDM provides comprehensive insights into data objects, all within a user-friendly, customizable interface.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s Data Views & Presentation feature within Experience Portals is a powerful tool that allows users to access and manage digital assets and data objects with unprecedented clarity and precision. This feature is particularly beneficial in two key contexts: Digital Asset Management (DAM) and Product Information Management (PIM) or Master Data Management (MDM).

In the context of DAM, the feature provides detailed views of digital assets, including essential metadata, version history, and any related data. Users can quickly access all relevant information about an asset, from its creation date to its current usage status, ensuring that asset management is both comprehensive and intuitive. This detailed presentation helps users manage their digital assets more effectively, making it easier to maintain control over large libraries of images, videos, documents, and other media.

For PIM and MDM, the Data Views & Presentation feature offers in-depth insights into data objects, such as product information or customer data. Users can explore detailed views that include all relevant attributes, relationships, and classifications of each data object. This is particularly useful for businesses that rely on accurate and detailed product data to drive operations, as it allows for better data governance and ensures that all necessary information is easily accessible.

Moreover, the views are customizable, allowing users to tailor the presentation of data according to their specific needs. This flexibility ensures that users can focus on the most critical aspects of their data, enhancing both efficiency and decision-making processes. Whether you're managing digital assets or data objects, this feature ensures that you have the detailed, customizable views necessary to optimize your workflows and achieve your business objectives.
features.description: The Data Views & Presentation feature in Pimcore Experience Portals is designed to provide users with tailored and detailed views of their digital assets and data objects. In the context of Digital Asset Management (DAM), users can view and manage detailed asset information, including metadata, versions, and associated data. For Product Information Management (PIM) and Master Data Management (MDM), this feature offers in-depth views of data objects, enabling users to access comprehensive information, relationships, and classifications. These customizable views ensure that the most relevant data is always at your fingertips, improving decision-making and efficiency.

features.name: Reports & Statistics
features.headline: Actionable Insights with Comprehensive Reporting
features.shortDescription: Pimcore Experience Portals provide powerful reporting and statistics features, offering users detailed insights into portal activity and performance. Generate, view, and analyze reports to make data-driven decisions and optimize your portal’s effectiveness.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s Reports & Statistics feature within Experience Portals is a robust tool designed to provide users with in-depth insights into portal activity and performance. This feature enables you to generate detailed reports that cover a wide range of metrics, from user interactions and engagement levels to content performance and data trends. These reports are essential for understanding how your portal is being used, what areas are performing well, and where improvements might be needed.

With the ability to create custom reports, users can tailor their analytics to focus on the metrics that matter most to their business. Whether you're tracking user behavior to optimize content delivery, monitoring download activity to assess asset utilization, or analyzing data trends to inform future strategies, the Reports & Statistics feature provides the insights needed to drive effective decision-making.

The feature is designed to be user-friendly, allowing even non-technical users to easily generate and interpret reports. The visual representations of data, including charts and graphs, make it easier to grasp complex information quickly, while detailed statistics offer the precision needed for more in-depth analysis. This balance of simplicity and depth ensures that all users can benefit from the insights provided, regardless of their role or expertise.

By continuously monitoring and analyzing portal activity, businesses can stay agile, adapting their strategies based on real-time data. This not only helps in optimizing current operations but also in planning future initiatives with greater accuracy and confidence. In a fast-paced digital environment, the ability to make informed decisions based on comprehensive, real-time data is a significant competitive advantage.
features.description: The Reports & Statistics feature in Pimcore Experience Portals empowers users to generate and analyze detailed reports on various aspects of portal activity. This feature offers a comprehensive overview of performance metrics, user interactions, and data trends, allowing businesses to make informed, data-driven decisions. By leveraging these insights, you can optimize portal content, improve user engagement, and ensure that your portal is aligned with your business objectives.

features.name: Download
features.headline: Flexible Asset and Data Downloads for Enhanced Usability
features.shortDescription: Pimcore Experience Portals provide versatile download options, including single and batch downloads, a convenient download cart, and support for image thumbnails as well as CSV and JSON data formats. These features make accessing and exporting assets and data seamless and efficient.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s Asset and Data Downloads feature in Experience Portals provides a comprehensive and user-friendly solution for accessing and exporting digital assets and data. Designed with flexibility and efficiency in mind, this feature supports a wide range of download options to meet the diverse needs of portal users.

Users can choose between single downloads for individual files or batch downloads when multiple assets or data sets are needed at once. This functionality is particularly valuable for managing large volumes of data, as it allows users to efficiently gather all necessary files in one go. The download cart further enhances this process by allowing users to collect and organize their downloads before initiating the export. This is ideal for users who need to compile a selection of assets from different categories or data pools, as it provides a centralized place to manage all download requests.

In addition to these core capabilities, the feature also supports the download of image thumbnails, which is useful for previewing or sharing visual assets in a compact format. For data-heavy tasks, users can export information in CSV or JSON formats, ensuring compatibility with various data processing tools and applications. This versatility makes the Asset and Data Downloads feature a powerful tool for anyone needing to interact with and export digital assets and structured data efficiently.
features.description: The Asset and Data Downloads feature in Pimcore Experience Portals is designed to streamline the process of accessing and exporting digital assets and data. Whether you need to download a single file or multiple items at once, this feature offers the flexibility you need. Use the download cart to gather and manage items before downloading, or choose to download specific assets like image thumbnails. Additionally, data can be exported in CSV or JSON formats, making it easy to use in various applications. This comprehensive set of tools ensures that users can efficiently retrieve and manage the assets and data they need.

features.name: Security and Permissions
features.headline: Advanced Security and Role-Based Permissions for Portals
features.shortDescription: Pimcore Experience Portals offer a powerful, role-based permission system with customizable access settings per portal. Integrated with SSO via OpenID Connect, this feature provides a secure, seamless experience for users while allowing administrators to control permissions and protect sensitive content.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s Security and Permissions feature in Experience Portals is designed to provide a secure, flexible framework for managing user access across multiple portals. With a role-based permission system, administrators can create specific roles, each with customized permissions, allowing users to view, edit, or manage only the content relevant to their role. This feature also enables user-specific permissions for individual portals, offering even greater control over access in diverse portal environments.

To enhance user experience and streamline authentication, Pimcore Experience Portals integrate with Single Sign-On (SSO) via OpenID Connect. This integration provides a seamless login process, allowing users to access portals securely without repeated logins, reducing friction and improving security. The SSO support also ensures that permission changes or user removals are reflected instantly across all connected systems, enhancing both security and user management efficiency.

With this robust setup, administrators can manage permissions for various users and groups across portals, ensuring that sensitive content remains protected while delivering a convenient, scalable solution for user access. Ideal for businesses with complex access needs, Pimcore’s Security and Permissions feature provides a centralized, adaptable approach to user management, allowing organizations to maintain strict control over data access, ensure compliance, and foster a streamlined user experience.
features.description: Pimcore Experience Portals’ Security and Permissions feature empowers businesses with granular, role-based control over user access, supporting specific permissions per portal. Integrated with OpenID Connect for Single Sign-On (SSO), it ensures secure, efficient access management. Administrators can define access levels by role or individual user, offering maximum flexibility and security across portals. This comprehensive system supports customizable permissions, streamlined user management, and robust access protection, making it easier to secure sensitive information while delivering an accessible user experience.

benefits.name: Enhanced Security with Role-Based Access
benefits.description: Pimcore Experience Portals offer role-based permissions, enabling administrators to define access per portal based on user roles. This segmentation enhances data security by controlling access to sensitive information, allowing only authorized users to access specific areas of each portal.

benefits.name: Seamless SSO Integration for User Convenience
benefits.description: The Single Sign-On (SSO) capability in Pimcore Experience Portals, powered by OpenID Connect, allows users to access multiple portals with one login. This integration enhances user convenience while maintaining secure authentication, reducing login friction and improving user experience.

benefits.name: Scalable User-Specific Permissions for Growth
benefits.description: Pimcore’s Experience Portals support user-specific permissions per portal, allowing businesses to customize access at both the individual and group levels. This adaptability provides a flexible, scalable solution that adjusts to evolving business needs and ensures secure content distribution across all portals.

features.name: Unlimited Portals and Data Pools
features.headline: Unlimited Portals and Data Pools for Tailored Content Access
features.shortDescription: Pimcore Experience Portals empower you to create an unlimited number of multi-language portals, each configured with specific data pools. Break free from data silos and tailor your portals for different target groups, whether for marketing, collaboration, or digital asset sharing.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s Unlimited Portals & Data Pools feature is a game-changer for organizations looking to optimize how they manage and share data and digital assets. This feature allows you to create an unlimited number of multi-language portals, each uniquely configured to serve different target groups and purposes. Whether you need a portal for marketing and sales, product collaboration, master data sharing, or digital asset management, Pimcore provides the flexibility to tailor each portal to meet the specific needs of your users.

The true power of this feature lies in its ability to break down data silos. With the Unlimited Portals & Data Pools feature, you can configure distinct data pools for each portal, ensuring that the right content is accessible to the right audience. This means that your marketing team can have a dedicated portal for accessing and sharing sales content, while your product team uses a separate portal to collaborate on product information. Meanwhile, external stakeholders, such as agencies or partners, can access the digital assets they need through a secure, tailored portal designed just for them.

Each portal is fully customizable, allowing you to define which content is shown via data pools, ensuring that each user group has access to the most relevant and up-to-date information. This not only improves efficiency but also enhances the user experience, as each portal is designed with the specific needs of its audience in mind.

Moreover, the multi-language support ensures that your portals can serve global teams and external partners, making it easier to collaborate across borders and time zones. Whether you’re managing a global marketing campaign, coordinating product development across multiple regions, or sharing digital assets with international agencies, Pimcore’s Unlimited Portals & Data Pools feature ensures that everyone has access to the right data in the right language.

This level of customization and scalability makes Pimcore an indispensable tool for any organization looking to streamline its data management processes, enhance collaboration, and deliver a tailored experience to each of its user groups.
features.description: With Pimcore Experience Portals, you can set up an unlimited number of multi-language portals, each tailored to specific audiences and purposes. These portals can serve as marketing and sales content hubs, collaboration platforms, or digital asset sharing solutions. By configuring distinct data pools for each portal, you ensure that the right content is accessible to the right users, effectively breaking down data silos and enabling seamless collaboration across your organization and with external stakeholders.

features.name: Collections
features.headline: Organize and Share Content with Virtual Collections
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s Experience Portals offer Virtual Collections, allowing users to create, share, and download curated selections of data, such as products or digital assets. Ideal for organizing content by topic or project, these collections act as virtual storage for collaborative and efficient asset management.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s Experience Portals introduce Virtual Collections—a powerful feature designed to enhance how businesses organize, manage, and collaborate on digital content. Virtual Collections are essentially curated selections of data, such as products or digital assets, that can be grouped together based on specific topics, projects, or other criteria. These collections function as virtual storage, providing users with a flexible and dynamic way to manage their digital content.

With Virtual Collections, users can easily create and organize content around particular themes or business needs. For example, a marketing team might create a collection of assets related to an upcoming campaign, while a product team might gather all assets related to a new product launch. These collections provide a centralized place to access all relevant content, simplifying the management of large volumes of data.

One of the key advantages of Virtual Collections is their collaborative nature. Collections can be shared with other users, enabling teams to work together seamlessly. Whether you need to share a collection with a colleague, a client, or an external partner, Pimcore makes it easy to collaborate on and distribute the content that matters most. This feature significantly improves teamwork and communication, ensuring that everyone involved has access to the right data at the right time.

Additionally, Pimcore allows users to download entire collections, providing a convenient way to access and use grouped assets offline or in other systems. This is particularly useful for tasks like project handovers, presentations, or when preparing assets for external use. By offering the ability to download all relevant data in one go, Virtual Collections streamline the process of working with large sets of assets.

Overall, Pimcore’s Virtual Collections offer a flexible, efficient, and collaborative solution for managing digital assets and product data. By organizing content in a way that aligns with specific business needs, and enabling easy sharing and downloading, Virtual Collections help businesses maximize the value of their digital content while enhancing productivity and collaboration.
features.description: Pimcore’s Virtual Collections feature within the Experience Portals enables users to create curated selections of data, such as products or digital assets, that can be organized around specific topics or projects. These collections can be easily shared with other users, fostering collaboration and streamlining workflows. Additionally, users can download entire collections, making it simple to access and utilize grouped assets as needed. Virtual Collections serve as an effective tool for managing and organizing content in a flexible, collaborative, and efficient manner.

features.name: Customization & Branding
features.headline: Tailor Portals to Your Brand with Full Customization
features.shortDescription: Pimcore Experience Portals offer complete customization and white-labeling capabilities, enabling businesses to align portals with their brand vision. Adjust logos, colors, and functionality, and extend features to match your specific needs with full control and flexibility.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore Experience Portals offer a comprehensive suite of customization and branding tools, empowering businesses to fully tailor portals to reflect their brand identity and functional requirements. With white-labeling capabilities, organizations can apply their own logos, color schemes, and design elements, creating a seamless brand experience that resonates with users. This customization extends beyond appearance, with full control over portal functionality through Pimcore’s adaptable codebase. Businesses can extend and enhance portal features, adding custom modules, workflows, and integrations that support specific needs and enhance user engagement.

Developers have the freedom to fine-tune every aspect of the portal, from layout to functionality, ensuring that it aligns precisely with business processes and objectives. This level of control fosters a unique portal environment where brands can achieve consistency and innovation simultaneously. For organizations looking to establish a powerful, branded user experience, Pimcore’s Customization & Branding feature offers full ownership, enabling the creation of highly personalized portals that grow and evolve alongside the business.
features.description: Pimcore’s Customization & Branding features allow businesses to transform Experience Portals into unique brand touchpoints. With white-labeling options, companies can seamlessly apply their logos, colors, and design elements, creating a cohesive brand experience. Developers can further extend and adapt portal functionalities through customizable code, ensuring the portal aligns with operational requirements. Pimcore’s flexible framework provides complete ownership over appearance and features, enabling businesses to scale, innovate, and differentiate their portals fully.

benefits.name: Seamless Brand Experience
benefits.description: By leveraging white-labeling, Pimcore Experience Portals allow companies to create a fully branded portal experience. Businesses can adjust logos, color schemes, and design to match their unique brand identity, ensuring customers experience a seamless, recognizable interface that reinforces brand loyalty.

benefits.name: Full Control Over Functionality
benefits.description: With the flexibility to modify and extend functionalities, Pimcore Experience Portals enable businesses to customize portals according to their unique requirements. This adaptability helps optimize workflows, add specific features, and support an efficient, user-centered portal experience.

benefits.name: Extendability for Long-Term Growth
benefits.description: With complete ownership over customization, Pimcore Experience Portals enable businesses to extend and scale portal functionalities in alignment with evolving goals. This flexibility supports long-term growth, allowing for continuous innovation and ensuring the portal adapts to meet new challenges.

capabilities.name: Automation
capabilities.headline: Efficiency Through Smart Automation
capabilities.shortDescription: Pimcore's AI-driven automation with the Pimcore Copilot enhances data and experience management, ensuring businesses stay ahead of the competition. With integrations to tools like Power Automate, Zapier, and n8n, it delivers tailored automation, boosting efficiency, ROI, and time to market.
capabilities.longDescription:
Pimcore’s smart automation offers a significant competitive edge through its AI-powered Pimcore Copilot. This tool provides advanced customization and seamless integration with leading automation platforms such as Power Automate, Zapier, and n8n, enabling businesses to automate a wide range of workflows efficiently. From simple data entry to complex process management, the AI-driven Copilot adapts to specific business needs, reducing manual intervention and minimizing errors.

Smart automation translates directly to higher efficiency and productivity, reducing time to market for data and experience management tasks. By automating repetitive and complex processes, businesses can focus on strategic initiatives, driving higher ROI and operational excellence. The integration capabilities ensure that every aspect of data management is streamlined, providing a comprehensive solution that enhances overall performance. Pimcore’s commitment to automation not only boosts efficiency but also significantly improves business outcomes in a competitive market.

features.name: Scheduled Publishing
features.headline: Scheduled Publishing
features.shortDescription: Pimcore allows you to define schedules for publishing, unpublishing, and updating content, ensuring that your digital assets are managed and delivered at the optimal times.
features.longDescription: Pimcore’s Scheduled Publishing feature is designed to give you complete control over the timing of your content’s lifecycle. With this feature, you can easily define schedules for when content should be published, updated, or unpublished, ensuring that your digital presence is always aligned with your strategic goals. Whether you need to launch a new product, update seasonal promotions, or remove outdated content, Pimcore allows you to automate these processes, reducing the need for manual intervention and ensuring that content is delivered to your audience at the most impactful moments. By scheduling content in advance, you can maintain a consistent and dynamic online presence, enhancing both user engagement and operational efficiency.
features.description: Pimcore’s Scheduled Publishing feature provides the ability to set specific times and dates for content to be published, unpublished, or updated. This ensures that content is delivered to your audience exactly when it’s most effective. You can automate the entire content lifecycle, from initial publishing to updates and eventual removal, allowing for precise control over when and how content appears across your digital channels. This automation enhances content management, ensuring that your messaging is always timely and relevant.

features.name: Automated Relation Assignment
features.headline: Automated Relation Assignment
features.shortDescription: Pimcore uses AI and machine learning to automate the assignment of relations between structured data, unstructured data, and binary assets, creating an intelligent, interconnected data model.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore's data model is built on the concept of relations between different types of data—structured, unstructured, and binary assets. These relationships are what make Pimcore's data model smart and intelligent, allowing for a collective understanding of interconnected data. The Automated Relation Assignment feature takes this a step further by using AI and machine learning to automatically establish these relations based on the content and the inherent logic of the data.

For example, through this feature, Pimcore can automatically categorize data, apply tags, or recognize images and associate them with the correct products or entities. This automation not only reduces the manual effort involved in data management but also ensures that the relations within the data model are accurate and reflective of the underlying content. By automating the assignment of these relationships, Pimcore enhances the collective intelligence of its data model, making it a powerful tool for managing complex datasets efficiently and effectively.
features.description: At the heart of Pimcore's powerful data model are the relations between various entities, such as structured data, unstructured data, and binary assets. Automated Relation Assignment leverages AI and machine learning to intelligently establish these connections based on content and logical patterns. This feature enables automatic categorization, tagging, and image recognition, ensuring that assets like images are automatically associated with the correct products or entities. This automation enhances the collective intelligence of the data model, making data management smarter and more efficient.

features.name: Combined Automations via Copilot
features.headline: Combined Automations via Copilot
features.shortDescription: Pimcore Copilot enables businesses to create, configure, and compose AI/ML-powered automations, combining multiple steps into custom workflows for enhanced data and experience management.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore Copilot is at the forefront of AI/ML-powered automation, allowing businesses to create, configure, and compose custom workflows that address specific operational needs. With the ability to integrate and combine multiple automation steps, Copilot empowers users to design sophisticated processes tailored to their exact requirements. The flexibility of Copilot means that it can be extended to solve individual challenges, utilizing any AI model, including over 500,000 from Hugging Face and leading industry models.

This comprehensive tool supports the seamless management of complex automations, ensuring that all steps work together harmoniously. Whether automating data processes, enhancing digital experiences, or optimizing marketing strategies, Pimcore Copilot provides a cohesive, efficient system that drives innovation and operational excellence.
features.description: Pimcore Copilot is a powerful tool that allows businesses to create, configure, and compose complex automations, tailored to their unique needs. Users can easily put together different automation steps to design custom workflows that seamlessly integrate AI/ML models. With access to over 500,000 models from Hugging Face and major AI platforms, Copilot enables businesses to automate processes across the entire Pimcore platform, enhancing efficiency, adaptability, and innovation. This unified approach to automation ensures all processes work cohesively, optimizing data and experience management.

features.name: Automated Content Translations
features.headline: Automated Content Translations
features.shortDescription: Pimcore automates translations by integrating with top providers, defining semi- and fully automated workflows, utilizing AI models like DeepL, Meta, and OpenAI, and generating tasks via Pimcore Copilot.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s Translation Automation feature is designed to enhance and streamline content localization efforts by integrating with top-tier translation providers and utilizing advanced AI models like DeepL, Meta, and OpenAI. This integration allows businesses to automate their translation processes, defining both semi- and fully automated workflows to suit different needs.

Through Pimcore Copilot, users can generate automatic translation tasks, significantly reducing the time and effort required to manage large-scale translation projects. The system’s ability to train large language models also means that businesses can develop custom, industry-specific translations that align closely with their brand voice and market requirements.

By automating these processes, Pimcore ensures that content is translated quickly, accurately, and consistently, supporting global operations and enabling businesses to reach international audiences more effectively.
features.description: Pimcore streamlines translation processes by integrating with leading translation providers and leveraging AI models such as DeepL, Meta, and OpenAI. Users can define semi- and fully automated translation workflows, ensuring efficient content localization. Pimcore Copilot automates the generation of translation tasks, further enhancing productivity. Additionally, the platform supports training large language models for custom and industry-specific translations, allowing for tailored content delivery that meets the precise needs of different markets.

features.name: Product Variant Generation
features.headline: Product Variant Generation
features.shortDescription: Pimcore Copilot automates the generation of product variants, optimizing the creation process and ensuring consistency across your product catalog.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore Copilot’s Product Variant Generation feature is a powerful automation tool designed to optimize the process of creating and managing product variants. This feature allows businesses to automatically generate multiple product variants based on specific attributes like size, color, or material, ensuring consistency and accuracy across the product catalog. By automating this process, businesses can significantly reduce the time and effort required to manually create each variant, minimizing the risk of errors and ensuring that all product options are accurately represented.

The Product Variant Generation feature is particularly beneficial for businesses with large and complex product ranges, where manually managing each variant can be time-consuming and prone to mistakes. With Copilot’s automation capabilities, you can streamline your product management processes, ensuring that all variants are generated according to your specifications and are consistent with your overall product strategy. This feature helps maintain a well-organized product catalog, enhancing the efficiency of your product management efforts and supporting better customer experiences.
features.description: The Product Variant Generation feature in Pimcore Copilot streamlines the creation of product variants, helping businesses efficiently manage complex product catalogs. By automating the variant generation process, Copilot ensures that each variant is consistently created based on predefined attributes, such as size, color, or material. This automation not only saves time but also reduces the risk of errors, allowing for a more organized and comprehensive product catalog. It’s an essential tool for businesses looking to optimize their product management workflows.

features.name: Data Flow & Workflow Automation
features.headline: Data Flow & Workflow Automation
features.shortDescription: Integrate Pimcore into your IT and marketing infrastructure, using workflow automation engines like Zapier, Power Automate, and n8n. Pimcore connects to third-party applications via APIs and no-code editors, providing templates and blueprints for efficient data flow setup.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s Data Flow & Workflow Automation feature is designed to integrate the platform seamlessly into your broader IT and marketing application ecosystem. By utilizing workflow automation engines such as Zapier, Power Automate, and n8n, Pimcore ensures that it can connect with almost any third-party application, allowing for a truly interconnected workflow.

Through Pimcore’s powerful APIs, businesses can read and write data across different systems, facilitating a smooth flow of information. The platform’s no-code editors enable users to set up complex data flows easily, making it accessible even to those without extensive technical knowledge. Additionally, Pimcore provides a range of blueprints and templates that ease the setup process, ensuring that data retrieval and integration are both streamlined and efficient.

This approach not only enhances the efficiency of data management but also ensures that Pimcore becomes a central component of your holistic IT and marketing infrastructure, driving innovation and operational excellence.
features.description: Pimcore seamlessly integrates into your holistic IT and marketing infrastructure by leveraging powerful workflow automation engines like Zapier, Power Automate, and n8n. Through Pimcore’s robust APIs, businesses can read, write, and manage data across various third-party applications, ensuring a smooth and interconnected workflow. Pimcore’s no-code editors allow users to set up complex data flows without needing deep technical expertise. Additionally, Pimcore offers blueprints and templates that simplify the setup process, making data retrieval and integration both efficient and user-friendly.

features.name: Event Based Notifications
features.headline: Event Based Notifications
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s event-based notifications trigger automation workflows in external systems via webhooks and automate internal processes using Copilot, based on events fired within Pimcore.
features.longDescription: Pimcore’s event-based notifications provide a powerful tool for automating workflows across both internal and external systems. When an event is triggered within Pimcore—such as a data update, user action, or system change—Pimcore can send out notifications via webhooks to external systems, triggering automation workflows in platforms like CRM, ERP, or marketing automation tools. Simultaneously, these events can also activate automations within Pimcore itself, using configurations set up in Pimcore Copilot.
features.description: Pimcore's event-based notifications allow businesses to trigger automation workflows in external systems by sending events via webhooks. Additionally, automations configured through Pimcore Copilot can be initiated based on specific events within Pimcore. This dual capability ensures that workflows are tightly integrated across both internal and external systems, enabling seamless automation and efficient operations. By leveraging these event-driven triggers, businesses can ensure that their workflows are responsive and synchronized with real-time data and actions.

features.name: Content Classification & Categorization
features.headline: Content Classification & Categorization
features.shortDescription: Pimcore automates content classification and categorization using AI models from top vendors like OpenAI, Google, Meta, and Huggingface, enabling precise content management via Pimcore Copilot.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s automation capabilities for content classification and categorization harness the power of AI models from top-tier vendors like OpenAI, Google, Meta, and Huggingface. These models, utilizing advanced Computer Vision and Natural Language Processing, enable businesses to automatically classify and categorize diverse content types such as images, product information, and more. The AI models can be fine-tuned with existing data to enhance accuracy and relevance, ensuring that content is categorized according to specific business needs.

This process is seamlessly managed through Pimcore Copilot, an intuitive tool that simplifies the configuration and execution of AI-driven classification workflows. Pimcore Copilot allows users to set up and deploy these AI models, fine-tuning them to fit the unique requirements of their content management strategies. By automating the classification and categorization process, businesses can significantly reduce manual effort, improve content organization, and ensure that all content is correctly categorized and easily retrievable.

Pimcore’s use of cutting-edge AI technology for content classification not only improves efficiency but also enhances the overall quality and accuracy of content management, making it a valuable tool for businesses dealing with large volumes of diverse content.
features.description: Pimcore leverages advanced AI models from leading providers such as OpenAI, Google, Meta, and Huggingface to automate the classification and categorization of content, including images and product information. The AI models utilize Computer Vision and Natural Language Processing to classify content based on existing categories and can be fine-tuned using your data.
