This intelligent automation is configured and executed via Pimcore Copilot, streamlining content management and ensuring accuracy in categorization.

features.name: Custom Automations
features.headline: Automation Magic
features.shortDescription: Pimcore allows for the creation of fully customizable automations by combining Copilot, the Workflow Engine, Workflow Automations, the Datahub, and the Pimcore API, enabling businesses to tailor their platform to specific industry needs.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s Custom Automations bring together the most powerful components of the platform—Copilot, the Workflow Engine, Workflow Automations, the Datahub, and the Pimcore API—into a versatile and adaptable toolkit. This integration allows businesses to automate processes across the entire platform in an incredibly smart and efficient way. Everything within Pimcore is customizable, enabling you to tailor automations to your specific industry needs.

With this flexibility, you can adapt existing workflows, create new ones, and even write custom code to extend every aspect of the platform. This capability ensures that your data and experience management solutions are not only robust and efficient but also entirely aligned with your business’s unique requirements. Pimcore empowers you to build a fully owned and personalized platform, offering unparalleled control and adaptability in the world of data and experience management.
features.description: Imagine combining Pimcore Copilot, the Workflow Engine, Workflow Automations, the Datahub, and the Pimcore API into a powerful toolkit. With this setup, everything within Pimcore can be automated in a hyper-smart way. Every aspect of the platform can be adapted, extended, and customized to meet your industry’s unique requirements. Additionally, you can write custom code to extend functionalities, creating a personal data and experience management platform with full ownership and control. This flexibility makes Pimcore an unparalleled solution for tailored automation.

features.name: Automated Text Generation
features.headline: AI-Powered Text Generation
features.shortDescription: Pimcore utilizes various AI models to generate, summarize, extract features from, and classify textual content, enhancing content creation and personalization across the platform.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s AI-powered text generation feature brings the power of leading AI models, including those from OpenAI, Hugging Face, Anthropic, and Meta, directly into the content creation and management process. This feature is designed to do more than just generate text; it also includes capabilities for summarization, feature extraction, and text classification.

Pimcore Copilot can harness these AI-driven functionalities in various areas of the platform. For instance, in the PIM module, AI can generate product descriptions based on existing attributes, significantly reducing the manual effort required to create engaging and informative content. In Pimcore DXP, AI can personalize content by understanding user preferences and tailoring messages accordingly, enhancing user experience and engagement. Moreover, AI can optimize marketing automation by generating targeted content that resonates with specific audience segments.

The versatility of generative AI within Pimcore opens up numerous possibilities for supporting content management and creative content delivery. By automating text-related tasks and improving the quality of generated content, Pimcore enables businesses to deliver more personalized, relevant, and impactful content across all channels.
features.description: Pimcore integrates with leading AI models such as those from OpenAI, Hugging Face, Anthropic, and Meta to offer advanced text generation capabilities. This feature is more than just generating content; it includes text summarization, feature extraction, and classification. Pimcore Copilot can deploy these capabilities across the platform, such as generating product descriptions in PIM based on attributes, personalizing content in DXP, and optimizing marketing automation. These AI-driven processes significantly enhance content management, making creative content delivery smarter and more efficient.

features.name: Automated Image to Text Generation
features.headline: Image/Video to Text AI
features.shortDescription: Pimcore leverages AI models to automatically generate text from images and videos, facilitating auto-tagging, categorization, and enhanced accessibility, all configurable via Pimcore Copilot.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s Image/Video to Text AI transforms how businesses manage and utilize media assets by automatically generating descriptive texts from images and videos. Powered by advanced AI models, this feature streamlines the process of auto-tagging and categorizing content, ensuring that media is accurately labeled and easily searchable. In digital experience platforms (DXP), this capability can be particularly useful for automating the creation of alt texts, which are crucial for improving website accessibility.

Configuration and execution of these AI-driven processes are handled through Pimcore Copilot, allowing users to seamlessly integrate this functionality into their existing workflows. By automating text generation from media, Pimcore not only enhances content management efficiency but also supports compliance with accessibility standards, making it easier to deliver inclusive digital experiences.
features.description: Pimcore's Image/Video to Text AI harnesses advanced AI models to automatically generate descriptive text from images and videos. This capability is particularly valuable for tasks like auto-tagging and content categorization, ensuring that media assets are accurately labeled and organized. In the context of DXP, it can automate the generation of alt texts, significantly improving accessibility. The entire process is managed and executed through Pimcore Copilot, making it easy to integrate into your digital content workflows.

features.name: Automated Imports
features.headline: Automated Data Importing
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s Automated Data Importing allows seamless integration of data from various sources, supporting flexible mapping, transformation, and validation. It also enables scheduling and trigger-based imports, all configured and executed through an intuitive interface.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s Automated Data Importing feature offers a robust solution for integrating data from diverse external sources, with support for advanced data mapping, transformation, and validation. It enables users to configure imports to be executed automatically based on a schedule, ensuring that data is consistently updated without manual intervention. Additionally, imports can be triggered by push notifications (Webhooks) from external systems, allowing real-time data updates as soon as changes occur.

The configuration of these automated workflows is made simple through Pimcore’s user-friendly interface, which allows for detailed customization of data mapping and transformation rules. This ensures that incoming data is accurately aligned with existing data structures, meeting specific business requirements. The automation of data imports not only reduces manual effort but also enhances the overall efficiency and reliability of data management within Pimcore.
features.description: Pimcore’s Automated Data Importing streamlines data integration by supporting flexible mapping, transformation, and validation. Users can configure imports to run automatically on a schedule or be triggered by push notifications (Webhooks) from external systems. This capability ensures data is consistently accurate and up-to-date, with all processes managed through an intuitive interface. By automating data imports and enabling real-time updates, Pimcore enhances data consistency and reliability across platforms.

features.name: Automated Notifications
features.headline: Notifications for Workflow and Automation
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s Notifications system is essential for workflow management and collaboration, automatically notifying users or roles when key events occur or automations are executed in data management.
features.longDescription: Pimcore’s Notifications system plays a critical role in ensuring smooth workflow management and effective collaboration across teams. By automatically notifying users or predefined roles when specific events occur or automations are executed, Pimcore keeps everyone informed and responsive to changes within the platform. For instance, in data management, notifications can alert relevant stakeholders when a data import is completed, when data validation issues arise, or when a workflow reaches a critical stage. These notifications are fully configurable, allowing businesses to tailor the alert system to match their unique operational requirements. This ensures that notifications are both timely and relevant, helping teams to act quickly and maintain the integrity of their processes. By keeping everyone in the loop, Pimcore’s Notifications system enhances productivity, reduces the likelihood of missed tasks, and ensures that automated processes are monitored effectively.
features.description: Pimcore’s Notifications feature enhances workflow management and collaboration by automatically sending alerts to users or specific roles when important events occur or automations are triggered. Whether it's a data update, a workflow transition, or the completion of an automation task, notifications ensure that the right people are informed in real-time. This system helps maintain seamless communication across teams and ensures that everyone stays aligned with ongoing processes. Configurable through Pimcore’s intuitive interface, notifications can be tailored to fit specific operational needs.

features.name: Automated Text to Image Generation
features.headline: Generative AI for Images, Video, and Audio
features.shortDescription: Pimcore integrates with any AI model to automatically generate images, videos, and audio from text descriptions, enhancing content creation and accessibility in digital experiences.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s Generative AI capabilities offer the flexibility to integrate with any AI model, enabling the automatic generation of images, videos, and audio from text descriptions. Examples of supported models include StabilityAI, Flux, DALL-E, and Midjourney, though the platform is not limited to these. This AI-driven approach is ideal for enriching digital content, allowing businesses to create dynamic media that enhances user engagement.

Pimcore Copilot simplifies the configuration and execution of these AI-driven tasks, making it easy for users to integrate AI into their content creation workflows. Whether generating visual content for a marketing campaign or producing audio for digital media, Pimcore’s generative AI capabilities ensure efficient and high-quality content creation that aligns with project goals.
features.description: Pimcore utilizes AI models like StabilityAI, Flux, DALL-E, Midjourney, and more to automate the generation of images, videos, and audio from text inputs. This flexibility allows businesses to enhance their digital content efficiently. With Pimcore Copilot, users can configure and execute AI-driven content generation tasks, integrating advanced AI seamlessly into their workflows. This capability ensures that content creation is both innovative and aligned with specific project needs.

capabilities.name: User Management
capabilities.headline: Advanced User Management for Enterprise-Grade Security
capabilities.shortDescription: Pimcore’s robust user management system supports large-scale data and experience management, offering secure SSO, 2FA, and detailed role and rights management down to the field and content level, ensuring compliance and security in global enterprise environments.
capabilities.longDescription:
In the realm of data and experience management, especially for large enterprises, managing who has access to what is critical. Pimcore’s user management system is built to handle the complexities of large-scale, multi-user environments, where hundreds of editors might be working on various aspects of data and digital experiences simultaneously.

Security is at the forefront of Pimcore’s user management capabilities. The platform supports Single Sign-On (SSO) and Two-Factor Authentication (2FA), ensuring that user access is both streamlined and secure. These features are essential for protecting sensitive data and preventing unauthorized access in a global enterprise setting.

However, security doesn’t stop at login. Pimcore offers incredibly granular role and rights management, allowing administrators to define precisely what each user can see and do within the platform. This includes permissions down to the field and content level, ensuring that users only access data and functionalities relevant to their specific role. This level of control is crucial in industries with strict data governance and compliance requirements, as it ensures that sensitive information is only accessible to those who need it.

Pimcore’s user management system is not just about security—it’s also about efficiency and compliance. By allowing for detailed role and rights management, Pimcore helps organizations maintain compliance with internal policies and external regulations, while also ensuring that workflows are as efficient as possible. Users are empowered to do their jobs effectively, without unnecessary access to data or tools they don’t need, reducing the risk of errors and enhancing overall security.

In summary, Pimcore’s user management capabilities are tailored to meet the demands of large enterprises, providing the security, flexibility, and control needed to manage data and experiences at scale. Whether your organization operates in a highly regulated industry or simply requires robust user management for a global team, Pimcore offers the tools to manage users securely and efficiently.

features.name: 2FA
features.headline: Enhanced Security with Two-Factor Authentication
features.shortDescription: Pimcore DXP supports Two-Factor Authentication (2FA) to enhance user security. Administrators can activate 2FA for users or enforce its use, providing an additional layer of protection against unauthorized access and ensuring that your digital platform remains secure.
features.longDescription:
In an era where digital security is more critical than ever, Pimcore DXP’s Two-Factor Authentication (2FA) feature provides a powerful tool to protect your digital platform against unauthorized access. 2FA requires users to verify their identity through an additional authentication method, typically involving something they know (like a password) and something they have (such as a mobile device or email). This dual-layer verification significantly reduces the risk of unauthorized access, even if user credentials are compromised.

Pimcore offers administrators the flexibility to manage 2FA settings according to their security needs. You can allow users to activate 2FA on their own, providing them with the option to enhance their account security voluntarily. Alternatively, for organizations that require stricter security protocols, administrators can enforce 2FA for all users, ensuring that every account is protected by this additional layer of security.

Enforcing 2FA can be particularly beneficial for protecting sensitive data, administrative accounts, or access to critical systems within the platform. By requiring a second form of verification, Pimcore helps mitigate risks associated with phishing attacks, credential stuffing, and other common security threats. This level of security is essential for businesses that handle confidential information, conduct financial transactions, or operate within industries where compliance with strict security standards is mandatory.

Pimcore’s 2FA feature integrates seamlessly into the user experience, ensuring that the additional security measure is easy to implement and use. Whether users are verifying their identity through a mobile app, receiving a code via SMS, or using an authentication app, the process is straightforward and designed to minimize disruption to their workflow.

Overall, Pimcore DXP’s 2FA feature provides peace of mind by significantly enhancing the security of your digital platform. By adding this extra layer of protection, you can safeguard your organization’s assets, protect user accounts, and ensure that your platform remains secure against evolving digital threats.
features.description: Pimcore DXP’s Two-Factor Authentication (2FA) feature adds an extra layer of security to your digital platform by requiring users to verify their identity through a second factor, such as a mobile device or email. Administrators have the flexibility to activate 2FA for individual users or enforce its use across the entire platform, ensuring robust protection against unauthorized access. This feature enhances the overall security of your digital environment, safeguarding sensitive data and user accounts from potential breaches.

features.name: Single Sign-On (SSO) Integration
features.headline: Streamlined Access and Security with SSO & Identity Management
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s platform-wide Single Sign-On (SSO) and Identity Management feature, compliant with OpenID and OpenID Connect (OIDC), provides a secure and efficient way to manage user authentication across all Pimcore applications. This integration simplifies access while ensuring robust identity management and enhanced security.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s Single Sign-On (SSO) and Identity Management feature is designed to provide a unified and secure authentication system across the entire Pimcore platform, making it easier for users to access all applications while ensuring strong identity management. By supporting OpenID and OpenID Connect (OIDC), Pimcore enables a seamless login experience where users authenticate once and gain access to all necessary applications and services, whether they are part of the Digital Experience Platform (DXP), Product Information Management (PIM), Master Data Management (MDM), Digital Asset Management (DAM), or any other Pimcore solution.

This integration with OpenID and OIDC standards ensures that Pimcore can securely connect with various identity providers, allowing for flexible and scalable identity management. Organizations can configure trusted identity providers, set up client credentials, and manage user sessions, all while adhering to industry-standard security protocols.

The benefits of SSO extend beyond just convenience; they significantly enhance security by centralizing authentication. This reduces the risks associated with multiple login systems, such as inconsistent security policies and the potential for unauthorized access. With Pimcore, you can ensure that all user identities are managed consistently across the platform, improving overall security and compliance with industry regulations.

For administrators, managing SSO and Identity Management through Pimcore is straightforward. The platform’s configuration tools allow for easy setup and ongoing management of authentication systems, ensuring that your organization can adapt to evolving security needs without disrupting user access.

By implementing SSO and Identity Management across the entire Pimcore platform, organizations can reduce password fatigue, lower the risk of security breaches, and streamline the user experience, all while maintaining a high level of security and compliance. This comprehensive approach to identity management supports both operational efficiency and user satisfaction, making it a critical feature for businesses that rely on multiple Pimcore applications.
features.description: Pimcore’s Single Sign-On (SSO) and Identity Management feature spans across the entire Pimcore platform, enabling seamless and secure user authentication for all applications. Compliant with OpenID and OpenID Connect (OIDC), this feature allows users to log in once and access multiple systems without needing separate credentials. Administrators can easily configure and manage identity providers, ensuring consistent and secure access control across the platform. Pimcore’s SSO and Identity Management not only enhance security but also simplify user experience and operational efficiency.

features.name: Permissions and Access Control Rules
features.headline: Granular Permissions and Access Control Across Pimcore
features.shortDescription: Pimcore offers extensive permissions and access control features, allowing administrators to manage user and role-level access across the entire platform. Define precise access to features and data elements, ensuring that users interact only with the content relevant to their roles. A built-in tool facilitates the analysis and management of user permissions, enhancing security and compliance across your digital ecosystem.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s Permissions and Access Control Rules feature is a cornerstone of secure and efficient platform management, offering administrators the ability to finely tune access rights across all aspects of the Pimcore ecosystem. Whether handling individual users or managing groups through roles, this feature allows for the precise definition of what each user can access and control within the platform.

Administrators can set permissions at both the user and role levels, ensuring that every user is granted access only to the features and data elements they need to perform their duties. For example, you can specify which users have the ability to edit content, manage assets, or access sensitive customer data, while restricting others to view-only permissions. This granular control supports the principle of least privilege, reducing the risk of unauthorized access and enhancing the overall security posture of your digital environment.

In addition to defining permissions, Pimcore provides a sophisticated tool for analyzing and managing these permissions. This tool gives administrators a clear overview of what each user or role can access, making it easier to audit permissions and ensure that they align with your organization’s security policies. By regularly reviewing and adjusting these permissions, you can maintain a secure and compliant platform that adapts to changing business needs.

This extensive permissions and access control capability is essential for organizations that require stringent security measures, such as those in regulated industries or with large, complex teams. By enabling precise control over who can access what, Pimcore helps you safeguard sensitive data, ensure compliance with industry standards, and streamline operations across your entire digital ecosystem.
features.description: Pimcore’s Permissions and Access Control Rules provide comprehensive security management across the entire platform. Administrators can define and enforce access rules at both the user and role levels, ensuring that each team member only interacts with the necessary features and data elements. This granular control helps protect sensitive information and maintain operational efficiency. Additionally, Pimcore includes a powerful tool for analyzing permissions, enabling you to review and adjust access controls to meet your organization’s security and compliance requirements.

features.name: User Notifications
features.headline: Streamline Communication with Targeted User Notifications
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s User Notifications feature allows administrators to send targeted notifications to specific users or roles, attach relevant data elements, and automate notifications through workflows and automations. Users can easily track all notifications sent to them, ensuring effective communication across the platform.
features.longDescription:
Effective communication is key to successful digital operations, and Pimcore’s User Notifications feature is designed to streamline and enhance this process across the platform. With the ability to send notifications to specific users or roles, administrators can ensure that the right people receive the right information when they need it.

Notifications in Pimcore can be customized to include attached data elements, such as documents, assets, or other relevant information, providing recipients with all the context they need to take informed action. This is particularly useful in complex workflows where multiple stakeholders need to be kept informed of changes or updates to critical data.

One of the standout capabilities of Pimcore’s User Notifications is the integration with workflows and automations. Notifications can be automatically triggered based on specific events or conditions within the platform, such as the completion of a task, the approval of a document, or changes to data elements. This automation ensures that notifications are sent promptly and consistently, reducing the risk of missed communications and improving overall workflow efficiency.

For users, Pimcore provides an intuitive interface where they can easily access a list of all notifications sent to them. This feature allows users to keep track of important updates and communications without sifting through emails or other channels. By centralizing notifications within the platform, Pimcore ensures that users stay informed and can respond to changes or requests in a timely manner.

The User Notifications feature is designed to support both routine communication and critical updates, making it a versatile tool for managing information flow within the platform. Whether it’s alerting a team to a new task, notifying stakeholders of a project milestone, or providing updates on important data changes, Pimcore’s User Notifications ensure that everyone stays on the same page.

This feature is particularly valuable for organizations that require robust communication tools to manage complex workflows and ensure that all team members are aligned and informed. By integrating notifications with data elements, workflows, and automations, Pimcore provides a comprehensive solution for managing communication across your digital ecosystem.
features.description: Pimcore’s User Notifications feature enhances communication within the platform by enabling administrators to send targeted notifications to individual users or roles. Notifications can include attached data elements, ensuring that recipients have all the relevant information they need. Additionally, notifications can be automatically triggered by workflows and automations, streamlining communication processes. Users can access a list of all notifications sent to them, making it easy to stay informed and responsive. This feature ensures that important updates and information reach the right people at the right time, enhancing collaboration and efficiency across the platform.

features.name: User and Rights Management
features.headline: Comprehensive User and Rights Management Across Pimcore
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s User and Rights Management feature enables administrators to manage users and roles across the entire platform. This includes assigning multiple roles to users, sending invitation emails to new users, and providing support for password recovery. With Pimcore, managing user access and rights is streamlined, secure, and efficient.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s User and Rights Management feature offers a powerful and flexible solution for managing user access and roles across the entire platform. Designed to accommodate complex organizational needs, this feature allows administrators to create, manage, and assign roles to users, ensuring that each user has the appropriate level of access to perform their tasks effectively.

One of the key benefits of this feature is the ability to assign multiple roles to a single user, enabling a more nuanced and tailored approach to access management. This flexibility is crucial for organizations with diverse teams where individuals may need access to different sets of tools and data depending on their responsibilities.

Administrators can easily manage users within the system, creating new accounts and adjusting roles as needed. Pimcore also simplifies the onboarding process by allowing administrators to send invitation emails to new users directly from the platform. These invitations streamline the user setup process, enabling new team members to quickly gain access to the tools and resources they need.

For user convenience and security, Pimcore includes a "Password Forgotten" feature, allowing users to recover their accounts quickly and securely if they forget their passwords. This function reduces the administrative burden on IT teams by enabling users to reset their passwords independently while maintaining the security of the system.

Pimcore’s User and Rights Management system is designed to support the security and operational needs of any organization, whether it’s a small team or a large enterprise. By providing a centralized and flexible approach to user and role management, Pimcore ensures that access to digital assets, content, and other system functionalities is both secure and appropriately controlled.

This feature is integral to maintaining a secure and efficient digital environment, ensuring that users can access the tools they need while safeguarding sensitive information from unauthorized access.
features.description: Pimcore’s User and Rights Management feature provides a robust system for managing users and roles across the entire platform. Administrators can create and manage roles, assign multiple roles to users, and control access to various system functionalities. The feature also supports sending invitation emails to onboard new users and includes a "Password Forgotten" function to assist with account recovery. This comprehensive management system ensures that user access is both flexible and secure, meeting the needs of diverse teams and organizational structures.

capabilities.name: File Handling
capabilities.headline: Flexible and Scalable File Handling
capabilities.shortDescription: Pimcore offers perfect file handling with support for any file type, intuitive organization, and unlimited cloud storage capabilities, ensuring seamless management of documents and digital assets.
capabilities.longDescription:
Pimcore’s file handling capabilities set a new standard for managing digital assets, documents, and any other types of files within an organization. The platform’s intuitive file organization system makes it easy to store, retrieve, and manage files of all types, ensuring that everything from documents and images to videos and other media is easily accessible and well-organized. Pimcore supports every conceivable file type, providing a comprehensive solution for managing diverse digital assets.

One of Pimcore’s standout features is its robust cloud storage support. Operating seamlessly across any cloud environment, Pimcore removes all limitations on file sizes and the number of files you can manage. Whether you’re dealing with a few large files or millions of smaller ones, Pimcore scales effortlessly to meet your needs, ensuring that your digital content is stored securely and is always accessible when needed.

Pimcore’s file handling is designed to be both flexible and scalable, allowing businesses to manage their digital assets efficiently as they grow. The platform’s ability to handle large volumes of files without compromising on performance makes it an ideal choice for organizations that require reliable and powerful digital asset management. Whether you’re organizing files for internal use or distributing digital content across multiple channels, Pimcore provides the tools and capabilities to do so with ease and confidence.

features.name: Cloud Storage Support
features.headline: Seamless Cloud Storage Integration
features.shortDescription: Combine the best of both worlds with Pimcore’s Cloud Storage Support. Run your DAM on-premise while leveraging cloud storage solutions like CDNs and S3, or opt for Pimcore PaaS for a fully integrated, cloud-optimized experience.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s Cloud Storage Support feature provides the flexibility to combine on-premise control with the advantages of cloud storage, making it an ideal solution for businesses with diverse storage needs. Whether you prefer to maintain your Digital Asset Management (DAM) system on-premise or in the cloud, Pimcore allows you to seamlessly integrate cloud storage solutions like Content Delivery Networks (CDNs) and S3-compliant storages with your on-premise installations.

This hybrid approach gives you the best of both worlds: the security, control, and compliance benefits of on-premise data management, coupled with the scalability, accessibility, and cost-efficiency of cloud storage. For businesses that require a more flexible and scalable storage solution, this integration ensures that you can efficiently manage and distribute your digital assets across multiple platforms and geographies, while still retaining control over sensitive data.

For those looking for a fully cloud-native experience, Pimcore PaaS offers a perfectly integrated solution right from the start. With Pimcore PaaS, your entire digital asset management infrastructure is optimized for the cloud, providing seamless performance, automatic scaling, and full region support. This eliminates the need for complex setups or configurations, allowing your business to focus on leveraging your digital assets rather than managing infrastructure.

Whether you choose a hybrid on-premise/cloud setup or a fully cloud-based environment, Pimcore’s Cloud Storage Support ensures that your digital asset management is both flexible and future-proof, ready to meet the demands of today’s dynamic business environment.
features.description: Pimcore offers unparalleled flexibility by allowing you to run your Digital Asset Management (DAM) system on-premise while integrating with cloud storage solutions such as CDNs and S3-compliant storages. This hybrid approach ensures you can maintain control over your on-premise setup while benefiting from the scalability and accessibility of the cloud. Alternatively, choose Pimcore PaaS for a fully cloud-optimized solution that’s perfect from the start.

features.name: No File-size Limits
features.headline: Unlimited File-Size and Asset Management
features.shortDescription: Manage digital assets without constraints using Pimcore’s unlimited file-size capabilities. Whether on-premise, in the cloud, or as Pimcore PaaS, the only limit is your physical storage, making it a flexible solution for all your asset management needs.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore stands out as a robust and flexible digital asset management platform, offering unparalleled freedom when it comes to handling large files and vast amounts of digital assets. Unlike other systems that impose restrictions on file sizes or the number of assets you can store, Pimcore places no such limits—your only constraint is the physical capacity of your storage system. This flexibility is crucial for businesses that deal with high-resolution images, large video files, complex design documents, or other sizable digital assets.

Pimcore’s versatility extends beyond just storage capabilities. The platform can be deployed in various environments—whether on-premise, in the public or private cloud, or as Pimcore PaaS on any major hyperscaler. This adaptability ensures that Pimcore can meet the diverse needs of businesses, regardless of their infrastructure preferences or geographic location. With full region support, Pimcore ensures that your digital assets are always accessible and managed efficiently, no matter where your operations are based.

For organizations that require a scalable and future-proof solution for digital asset management, Pimcore’s no file-size limits and flexible deployment options make it the ideal choice. Whether you’re a small business with growing storage needs or a large enterprise managing a vast library of digital assets, Pimcore provides the tools and scalability to handle it all with ease.
features.description: Pimcore offers a truly flexible platform for digital asset management with no limits on file sizes or the number of assets you can store. The only constraint is your physical storage capacity, making Pimcore ideal for businesses of all sizes and industries. Whether you choose to run Pimcore on-premise, in the public/private cloud, or as Pimcore PaaS on any hyperscaler with full region support, you’ll have the scalability and flexibility to meet all your storage and digital asset management requirements.

features.name: Organize Files in Folders Hierarchy
features.headline: Intuitive Digital Asset Organization
features.shortDescription: Effortlessly manage digital assets with Pimcore’s folder hierarchy system, allowing for structured organization of files, just like a classic file system. Perfect for keeping your digital assets in order and easy to find.
features.longDescription:
In the realm of Digital Asset Management (DAM), keeping your files organized is crucial for efficiency and ease of access. Pimcore’s DAM system offers a highly intuitive way to manage your digital assets by allowing you to organize files within a folder hierarchy, mirroring the structure of classic file systems. This familiar organizational approach ensures that users can easily navigate through folders, subfolders, and files, making it simple to locate and manage digital assets.

Whether you’re handling a vast library of images, videos, documents, or other media, the folder hierarchy enables you to create a structured environment where assets are neatly categorized and easy to retrieve. This not only improves workflow efficiency but also enhances collaboration, as team members can quickly find and access the files they need without searching through disorganized directories.

Pimcore’s folder-based organization system is designed to scale with your needs, making it suitable for businesses of all sizes and industries. Whether you’re a small team managing a handful of assets or a large enterprise with extensive digital libraries, this system ensures that your digital assets are always well-organized, easily accessible, and ready to support your content creation and distribution efforts.
features.description: Pimcore’s Digital Asset Management (DAM) system allows you to organize files using a familiar folder hierarchy, just like in traditional file systems. This intuitive structure makes it easy to manage, navigate, and locate digital assets, ensuring that your media files are always well-organized and accessible when you need them.

features.name: Any Filetype Support
features.headline: Comprehensive Filetype Support in DAM
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s DAM supports any file type, from images and videos to office documents and PDFs. With built-in preview, conversion capabilities, and an extensible viewer framework, it’s adaptable to even the most industry-specific formats.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s Digital Asset Management (DAM) system is designed to handle virtually any file type, making it an incredibly versatile solution for businesses across various industries. Whether you’re working with bitmap and vector images, office documents, PDFs, or even large video files, Pimcore ensures that your digital assets are fully supported and easily accessible.

The DAM system includes built-in tools for previewing and converting a wide array of file types, allowing users to quickly view and manipulate assets without needing external software. For example, you can convert images and videos into different formats to meet specific needs, or preview documents and PDFs directly within the platform. This capability not only enhances productivity but also simplifies the management of diverse content types within a single, unified system.

Moreover, Pimcore’s extensible viewer framework is a standout feature for businesses with specialized needs. This framework allows for the integration of industry-specific file formats, ensuring that even the most niche assets are supported. Whether you’re dealing with CAD files, medical imaging formats, or other specialized content, Pimcore’s flexible architecture can be adapted to handle these unique requirements seamlessly.

By offering comprehensive support for any file type, Pimcore’s DAM system empowers businesses to manage their digital assets more effectively, ensuring that all content is organized, accessible, and usable within a single, powerful platform.
features.description: Pimcore’s Digital Asset Management (DAM) system supports a wide range of file types, including bitmap and vector images, office documents, PDFs, and videos. The platform offers built-in preview and conversion tools for numerous file formats, ensuring seamless access and usability. Additionally, Pimcore features an extensible viewer framework, allowing businesses to integrate industry-specific file formats, making it the ideal solution for any digital asset management need.

capabilities.name: Asset Conversions
capabilities.headline: Seamless Asset Conversion
capabilities.shortDescription: Pimcore’s Digital Asset Conversion feature offers transcoding between formats, AI-based upscaling, and watermarking. With Pimcore Copilot for image manipulation and generation, it ensures efficient, automated conversion for single-source publishing and flexible third-party integration.
capabilities.longDescription:
Pimcore’s Digital Asset Conversion feature is designed to provide comprehensive and efficient management of digital assets. Within its DXP and DAM systems, this feature supports transcoding between various formats, ensuring compatibility across different platforms and devices. AI-based upscaling enhances image quality, making low-resolution images suitable for high-definition displays. Watermarking ensures that digital assets are protected and branded consistently.

Pimcore Copilot further extends these capabilities with AI-driven image manipulation and generation, automating complex tasks and enabling creative possibilities. Businesses benefit from automated conversion processes that facilitate single-source publishing, reducing redundancy and improving efficiency. Additionally, the ability to integrate third-party file conversion and manipulation systems offers unmatched flexibility, ensuring that Pimcore can handle any file format and conversion requirement. This robust and versatile approach to digital asset conversion makes Pimcore an essential tool for modern businesses looking to optimize their digital asset management.

features.name: Video Conversion
features.headline: Versatile Video Conversion with Custom Pipelines
features.shortDescription: Convert videos to any web format with customizable bitrates, sizes, and transformations. Pimcore's video conversion feature supports scaling, cutting, color adjustments, and more, ensuring your videos are optimized for any platform.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s Video Conversion feature is a powerful tool designed to meet the demands of modern multimedia management. It allows you to convert videos into any required web format, ensuring compatibility across different platforms and devices. With customizable bitrates, you can optimize videos for varying bandwidths and quality levels, making it ideal for everything from high-definition streaming to mobile-friendly content.

The feature includes a configurable transformation pipeline that offers extensive control over your video content. You can scale videos to different resolutions, ensuring they are perfectly sized for their intended display. The cutting tool allows you to trim videos to the exact length needed, while the color adjustment options enable you to fine-tune the visual aesthetics to match your brand or creative vision.

This versatility ensures that your video assets are not only compatible with various platforms but also optimized for the best possible performance and visual quality. Whether you're preparing videos for social media, online marketing, or internal presentations, Pimcore’s Video Conversion feature provides the flexibility and control needed to deliver high-quality content across all channels.
features.description: Pimcore’s Video Conversion feature enables seamless conversion of videos into any web format, with the ability to adjust bitrates, scale sizes, and apply various transformations. The feature supports a configurable pipeline that includes cutting, color adjustments, and more, ensuring your videos are perfectly optimized for different output channels. Whether you need high-definition videos for streaming or optimized clips for mobile devices, this feature delivers precise control over your video assets.

features.name: Document Preview Generation
features.headline: Comprehensive Previews for All File Formats
features.shortDescription: Generate previews of Microsoft Office files, Adobe PDFs, various image formats, and more. Extendable with custom preview services for industry-specific formats, including 3D models and Adobe InDesign files.
features.longDescription: Pimcore's file preview feature is designed to handle an extensive array of file formats, making it an essential tool for businesses managing diverse digital assets. Users can generate previews for common formats such as Microsoft Word, Excel, and PowerPoint, Adobe PDFs, and various image formats including vectors (SVGs) and print-ready files (TIFFs). The flexibility of this feature is further amplified by its ability to integrate custom preview and conversion services, enabling the platform to support industry-specific and specialized formats. This includes complex 3D models, CAD files, and desktop publishing formats like Adobe InDesign, making it ideal for industries like manufacturing, architecture, publishing, and more. By offering these capabilities directly within the platform, Pimcore reduces the need for external software, speeds up content reviews, and ensures seamless management of even the most complex digital assets. This integration not only saves time but also enhances accuracy and consistency across projects, driving efficiency and improving collaboration across teams.
features.description: Pimcore offers the capability to generate previews for a vast range of file formats, including Microsoft Office (Word, Excel, PowerPoint), Adobe PDFs, and numerous image formats, from vector to print. This feature can be extended with custom preview and conversion services, allowing support for special and industry-specific formats such as 3D models and desktop publishing files like Adobe InDesign. It enhances productivity by enabling quick content reviews directly within the platform, streamlining workflows across diverse industries.

features.name: Watermarking
features.headline: Secure Your Digital Assets with Watermarking
features.shortDescription: Protect your digital assets by applying customizable watermarks directly within Pimcore. This feature allows you to add logos, text, or patterns to your images and videos, ensuring your content remains secure and your brand is consistently represented.
features.longDescription:
The Watermarking feature in Pimcore is designed to provide both security and branding for your digital assets. Whether you need to protect your images, videos, or other multimedia content, this tool offers a straightforward and effective way to apply watermarks that can include logos, text, or custom patterns. Watermarks can be customized to suit your specific needs, with adjustable transparency, size, and placement options, allowing for subtle or prominent branding depending on the context.

This feature is particularly valuable for businesses that need to protect their content from unauthorized use while ensuring that their brand is consistently represented across all digital assets. By embedding watermarks directly into your images or videos, you create a visible layer of protection that discourages unauthorized reproduction or distribution. Additionally, watermarks can reinforce brand identity, ensuring that your logo or brand name remains visible, even when content is shared or published online.

Pimcore’s Watermarking feature is versatile enough to be used across a range of scenarios—from securing internal documentation to adding a professional touch to marketing materials. It integrates seamlessly with your existing workflows, allowing for batch processing of multiple assets, and can be easily adjusted to meet the requirements of different platforms or media formats. Whether you're preparing content for social media, e-commerce, or digital publications, this feature ensures that your assets remain secure and your brand stays front and center.
features.description: Pimcore’s Watermarking feature offers a robust solution for protecting and branding your digital assets. Easily apply watermarks to images and videos, using customizable options such as logos, text, or patterns. This feature helps deter unauthorized use, ensures brand visibility, and can be adjusted for transparency, size, and placement, making it versatile for various applications. Whether for internal documentation or public-facing content, Pimcore’s Watermarking feature provides a seamless way to secure your assets while maintaining a professional appearance.

features.name: Upscaling
features.headline: High-Quality Image Upscaling with AI Precision
features.shortDescription: Enhance image resolution with Pimcore Copilot’s AI-powered upscaling feature. Effortlessly increase image size while maintaining clarity and detail, perfect for preparing images for high-resolution displays or print.
features.longDescription:
The Image Upscaling feature within Pimcore Copilot is a powerful tool designed to meet the needs of businesses and creatives who require high-quality visuals across various platforms. Traditional upscaling methods often lead to loss of detail and pixelation, but Pimcore Copilot’s AI-driven approach overcomes these limitations by using sophisticated algorithms that analyze and enhance the image during the upscaling process.

This feature intelligently increases the resolution of images, making them suitable for high-definition displays, large format prints, or any other use case where maintaining image quality is crucial. The AI algorithms work by filling in the missing pixel information, resulting in images that retain their original clarity and sharpness, even at larger sizes. Whether you're preparing marketing materials, product images, or digital art for print, Pimcore Copilot ensures that your upscaled images meet the highest standards of visual quality.

Moreover, the process is user-friendly and efficient—simply provide the image and desired resolution, and Pimcore Copilot handles the rest. This feature is perfect for organizations looking to enhance their digital content without the need for costly and time-consuming manual editing. By maintaining the integrity and detail of your images during the upscaling process, Pimcore Copilot helps ensure that your visual assets stand out in any context.
features.description: Pimcore Copilot’s Image Upscaling feature leverages advanced AI algorithms to increase image resolution without compromising quality. This tool allows users to upscale images to larger sizes while preserving sharpness and detail, making it ideal for high-resolution displays, print media, or any application requiring enhanced visual clarity. By intelligently filling in missing pixels and enhancing image data, Pimcore Copilot ensures that upscaled images look crisp, clear, and professional.

features.name: Image Conversion
features.headline: Advanced Image Converting with Configurable Pipelines
features.shortDescription: Leverage a powerful transformation pipeline to convert images and vectors into any format, resolution, or size. This feature supports various operations, including scaling, cropping, and color adjustments, ensuring your digital assets are optimized for every output channel.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s Image Converting feature is a robust tool designed to handle the complex needs of modern digital asset management. At its core is a highly configurable transformation pipeline that allows you to convert images and vectors into any required format, resolution, and size. Whether you need to prepare assets for web, print, or mobile applications, this feature ensures that your images are perfectly optimized.

The pipeline offers a wide range of operations, including file format conversion (e.g., JPEG to PNG, SVG to EPS), scaling to various resolutions, and cropping images while considering focal points to maintain the most important parts of the image. You can also rotate images, apply filters for aesthetic adjustments, and ensure color accuracy with support for color profiles, including CMYK, which is essential for print readiness.

Moreover, the system automatically adapts images based on responsive design needs, adjusting the resolution and size depending on the output channel. This means that whether your image is destined for a high-resolution desktop display or a compact mobile screen, it will always look its best. Thumbnails are automatically generated, making it easier to manage large galleries or product catalogs.

In summary, Pimcore’s Image Converting feature provides everything you need to ensure that your digital assets are perfectly formatted, optimized, and ready for any application or channel, all within an intuitive and flexible system.
features.description: Pimcore’s Image Converting feature offers a configurable transformation pipeline that allows users to convert any image or vector format into the desired format, resolution, and size. The pipeline supports an array of operations, including file format conversion, scaling, cropping, rotating, and applying filters. It also adapts automatically for responsive designs, ensuring assets are optimized for different output channels. Additional features include handling focal points and being CMYK-ready for print, making it a comprehensive tool for managing digital assets across various media.

features.name: Prompt Based Image Manipulation
features.headline: AI-Powered Image Manipulation with Pimcore Copilot
features.shortDescription: Leverage Pimcore Copilot to perform advanced image manipulation using AI/ML models. Integrate with top AI providers like OpenAI and StabilityAI, or deploy your own models for tasks such as background removal, object removal, generative content filling, and more.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore Copilot’s prompt-based image manipulation feature represents a significant advancement in digital asset management, offering seamless integration with AI/ML models to perform complex image editing tasks. This feature provides interfaces for various AI/ML models, allowing users to choose from leading commercial solutions such as OpenAI and StabilityAI, or integrate their own AI models for a more tailored approach.

With Pimcore Copilot, users can execute a wide range of image manipulation tasks with ease. The system supports background removal, enabling the quick isolation of subjects from their surroundings, and object removal, allowing unwanted elements to be erased from images. Generative content filling is another powerful tool, capable of intelligently filling gaps or extending images based on the surrounding content, creating seamless and natural-looking results. Additionally, the feature includes image upscaling, which enhances resolution without losing quality, and image extending, which can expand the canvas while maintaining visual consistency.

These capabilities are driven by simple text-based prompts, making advanced image editing accessible to users without specialized graphic design skills. Whether you’re preparing images for marketing campaigns, product listings, or creative projects, Pimcore Copilot’s AI-powered image manipulation tools provide the flexibility and precision needed to produce professional-quality results quickly and efficiently.
features.description: Pimcore Copilot’s prompt-based image manipulation feature enables users to perform advanced image editing tasks through AI/ML models. Whether integrating with leading commercial AI models like OpenAI and StabilityAI or utilizing your own custom models, Pimcore Copilot offers tools for background removal, object removal, generative content filling, image upscaling, and more. This feature provides unprecedented flexibility and power, allowing users to enhance and modify images with simple prompts, making it ideal for creative teams and digital asset managers.

capabilities.name: Asset Experience Portal
capabilities.headline: Streamlined Digital Asset Access
capabilities.shortDescription: Pimcore's Asset Experience Portals provide real-time access to digital assets, enabling seamless search, filtering, and sharing. Ideal for internal and external stakeholders, these customizable portals enhance collaboration and data management efficiency.
capabilities.longDescription:
Pimcore’s Asset Experience Portals are designed to revolutionize digital asset management by providing a centralized, real-time access point for all your media assets. These portals enable users to search, filter, and share assets quickly and efficiently, catering to both internal teams and external partners such as agencies and distributors. With highly configurable views, advanced metadata management, and integration capabilities with tools like Adobe Creative Cloud and Microsoft Office, these portals enhance collaboration and streamline the asset management process.

The portals feature intuitive tools for sharing, including configurable options for expiry dates, download quality, and watermarking, ensuring secure and controlled access. They also support the creation of asset collections and customizable dashboards for monitoring and reporting purposes. By offering a unified and user-friendly interface, Pimcore’s Asset Experience Portals improve data quality, increase productivity, and support strategic decision-making.

features.name: Asset data management
features.headline: Advanced Metadata Management for Media Assets
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s Asset Experience Portals offer advanced metadata management, enabling enrichment of media assets with complex attribute structures. Features include bulk metadata editing, tagging, and exporting in JSON, XML, and CSV formats, along with workflow states and transitions.
features.longDescription:
In the realm of digital asset management, the ability to manage and enrich media assets with detailed metadata is essential for maintaining order and maximizing the value of your content. Pimcore’s Asset Experience Portals excel in this area by offering some of the industry’s most sophisticated metadata management features. Whether you’re handling thousands of images, videos, documents, or other digital assets, Pimcore provides the tools needed to ensure that every asset is enriched with relevant and precise information.

Pimcore’s metadata management capabilities are highly advanced, allowing you to define and edit complex attribute structures tailored to your business’s specific needs. This flexibility ensures that each asset is not only cataloged accurately but also enriched with the metadata necessary to enhance its usability and searchability. From simple attributes like file type and creation date to more complex structures involving product associations, rights management, and usage conditions, Pimcore’s metadata tools can handle it all.

For businesses managing large volumes of assets, Pimcore offers bulk editing features that make it easy to apply metadata changes across multiple files simultaneously. This batch processing capability is invaluable for saving time and ensuring consistency, especially when dealing with large-scale updates or re-categorization efforts.

Pimcore also supports the assignment of tags to assets, enabling more straightforward organization and retrieval. Tags can be customized to align with your internal taxonomy, making it easier for teams to find and utilize the assets they need.

One of the standout features of Pimcore’s metadata management is the ability to export metadata in structured formats such as JSON, XML, and CSV. This functionality ensures that your metadata is not only useful within the Pimcore environment but also portable and compatible with other systems and platforms. Whether you’re sharing data with partners, integrating with other tools, or conducting analytics, Pimcore makes it easy to export and leverage your metadata wherever it’s needed.

Additionally, Pimcore integrates workflow states and transitions into its metadata management, allowing you to define and manage the stages an asset goes through during its lifecycle. From creation to approval, distribution, and archiving, each state can be tracked and managed within Pimcore, ensuring that assets are handled according to your business’s specific processes and compliance requirements.
features.description: Pimcore’s Asset Experience Portals provide advanced metadata management, allowing businesses to enrich media assets with complex information and attribute structures. The platform supports detailed metadata editing, batch processing for efficient bulk edits, and the assignment of tags to streamline asset organization. Additionally, Pimcore enables the download of metadata in structured formats like JSON, XML, and CSV, making data management seamless. Workflow states and transitions further enhance the management of assets, ensuring they move efficiently through each stage of their lifecycle.

features.name: Asset upload
features.headline: Seamless Direct Asset Upload with Personalized Folders
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s Asset Experience Portals offer direct asset upload capabilities, allowing users to upload files directly into personalized folders. Set up review processes and manage uploads without needing backend access, all within an intuitive, user-friendly interface.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s Asset Experience Portals revolutionize the way businesses manage digital assets by offering a seamless direct asset upload feature. This capability allows users to upload files directly into the system without ever needing to access the backend, making the process both user-friendly and efficient.

Each user can upload assets into personalized folders, ensuring that files are organized according to individual needs and responsibilities. This personalized approach not only enhances organization but also simplifies the process of managing and locating assets within the portal.

One of the standout aspects of this feature is its integration with customizable upload review processes. Businesses can set up tailored workflows that ensure all uploaded assets go through a review and approval process before they are made available for broader use. This is particularly important for maintaining content quality and compliance, as it ensures that only vetted and approved assets are added to the asset library.

Moreover, the direct upload feature is designed with accessibility in mind. Any authorized user, regardless of technical expertise, can upload assets directly from the portal’s front end. This eliminates the need for backend access, reducing the complexity of the process and enabling more team members to contribute to the digital asset library.

Whether you’re managing a large volume of assets or simply want to streamline the contribution process, Pimcore’s direct asset upload feature offers the flexibility, security, and control needed to keep your digital content organized and up-to-date.
features.description: Pimcore’s Asset Experience Portals streamline the asset management process by enabling direct asset uploads. Users can upload files directly into personalized folders, with no need to access the backend UI. These uploads can be seamlessly integrated into custom review workflows, ensuring that all assets are properly vetted before use. This feature is designed for ease of use, allowing any authorized user to contribute to the asset library efficiently and securely.

features.name: Portal Configuration
features.headline: Comprehensive Configuration for Fully Customized Portals
features.shortDescription: Pimcore Experience Portals offer complete configuration options, from a Setup Wizard to multi-language support and data pool access. Enjoy full design control with white labeling, advanced user management, and seamless integration with OpenID Connect for a tailored and secure portal experience.
features.longDescription:
The Configuration of Pimcore Experience Portals is designed to give businesses complete control over the creation and management of their digital portals. This feature-rich configuration process begins with a user-friendly Setup Wizard, guiding you through each step of portal creation, ensuring a smooth and efficient setup tailored to your specific needs. Once set up, the portals can be fully customized, including the ability to support multiple languages, making them accessible and user-friendly for a global audience.

One of the key aspects of this configuration is the flexible management of data pools. Whether you're dealing with asset data pools or object data pools, Pimcore allows you to configure exactly what data is accessible through the portal, ensuring that the right information is available to the right users. This is further enhanced by advanced user management features, which include seamless integration with OpenID Connect. This integration allows for secure user authentication and management, including options for guest user access, ensuring that your portals remain secure and user access is tightly controlled.

Additionally, the full design control and white-labeling capabilities allow you to create a portal that not only functions according to your needs but also reflects your brand identity perfectly. You can customize every element of the portal's appearance, ensuring a cohesive brand experience across all digital touchpoints. Whether you're setting up a portal for internal use, partners, or customers, the comprehensive configuration options provided by Pimcore ensure that your portal is as functional, secure, and brand-aligned as possible.
features.description: The Configuration of Pimcore Experience Portals provides businesses with powerful tools to fully customize their portals. From the intuitive Setup Wizard to multi-language support, every aspect of your portal can be configured to meet your exact needs. Access and manage data pools, control user permissions with advanced management tools, and utilize OpenID Connect for secure access. With full white labeling and design control, your portals can be branded to reflect your identity while offering a user-friendly and secure experience tailored to your audience.

features.name: Download
features.headline: Flexible Asset and Data Downloads for Enhanced Usability
features.shortDescription: Pimcore Experience Portals provide versatile download options, including single and batch downloads, a convenient download cart, and support for image thumbnails as well as CSV and JSON data formats. These features make accessing and exporting assets and data seamless and efficient.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s Asset and Data Downloads feature in Experience Portals provides a comprehensive and user-friendly solution for accessing and exporting digital assets and data. Designed with flexibility and efficiency in mind, this feature supports a wide range of download options to meet the diverse needs of portal users.

Users can choose between single downloads for individual files or batch downloads when multiple assets or data sets are needed at once. This functionality is particularly valuable for managing large volumes of data, as it allows users to efficiently gather all necessary files in one go. The download cart further enhances this process by allowing users to collect and organize their downloads before initiating the export. This is ideal for users who need to compile a selection of assets from different categories or data pools, as it provides a centralized place to manage all download requests.

In addition to these core capabilities, the feature also supports the download of image thumbnails, which is useful for previewing or sharing visual assets in a compact format. For data-heavy tasks, users can export information in CSV or JSON formats, ensuring compatibility with various data processing tools and applications. This versatility makes the Asset and Data Downloads feature a powerful tool for anyone needing to interact with and export digital assets and structured data efficiently.
features.description: The Asset and Data Downloads feature in Pimcore Experience Portals is designed to streamline the process of accessing and exporting digital assets and data. Whether you need to download a single file or multiple items at once, this feature offers the flexibility you need. Use the download cart to gather and manage items before downloading, or choose to download specific assets like image thumbnails. Additionally, data can be exported in CSV or JSON formats, making it easy to use in various applications. This comprehensive set of tools ensures that users can efficiently retrieve and manage the assets and data they need.

features.name: Security and Permissions
features.headline: Advanced Security and Role-Based Permissions for Portals
features.shortDescription: Pimcore Experience Portals offer a powerful, role-based permission system with customizable access settings per portal. Integrated with SSO via OpenID Connect, this feature provides a secure, seamless experience for users while allowing administrators to control permissions and protect sensitive content.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s Security and Permissions feature in Experience Portals is designed to provide a secure, flexible framework for managing user access across multiple portals. With a role-based permission system, administrators can create specific roles, each with customized permissions, allowing users to view, edit, or manage only the content relevant to their role. This feature also enables user-specific permissions for individual portals, offering even greater control over access in diverse portal environments.

To enhance user experience and streamline authentication, Pimcore Experience Portals integrate with Single Sign-On (SSO) via OpenID Connect. This integration provides a seamless login process, allowing users to access portals securely without repeated logins, reducing friction and improving security. The SSO support also ensures that permission changes or user removals are reflected instantly across all connected systems, enhancing both security and user management efficiency.

With this robust setup, administrators can manage permissions for various users and groups across portals, ensuring that sensitive content remains protected while delivering a convenient, scalable solution for user access. Ideal for businesses with complex access needs, Pimcore’s Security and Permissions feature provides a centralized, adaptable approach to user management, allowing organizations to maintain strict control over data access, ensure compliance, and foster a streamlined user experience.
features.description: Pimcore Experience Portals’ Security and Permissions feature empowers businesses with granular, role-based control over user access, supporting specific permissions per portal. Integrated with OpenID Connect for Single Sign-On (SSO), it ensures secure, efficient access management. Administrators can define access levels by role or individual user, offering maximum flexibility and security across portals. This comprehensive system supports customizable permissions, streamlined user management, and robust access protection, making it easier to secure sensitive information while delivering an accessible user experience.

benefits.name: Enhanced Security with Role-Based Access
benefits.description: Pimcore Experience Portals offer role-based permissions, enabling administrators to define access per portal based on user roles. This segmentation enhances data security by controlling access to sensitive information, allowing only authorized users to access specific areas of each portal.

benefits.name: Seamless SSO Integration for User Convenience
benefits.description: The Single Sign-On (SSO) capability in Pimcore Experience Portals, powered by OpenID Connect, allows users to access multiple portals with one login. This integration enhances user convenience while maintaining secure authentication, reducing login friction and improving user experience.

benefits.name: Scalable User-Specific Permissions for Growth
benefits.description: Pimcore’s Experience Portals support user-specific permissions per portal, allowing businesses to customize access at both the individual and group levels. This adaptability provides a flexible, scalable solution that adjusts to evolving business needs and ensures secure content distribution across all portals.

features.name: Data Search and Filtering
features.headline: Advanced Search and Filtering for Precise Data Retrieval
features.shortDescription: Pimcore Experience Portals offer powerful search and filtering capabilities, including global full-text search, advanced filtering options, and the ability to save searches. Users can easily navigate result lists and grids, making data retrieval fast, precise, and user-friendly.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s Search and Filtering capabilities within Experience Portals are designed to offer users an intuitive and powerful way to access the information they need, precisely when they need it. The global full-text search feature allows users to search across the entire portal with just a few keystrokes, delivering comprehensive results that encompass all relevant data. This is especially useful for large datasets, where pinpointing specific information quickly is crucial.

To further refine search results, users can utilize advanced filtering options. These filters allow for narrowing down results based on specific criteria, such as date ranges, categories, or custom attributes, making it easier to sift through large volumes of data and focus on what matters most. This level of precision ensures that users spend less time searching and more time using the data effectively.

In addition to searching and filtering, this feature allows users to save their search queries. This is particularly beneficial for users who frequently search for the same type of information, as it saves time and ensures consistency in data retrieval. Saved searches can be accessed quickly, making repetitive tasks more efficient.

The feature also supports result lists and grids, which display search outcomes in a clear and organized manner. Whether you prefer a list view or a grid layout, the search results are presented in a way that is easy to navigate and understand. This combination of powerful search tools and user-friendly display options makes Pimcore’s Search and Filtering feature an invaluable asset for any portal user, enhancing both productivity and user experience.
features.description: The Search and Filtering feature in Pimcore Experience Portals provides users with robust tools to find exactly what they need. With global full-text search, advanced filtering options, and the ability to save searches, users can quickly access relevant data. This feature also supports result lists and grids, ensuring that search results are displayed clearly and organized effectively for enhanced usability and efficiency.

features.name: Collections
features.headline: Organize and Share Content with Virtual Collections
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s Experience Portals offer Virtual Collections, allowing users to create, share, and download curated selections of data, such as products or digital assets. Ideal for organizing content by topic or project, these collections act as virtual storage for collaborative and efficient asset management.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s Experience Portals introduce Virtual Collections—a powerful feature designed to enhance how businesses organize, manage, and collaborate on digital content. Virtual Collections are essentially curated selections of data, such as products or digital assets, that can be grouped together based on specific topics, projects, or other criteria. These collections function as virtual storage, providing users with a flexible and dynamic way to manage their digital content.

With Virtual Collections, users can easily create and organize content around particular themes or business needs. For example, a marketing team might create a collection of assets related to an upcoming campaign, while a product team might gather all assets related to a new product launch. These collections provide a centralized place to access all relevant content, simplifying the management of large volumes of data.

One of the key advantages of Virtual Collections is their collaborative nature. Collections can be shared with other users, enabling teams to work together seamlessly. Whether you need to share a collection with a colleague, a client, or an external partner, Pimcore makes it easy to collaborate on and distribute the content that matters most. This feature significantly improves teamwork and communication, ensuring that everyone involved has access to the right data at the right time.

Additionally, Pimcore allows users to download entire collections, providing a convenient way to access and use grouped assets offline or in other systems. This is particularly useful for tasks like project handovers, presentations, or when preparing assets for external use. By offering the ability to download all relevant data in one go, Virtual Collections streamline the process of working with large sets of assets.

Overall, Pimcore’s Virtual Collections offer a flexible, efficient, and collaborative solution for managing digital assets and product data. By organizing content in a way that aligns with specific business needs, and enabling easy sharing and downloading, Virtual Collections help businesses maximize the value of their digital content while enhancing productivity and collaboration.
features.description: Pimcore’s Virtual Collections feature within the Experience Portals enables users to create curated selections of data, such as products or digital assets, that can be organized around specific topics or projects. These collections can be easily shared with other users, fostering collaboration and streamlining workflows. Additionally, users can download entire collections, making it simple to access and utilize grouped assets as needed. Virtual Collections serve as an effective tool for managing and organizing content in a flexible, collaborative, and efficient manner.

features.name: Customization & Branding
features.headline: Tailor Portals to Your Brand with Full Customization
features.shortDescription: Pimcore Experience Portals offer complete customization and white-labeling capabilities, enabling businesses to align portals with their brand vision. Adjust logos, colors, and functionality, and extend features to match your specific needs with full control and flexibility.
