features.longDescription:
Pimcore Experience Portals offer a comprehensive suite of customization and branding tools, empowering businesses to fully tailor portals to reflect their brand identity and functional requirements. With white-labeling capabilities, organizations can apply their own logos, color schemes, and design elements, creating a seamless brand experience that resonates with users. This customization extends beyond appearance, with full control over portal functionality through Pimcore’s adaptable codebase. Businesses can extend and enhance portal features, adding custom modules, workflows, and integrations that support specific needs and enhance user engagement.

Developers have the freedom to fine-tune every aspect of the portal, from layout to functionality, ensuring that it aligns precisely with business processes and objectives. This level of control fosters a unique portal environment where brands can achieve consistency and innovation simultaneously. For organizations looking to establish a powerful, branded user experience, Pimcore’s Customization & Branding feature offers full ownership, enabling the creation of highly personalized portals that grow and evolve alongside the business.
features.description: Pimcore’s Customization & Branding features allow businesses to transform Experience Portals into unique brand touchpoints. With white-labeling options, companies can seamlessly apply their logos, colors, and design elements, creating a cohesive brand experience. Developers can further extend and adapt portal functionalities through customizable code, ensuring the portal aligns with operational requirements. Pimcore’s flexible framework provides complete ownership over appearance and features, enabling businesses to scale, innovate, and differentiate their portals fully.

benefits.name: Seamless Brand Experience
benefits.description: By leveraging white-labeling, Pimcore Experience Portals allow companies to create a fully branded portal experience. Businesses can adjust logos, color schemes, and design to match their unique brand identity, ensuring customers experience a seamless, recognizable interface that reinforces brand loyalty.

benefits.name: Full Control Over Functionality
benefits.description: With the flexibility to modify and extend functionalities, Pimcore Experience Portals enable businesses to customize portals according to their unique requirements. This adaptability helps optimize workflows, add specific features, and support an efficient, user-centered portal experience.

benefits.name: Extendability for Long-Term Growth
benefits.description: With complete ownership over customization, Pimcore Experience Portals enable businesses to extend and scale portal functionalities in alignment with evolving goals. This flexibility supports long-term growth, allowing for continuous innovation and ensuring the portal adapts to meet new challenges.

features.name: Data Views & Presentation
features.headline: Tailored Data Views for Enhanced Asset and Object Management
features.shortDescription: Pimcore Experience Portals offer specialized data views and presentation options for both digital assets and data objects. In the context of DAM, view detailed digital assets, while PIM/MDM provides comprehensive insights into data objects, all within a user-friendly, customizable interface.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s Data Views & Presentation feature within Experience Portals is a powerful tool that allows users to access and manage digital assets and data objects with unprecedented clarity and precision. This feature is particularly beneficial in two key contexts: Digital Asset Management (DAM) and Product Information Management (PIM) or Master Data Management (MDM).

In the context of DAM, the feature provides detailed views of digital assets, including essential metadata, version history, and any related data. Users can quickly access all relevant information about an asset, from its creation date to its current usage status, ensuring that asset management is both comprehensive and intuitive. This detailed presentation helps users manage their digital assets more effectively, making it easier to maintain control over large libraries of images, videos, documents, and other media.

For PIM and MDM, the Data Views & Presentation feature offers in-depth insights into data objects, such as product information or customer data. Users can explore detailed views that include all relevant attributes, relationships, and classifications of each data object. This is particularly useful for businesses that rely on accurate and detailed product data to drive operations, as it allows for better data governance and ensures that all necessary information is easily accessible.

Moreover, the views are customizable, allowing users to tailor the presentation of data according to their specific needs. This flexibility ensures that users can focus on the most critical aspects of their data, enhancing both efficiency and decision-making processes. Whether you're managing digital assets or data objects, this feature ensures that you have the detailed, customizable views necessary to optimize your workflows and achieve your business objectives.
features.description: The Data Views & Presentation feature in Pimcore Experience Portals is designed to provide users with tailored and detailed views of their digital assets and data objects. In the context of Digital Asset Management (DAM), users can view and manage detailed asset information, including metadata, versions, and associated data. For Product Information Management (PIM) and Master Data Management (MDM), this feature offers in-depth views of data objects, enabling users to access comprehensive information, relationships, and classifications. These customizable views ensure that the most relevant data is always at your fingertips, improving decision-making and efficiency.

features.name: Sharing
features.headline: Secure and Flexible Data Sharing for Enhanced Collaboration
features.shortDescription: Pimcore Experience Portals offer robust data and digital asset sharing features, enabling users to share content securely with others, including guest users without login. Define permissions, choose downloading options, and protect shared assets with watermarking, ensuring controlled and secure collaboration.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s Data and Digital Asset Sharing feature within Experience Portals is designed to facilitate secure and flexible sharing of content, whether it’s data, documents, or digital assets. This feature is particularly valuable for organizations that need to collaborate with various stakeholders, both internally and externally, while maintaining strict control over their content.

One of the key benefits of this feature is the ability to share data and assets with both registered users and guest users who do not have a login. This is especially useful for sharing content with clients, partners, or any external stakeholders who require access to specific information without needing full portal access. The process is simple and secure, allowing you to share content via a direct link, which can be accessed without a password, streamlining the sharing process.

To ensure that shared content is used appropriately, Pimcore allows you to define specific permissions for each share. These permissions can include viewing rights, downloading rights, and even editing rights, depending on the needs of the recipient. This level of control ensures that you can tailor the sharing experience to suit different levels of collaboration while keeping sensitive data protected.

In addition to defining permissions, users can choose specific downloading options, such as allowing downloads in different formats or restricting downloads altogether. This flexibility is crucial for controlling how your data and assets are distributed, ensuring that they are used in the intended manner.

To further enhance security, Pimcore’s sharing feature also supports watermarking. This is particularly important for protecting sensitive or proprietary content, such as images or documents, by marking them with identifying information that discourages unauthorized use or distribution. Watermarking provides an additional layer of security, ensuring that even if content is shared broadly, it remains protected.

Overall, Pimcore’s Data and Digital Asset Sharing feature combines ease of use with robust security controls, making it an ideal solution for organizations looking to collaborate effectively while safeguarding their valuable digital assets and data.
features.description: The Data and Digital Asset Sharing feature in Pimcore Experience Portals provides a powerful and flexible way to share content with others, both within your organization and externally. Users can share data and assets securely with other registered users or guest users without requiring a login. You can also define permissions for each share, control downloading options, and apply watermarking to protect sensitive content. This feature ensures that your data is shared efficiently and securely, supporting seamless collaboration while maintaining full control over your assets.

features.name: Mobile Ready
features.headline: Seamless Mobile Access to Data and Assets
features.shortDescription: Pimcore Experience Portals offer a fully responsive interface, ensuring seamless access to data and digital assets from any device. Whether on a smartphone, tablet, or desktop, users can efficiently interact with the portal’s content, maintaining productivity on the go.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s Mobile-Ready feature is designed to provide users with a seamless and consistent experience across all devices, ensuring that data and digital assets are accessible anytime, anywhere. As more business operations shift towards mobile, having a fully responsive interface that adapts to different screen sizes and devices is crucial. Whether your users are accessing the portal from a smartphone, tablet, or desktop, they will experience a smooth and intuitive interface that retains full functionality, regardless of the device.

This mobile-readiness is not just about scaling the interface to fit smaller screens; it’s about rethinking the user experience for mobile contexts. The interface is designed to be touch-friendly, with easy navigation and accessible controls that make interacting with data and assets effortless, even on smaller screens. This ensures that users can perform all necessary tasks, from viewing detailed data to downloading digital assets, with the same ease and efficiency they would have on a desktop.

Moreover, the ability to access the portal’s full range of features on mobile devices means that productivity doesn’t have to stop when users are away from their desks. Whether they’re in the field, at a client site, or commuting, users can stay connected to the information they need, making quick decisions and staying engaged with their work. This flexibility is invaluable in today’s fast-paced business environment, where the ability to act on information in real-time can provide a significant competitive advantage.
features.description: The Mobile-Ready feature in Pimcore Experience Portals ensures that users can access and manage data and digital assets from any device, thanks to a fully responsive interface. Designed to adapt to different screen sizes and orientations, this feature guarantees that your portal delivers a consistent and intuitive user experience whether accessed on a smartphone, tablet, or desktop. By enabling efficient access to critical information and assets on the go, this feature supports uninterrupted productivity and flexibility in today’s mobile-driven world.

features.name: Dashboards & Content Pages
features.headline: Dynamic Dashboards and Content Pages for Customized Insights
features.shortDescription: Create and manage customized dashboards and content pages within Pimcore Portals. Compose pages using flexible content blocks, integrate reports and statistics, and leverage the full suite of DXP features for a seamless, data-driven experience.
features.longDescription:
The Dashboards & Content Pages feature in Pimcore Portals offers a robust and flexible solution for presenting data and content in a way that’s both impactful and easy to navigate. With this feature, you can create highly customized dashboards and content pages tailored to the specific needs of your users. Whether you're displaying KPIs, detailed reports, or engaging multimedia content, this feature enables you to design pages that are not only visually appealing but also packed with actionable insights.

This functionality allows you to compose pages from a variety of content blocks, each serving a specific purpose—from data visualization tools like charts and graphs to text blocks, media elements, and more. The ability to integrate reports and statistics directly into your dashboards means that users can access critical information at a glance, without needing to dive into complex systems or databases.

Additionally, Dashboards & Content Pages fully leverage Pimcore's Digital Experience Platform (DXP) features, ensuring that every page is not only informative but also aligned with your broader digital strategy. You can use personalization tools, multi-channel publishing, and advanced analytics to create content that resonates with your audience, offering them a tailored and cohesive experience across all touchpoints. Whether your goal is to inform, engage, or convert, this feature provides the tools you need to create portals that are both user-friendly and deeply informative.
features.description: Pimcore's Dashboards & Content Pages feature empowers you to create fully customized dashboards and content pages within your portals. By composing pages from versatile content blocks, you can tailor the presentation of data, reports, and statistics to meet the unique needs of your audience. This feature leverages all the powerful DXP capabilities of Pimcore, allowing you to deliver a dynamic, engaging, and personalized user experience that drives informed decision-making and enhances portal usability.

features.name: Unlimited Portals and Data Pools
features.headline: Unlimited Portals and Data Pools for Tailored Content Access
features.shortDescription: Pimcore Experience Portals empower you to create an unlimited number of multi-language portals, each configured with specific data pools. Break free from data silos and tailor your portals for different target groups, whether for marketing, collaboration, or digital asset sharing.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s Unlimited Portals & Data Pools feature is a game-changer for organizations looking to optimize how they manage and share data and digital assets. This feature allows you to create an unlimited number of multi-language portals, each uniquely configured to serve different target groups and purposes. Whether you need a portal for marketing and sales, product collaboration, master data sharing, or digital asset management, Pimcore provides the flexibility to tailor each portal to meet the specific needs of your users.

The true power of this feature lies in its ability to break down data silos. With the Unlimited Portals & Data Pools feature, you can configure distinct data pools for each portal, ensuring that the right content is accessible to the right audience. This means that your marketing team can have a dedicated portal for accessing and sharing sales content, while your product team uses a separate portal to collaborate on product information. Meanwhile, external stakeholders, such as agencies or partners, can access the digital assets they need through a secure, tailored portal designed just for them.

Each portal is fully customizable, allowing you to define which content is shown via data pools, ensuring that each user group has access to the most relevant and up-to-date information. This not only improves efficiency but also enhances the user experience, as each portal is designed with the specific needs of its audience in mind.

Moreover, the multi-language support ensures that your portals can serve global teams and external partners, making it easier to collaborate across borders and time zones. Whether you’re managing a global marketing campaign, coordinating product development across multiple regions, or sharing digital assets with international agencies, Pimcore’s Unlimited Portals & Data Pools feature ensures that everyone has access to the right data in the right language.

This level of customization and scalability makes Pimcore an indispensable tool for any organization looking to streamline its data management processes, enhance collaboration, and deliver a tailored experience to each of its user groups.
features.description: With Pimcore Experience Portals, you can set up an unlimited number of multi-language portals, each tailored to specific audiences and purposes. These portals can serve as marketing and sales content hubs, collaboration platforms, or digital asset sharing solutions. By configuring distinct data pools for each portal, you ensure that the right content is accessible to the right users, effectively breaking down data silos and enabling seamless collaboration across your organization and with external stakeholders.

features.name: Reports & Statistics
features.headline: Actionable Insights with Comprehensive Reporting
features.shortDescription: Pimcore Experience Portals provide powerful reporting and statistics features, offering users detailed insights into portal activity and performance. Generate, view, and analyze reports to make data-driven decisions and optimize your portal’s effectiveness.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s Reports & Statistics feature within Experience Portals is a robust tool designed to provide users with in-depth insights into portal activity and performance. This feature enables you to generate detailed reports that cover a wide range of metrics, from user interactions and engagement levels to content performance and data trends. These reports are essential for understanding how your portal is being used, what areas are performing well, and where improvements might be needed.

With the ability to create custom reports, users can tailor their analytics to focus on the metrics that matter most to their business. Whether you're tracking user behavior to optimize content delivery, monitoring download activity to assess asset utilization, or analyzing data trends to inform future strategies, the Reports & Statistics feature provides the insights needed to drive effective decision-making.

The feature is designed to be user-friendly, allowing even non-technical users to easily generate and interpret reports. The visual representations of data, including charts and graphs, make it easier to grasp complex information quickly, while detailed statistics offer the precision needed for more in-depth analysis. This balance of simplicity and depth ensures that all users can benefit from the insights provided, regardless of their role or expertise.

By continuously monitoring and analyzing portal activity, businesses can stay agile, adapting their strategies based on real-time data. This not only helps in optimizing current operations but also in planning future initiatives with greater accuracy and confidence. In a fast-paced digital environment, the ability to make informed decisions based on comprehensive, real-time data is a significant competitive advantage.
features.description: The Reports & Statistics feature in Pimcore Experience Portals empowers users to generate and analyze detailed reports on various aspects of portal activity. This feature offers a comprehensive overview of performance metrics, user interactions, and data trends, allowing businesses to make informed, data-driven decisions. By leveraging these insights, you can optimize portal content, improve user engagement, and ensure that your portal is aligned with your business objectives.

capabilities.name: Template and Component Management
capabilities.headline: Flexible Template and Component Management
capabilities.shortDescription: Pimcore Experience Management offers unmatched flexibility in managing templates, layouts, and content, supporting multi-channel publishing with an open, Twig-based template system and reusable components focused on usability and accessibility.
capabilities.longDescription:
Pimcore Experience Management stands out as a highly flexible and powerful platform for managing templates, layouts, and content across all digital channels. Built with an open architecture, Pimcore uses Twig, a popular and flexible templating language, as the foundation for creating and managing templates. This approach ensures that developers have the freedom to design and implement highly customized layouts that perfectly fit the needs of any project, from simple websites to complex, multi-channel digital experiences.

One of the key strengths of Pimcore’s template management system is its focus on reusability and accessibility. Developers can create reusable components that are not only easy to implement across different templates but are also designed with usability and accessibility in mind. This ensures that all content delivered through Pimcore is consistent, accessible to all users, and optimized for the best possible user experience.

Moreover, Pimcore’s content management capabilities go beyond just creating and editing templates. Everything within Pimcore can be made editable, giving content managers and marketers complete control over every aspect of their digital presence. Whether it’s a document, a piece of content, or an entire template, Pimcore’s system allows for easy editing and updating, ensuring that content can be adapted and tailored for any channel with minimal effort.

This level of flexibility and control makes Pimcore a content management system on steroids, capable of handling the most demanding multi-channel publishing needs. Whether you’re managing a global website, creating personalized content for different audiences, or delivering content across various digital touchpoints, Pimcore provides the tools and capabilities to ensure that your content is always perfectly aligned with your business goals.

features.name: Editable Templates
features.headline: Dynamic Content Management with Customizable Editables
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s Editables enable seamless content management by providing customizable placeholders in templates, which appear as input widgets in the admin interface. With over 20 predefined Editables and the ability to develop new ones, any content can be made fully editable, empowering users to manage content efficiently.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s Editables are a powerful feature that forms the core of content management in the platform, allowing you to create fully editable content areas within your digital environment. Editables act as placeholders embedded within your templates, which appear as interactive input widgets in the admin interface when in edit mode. These widgets allow content managers to directly modify text, images, and other elements within documents, ensuring that content updates can be performed quickly and without the need for coding.

With over 20 predefined Editables available, Pimcore offers a wide array of tools to cover various content needs, including text fields, rich text editors, image uploaders, and more. Each of these Editables can be fully customized to fit the specific requirements of your project, ensuring that content management is not only flexible but also aligned with your unique digital strategy.

Moreover, Pimcore’s Editables are highly extendable, allowing developers to create new Editables tailored to specialized content needs. This flexibility means that regardless of the complexity or uniqueness of your content, Pimcore can accommodate it, making your content fully editable and easy to manage.

In frontend mode, the content managed through these Editables is rendered exactly as intended, providing a seamless and consistent user experience. This interaction between the admin and frontend environments makes Pimcore’s Editables an essential tool for maintaining a dynamic, up-to-date digital platform that can quickly adapt to content changes.

By leveraging Pimcore’s Editables, organizations can empower their content teams to manage and update content autonomously, reducing dependency on technical teams and speeding up content workflows. This not only enhances operational efficiency but also ensures that your digital platform remains agile and responsive to evolving content needs.
features.description: Pimcore’s Editables are the foundation of content management within the platform, allowing you to create dynamic, editable content areas directly within your templates. These placeholders become input widgets in the admin interface, enabling content managers to easily update text, images, and other elements without technical assistance. With over 20 predefined Editables, fully customizable and extendable, Pimcore ensures that any content can be managed with ease, making your digital platform responsive and user-friendly.

features.name: Renderlets & Relations
features.headline: Seamless Data Integration with Renderlets & Relations
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s Renderlets & Relations are powerful tools that seamlessly integrate data from PIM, MDM, DAM, and E-Commerce into the DXP, enabling single-source publishing. With drag-and-drop simplicity, you can embed products, images, and storefronts directly into your digital experiences, enhancing flexibility and efficiency.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s Renderlets & Relations are groundbreaking features that embody the pure essence of single-source publishing, seamlessly integrating data management with digital experience creation. These specialized Editables allow you to connect and render data from Pimcore’s PIM, MDM, DAM, and E-Commerce modules directly within the DXP environment, revolutionizing how content is managed and published across multiple channels.

Renderlets act as dynamic placeholders that enable you to embed data-driven content into DXP templates effortlessly. For example, with a simple drag-and-drop, a product from PIM can be placed directly into the WYSIWYG editor of Pimcore DXP. The system automatically formats and optimizes the product information for its intended placement, ensuring that all content is consistently displayed. This functionality also extends to images from Pimcore DAM, which can be dropped into the editor, where they are automatically resized and adjusted to fit the design and specifications.

Relations enhance this capability by allowing you to link various content types, enabling complex and integrated digital experiences. Imagine dragging and dropping a complete storefront into a DXP page to instantly create a micro-shop that’s fully integrated with your existing product catalogs and data. This ability to reuse and repurpose data across different domains without leaving the application defines the power of single-source publishing.

With Renderlets & Relations, all content is managed and published from a single, unified source. This means you can maintain consistency, streamline workflows, and enhance efficiency, all while ensuring that your digital experiences are always up-to-date and aligned with your data. Whether you’re embedding a single product, a media asset, or an entire storefront, these features offer a level of flexibility and control that is unmatched in the industry.

The ability to manage everything within a single platform, without switching between tools or platforms, greatly enhances the efficiency and flexibility of content creation. By centralizing data management and publishing within Pimcore, businesses can deliver consistent, engaging, and up-to-date content across all channels, maximizing the impact of their digital strategies.
features.description: Renderlets & Relations are unique features of Pimcore DXP that exemplify the true definition of single-source publishing. By seamlessly connecting PIM, MDM, DAM, and E-Commerce with DXP, these tools enable effortless access and rendering of data across your digital experiences. With drag-and-drop functionality, users can embed products, images, and even entire storefronts into the WYSIWYG editor, with content automatically formatted and optimized for multi-channel publishing. This unparalleled flexibility ensures that all data is managed and published from a single source, streamlining workflows and enhancing efficiency.

features.name: Responsive Templates
features.headline: Fully Responsive, Mobile-First Templates Compatible with Any CSS Framework
features.shortDescription: Pimcore DXP enables the creation of fully responsive, mobile-friendly templates that seamlessly integrate with any frontend CSS framework, including Bootstrap, Tailwind, Materialize, and Foundation. This ensures that your digital experiences are optimized for all devices, maintaining consistency and engagement across desktops, tablets, and smartphones.
features.description:
In the age of mobile-first design, ensuring that your digital content is fully responsive and accessible across all devices is more important than ever. Pimcore DXP’s full-responsive template feature is designed to meet this need by providing all the tools necessary to create adaptable, mobile-friendly layouts that maintain their visual integrity and functionality on any screen size.

What sets Pimcore apart is its compatibility with any frontend CSS framework, including popular options like Bootstrap, Tailwind, Materialize, and Foundation. This flexibility allows developers to choose the framework that best suits their project’s needs while ensuring that the final templates are responsive and compliant with modern web standards.

Using these frameworks within Pimcore, developers can easily implement grid systems, responsive typography, and other essential elements that ensure content looks and functions perfectly across all devices. Whether you’re building a complex multi-page site or a simple landing page, Pimcore’s full-responsive templates will automatically adjust to different screen sizes and orientations, providing users with a seamless experience on desktops, tablets, and smartphones.

In addition to ensuring visual consistency, Pimcore’s responsive design capabilities enhance usability by optimizing navigation, readability, and interaction for each device type. This mobile-first approach is particularly valuable in a world where more users are accessing content via mobile devices, making it essential to deliver a smooth, intuitive experience across the board.

Furthermore, by leveraging the power of modern CSS frameworks, Pimcore enables faster development cycles, allowing teams to build and deploy responsive templates more efficiently. This not only reduces development time but also ensures that your digital experiences remain current, adaptive, and user-friendly as technology and user expectations evolve.

features.name: Accessibility
features.headline: Build Accessible, Compliant Digital Experiences
features.shortDescription: Pimcore DXP offers comprehensive tools to create fully accessible templates, ensuring compliance with global accessibility standards like ADA and WCAG. By adhering to regulatory requirements from the European Union and the U.S., Pimcore enables you to deliver inclusive digital experiences that support digital literacy and e-inclusion for all users.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore DXP’s commitment to accessibility goes beyond simple compliance; it’s about empowering businesses to create digital experiences that are inclusive and user-friendly for everyone. With a full suite of tools to develop accessible templates, Pimcore ensures that your digital content adheres to global accessibility standards such as the Americans with Disabilities Act (ADA) and the Web Content Accessibility Guidelines (WCAG).

By leveraging Pimcore’s accessibility features, you can design and build websites, applications, and digital content that meet the rigorous requirements set forth by regulatory bodies in both the European Union and the United States. This includes complying with legal mandates concerning digital literacy and e-inclusion, which are increasingly important as the global digital landscape continues to expand.

Pimcore provides the flexibility to integrate accessibility best practices into every aspect of your digital experience. This includes features like keyboard navigation, screen reader compatibility, alternative text for images, and high-contrast visual elements, ensuring that your content is accessible to users with a wide range of abilities and disabilities.

Moreover, by adhering to accessibility standards, you’re not just avoiding legal pitfalls—you’re enhancing the overall user experience. Accessible design often leads to better usability for all users, as it encourages a focus on clear, straightforward interfaces, intuitive navigation, and responsive layouts. This focus on inclusivity can also improve your brand’s reputation, demonstrating a commitment to serving all members of your audience, regardless of their individual needs.

In an era where digital inclusion is a priority, Pimcore’s accessibility features help you stay ahead by ensuring that your digital experiences are not only compliant but also welcoming and usable for everyone. This comprehensive approach to accessibility not only meets current regulatory demands but also positions your business as a leader in digital inclusivity.
features.description: Pimcore DXP empowers you to create accessible digital experiences by providing all the necessary tools to develop templates that meet global accessibility standards, including ADA and WCAG. Designed to comply with regulatory requirements from the European Union and the U.S., Pimcore ensures that your digital content is accessible to all users, promoting digital literacy and e-inclusion. With Pimcore, you can build websites and applications that not only comply with legal standards but also enhance usability and inclusivity for a diverse audience.

features.name: Reusable Components
features.headline: Build with Reusable, Customizable Components
features.shortDescription: Pimcore DXP templates are powered by reusable, 100% customizable components like area bricks, enabling easy page building and integration with design systems. These flexible components support consistent design and functionality across projects, streamlining development and enhancing scalability.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore DXP’s reusable components feature is designed to facilitate efficient, scalable, and consistent digital development. By utilizing flexible and customizable components like area bricks, developers can create dynamic and easily maintainable templates that streamline the page-building process while ensuring consistency across projects.

Area bricks are modular elements that can be inserted into different sections of your templates, allowing for the creation of complex layouts and content structures with minimal effort. These components are fully customizable, enabling developers to tailor each brick to meet specific project requirements. Whether you’re building a content-rich landing page, a customizable product grid, or a dynamic form, area bricks provide the building blocks needed to bring your vision to life.

A key advantage of Pimcore’s reusable components is their compatibility with UI design systems and component libraries. This means that the components you create can seamlessly integrate with your existing design frameworks, ensuring that your digital experiences are not only visually consistent but also aligned with your brand guidelines. By standardizing components within a design system, you can ensure that every element of your digital platform adheres to the same high standards of design and functionality.

Furthermore, the ability to create a component library within Pimcore allows you to build a repository of reusable, tested, and approved components that can be deployed across multiple projects. This library not only speeds up development by providing ready-to-use elements but also ensures that your digital experiences maintain a consistent look and feel, regardless of the project or team involved.

By leveraging reusable components, Pimcore simplifies the process of easy page building. Developers can drag and drop pre-built components into templates, reducing the need for repetitive coding and allowing for rapid prototyping and deployment. This efficiency is particularly valuable for large-scale projects or organizations that require a high degree of consistency across various digital touchpoints.

Overall, Pimcore’s reusable components offer a powerful combination of flexibility, customization, and integration. Whether you’re looking to enhance your digital platform’s scalability, maintain design consistency, or streamline development processes, these components provide the tools needed to build robust, scalable, and visually consistent digital experiences.
features.description: Pimcore DXP’s reusable components feature, including area bricks, empowers developers to create flexible and customizable templates that simplify page building. These components can be tailored to specific needs, integrated with existing UI design systems, and reused across multiple projects. By building a comprehensive component library, you ensure consistent design and functionality, making it easier to scale, maintain, and enhance your digital experiences.

features.name: Template Creation via Twig
features.headline: Customizable and Secure Template Development with Twig
features.shortDescription: Pimcore DXP’s template development leverages the powerful Twig templating engine, enabling the creation of custom layouts and designs. Fully compliant with the latest web standards, Twig offers a secure and flexible environment to craft unique templates for different content types and pages, with full support for all CSS and JavaScript possibilities.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore DXP’s template development capabilities are significantly enhanced by the integration of Twig, a robust templating engine that offers both flexibility and security. Twig allows developers to create custom layouts and designs tailored to the specific needs of different content types and pages, ensuring that your digital experiences are not only unique but also optimized for performance and usability.

One of the key strengths of Twig is its full compliance with the latest web standards and technologies. This means that developers can utilize the latest CSS frameworks and JavaScript libraries without worrying about compatibility issues. Whether you’re building a responsive layout, incorporating advanced animations, or implementing complex user interactions, Twig provides the support needed to bring your vision to life.

Twig’s templating system is also designed with security in mind. By automatically escaping variables and providing tools to sanitize user inputs, Twig helps prevent common security vulnerabilities like XSS (Cross-Site Scripting) attacks. This ensures that your templates are not only powerful but also secure, protecting your digital experiences from potential threats.

In addition to its security features, Twig offers a highly flexible environment for template development. Developers can create different templates for various content types and pages, allowing for a highly tailored user experience. Whether you need a specific layout for a product page, a unique design for a blog post, or a custom format for user-generated content, Twig makes it easy to create and manage multiple templates within the same project.

Furthermore, Twig’s syntax is simple and easy to learn, making it accessible to both experienced developers and those new to template development. This ease of use, combined with its powerful features, makes Twig an ideal choice for developing templates that are both functional and aesthetically pleasing.

Overall, Pimcore DXP’s integration with Twig provides a powerful and flexible framework for template development, enabling you to create custom, secure, and compliant digital experiences that meet the specific needs of your audience.
features.description: Pimcore DXP’s integration with Twig, a powerful and secure templating engine, allows developers to create highly customizable and responsive templates. Whether you need unique layouts for different content types or pages, Twig provides the flexibility to design and implement custom solutions. Fully compliant with the latest web standards and supporting all CSS and JavaScript functionalities, Twig ensures that your templates are both cutting-edge and secure, enabling a rich and dynamic user experience.

features.name: Multi Language Templates
features.headline: Effortless Multi-Language Support with Customizable Templates
features.shortDescription: Pimcore DXP enables the creation of multi-language templates, allowing you to use a single template across multiple languages. Easily translate labels and content using Pimcore’s website translation features, ensuring a consistent and localized experience for global audiences.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore DXP’s multi-language templates feature is designed to simplify the process of creating and managing global digital experiences. By allowing you to use a single template across multiple languages, this feature reduces the complexity of managing content for different regions, while ensuring consistency in design and functionality.

One of the key advantages of this feature is its seamless integration with Pimcore’s website translation tools. These tools enable you to easily translate labels, buttons, headers, and other text elements within your templates, ensuring that your content is accurately localized for each target market. This functionality is essential for businesses operating in multiple countries or regions, where delivering a tailored and culturally relevant experience is crucial for engaging local audiences.

Using multi-language templates, you can maintain a consistent brand identity and user experience across all language versions of your site, while minimizing the time and effort required to manage content in multiple languages. Whether you’re translating a few key phrases or localizing an entire website, Pimcore’s tools make it easy to ensure that every element of your digital platform is aligned with the language and cultural preferences of your audience.

Moreover, Pimcore’s multi-language templates are fully customizable, allowing you to adapt the layout, design, and content of your templates to meet the specific needs of each market. This flexibility ensures that your global digital presence is not only consistent but also responsive to the unique demands of different regions.

Overall, Pimcore’s multi-language templates feature provides a powerful solution for businesses looking to expand their digital presence globally, offering the tools needed to create localized, consistent, and user-friendly experiences across multiple languages.
features.description: Pimcore DXP’s multi-language templates feature allows you to design and deploy templates that can be used across multiple languages, streamlining global content management. With built-in website translation tools, you can easily translate labels, text, and other content elements, ensuring that your digital experiences are consistent, localized, and accessible to diverse audiences worldwide.

capabilities.name: Content Modelling
capabilities.headline: Dynamic and Flexible Content Modeling
capabilities.shortDescription: Pimcore’s content modeling capabilities allow for dynamic, flexible, and scalable content structures. By linking content across assets and commerce, utilizing multiple document and page types, and offering reusable components, Pimcore supports multi-channel and single-source publishing, creating seamless content and commerce experiences.
capabilities.longDescription:
Pimcore’s content modeling capabilities elevate it beyond the average Digital Experience Platform (DXP). Designed to model any digital data for any channel and industry, Pimcore enables businesses to create highly dynamic and flexible content structures. The platform supports multiple document and page types, allowing for a variety of content formats and presentations. Reusable components streamline content creation and management, ensuring consistency and efficiency.

Content linking between assets and commerce further enhances the platform’s versatility, enabling businesses to integrate diverse content types seamlessly. This feature is crucial for creating cohesive content and commerce experiences, ensuring that customers receive a unified message across all touchpoints. The multi-channel and single-source publishing capabilities ensure that content is efficiently managed and distributed, reducing redundancy and improving workflow efficiency. Pimcore’s content modeling capabilities are designed to support innovative content strategies, providing a robust foundation for businesses to deliver exceptional digital experiences.

features.name: Dynamic and Flexible Content Structure
features.headline: Dynamic and Flexible Content Structure
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s content composition empowers editors to design digital experiences without coding, using a page builder methodology. Pages are composed of reusable components, flexibly arranged through drag-and-drop, utilizing visual components like Areablock, Area, and Block.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s content composition capabilities are designed to give editors complete control over the structure and layout of digital content, all without requiring any coding expertise. Using a page builder methodology, editors can define and customize content structures by composing pages from reusable components. These components can be flexibly arranged through a user-friendly drag-and-drop interface, allowing for quick and intuitive design processes.

Central to this flexibility are Pimcore’s visual components: Areablock, Area, and Block. These elements enable the seamless creation of complex digital experiences by allowing content to be divided, structured, and organized into cohesive and visually appealing layouts. Areablock facilitates the grouping of multiple content blocks, while Area and Block components allow for detailed control over specific sections and individual content elements.

This system is designed to be infinitely adaptable, ensuring that everything is possible—from straightforward page designs to intricate, dynamic layouts. Pimcore’s content composition tools empower editors to craft highly personalized digital experiences that align perfectly with the brand’s vision and user needs, all while maintaining ease of use and flexibility.
features.description: Pimcore’s content composition feature allows editors to flexibly define content structures using a page builder methodology, without needing to code. Editors can compose pages from reusable components, arranging them effortlessly through drag-and-drop. The visual components—Areablock, Area, and Block—provide powerful tools to create rich digital experiences. With this system, everything is possible, from simple layouts to complex, dynamic pages, ensuring that editors have the creative freedom to build engaging and tailored digital content.

features.name: Time-Based Components
features.headline: Time Depending Components
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s Time-Based Components allow for scheduled content management, enabling you to define when specific content blocks appear or disappear, automating the delivery of time-sensitive digital experiences.
features.longDescription: Pimcore’s Time-Based Components provide powerful tools for automating the timing of content delivery across your digital platforms. With features like the Scheduled Block Editable, you can define specific timeframes for when content blocks should be visible or hidden, allowing for dynamic and time-sensitive content management. This capability is particularly useful for scheduling promotions, seasonal content, or any time-specific messages that need to appear on your website at precise intervals. By automating these processes, Pimcore ensures that your digital experiences are always aligned with your strategic timing, improving relevance and engagement with your audience.
features.description: Pimcore’s Time-Based Components, like the Scheduled Block Editable, enable precise control over when specific content is displayed or hidden on your digital platforms. This feature allows you to schedule content blocks to appear or disappear at set times, automating the delivery of time-sensitive promotions, announcements, or seasonal content. The scheduling can be easily managed, ensuring that your content is always relevant and timely, enhancing the user experience by presenting the right information at the right time.

features.name: Content Linking
features.headline: Content Linking
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s unique content linking allows seamless integration of data across PIM, MDM, DAM, and Commerce, enabling effortless reuse and embedding of content with single-source publishing through powerful renderlets.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s content linking feature represents a powerful and innovative approach to managing digital experiences, leveraging the platform’s unique ability to integrate data from across all its domains—PIM, MDM, DAM, and Commerce. This capability allows you to link, embed, and reuse content with incredible ease, thanks to Pimcore’s renderlets. For instance, placing a product from PIM onto a website or into a printed brochure is as simple as a drag-and-drop action, with single-source publishing ensuring that the content remains consistent and accurate across all platforms.

This integration doesn’t just stop at PIM—it extends to DAM, allowing you to seamlessly embed and link media assets, and to other Pimcore functionalities, like creating dynamic relationships between data points or utilizing snippets across multiple documents. The ability to unify all these elements into a cohesive, easily managed digital experience is what sets Pimcore apart, offering a level of content management and integration that is unparalleled in the industry. This feature truly embodies the genius of Pimcore, making it an indispensable tool for any comprehensive data and experience management strategy.
features.description: Pimcore’s content linking capability is a standout feature that enables the seamless integration and relation of data across all Pimcore domains, including PIM, MDM, DAM, and Commerce. Using renderlets, you can easily embed and reuse data, such as placing a product from PIM into a website or brochure, with just a simple drag-and-drop action. This powerful functionality supports single-source publishing, ensuring that content is consistent and up-to-date across all channels. The ability to link and integrate data so effortlessly is what makes Pimcore truly unique and revolutionary.

features.name: Multiple Document Types
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s DXP offers predefined document types that serve as customizable templates for creating various digital content formats, ensuring consistency and efficiency in content management.
features.longDescription: Pimcore’s predefined document types are integral to its DXP, providing a structured and standardized approach to content creation and management. These document types include a variety of templates, such as pages, snippets, hardlinks, and email documents, which are designed to cover the most common content formats needed for digital publishing. Each predefined document type comes with a set of configurable attributes, allowing you to customize them according to your specific needs while maintaining a consistent design and structure across your digital platforms. This system not only speeds up the content creation process but also ensures that your digital assets are organized, cohesive, and easily manageable, whether you're working on a single project or managing a complex, multi-channel digital strategy.
features.description: Pimcore’s predefined document types are foundational templates within the DXP that streamline the creation and management of digital content. These document types, such as pages, snippets, and links, provide a standardized structure that can be customized to meet specific needs, ensuring that content creation is both efficient and consistent across different channels. By leveraging these predefined templates, you can quickly deploy content with a uniform look and feel, while still having the flexibility to tailor each document type to suit particular requirements.

capabilities.name: Content Management
capabilities.headline: Unparalleled DXP Content Management
capabilities.shortDescription: Pimcore’s advanced DXP combines headless and traditional content management, delivering any type of content to any channel. It features WYSIWYG editing, multi-lingual and multi-tenant management, and supports digital media assets and data objects for seamless and efficient content delivery.
capabilities.longDescription:
Pimcore’s Content Management System (CMS), part of its advanced Digital Experience Platform (DXP), delivers an unmatched level of flexibility and efficiency in managing digital content. Combining headless and traditional CMS capabilities, Pimcore allows businesses to deliver any type of content seamlessly across all channels, ensuring a consistent and engaging user experience. The intuitive WYSIWYG editor simplifies content creation and management, making the process enjoyable and efficient.

The platform supports the management of digital media assets and leverages Pimcore Data Objects for robust and scalable content management. Multi-lingual and multi-tenant capabilities enable businesses to manage content across different regions and languages effortlessly, while features like content inheritance, personalization, and staging provide additional layers of flexibility and control. These capabilities ensure that businesses can maintain a centralized and efficient content repository, ready to serve any digital channel with precision and ease.

features.name: Glossary
features.headline: Glossary
features.shortDescription: Pimcore's Glossary centralizes term management, enriching content with automatic links, tooltips, and abbreviations for enhanced user understanding and consistent terminology.
features.longDescription: Pimcore’s Glossary feature in DXP provides a powerful tool for managing and standardizing key terms and phrases across your digital content. It automatically links terms within the content, adding inline links, tooltips, and abbreviations that help users understand complex terminology with ease. These enrichments make content more interactive and accessible, enhancing user comprehension. The Glossary ensures consistent use of terminology, improves content quality, and enables seamless integration of definitions throughout your digital ecosystem. This is particularly valuable for content-heavy environments where clarity, coherence, and user engagement are critical.
features.description: Pimcore’s Glossary within DXP enables centralized management of terms, automatically linking them across content to maintain consistency and improve user comprehension. It enriches content with inline links, tooltips, and abbreviations, ensuring that key terms are clearly explained and easily accessible. This feature not only supports consistent terminology but also enhances the overall user experience by making complex content more understandable and interactive.

features.name: Document Inheritance
features.headline: Document Inheritance
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s unique Content Inheritance technology streamlines content production and reuse, enabling easy personalization at the content item level while inheriting general content across documents.
features.longDescription: Pimcore’s Content Inheritance technology is a distinctive and powerful tool that significantly enhances content production efficiency and reuse across digital platforms. By enabling content, layouts, and settings to be inherited from master documents, this feature streamlines the content creation process, reducing redundancy and ensuring consistency. What sets Pimcore’s Content Inheritance apart is its flexibility—while general content is seamlessly inherited, content items can be easily personalized at the individual level without extensive effort. This allows for a scalable, efficient content strategy that supports both broad consistency and targeted customization. Whether managing large websites or multiple sites, Pimcore’s Content Inheritance ensures that content production is both streamlined and adaptable to specific needs, making it a vital component of any robust digital experience management strategy.
features.description: Pimcore’s Content Inheritance feature offers a powerful and unique approach to content management, streamlining production by allowing content to be reused across multiple documents. This technology enables documents to inherit general content from a master document while allowing for easy personalization at the content item level without significant effort. This approach ensures consistent, efficient content management while providing the flexibility to tailor specific content elements as needed. Content Inheritance simplifies the content creation process, making it ideal for managing large-scale digital experiences.

features.name: Content Staging
features.headline: Content Staging
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s DXP offers robust content staging, preview, versioning, and scheduling features, allowing for workflow-compliant content management and precise control over publishing states.
features.longDescription: Pimcore’s Content Staging in DXP empowers users to manage the entire content lifecycle with precision and control. The feature includes staging, where content can be prepared and reviewed before it’s made public. Content preview allows stakeholders to see how content will appear across different channels, ensuring alignment with brand and messaging strategies. Versioning tracks changes, enabling the restoration of previous versions if necessary, while scheduling tools allow you to define exact publishing times. Additionally, the system’s support for different publishing states, such as draft, pending review, and live, ensures that content moves through a workflow-compliant process, where each stage can be carefully managed and monitored. This comprehensive approach to content staging guarantees that all content is optimized and ready for delivery, providing a reliable and efficient way to manage digital experiences.
features.description: Pimcore’s Content Staging feature in DXP provides comprehensive tools for managing and preparing content before it goes live. With capabilities for content staging, you can preview, version, and schedule content, ensuring it aligns with your workflows and meets quality standards before publication. Different publishing states—such as draft, pending review, and live—are managed seamlessly within this workflow-compliant environment, allowing for precise control over when and how content is published. This ensures that all content is thoroughly vetted and optimized for its intended audience.

features.name: Content Preview
features.headline: Content Preview
features.shortDescription: Pimcore Visual Editing includes multi-publishing aware content previews, allowing you to view your digital experience across different devices, sizes, and resolutions, with responsive and mobile settings accounted for.
features.longDescription: Pimcore’s Content Preview feature offers a comprehensive way to visualize and fine-tune your digital content before it’s published. Integrated into the Visual Editing tool, this feature provides multi-publishing aware previews that allow you to see how your content will look across a variety of devices, screen sizes, and resolutions. By taking into account responsive and mobile settings, Pimcore ensures that your digital experiences are optimized for any audience, regardless of the device they’re using. Additionally, for those engaged in multi-channel publishing, Pimcore allows you to preview different output formats, such as PDF generation, ensuring that all content is consistent and meets your quality standards before it reaches your audience. This powerful preview capability is essential for delivering polished and professional digital experiences across all channels and devices.
features.description: Pimcore’s Content Preview feature in Visual Editing enables you to see how your digital experiences will appear across various devices, screen sizes, and resolutions, considering responsive and mobile settings. This multi-publishing aware functionality also supports previews for different output formats, such as PDF generation, ensuring that you can accurately visualize content across all channels before it goes live. This capability ensures that your digital content is optimized and consistent across every platform and device.

features.name: Visual Editing
features.headline: Visual Editing
features.shortDescription: Accelerate your time to market with Pimcore's powerful unique visual editing, allowing seamless drag-and-drop of data from PIM, MDM, DAM, CDP, and Commerce onto a personalized DXP-powered creative canvas, enabling multi-channel content creation.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s visual editing capabilities are designed to revolutionize the way you approach content creation, dramatically accelerating your time to market. This feature allows you to access the full power of Pimcore’s integrated data and experience management ecosystem by enabling seamless drag-and-drop functionality across all its domains, including PIM, MDM, DAM, CDP, DXP, and Commerce.

Whether you're creating personalized websites, crafting newsletters, developing landing pages, or building complex B2B portals, commerce applications, and web-to-print documents, Pimcore’s visual editor supports multi-channel content creation that is both flexible and efficient. The platform's unique ability to blend data management with digital experience management into a single, cohesive solution sets it apart, offering users a streamlined, intuitive process for building and managing content.

Furthermore, the integration of Pimcore Copilot takes this experience to the next level by automating routine tasks and providing AI-driven insights, ensuring that your content creation process is not only powerful and efficient but also exceptionally comfortable and seamless. Visual editing in Pimcore goes beyond simple content adjustments—it's a comprehensive tool for visualizing and leveraging your data model to create compelling digital experiences across any channel.
features.description: Pimcore's visual editing approach empowers you to accelerate time to market by effortlessly dragging and dropping data from across all Pimcore domains—PIM, MDM, DAM, CDP, DXP, and Commerce—onto your creative canvas. This feature supports multi-channel content creation, enabling you to design highly personalized websites, newsletters, landing pages, B2B portals, commerce applications, and even web-to-print documents. With Pimcore's seamless blend of data and experience management, every aspect of content creation is maximally efficient and intuitive. Pimcore Copilot further enhances this process, making the experience comfortable, seamless, and incredibly powerful.

features.name: Support for Various Filetypes
features.headline: Universal Content, Future-Ready Delivery
features.shortDescription: Pimcore seamlessly integrates, converts, transcodes, and delivers any type of data and files across channels, ensuring future-proof compatibility with emerging technologies like augmented reality, 3D, and AI-powered data streams.
features.longDescription: Pimcore’s DXP provides comprehensive support for a wide range of data types and files, allowing for seamless integration, conversion, transcoding, and delivery across multiple channels. This capability ensures that content is consistently optimized for delivery, regardless of the format or channel. Beyond traditional file type management, Pimcore is future-proof, designed to integrate with and support emerging technologies such as augmented reality, 3D content, real-time generated data, and AI-powered data streams. By focusing on the connection, integration, and orchestration of diverse data, Pimcore elevates data and experience management to a new level, ensuring that your digital strategies remain flexible, innovative, and fully aligned with current and future technological advancements.
features.description: Pimcore’s DXP offers unparalleled support for all data types and files, enabling seamless integration, conversion, and delivery to any channel. This future-proof approach ensures compatibility with current and emerging technologies, such as augmented reality, 3D content, and real-time AI-powered data streams. Pimcore transcends traditional file type management by focusing on connecting, integrating, and orchestrating any kind of data within the context of comprehensive data and experience management. This flexibility ensures that your digital experiences are always at the forefront of innovation and technology.

features.name: Centralized Data Repository
features.headline: Centralized Data and Experience Management
features.shortDescription: Pimcore serves as a central content repository, seamlessly blending data management (PIM, MDM, DAM, CDP) with experience management (DXP, Commerce). Acting as the "golden record" and single source of truth, Pimcore ensures accurate, interconnected, and streamlined data management across all channels.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s role as a Central Content Repository is integral to its effectiveness as both a data management and experience management platform. By seamlessly integrating Product Information Management (PIM), Master Data Management (MDM), Digital Asset Management (DAM), and Customer Data Platform (CDP) capabilities with Digital Experience Platform (DXP) and Commerce functionalities, Pimcore provides a comprehensive solution that serves as the backbone of an organization’s digital ecosystem.

At the heart of Pimcore’s Central Content Repository is the concept of the "golden record"—a single source of truth that ensures all data is accurate, consistent, and up-to-date. This is particularly crucial for content distribution and multi-channel publishing, where delivering the right information to the right channel at the right time is essential. Unlike traditional systems that duplicate data across different silos, Pimcore stores data in a relational graph structure. This approach means that data is linked and interconnected, rather than copied, ensuring that each piece of information exists only once within the system.

This relational data structure significantly reduces complexity in data management. When you update a single data item in Pimcore, all related entities are automatically updated as well. This ensures that changes are propagated across the entire system in real-time, maintaining data integrity and consistency. For instance, if a product description is updated in the PIM, all instances where that product is referenced—whether in an e-commerce store, marketing campaign, or customer profile—are instantly refreshed with the new information. This not only improves data quality but also streamlines workflows, as it eliminates the need for manual updates across multiple systems.

By acting as the central repository for all content and data, Pimcore empowers organizations to manage their digital assets and customer experiences from a single, unified platform. This centralized approach enhances operational efficiency, reduces the risk of errors, and ensures that all channels are aligned with the latest, most accurate information. Whether you’re managing complex product catalogs, coordinating global marketing campaigns, or delivering personalized customer experiences, Pimcore’s Central Content Repository provides the foundation needed to achieve your business goals with confidence and precision.
features.description: Pimcore functions as a central content repository, combining robust data management capabilities (PIM, MDM, DAM, CDP) with advanced experience management (DXP, Commerce). By holding the "golden record" and acting as the single source of truth, Pimcore simplifies content distribution and multi-channel publishing. Data is stored like a graph, linking all related entities without duplication, ensuring consistency and quality. When a single data item is updated, all connected entities are automatically updated, reducing complexity and enhancing the efficiency of data management processes.

capabilities.name: Website Management
capabilities.headline: Comprehensive Website Management
capabilities.shortDescription: Pimcore’s multi-channel DXP offers robust website management capabilities, including Multi-Site and Multi-Lingual Content Management, along with dynamic navigation to optimize customer journeys, forming the foundation of a personalized digital experience platform.
capabilities.longDescription:
Pimcore’s multi-channel Digital Experience Platform (DXP) provides a powerful set of tools for managing digital channels, with a particular focus on websites, portals, and e-commerce storefronts. At the core of Pimcore’s capabilities is its extensive support for Multi-Site Management, which allows businesses to efficiently manage multiple websites from a single, unified interface. Whether you’re running different brand sites, regional sites, or customer-specific portals, Pimcore provides the flexibility and control needed to keep everything organized and consistent.

In addition to Multi-Site Management, Pimcore excels in Multi-Lingual Content Management, making it an ideal solution for businesses with a global presence. The platform allows you to create and manage content in multiple languages, ensuring that your messaging resonates with diverse audiences across different regions. This capability is essential for delivering a seamless and localized experience to customers, regardless of where they are in the world.

Pimcore also offers dynamic navigation features that are crucial for optimizing customer journeys. By providing tools to create flexible and responsive navigation structures, Pimcore ensures that users can easily find the information they need, leading to better engagement and higher conversion rates. These dynamic navigation capabilities are particularly valuable in delivering personalized digital experiences, as they allow businesses to tailor the user journey based on individual preferences and behaviors.

Together, these features make Pimcore’s website management tools a cornerstone of its DXP offering. By combining powerful Multi-Site and Multi-Lingual Content Management with dynamic navigation, Pimcore provides the foundation for creating personalized and effective digital experiences that drive customer satisfaction and business success.

features.name: Navigation
features.headline: Flexible and Dynamic Navigation Management for Any Style
features.shortDescription: Pimcore DXP’s Navigation Management offers full flexibility to create and manage any style or type of navigation, including sidebars and breadcrumbs. Build dynamic, hierarchy-based navigations that enhance user experience across your digital platforms.
features.longDescription:
Effective navigation is critical to user experience, and Pimcore DXP’s Navigation Management feature provides the tools you need to design and implement flexible, user-friendly navigation across your digital platforms. Whether you’re building a complex e-commerce site, a content-rich portal, or a simple landing page, Pimcore offers complete control over the style, structure, and functionality of your navigation elements.

At the heart of Pimcore’s Navigation Management is its ability to create navigations based on a tree hierarchy. This hierarchical structure allows you to organize your site’s content logically and intuitively, ensuring that users can easily find the information they need. Whether you’re managing a large site with multiple sections and sub-sections or a simpler site with a few key pages, Pimcore’s tree-based approach makes it easy to maintain a clear and effective navigation structure.

Pimcore also offers full flexibility in the design and type of navigation you can create. Whether you need top-level menus, sidebars for in-depth content navigation, or breadcrumbs to help users keep track of their location within the site, Pimcore supports it all. You can customize the look and feel of these navigations to match your site’s design, ensuring a seamless and cohesive user experience.

For instance, sidebars are ideal for websites with extensive content, allowing users to explore related topics or sections without losing their place. Breadcrumbs, on the other hand, provide a simple way for users to understand their current location within the site’s hierarchy, making it easier to navigate back to previous sections or explore related content.

Pimcore’s Navigation Management also supports responsive design, ensuring that your navigations work beautifully across all devices and screen sizes. Whether users are accessing your site on a desktop, tablet, or smartphone, they will have a consistent and user-friendly navigation experience.

By offering such a high degree of flexibility and control, Pimcore’s Navigation Management allows you to create navigations that are not only functional but also aligned with your overall site design and user experience strategy. This feature is essential for ensuring that users can easily navigate your site, find the information they need, and engage with your content effectively.
features.description: Pimcore DXP’s Navigation Management feature empowers you to create and manage various types of navigation with full flexibility. Whether you need traditional menus, sidebars, or breadcrumbs, this feature allows you to design navigations that align with your site’s structure and user experience goals. With the ability to build navigation based on a tree hierarchy, Pimcore ensures that your site’s navigation is intuitive, organized, and adaptable to any design style.

features.name: Multi Site Management
features.headline: Effortlessly Manage Unlimited Sites and Channels from a Single Platform
features.shortDescription: Pimcore DXP’s Multi-Site Management feature allows you to manage an unlimited number of web presences, domains, and channels—all from a single instance. Share resources, publish content across thousands of sites, and extend your reach to multiple channels including websites, landing pages, e-commerce, and more.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore DXP’s Multi-Site Management feature is a powerful tool designed to streamline the administration of multiple digital properties within a single, unified platform. Whether managing different brand sites, regional domains, or a diverse array of digital channels, this feature allows you to oversee an unlimited number of web presences and domains with ease.

With Pimcore, you can manage everything from corporate websites and e-commerce platforms to specialized landing pages, customer portals, and even web-to-print and POS systems—all from one instance. This versatility is unmatched, as it not only supports an unlimited number of sites but also extends across unlimited channels, making it possible to control your entire digital strategy from a central location.

One of the key advantages of Pimcore’s Multi-Site Management is the ability to share resources across all your sites and channels. This includes everything from digital assets and templates to data pools and user-generated content, allowing you to maintain consistency and efficiency across your digital properties. By leveraging shared resources, you can reduce redundancy, streamline workflows, and ensure that all your sites and channels are aligned with your brand’s standards.

Furthermore, Pimcore enables you to publish content from a single location across thousands of sites, ensuring that your message is consistent, timely, and relevant across all your digital touchpoints. This centralized publishing capability is particularly valuable for global brands that need to manage content across different regions and languages while maintaining a cohesive digital presence.

The flexibility of Pimcore’s Multi-Site Management feature also extends to its support for multiple domains, allowing you to manage distinct web presences for different brands, products, or markets. This multi-domain management capability is seamlessly integrated into the platform, providing a unified approach to handling diverse digital properties without the complexity of managing separate systems.

In addition to its powerful management capabilities, Pimcore’s Multi-Site Management feature is designed for scalability. Whether you’re managing a few websites or thousands, Pimcore can handle the complexity and scale of your digital operations, ensuring that your platform grows with your business.

Overall, Pimcore DXP’s Multi-Site Management offers a comprehensive solution for managing an extensive array of digital properties, ensuring that your content is consistent, your resources are efficiently utilized, and your brand’s digital presence is cohesive across all channels and touchpoints.
features.description: Pimcore DXP’s Multi-Site Management empowers you to control an unlimited number of websites, domains, and channels from a single platform. This feature allows you to efficiently share resources and publish content across multiple sites, whether it’s for different brands, regions, or target audiences. Beyond websites, Pimcore supports a variety of channels, including landing pages, e-commerce, portals, and even web-to-print and POS systems. This comprehensive approach enables centralized content management while maintaining flexibility and consistency across your entire digital ecosystem.

features.name: URL Structure
features.headline: Optimize URL Structure for SEO and Multi-Site Management
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s URL Structure feature enables DXP users to create SEO-optimized, hierarchical URLs that integrate seamlessly with sitemaps and redirects. Built on Pimcore’s Document Structure, this flexible tool supports multi-site installations and language-specific URLs to enhance site organization and search performance.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s URL Structure feature is an essential tool for optimizing site organization, search engine visibility, and user navigation within DXP environments. Built on Pimcore’s Document Structure, this feature allows users to define a clear, hierarchical URL structure that aligns with SEO best practices. The tree hierarchy creates a natural flow for URLs and sitemaps, making it easier for search engines to index content and improving user experience by organizing pages logically.
