With support for multi-site setups, the URL Structure feature offers unparalleled flexibility, allowing administrators to create unique URL paths for each site while managing global or localized URLs through Pimcore properties. This includes setting canonical URLs to prevent duplicate content issues and specifying language-specific URLs for targeting international audiences. Integrated with redirect management, the feature ensures that all URL changes are smoothly managed without affecting SEO, preserving link equity and user experience. With these capabilities, Pimcore’s URL Structure tool empowers businesses to create a clean, optimized, and scalable URL architecture that enhances both site performance and search engine visibility across multiple digital properties.
features.description: Pimcore’s URL Structure feature provides a powerful, intuitive way to manage website URLs and sitemaps, supporting SEO best practices with a tree-based hierarchy. Designed for flexibility, this feature allows for precise control over URLs within multi-site installations, with tools for setting canonical and language-specific URLs to target diverse markets. Integrated with redirect management, it ensures smooth transitions and avoids broken links, making it easier to maintain an organized and SEO-friendly site architecture based on Pimcore’s Document Structure.

benefits.name: Enhanced SEO with Structured URLs
benefits.description: With its tree-based hierarchy, Pimcore’s URL Structure feature allows businesses to create SEO-optimized URLs that enhance search engine visibility. This structure helps organize content in a logical flow, making it easier for search engines to crawl and index, which can improve rankings.

benefits.name: Simplified Management for Multi-Site and Multi-Language URLs
benefits.description: With flexible options for multi-site and language-specific URLs, Pimcore’s URL Structure feature enables businesses to customize and manage distinct URL paths for each site or language, simplifying content management across multiple domains.

benefits.name: Integrated Redirects for Smooth User Experience
benefits.description: Integrated with Pimcore’s redirect management, the URL Structure feature allows businesses to make URL adjustments without affecting the user experience. Redirects automatically handle changes, ensuring a smooth transition and preventing broken links that could harm SEO or disrupt site navigation.

features.name: Multi Language Templates
features.headline: Effortless Multi-Language Support with Customizable Templates
features.shortDescription: Pimcore DXP enables the creation of multi-language templates, allowing you to use a single template across multiple languages. Easily translate labels and content using Pimcore’s website translation features, ensuring a consistent and localized experience for global audiences.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore DXP’s multi-language templates feature is designed to simplify the process of creating and managing global digital experiences. By allowing you to use a single template across multiple languages, this feature reduces the complexity of managing content for different regions, while ensuring consistency in design and functionality.

One of the key advantages of this feature is its seamless integration with Pimcore’s website translation tools. These tools enable you to easily translate labels, buttons, headers, and other text elements within your templates, ensuring that your content is accurately localized for each target market. This functionality is essential for businesses operating in multiple countries or regions, where delivering a tailored and culturally relevant experience is crucial for engaging local audiences.

Using multi-language templates, you can maintain a consistent brand identity and user experience across all language versions of your site, while minimizing the time and effort required to manage content in multiple languages. Whether you’re translating a few key phrases or localizing an entire website, Pimcore’s tools make it easy to ensure that every element of your digital platform is aligned with the language and cultural preferences of your audience.

Moreover, Pimcore’s multi-language templates are fully customizable, allowing you to adapt the layout, design, and content of your templates to meet the specific needs of each market. This flexibility ensures that your global digital presence is not only consistent but also responsive to the unique demands of different regions.

Overall, Pimcore’s multi-language templates feature provides a powerful solution for businesses looking to expand their digital presence globally, offering the tools needed to create localized, consistent, and user-friendly experiences across multiple languages.
features.description: Pimcore DXP’s multi-language templates feature allows you to design and deploy templates that can be used across multiple languages, streamlining global content management. With built-in website translation tools, you can easily translate labels, text, and other content elements, ensuring that your digital experiences are consistent, localized, and accessible to diverse audiences worldwide.

capabilities.name: Content Delivery
capabilities.headline: Unified Multi-Channel Publishing
capabilities.shortDescription: Pimcore’s Multi-Channel Content Management System empowers businesses to publish content seamlessly across digital, social, mobile, POS, and print channels. Supporting both headless and traditional DXP, it ensures efficient, flexible, and superior content delivery.
capabilities.longDescription:
Pimcore’s Multi-Channel Content Management System is designed to streamline and optimize the process of content distribution across multiple platforms. This robust system enables businesses to manage and publish content seamlessly across digital channels such as websites and social media, as well as mobile apps, point-of-sale (POS) systems, and print media.

Supporting both headless and traditional Digital Experience Platforms (DXP), Pimcore provides the flexibility to choose the architecture that best suits your needs. With headless DXP, businesses can leverage API-driven content delivery for dynamic and scalable experiences across various devices and platforms. Meanwhile, the traditional DXP approach offers an integrated solution for managing web content and digital assets within a single platform.

This multi-channel approach ensures that content is consistent and engaging, regardless of the delivery medium. By centralizing content management, businesses can reduce redundancies, improve workflow efficiency, and ensure that all content aligns with brand standards. The ability to publish content effortlessly across various channels enhances customer engagement and maximizes reach, making Pimcore’s Multi-Channel Content Management System an essential tool for modern content strategies.

features.name: Print Publishing
features.headline: Print Publishing
features.shortDescription: Pimcore transforms multi-channel publishing with powerful web-to-print capabilities, automating the creation of B2B and B2C marketing collateral like datasheets, price lists, and product catalogs.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s Print Publishing capabilities are built to revolutionize the way businesses approach traditional print processes, particularly in the creation of B2B and B2C marketing and sales collateral. With its robust database publishing functionalities, Pimcore facilitates seamless web-to-print workflows, allowing businesses to automate the creation of essential documents like datasheets, price lists, product catalogs, and other publications. This automation not only streamlines the production process but also ensures that all printed materials are accurate, up-to-date, and formatted correctly.

Global sales and marketing teams benefit greatly from this system, as they can access the platform in real-time to download personalized product information tailored to their specific needs. This level of accessibility and customization ensures that every team member has the latest information in the right format, supporting more effective marketing and sales efforts.

For businesses requiring advanced design capabilities, Pimcore offers optional integration with Adobe InDesign. This integration allows for precise control over the layout and design of print materials, combining the automation and efficiency of Pimcore with the creative power of Adobe’s industry-leading design tools. Together, these features make Pimcore an essential platform for any business looking to enhance its multi-channel publishing and print production processes.
features.description: Pimcore’s Print Publishing feature revolutionizes traditional print processes by enabling automated creation of datasheets, price lists, product catalogs, and other publications. Designed for multi-channel publishing, Pimcore allows global sales and marketing teams to access and download personalized product information in real-time, ensuring content is always up-to-date and in the correct format. The platform's powerful database publishing functionalities support seamless web-to-print workflows, and optional integration with Adobe InDesign further enhances the design and layout process, offering flexibility and precision for print materials.

features.name: Headless Delivery
features.headline: Headless Delivery
features.shortDescription: Pimcore offers a comprehensive, API-driven headless content management solution that seamlessly integrates data and experience management across DXP, PIM, MDM, and DAM, with flexible content models, agile workflows, and robust API capabilities.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s Headless Content Management is designed to provide a complete and flexible solution for managing content across various domains, including DXP, PIM, MDM, and DAM. By adopting an API-driven approach, Pimcore allows for seamless content delivery to any channel, ensuring that data and experience management are tightly integrated. The platform supports the industry's most flexible content data models, allowing for unlimited content types, users, workflows, and API calls. This flexibility extends to multi-lingual content management and the use of a visual editor for easy content creation and editing.

As a central content hub, Pimcore enables businesses to manage and deliver content efficiently, with powerful APIs ensuring that content can be distributed across multiple channels. The platform also integrates with CDNs for optimized content delivery and includes robust workflow management features to streamline content production and approval processes. With the added capabilities of Copilot automations, Pimcore provides an agile and scalable solution for businesses looking to implement complex content-commerce strategies, making it a leading choice for headless content management.
features.description: Pimcore’s Headless Content Management goes beyond traditional headless DXP by also encompassing PIM, MDM, and DAM, providing a holistic approach to both data and experience management. The platform delivers content via powerful APIs, supports unlimited content types and workflows, and enables multi-lingual content management. With features like a visual editor, central content hub, and CDN integration, Pimcore ensures flexible and agile content delivery. The platform’s flexibility is further enhanced by Copilot automations and comprehensive workflow management, making it ideal for complex content-commerce strategies.

features.name: Website Publishing
features.headline: Website Publishing
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s DXP/CMS blends traditional page building with headless, API-centered content delivery, acting as the content-centric heart of a modern marketing tech stack for unified, scalable, and omnichannel content management.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s Website Publishing feature within its DXP/CMS platform merges the best of traditional page building with advanced headless and API-centered content delivery, offering a truly flexible and powerful content management solution. Designed to be the content-centric heart of a modern marketing technology stack, Pimcore unifies data and content into a single hub, making it accessible across all devices and channels. This ensures that whether you’re managing a single website or a network of multilingual sites, your content is seamlessly integrated and delivered.

The platform’s enterprise-grade web content management capabilities empower you to manage and deliver content efficiently, supporting even the most content-rich portals and experience-driven commerce sites. Pimcore’s flexible content architecture allows for channel-independent content authoring and management, while its API-led delivery connects content to any site or app quickly, powering omnichannel orchestration. With its ability to track content, standardize authoring and delivery, and accelerate content optimization, Pimcore ensures that your digital experiences are consistent, engaging, and optimized for all users.
features.description: Pimcore’s DXP offers a unique combination of traditional website publishing and cutting-edge headless, API-driven content delivery. Serving as the content hub of a modern marketing stack, Pimcore unifies data and content management across all channels and devices, whether for a single website or large, multilingual, content-rich portals. Its flexible architecture supports omnichannel content orchestration, ensuring seamless integration with existing systems. Pimcore standardizes content authoring, delivery, and analytics, speeding up content optimization and enabling exceptional digital experiences across all touchpoints.

capabilities.name: Scalability and Performance
capabilities.headline: Enterprise-Grade Scalability and Performance
capabilities.shortDescription: Pimcore’s architecture is designed for enterprise-level scalability and performance, supporting millions of complex data points, digital assets, and high-traffic digital experiences. It’s built to scale seamlessly across any infrastructure—cloud, on-premises, or PaaS.
capabilities.longDescription:
Pimcore’s architecture is built from the ground up to meet the rigorous demands of enterprise-level data and experience management. Whether you’re dealing with millions of complex product and master data points, managing vast libraries of digital assets, or delivering rich, multi-lingual digital experiences to millions of users each month, Pimcore’s platform is designed to scale effortlessly to meet these challenges.

The platform’s ability to handle such large volumes of data and traffic is underpinned by its robust architecture and high-performance APIs. Pimcore’s headless Data Hub is optimized for heavy usage scenarios, ensuring that data can be accessed and managed quickly and efficiently, even under the most demanding conditions. This makes it an ideal solution for businesses that require a platform capable of scaling with their growth, without compromising on performance or reliability.

Pimcore’s scalability isn’t limited to just software capabilities—it extends to infrastructure as well. The platform is incredibly versatile, running seamlessly on your preferred cloud provider, within your own on-premises data center, or as a fully certified PaaS solution with 24/7 support. This flexibility allows businesses to choose the deployment model that best fits their security, compliance, and operational needs. Whether you’re looking to leverage the scalability of the cloud, maintain control with an on-premises setup, or benefit from the convenience of a fully managed PaaS solution, Pimcore adapts to your infrastructure, ensuring that it scales in line with your business requirements.

In summary, Pimcore’s enterprise-grade architecture is designed to deliver the scalability and performance that large organizations need. It handles millions of data points, supports high-traffic environments, and scales across any infrastructure, making it the ideal platform for businesses that demand reliability, flexibility, and high performance.

features.name: Content Caching
features.headline: Lightning-Fast Content Delivery with Advanced Caching
features.shortDescription: Pimcore's advanced caching mechanisms ensure lightning-fast content delivery and top-tier performance for your digital experiences. With core caching, full-page caches, in-template caching, and seamless integration with third-party systems like Varnish, Pimcore guarantees excellent Google Page Speed scores and rapid content delivery.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s Caching feature is a cornerstone of its reputation as one of the fastest Digital Experience Platforms (DXP) available. Designed to ensure that content is delivered swiftly and efficiently, Pimcore employs a range of caching mechanisms that work together to optimize performance, reduce server load, and enhance the overall user experience.

At the heart of Pimcore’s caching strategy is its core caching system, which handles the efficient storage and retrieval of frequently accessed data. This foundational layer of caching ensures that the most commonly used elements of your digital experience are always ready to load without delay, minimizing the time it takes for users to interact with your content.

Building on this, Pimcore offers full-page caching, a powerful tool that stores entire pages as static HTML. When a user requests a page, the system serves the cached version instantly, bypassing the need to generate the page dynamically. This results in significantly faster load times, especially for high-traffic pages, and contributes to excellent Google Page Speed scores, which are crucial for SEO and user satisfaction.

For more granular control, in-template caching allows developers to cache specific parts of a page, such as complex data queries or frequently used components. This fine-tuned approach ensures that only the most resource-intensive parts of your templates are cached, balancing performance with up-to-date content delivery.

Moreover, Pimcore’s caching capabilities extend beyond its own infrastructure through compliance with Varnish and other third-party caching systems. This compatibility means you can integrate Pimcore seamlessly into your existing caching setup, leveraging external tools to further accelerate content delivery and handle traffic spikes without compromising performance.

Together, these caching mechanisms ensure that your digital experiences are delivered with unparalleled speed and reliability. Whether your focus is on improving load times, enhancing user experience, or boosting SEO performance, Pimcore’s comprehensive caching strategy is designed to meet and exceed your expectations.
features.description: Pimcore’s Caching feature leverages a variety of advanced caching mechanisms to deliver content with remarkable speed and efficiency. From core caching and full-page caches to in-template caching and third-party integrations like Varnish, these tools ensure that your digital experiences are not only fast but also highly reliable. By optimizing content delivery, Pimcore helps your website achieve outstanding Google Page Speed scores, enhancing user experience and boosting SEO performance.

features.name: Load Balancing Support
features.headline: Scalable Load-Balancing for Seamless Content Delivery
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s load-balancing support ensures scalable and reliable content delivery across multiple servers, containers, and environments. This feature enhances performance, supports high traffic volumes, and ensures seamless scalability, making Pimcore an ideal solution for growing digital operations.
features.longDescription:
As digital operations grow and evolve, the ability to handle increased traffic and demand becomes critical. Pimcore’s Load-Balancing Support addresses this need by providing a scalable architecture that distributes content delivery across multiple servers, containers, and environments. This feature ensures that your website or application remains fast, reliable, and responsive, even as traffic levels fluctuate or grow.

At the core of Pimcore’s load-balancing capabilities is its ability to distribute incoming requests evenly across various resources, preventing any single server from becoming a bottleneck. This not only enhances the performance of your digital experiences but also improves reliability by ensuring that no single point of failure can disrupt your operations. Whether your infrastructure is based on traditional server setups or more modern containerized environments like Kubernetes, Pimcore’s load-balancing support integrates seamlessly, allowing for flexible and efficient scaling.

For example, when deploying Pimcore on cloud platforms such as Alibaba Cloud, load balancing ensures that resources are optimally utilized, distributing the load across multiple instances to maintain high performance. Similarly, in Kubernetes environments, Pimcore’s load-balancing features work in conjunction with container orchestration to automatically scale resources up or down based on demand, ensuring that your application remains responsive under varying loads.

This scalable architecture is particularly valuable for businesses experiencing rapid growth or those operating in environments where traffic patterns are unpredictable. By leveraging load balancing, Pimcore allows you to scale your digital presence seamlessly, ensuring that your website or application can handle increased demand without compromising on speed or user experience.

Furthermore, load-balancing support contributes to improved uptime and reliability. By distributing traffic across multiple servers or containers, Pimcore reduces the risk of downtime due to server overloads or failures. This ensures that your digital operations remain available and responsive, even during peak traffic periods or unexpected surges.

Overall, Pimcore’s Load-Balancing Support provides the scalability, reliability, and performance needed to support modern digital operations, making it an ideal solution for businesses looking to grow and scale their online presence.
features.description: Pimcore’s Load-Balancing Support is designed to enhance the scalability and reliability of your digital experiences by distributing content delivery across multiple servers, containers, and environments. This architecture ensures that your website or application can handle increased traffic without compromising performance. By leveraging load balancing, Pimcore optimizes resource utilization, minimizes downtime, and provides a seamless user experience, even under heavy load. Whether deployed on cloud platforms like Alibaba Cloud or within Kubernetes environments, Pimcore’s load-balancing capabilities ensure that your digital operations are always responsive and ready to scale.

features.name: Static Page Generation
features.headline: Effortless Static Page Generation for Global Delivery
features.shortDescription: Pimcore DXP enables seamless static page generation, optimizing content delivery via global CDNs. This feature ensures faster load times, enhanced performance, and improved scalability by serving pre-rendered pages to users worldwide.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore DXP’s Static Page Generation feature is a powerful tool designed to enhance the performance and scalability of your digital experiences by pre-rendering pages and delivering them through global Content Delivery Networks (CDNs). This approach significantly reduces load times, ensuring that users have instant access to content, regardless of their location.

Static page generation works by creating static HTML versions of your dynamic content, which can then be distributed across a global CDN. Unlike traditional dynamic content delivery, where pages are generated on-the-fly with each request, static pages are pre-rendered and stored, ready to be served immediately when requested. This results in faster load times and a more responsive user experience, particularly for high-traffic websites or content that doesn’t change frequently.

For businesses with a global audience, the ability to serve content quickly and efficiently is crucial. By leveraging global CDNs, Pimcore’s Static Page Generation ensures that your static pages are cached closer to the user’s location, reducing latency and improving load times. This not only enhances the user experience but also contributes to better search engine rankings, as faster websites are often favored by search engines.

The feature is particularly beneficial for delivering content that requires high availability and consistency, such as landing pages, product information, and marketing campaigns. By generating static versions of these pages, you can ensure that they are always available and load quickly, even during traffic spikes or peak usage times.

Additionally, Pimcore’s Static Page Generation integrates seamlessly with the rest of the DXP, allowing you to continue managing your content dynamically while benefiting from the speed and reliability of static page delivery. This balance between dynamic content management and static content delivery makes Pimcore an ideal solution for businesses looking to optimize their digital experiences for performance and scalability.
features.description: Pimcore DXP’s Static Page Generation feature allows you to pre-render pages and serve them through global Content Delivery Networks (CDNs). By generating static versions of your dynamic content, this feature drastically improves page load times, enhances site performance, and scales effortlessly to accommodate global traffic. Ideal for delivering content quickly and efficiently, static page generation ensures that users across the globe experience faster and more reliable access to your digital experiences.

features.name: CDN Integration
features.headline: Accelerate Content Delivery with Seamless CDN Integration
features.shortDescription: All Pimcore editions allow seamless CDN integration to improve content delivery across global networks, enhancing load times and scalability. Pimcore PaaS simplifies this further with out-of-the-box CDN support, providing built-in, optimized content delivery right from launch.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s CDN Integration feature is available across all editions, allowing businesses to connect to top Content Delivery Networks (CDNs) like Cloudflare, Cloudfront, and Fastly to enhance content delivery performance. This capability distributes digital assets across global servers, reducing latency and delivering a high-speed experience for users around the world. For organizations using Pimcore PaaS, CDN integration is included out-of-the-box, providing immediate access to optimized, built-in content delivery without the need for extra configuration. This automatic setup accelerates time-to-market, delivering fast, responsive content directly from launch.

The feature also incorporates load balancing to efficiently distribute traffic across servers, preventing server overloads and ensuring consistent performance, even under high traffic. This built-in scalability ensures that digital experiences are resilient, scalable, and globally accessible, whether deployed on Pimcore’s PaaS or as a custom setup on other Pimcore editions. With flexible CDN integration available across all editions, Pimcore empowers organizations to provide a reliable, engaging user experience by delivering content quickly and efficiently on a global scale.
features.description: Pimcore’s CDN Integration feature enables every edition to leverage leading CDNs, like Cloudflare, Cloudfront, and Fastly, for faster, reliable content delivery across global markets. With CDN support across all editions, businesses can easily integrate content delivery networks to optimize user experience. Pimcore PaaS takes this a step further by offering CDN functionality out-of-the-box, with pre-configured, built-in content delivery that enhances scalability and performance without additional setup. This integration ensures efficient load balancing and quick, seamless access to digital content for users worldwide.

benefits.name: Faster Global Content Delivery
benefits.description: With CDN integration available in every Pimcore edition, businesses can accelerate content delivery across global servers, reducing latency and ensuring fast access to digital assets for users everywhere. Pimcore PaaS users benefit from this feature right out of the box, simplifying setup.

benefits.name: Scalable Performance with Load Balancing
benefits.description: All Pimcore editions support load-balanced CDN integration, allowing businesses to maintain high-performance content delivery even under high traffic loads. Pimcore PaaS simplifies this by providing a pre-configured, scalable setup right out of the box.

benefits.name: Out-of-the-Box CDN for Rapid PaaS Deployment
benefits.description: Pimcore PaaS offers out-of-the-box CDN integration, delivering pre-configured, optimized content distribution right from the start. This immediate setup enables fast, reliable content delivery across global networks, reducing deployment complexity and time-to-market.

capabilities.name: Optimization & Marketing
capabilities.headline: Comprehensive Marketing & Optimization Tools
capabilities.shortDescription: Pimcore DXP offers full-featured marketing and optimization tools, including SEO, Redirect Management, A/B testing, and more, with easy customization for third-party integrations. It’s designed to optimize customer journeys across all channels, ensuring seamless data and experience integration.
capabilities.longDescription:
Pimcore DXP is equipped with a robust set of marketing and optimization tools that are essential for any digital experience platform. Recognizing that the basics are crucial, Pimcore ensures that foundational tasks like SEO, Redirect Management, Meta-Data Management, A/B and Multi-Variant Testing, and URL Rewriting are handled efficiently and effectively right out of the box. These tools provide a strong foundation for your marketing efforts, enabling you to manage and optimize your digital content with ease.

However, Pimcore’s capabilities go far beyond just covering the basics. The platform is specifically designed to optimize customer journeys across a wide range of channels, ensuring that data and experiences are perfectly aligned. This alignment is particularly important in scenarios where digital experiences are highly personalized or marketing is automated to deliver content across multiple touchpoints. Pimcore’s integration of data and experience management ensures that every customer interaction is meaningful, relevant, and optimized for success.

In addition to its built-in features, Pimcore offers unparalleled flexibility for customization and extension. Within minutes, you can integrate any third-party marketing, analytics, or testing application, allowing you to adapt your marketing strategies to meet the specific needs of your business. This open and extensible architecture makes Pimcore not only a powerful tool for today’s marketing challenges but also a future-proof solution that can grow and evolve with your business.

features.name: Sitemap Generation
features.headline: Automated Sitemap Generation
features.shortDescription: Pimcore DXP enables automated generation of sitemaps, integrating both document trees and dynamic content from data objects. Configure sitemaps according to industry standards to ensure comprehensive indexing and improved SEO.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s Digital Experience Platform (DXP) offers powerful tools for automating the creation of sitemaps, a critical component for effective SEO. Sitemaps generated by Pimcore are comprehensive, encompassing both the static document tree and dynamic content sourced from data objects. This ensures that all relevant pages and content on your website are easily discoverable by search engines, contributing to better indexing and improved visibility in search results.

The sitemap generation process in Pimcore is fully configurable, allowing you to tailor the sitemap according to the specific needs of your website and the requirements set by industry standards. Following the guidelines provided by Google and other major search engines, Pimcore’s sitemaps include key elements such as URL priority, change frequency, and last modification date, ensuring that search engines have the most accurate and up-to-date information about your site’s content.

This automated approach to sitemap generation not only saves time and reduces manual effort but also ensures that your sitemaps are always aligned with the latest content and site structure. As your website evolves—whether through the addition of new pages, updates to existing content, or changes in your data objects—Pimcore automatically updates the sitemap to reflect these changes, keeping your SEO strategy robust and effective.

By utilizing Pimcore’s sitemap generation features, businesses can significantly enhance their SEO efforts, ensuring that their website is fully indexed and optimized for search engine visibility. This leads to higher rankings, increased traffic, and ultimately, better online performance.
features.description: Pimcore DXP simplifies the creation of sitemaps by automatically generating them based on your document tree and dynamic content from data objects. These sitemaps are fully configurable and adhere to industry standards, ensuring that search engines can effectively index your content. By including all relevant URLs, your site’s visibility in search results is enhanced, driving more traffic and improving SEO performance.

features.name: URL Rewriting
features.headline: Streamlined URL Rewriting and Redirect Management
features.shortDescription: Pimcore DXP enables easy definition of pretty URLs and efficient management of redirects, enhancing SEO and user experience. Customize routes and manage redirects effortlessly to ensure smooth navigation and maintain site integrity.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s Digital Experience Platform (DXP) provides comprehensive tools for managing URLs and redirects, essential for maintaining site integrity, improving user experience, and boosting SEO. The platform allows you to define pretty URLs for your documents, ensuring that your web addresses are clean, memorable, and optimized for search engines. By creating intuitive, easy-to-read URLs, you not only enhance the user experience but also improve the visibility and ranking of your content on search engine results pages.

In addition to URL rewriting, Pimcore offers powerful redirect management features. As websites grow and evolve, it’s common for page URLs to change. Pimcore’s redirect management tools allow you to seamlessly handle these changes by setting up 301 or 302 redirects, ensuring that users and search engines are automatically directed to the correct content, even if the original URL is no longer in use. This helps prevent broken links and maintains the flow of traffic to your site.

Pimcore’s custom routing capabilities further enhance your control over URL structures. You can define custom routes that align with your specific content structure, making it easier to manage complex websites and ensure that all pages are accessible through logical, user-friendly URLs. Whether you’re restructuring your site, launching new content, or managing a migration, Pimcore’s URL rewriting and redirect features provide the flexibility and control needed to keep your site running smoothly.
features.description: Pimcore DXP offers robust URL rewriting and redirect management capabilities, allowing you to define SEO-friendly, pretty URLs for documents and manage redirects effectively. With Pimcore’s custom routing and redirect management features, you can easily create and manage URLs that enhance user experience and maintain site structure. This ensures that users are seamlessly guided to the correct content, even as site structures evolve.

features.name: A-B Test Support
features.headline: Advanced A/B Testing and Conversion Optimization
features.shortDescription: Pimcore DXP supports A/B testing and conversion optimization with third-party tools, leveraging content versioning and benchmarking of website snippets and teasers. Test personalized content for different customer segments, powered by Pimcore’s behavioral targeting and personalization engine.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s Digital Experience Platform (DXP) is designed to elevate your A/B testing and conversion optimization strategies by integrating seamlessly with leading third-party tools such as Optimizely, VWO, AB Tasty, and trbo. These integrations empower businesses to conduct comprehensive tests and optimize their digital content to drive higher conversion rates.

A key feature of Pimcore is its robust content versioning system, which allows you to create and manage multiple versions of your content easily. This feature is especially valuable for A/B testing, as it enables you to test different versions of pages, components, or calls-to-action without disrupting your content management workflow. By comparing how different versions perform, you can make data-driven decisions to optimize your content for better results.

In addition to content versioning, Pimcore provides the ability to benchmark website snippets and teasers. These smaller content elements, which are crucial for capturing user attention and driving engagement, can be tested across different variations to see which ones perform best. By analyzing the performance of these snippets and teasers, businesses can fine-tune their content strategies and enhance the effectiveness of their digital experiences.

Pimcore’s integration with A/B testing tools is further strengthened by its advanced behavioral targeting and personalization engine. This allows you to go beyond generic content testing by creating personalized experiences tailored to specific customer segments and personas. For example, you can test different versions of a promotional banner for new versus returning visitors or personalize product recommendations based on browsing history.

By combining A/B testing with content versioning, snippet benchmarking, and personalization, Pimcore provides a comprehensive solution for optimizing digital experiences. This multi-faceted approach ensures that every aspect of your content strategy is tested, refined, and aligned with your business goals, leading to higher engagement, better user satisfaction, and increased conversions.
features.description: Pimcore DXP enhances your A/B testing and conversion optimization efforts by integrating with popular third-party tools like Optimizely and VWO. It provides robust content versioning, allowing you to test different content versions effortlessly. Additionally, Pimcore’s website snippets and teasers can be benchmarked, offering deeper insights into which elements drive conversions. With the power of Pimcore’s behavioral targeting and personalization engine, you can also test personalized content tailored to specific customer segments, optimizing conversions across your digital experiences.

features.name: SEO Management
features.headline: Comprehensive SEO and Site Quality Management
features.shortDescription: Pimcore DXP offers advanced SEO and site quality management tools, including meta tags, descriptions, and keywords, alongside support for rich schema.org, Meta OpenGraph, Google Tag Manager, and Google Search Console integration.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s Digital Experience Platform (DXP) offers a comprehensive solution for managing SEO and site quality, ensuring that your website is optimized for search engines and delivers a superior user experience. This feature-rich platform provides all the tools you need to manage meta tags, titles, descriptions, and keywords, allowing you to fine-tune your content for maximum search engine visibility.

Pimcore DXP supports rich schema.org markup, enabling you to provide search engines with detailed information about your content. This structured data helps search engines better understand your pages, leading to enhanced search result features like rich snippets, which can significantly boost click-through rates. Additionally, Pimcore’s Meta OpenGraph support allows you to control how your content appears when shared on social media platforms, ensuring consistent and visually appealing previews that drive engagement.

For more advanced SEO management, Pimcore integrates seamlessly with Google Tag Manager, allowing you to manage and deploy marketing tags (such as analytics and conversion tracking) without requiring code changes. This integration simplifies the process of tracking user behavior and optimizing site performance based on real-time data.

Moreover, Pimcore’s integration with Google Search Console provides direct insights into how your site is performing in Google Search. You can monitor search queries, track indexing status, and optimize your website for better visibility and ranking. These integrations ensure that your SEO strategies are data-driven and aligned with the latest best practices.

Pimcore’s site quality management features extend beyond SEO to encompass overall site health. The platform offers tools to monitor and improve various aspects of your website, ensuring that it meets the highest standards of performance, accessibility, and user experience. By leveraging Pimcore’s SEO and site quality management tools, businesses can create websites that not only rank well in search engines but also deliver exceptional value to users.
features.description: Pimcore DXP provides a robust suite of SEO and site quality management tools designed to optimize your website’s performance in search engines. Manage meta tags, titles, descriptions, and keywords with ease, and enhance your site’s visibility using rich schema.org and Meta OpenGraph support. Seamlessly integrate with Google Tag Manager and Google Search Console to monitor and improve your site’s SEO performance. These features ensure that your website is fully optimized for search engines and delivers high-quality user experiences.

capabilities.name: Personalization
capabilities.headline: Holistic Personalization Across All Capabilities
capabilities.shortDescription: Pimcore redefines personalization by integrating it across all capabilities—DXP, Commerce, and Data Management—leveraging real-time customer insights, AI, and behavioral targeting to personalize every aspect of the digital experience, while ensuring compliance with privacy regulations like GDPR.
capabilities.longDescription:
Pimcore’s personalization capabilities go far beyond the conventional scope of digital experience platforms and e-commerce solutions. Recognizing that personalization is key to delivering meaningful customer interactions, Pimcore integrates personalization across all its capabilities—spanning DXP, Commerce, and crucially, Data Management. This holistic approach means that personalization isn’t just a marketing tactic; it’s embedded in the very fabric of your data management strategy.

At the heart of Pimcore’s personalization engine is its integrated Customer Data Platform (CDP), which consolidates customer profile information from various sources, allowing for real-time personalization of every customer interaction. Pimcore’s behavioral targeting engine further enhances this by segmenting and personalizing customer experiences based on real-time behavior, ensuring that each touchpoint is as relevant and engaging as possible. This is particularly powerful in e-commerce settings, where personalized product recommendations can significantly boost conversion rates.

But Pimcore doesn’t stop at just the digital experience and commerce layers. It extends personalization into the realms of Product Information Management (PIM), Master Data Management (MDM), and Digital Asset Management (DAM), making it the first platform to see personalization as a core component of these data-centric initiatives. For instance, product information can be dynamically personalized based on customer profiles, ensuring that every product interaction is tailored to the individual’s preferences and needs.

The integration of generative AI takes personalization to the next level, enabling mass customization and automating the personalization of vast amounts of data. This smart automation reduces the manual effort required to deliver personalized experiences, making it scalable and efficient. Moreover, Pimcore’s personalization engine is built with privacy and compliance in mind, adhering to regulations like GDPR, which ensures that all personalized experiences respect customer privacy and data protection rules.

In summary, Pimcore offers a comprehensive, data-driven approach to personalization that touches every part of your business—from marketing and commerce to data management—ensuring that every customer interaction is optimized for relevance, engagement, and compliance.

features.name: User Profiling & Segmentation
features.headline: Comprehensive User Profiling and Segmentation
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s CDP framework offers advanced user profiling and segmentation, unifying customer data from multiple sources into a consistent view. Leverage powerful tools for profile unification, audience segmentation, and automated marketing to deliver personalized content.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s Customer Data Platform (CDP) framework is a powerful tool for businesses looking to enhance their customer relationship management through comprehensive user profiling and segmentation. The CDP framework is designed to store and manage master data records, providing a unified and consistent view of each customer by aggregating data from multiple source systems.

This unified approach to customer data management allows businesses to build detailed and accurate customer profiles, which are essential for understanding customer behavior, preferences, and needs. Pimcore’s CDP framework excels in profile unification, ensuring that data from various touchpoints is combined into a single, coherent profile. This eliminates data silos and inconsistencies, giving businesses a complete and accurate picture of each customer.

With this unified customer view, Pimcore enables advanced audience segmentation, allowing businesses to categorize their customers into specific segments based on various criteria such as demographics, behavior, purchase history, and more. These segments can then be used to tailor marketing efforts, ensuring that each customer receives content and offers that are relevant to them.

Pimcore’s CDP framework also includes features for triggering marketing automation based on these segments. This means that businesses can automate personalized content delivery, ensuring that the right message reaches the right audience at the right time. Whether it’s through email campaigns, targeted ads, or personalized website content, Pimcore helps businesses maximize the effectiveness of their marketing strategies by leveraging the power of user profiling and segmentation.

By providing a consistent and unified view of all related customer data, along with impressive tools for profile unification, audience segmentation, and marketing automation, Pimcore’s CDP framework empowers businesses to create deeply personalized and effective customer experiences.
features.description: Pimcore’s Customer Data Platform (CDP) framework enables businesses to store, manage, and unify master data records of customers, providing a comprehensive view of their profiles. By aggregating data from various sources, Pimcore ensures a consistent and unified customer profile. The platform includes robust features for profile unification, audience segmentation, and triggering marketing automation, empowering businesses to deliver highly personalized content and experiences.

features.name: Support for Personalized Product Recommendations
features.headline: Intelligent, Personalized Product Recommendations Across Channels
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s Personalized Product Recommendations leverage customer journey data, purchase history, shopping cart contents, and insights from BI and ERP systems, creating highly relevant, cross-channel recommendations for B2C and B2B customers.
features.longDescription: Pimcore’s Personalized Product Recommendations provide a robust solution for delivering relevant product suggestions by combining insights from multiple data sources, including customer journey history, previous purchases, shopping cart contents, and B2B intelligence from ERP and BI systems. With the flexibility to connect additional sources such as analytics and behavioral insights, Pimcore allows businesses to create a personalized shopping experience that responds to each customer’s unique preferences. Integrated with Pimcore DXP’s behavioral targeting, this feature dynamically adjusts recommendations based on real-time interactions, ensuring customers receive the most relevant suggestions across all channels. By tailoring recommendations to both B2C and complex B2B scenarios, Pimcore enhances the customer journey, creating a more intuitive and satisfying shopping experience that encourages deeper engagement and increases conversion rates.
features.description: Pimcore’s Personalized Product Recommendations feature tailors product suggestions based on a comprehensive view of the customer journey, including purchase history, cart data, and B2B insights from BI and ERP systems. Integrated with Pimcore DXP’s behavioral targeting, this feature enables seamless, data-driven recommendations that enhance relevance and drive engagement, adaptable to any connected data source.

features.name: Personalized Content Delivery
features.headline: Comprehensive Multi-Channel Content Personalization
features.shortDescription: Pimcore DXP offers full content personalization across customer segments and individual visitors, throughout the entire customer journey. Personalize content for web, e-commerce, and data management (PIM, MDM, DAM), with AI-driven support from Pimcore Copilot for adapting text and media.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s Digital Experience Platform (DXP) provides businesses with a powerful and versatile content personalization engine that tailors experiences to individual visitors and customer segments across the entire customer journey. This personalization is not limited to just web content but extends across all digital touchpoints, including e-commerce platforms and data management systems like Product Information Management (PIM), Master Data Management (MDM), and Digital Asset Management (DAM).

With Pimcore, any content—whether it’s a webpage, product description, digital asset, or marketing message—can be fully personalized to meet the specific needs and preferences of your audience. This ensures that every interaction is relevant, timely, and aligned with the user’s context, driving higher engagement and conversion rates.

Pimcore’s personalization capabilities are further enhanced by Pimcore Copilot, an AI-powered tool that leverages generative AI to assist in the creation and adaptation of personalized content. Pimcore Copilot can dynamically adjust textual content and media to fit the preferences and behaviors of different customer segments or individual users. For example, it can generate product descriptions tailored to a specific demographic, or adjust imagery and language to better resonate with users from different regions or cultural backgrounds.

This AI-driven approach allows for a high degree of flexibility and creativity in personalization, ensuring that content is not only relevant but also compelling and persuasive. Whether you’re managing a large e-commerce platform, curating digital assets, or maintaining a complex product catalog, Pimcore’s content personalization tools help you deliver experiences that are both meaningful and effective.

By integrating content personalization across multiple channels and touchpoints, Pimcore enables businesses to create cohesive, customer-centric experiences that drive loyalty, satisfaction, and long-term success.
features.description: Pimcore DXP enables comprehensive content personalization for customer segments and individual visitors, across all channels and throughout the customer journey. This capability extends beyond web content to include e-commerce and data management features such as PIM, MDM, and DAM. With the help of Pimcore Copilot, powered by generative AI, you can adapt textual content and media for personalized experiences. Whether on the web, in a product catalog, or within digital assets, Pimcore ensures that every piece of content resonates with the intended audience.

features.name: Personalization of Multi-Channel Experiences
features.headline: Real-Time Multi-Channel Personalization for Enhanced Customer Experiences
features.shortDescription: Pimcore CDP and DXP enable real-time personalization across channels, tailoring content based on customer data and behavior to deliver relevant experiences for both logged-in and anonymous users.
features.longDescription: Pimcore’s Multi-Channel Personalization feature, powered by the combined capabilities of Pimcore CDP and DXP, empowers businesses to deliver real-time, tailored experiences across all touchpoints. By using customer data and behavioral insights, Pimcore enables precise personalization that adapts to each individual’s journey, whether they are logged-in users or anonymous visitors. This personalization strategy extends across platforms, allowing businesses to create contextually relevant content on websites, mobile apps, emails, and more. With its flexible, data-driven approach, Pimcore’s personalization capabilities ensure that customers encounter meaningful content and offers at every interaction, increasing engagement and satisfaction. This feature supports brands in building strong, loyal customer relationships by consistently delivering experiences that reflect each user’s unique needs and behaviors, enhancing the overall customer journey.
features.description: With Pimcore’s Multi-Channel Personalization, businesses can dynamically customize content across every channel by leveraging real-time customer data from the CDP and behavioral targeting within the DXP. This capability provides seamless, context-aware personalization for both logged-in and anonymous users, aligning engagement with the customer journey to create highly relevant experiences that drive satisfaction and loyalty.

features.name: Tracking
features.headline: Website Performance Tracking and Analytics
features.shortDescription: Pimcore DXP integrates seamlessly with any analytics solution, including native integration with Google Analytics, providing comprehensive website performance tracking.
features.longDescription:
Website performance tracking and analytics are critical for understanding how users interact with digital experiences, and Pimcore DXP provides a powerful solution for this need. With the ability to integrate seamlessly with any analytics solution, Pimcore ensures that businesses can monitor and analyze key performance metrics across their websites. Native integration with Google Analytics simplifies the process, offering immediate access to detailed reports on user behavior, site performance, and traffic sources directly within the Pimcore platform.

This integration allows organizations to track important metrics such as page views, bounce rates, conversion rates, and user demographics, providing a comprehensive view of website performance. By understanding how users engage with their content, businesses can optimize site structures, improve user experiences, and make informed decisions that drive better results. The ability to access and analyze performance data in real-time ensures that businesses remain agile, adapting their digital strategies based on the latest insights and trends.

Pimcore’s tracking and analytics capabilities are an essential part of its DXP offering, enabling businesses to fully leverage data to enhance their digital presence and achieve their goals.
features.description: Pimcore DXP offers robust website performance tracking and analytics by integrating with a wide range of analytics solutions, including native support for Google Analytics. This flexibility allows businesses to monitor key performance indicators, user behavior, and website metrics in real-time. By providing detailed insights into website performance, Pimcore helps organizations optimize user experiences, improve site efficiency, and make data-driven decisions to enhance overall digital strategies. The integration ensures that all relevant analytics data is easily accessible within the Pimcore platform.

features.name: Personalized Digital Assets
features.headline: Personalized Digital Assets for Tailored Customer Experiences
features.shortDescription: Pimcore CDP & DXP enable the management and delivery of personalized digital assets, including PDFs, images, and videos, tailored to each customer profile, with GenAI-powered customization for dynamic, engaging content.
features.longDescription: Pimcore’s Personalization of Digital Assets feature offers businesses the ability to customize and deliver visual content that aligns with each customer’s preferences and profile. By leveraging customer data within the Pimcore CDP and DXP, businesses can tailor media assets—including PDFs, images, and videos—to reflect the interests and needs of individual customers or specific audience segments. With GenAI capabilities, Pimcore enables the generation of personalized media content, adding dynamic, unique visual elements that create an engaging experience for each viewer. This feature provides unmatched flexibility, ensuring that every digital asset is relevant and impactful, enhancing customer satisfaction and fostering a stronger connection with the brand. By using personalized digital assets across channels, businesses can deliver meaningful interactions that feel distinctively tailored, ultimately driving engagement, loyalty, and conversion.
features.description: Pimcore’s Personalization of Digital Assets feature empowers businesses to deliver individualized media that resonates with each audience segment, using customer profiles to adapt visual content like PDFs, images, and videos. With GenAI integration, this feature allows for the creation of dynamic, personalized media, ensuring each piece of content is tailored to the viewer, driving deeper engagement and relevance across digital touchpoints.

features.name: Support for E-Commerce Personalization
features.headline: Dynamic E-Commerce Personalization for Enhanced Customer Journeys
features.shortDescription: Pimcore CDP’s E-Commerce Personalization tailors the shopping experience using customer data for personalized recommendations, dynamic pricing, and targeted offers, optimizing journeys for both B2B and B2C scenarios.
features.longDescription: Pimcore’s E-Commerce Personalization feature empowers businesses to provide a tailored, data-driven shopping experience by customizing every aspect of the e-commerce journey. From personalized product recommendations and search results to dynamic pricing models and exclusive offers, Pimcore uses customer data to create a shopping experience that feels relevant and unique to each visitor. For complex B2B and B2C scenarios, Pimcore’s flexibility in adjusting assortments, pricing, and product sorting allows businesses to meet diverse customer needs, creating value for both high-volume purchasers and individual shoppers. Additionally, Pimcore CDP’s Customer Activities functionality provides continuous data insights, allowing businesses to refine each step of the e-commerce experience based on real-time customer behavior. This capability ensures that customers encounter an engaging, intuitive shopping environment that aligns with their preferences and buying history, boosting satisfaction, loyalty, and conversion rates.
features.description: Pimcore’s E-Commerce Personalization feature enables businesses to create tailored online shopping experiences by leveraging customer data, offering personalized product recommendations, dynamic pricing, and customized search results. Using customer activities to refine the e-commerce journey, Pimcore personalizes assortments, pricing, and product listings, making it ideal for complex B2B and B2C needs where real-time responsiveness enhances engagement and conversion.

features.name: Behavioral Targeting
features.headline: Dynamic Real-Time Personalization with Secure Targeting
features.shortDescription: Pimcore DXP offers robust real-time personalization and targeting capabilities, leveraging a secure behavioral targeting engine and integration with the Pimcore CDP framework. Configure target groups, build personas, and generate personalized content dynamically, with full compliance using first-party cookies.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s Digital Experience Platform (DXP) empowers businesses to deliver highly personalized and targeted digital experiences in real-time, enhancing user engagement and driving conversions. At the heart of this capability is Pimcore’s behavioral targeting engine, a powerful tool that enables you to deliver content tailored to individual user behaviors, preferences, and interactions.

This engine operates with full compliance using first-party cookies, ensuring that all personalization efforts are secure and adhere to the latest privacy regulations. By integrating seamlessly with the Pimcore Customer Data Platform (CDP) framework, it allows you to leverage comprehensive customer data to inform your personalization strategies.

One of the key features of Pimcore’s real-time personalization is the ability to configure and manage target groups. Through the Target Groups Configuration, you can define specific audience segments based on a wide range of criteria, ensuring that your content resonates with the right users. These target groups can be further refined using configurable and extensible global targeting rules, allowing for granular control over how and when content is personalized.

Pimcore also enables the generation of personalized document content, dynamically adapting what users see based on their segment, persona, or behavior. This ensures that every interaction is relevant and engaging, increasing the likelihood of conversion and customer satisfaction.

The platform’s deep integration with the Pimcore CDP framework enhances its personalization capabilities by allowing for detailed persona generation and segment building. By analyzing customer data within the CDP, you can create detailed personas that represent your key audience segments, making your targeting even more precise.

Pimcore’s real-time personalization tools also include a personalization toolbar, which allows you to test personalization and segmentation scenarios as they happen. This real-time testing ensures that your strategies are effective and optimized for maximum impact before they are fully deployed.

Moreover, Pimcore’s ability to utilize personalized PIM (Product Information Management) and MDM (Master Data Management) data further enriches the personalized experiences you can offer. By incorporating product and master data into your personalization efforts, you can deliver more relevant and accurate content, enhancing the overall user experience.
features.description: Pimcore DXP enables dynamic real-time personalization and targeting through its powerful behavioral targeting engine, fully compliant with first-party cookies. Integrated with the Pimcore CDP framework, it allows you to configure target groups, define global targeting rules, and build personas for precise segmenting. Generate personalized document content and utilize PIM and MDM data for tailored experiences. The personalization toolbar enables testing of personalization scenarios in real-time, ensuring your strategies are optimized for maximum impact.

features.name: Support for Personalized Product Description
features.headline: Real-Time, AI-Driven Personalized Product Information
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s Personalized Product Information feature uses AI/ML and customer insights to dynamically adapt product descriptions, optimizing voice and style for different personas and bridging CDP, PIM, DXP, and Commerce for real-time, responsive personalization.
features.longDescription: Pimcore’s Personalized Product Information feature brings together AI/ML capabilities and Pimcore’s integrated CDP, PIM, and DXP to personalize product content in real time, creating a customer experience that feels genuinely responsive and tailored. By using customer data and behavioral insights, Pimcore personalizes product descriptions, voice, and style according to specific persona groups or individual preferences, ensuring every piece of content resonates with the audience. With its unique ability to bridge PIM and DXP, Pimcore captures data on how customers interact with product details, using this feedback to dynamically optimize content for maximum relevance. As the first in the industry to enable real-time content optimization across CDP, PIM, DXP, and e-commerce, Pimcore empowers brands to deliver precise, engaging product experiences that adapt fluidly to each customer’s journey, enhancing satisfaction and driving stronger engagement across all channels.
features.description: Pimcore’s Personalized Product Information feature allows businesses to leverage the CDP and PIM integration to customize product data in real-time, using AI/ML to tailor descriptions by persona or individual preferences. This advanced capability bridges PIM and DXP, capturing live data on customer engagement to refine product information continuously, making Pimcore the first in the industry to enable dynamic content optimization across CDP, PIM, DXP, and e-commerce.

capabilities.name: Customer Data Management
capabilities.headline: Integrated CDP for Personalized Experiences
capabilities.shortDescription: Pimcore DXP's integrated Customer Data Platform (CDP) framework centralizes customer profiles, enabling businesses to craft highly personalized experiences across all channels. This framework empowers real-time insights and actions, allowing for tailored interactions that enhance customer satisfaction.
capabilities.longDescription: Pimcore DXP's Customer Data Platform (CDP) framework is designed to centralize and unify customer data from multiple sources, creating a comprehensive profile for each customer. This integration enables businesses to deliver highly personalized experiences across all channels, including web, mobile, in-store, and more. The CDP's real-time data processing capabilities allow for immediate insights and actions, ensuring that every interaction is relevant and impactful. By understanding customer preferences and behaviors, businesses can craft tailored marketing campaigns and customer journeys that resonate on a personal level, ultimately driving higher engagement, satisfaction, and loyalty.

features.name: Built-in CDP System
features.headline: Flexible Customer Data Platform (CDP) Framework for Unified Customer Insights
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s CDP Framework offers a fully configurable solution for creating and managing golden customer records, integrating customer data with automated triggers, actions, and personalization across all channels in a best-of-suite platform.
features.longDescription: Pimcore’s Customer Data Platform (CDP) Framework provides a robust, configurable solution for unifying customer data, supporting businesses in building golden records and creating a seamless, highly personalized customer experience. This composable CDP framework integrates directly within Pimcore’s data and experience management suite, making it the foundation for a true best-of-suite solution. With features that include real-time event tracking, behavioral triggers, and automated actions, Pimcore’s CDP Framework allows businesses to optimize the customer journey through personalized engagement and marketing automation. This integration also enables a seamless connection between customer profile management and multi-channel experience delivery, reducing IT complexities and supporting PXM (Product Experience Management) with a unified platform. Pimcore’s best-of-suite strategy gives brands a comprehensive view of their customers, enabling targeted, data-driven interactions that enhance engagement and drive conversions across any output channel.
features.description: Pimcore’s Customer Data Platform (CDP) Framework is a powerful, composable development toolkit for centralizing and optimizing customer data. Designed as part of Pimcore’s best-of-suite approach, this CDP provides the building blocks for creating comprehensive customer profiles and maintaining golden records, enabling data-driven actions and triggers to support marketing automation and highly personalized content delivery across any device and channel.

capabilities.name: E-commerce
capabilities.shortDescription: Pimcore's e-commerce framework is a highly customizable and composable infrastructure designed to meet the most challenging e-commerce needs. It integrates seamlessly with data and experience management to deliver exceptional B2C, B2B, and D2C commerce experiences.
capabilities.longDescription:
Pimcore’s e-commerce framework is a cornerstone for businesses aiming to deliver exceptional commerce experiences across B2C, B2B, and D2C channels. Unlike conventional e-commerce platforms that offer limited customization through themes and pre-built components, Pimcore takes a composable approach, providing a framework that can be fully tailored and developed to meet the specific needs of any industry or business strategy. This highly customizable infrastructure acts as the foundation for building truly unique e-commerce solutions, allowing businesses to innovate without constraints.

The framework is not just a storefront; it’s a collection of flexible building blocks designed for e-commerce success. Whether your strategy involves complex transactional processes, advanced personalization, or integration with extensive product data, Pimcore’s framework can be adapted to ensure a perfect fit. Moreover, Pimcore’s deep integration with its data and digital experience management capabilities ensures that your e-commerce platform is supported by accurate, up-to-date information, and delivers seamless, engaging customer experiences.

For businesses with more standard e-commerce needs, Pimcore also offers integration with numerous third-party storefronts. This ensures that even simpler, more traditional e-commerce applications can benefit from Pimcore’s powerful data and experience management capabilities, making it a versatile solution for a wide range of e-commerce scenarios.

features.name: Integration of External Ecommerce Systems
features.headline: Flexible Integration with External E-Commerce Systems
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s E-Commerce Framework offers seamless connectivity to any external e-commerce system, enabling data synchronization for products, customers, and orders through Pimcore Datahub, Workflow Automation, or Core API, as well as iPaaS vendors for streamlined integration.
features.longDescription: The Pimcore E-Commerce Framework offers powerful integration capabilities, allowing businesses to connect to external e-commerce systems and synchronize vital data streams for product catalogs, customer profiles, and order information. Pimcore's flexible architecture supports either native e-commerce extensions, such as Coreshop, or direct connectivity to third-party platforms via its Datahub, Workflow Automation, and Core API. For companies leveraging integration platform-as-a-service (iPaaS) solutions, Pimcore connects seamlessly with a variety of providers, making it straightforward to link Pimcore to other e-commerce ecosystems without custom development. This flexibility enables businesses to unify and control their data within Pimcore, ensuring data consistency across every digital touchpoint, improving operational efficiency, and supporting a scalable, adaptable approach to modern e-commerce demands.
features.description: With Pimcore’s E-Commerce Framework, businesses can seamlessly integrate any external e-commerce system, synchronizing essential product, customer, and order data in real-time. Whether using Pimcore’s native E-Commerce Framework, its flexible extensions like Coreshop, or connecting third-party platforms, Pimcore provides comprehensive connectivity through its Datahub, Workflow Automation, Core API, and iPaaS vendor integrations. This robust connectivity enables efficient data flow and ensures consistent information across all systems, creating an integrated digital ecosystem ready for rapid adaptation and scalability.

features.name: Built-in E-Commerce System
features.headline: Beyond the Standard E-Commerce Platform
features.shortDescription: The Pimcore E-Commerce Framework is far more than an out-of-the-box storefront—it’s a highly configurable, adaptable, and programmable platform that lets businesses build sophisticated, custom commerce experiences tailored precisely to their needs.
features.longDescription: The Pimcore E-Commerce Framework represents the antithesis of typical out-of-the-box e-commerce platforms that limit customization and adaptability. With Pimcore, businesses access a fully programmable and configurable platform designed to meet the unique demands of sophisticated e-commerce models, whether B2B, B2C, or D2C. This isn’t a one-size-fits-all solution; instead, it’s an advanced, composable framework where each feature can be precisely customized, extended, or developed from scratch. This flexibility allows companies to build tailored digital storefronts with core capabilities such as advanced CPQ workflows, dynamic pricing models, and custom checkout processes, all seamlessly integrated with Pimcore’s PIM, CDP, and DXP. The framework’s modular structure allows businesses to use only the components they need, streamlining implementation and providing the adaptability required to scale and adjust in real time. The result is a robust, anti-cookie-cutter e-commerce platform designed to fuel complex, engaging, and brand-specific commerce experiences across all channels and touchpoints.
features.description: The Pimcore E-Commerce Framework goes well beyond a traditional, out-of-the-box solution. It offers a fully customizable and adaptable architecture, allowing businesses to create unique, scalable digital storefronts for B2B, B2C, and D2C models. Unlike rigid, off-the-shelf platforms, this framework is built to be 100% programmable and configurable to meet the specific demands of each business. Integrated seamlessly with Pimcore’s PIM, CDP, and DXP, it enables businesses to design e-commerce environments that are entirely tailored, composable, and ready to deliver rich, personalized customer experiences across all channels.

capabilities.name: Master Data Management
capabilities.headline: Comprehensive Master Data Management
capabilities.shortDescription: Pimcore’s Master Data Management consolidates data across complex systems into a single source of truth, offering unparalleled flexibility, scalability, and multi-domain support for managing all types of master data.
capabilities.longDescription:
Pimcore’s Master Data Management (MDM) is a powerful, open-source solution designed to provide a single source of truth for all your data. It excels in consolidating data across complex and heterogeneous systems, ensuring that your organization can manage and enrich any type of master data, including product data, customer data, employee data, asset data, and more. Pimcore MDM supports the management of all aspects of a master record, including hierarchy, structure, validation, versioning, and enrichment with attributes, descriptions, translations, documentation, and other related data.

What sets Pimcore apart is its flexibility and scalability, thanks to its open-code architecture and highly adaptable data models. This flexibility makes it easy to expand and scale your data management practices as your business grows and evolves. Pimcore’s MDM is designed to support both analytical and operational MDM requirements, making it suitable for a wide range of use cases across different industries.

Moreover, Pimcore MDM is a true multi-domain and multi-vector solution, capable of managing diverse data types and ensuring consistency across all domains. It also includes robust support for B2B and B2C digital commerce, allowing you to seamlessly integrate your MDM system with your commerce platforms. Recognized by leading industry analysts such as Gartner and Forrester, Pimcore’s MDM solution is trusted by organizations worldwide to provide the flexibility, power, and scalability needed to manage their master data effectively.

features.name: Built-in MDM System
features.headline: Comprehensive Master Data Management (MDM) for Unified Data Governance
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s award-winning Master Data Management (MDM) enables seamless, cross-functional data integration and governance, centralizing all master data to enhance product experiences and support cross-channel consistency within a best-of-suite framework.
features.longDescription: Pimcore’s Master Data Management (MDM) application centralizes the management, governance, and optimization of all critical master data within a single, integrated platform, providing brands with a cohesive approach to data and experience management. With the flexibility to onboard and harmonize any type of external data—whether product, vendor, employee, or customer data—Pimcore MDM serves as the foundation for delivering personalized, high-quality product experiences across channels. Embedded within Pimcore’s composable suite, this award-winning MDM connects seamlessly with data and experience management tools, eliminating silos and supporting consistent, reliable data flows. By aligning with a best-of-suite strategy, Pimcore’s MDM minimizes IT complexities and ensures data accuracy, giving businesses a complete view of their data and enabling dynamic, responsive customer experiences. This unified platform transforms how businesses manage and leverage data, delivering an efficient, scalable solution that supports Product Experience Management (PXM) with intelligent data relationships that drive customer engagement and satisfaction.
features.description: Pimcore’s built-in Master Data Management (MDM) application centralizes and optimizes master data—such as vendor, product, employee, and customer data—within a composable suite that supports cohesive data and experience management. Designed as a fully-featured and award-winning solution, Pimcore MDM integrates with all Pimcore Platform functions, providing a unified foundation for efficient data governance that drives exceptional product experiences across any channel and industry, aligned with Pimcore’s best-of-suite strategy.

capabilities.name: Product Information Management
capabilities.headline: Comprehensive Product Information Management
