capabilities.shortDescription: Pimcore’s enterprise PIM software centralizes and harmonizes all your product information, offering full PXM capabilities that include data integration, management, syndication, optimization, and personalization. It’s the world’s most widely used and award-winning PIM solution.
capabilities.longDescription:
Pimcore's origins lie in Product Information Management (PIM), and it has evolved into a leading platform that sets the standard for how businesses manage their product data. At its core, Pimcore’s enterprise PIM software is designed to centralize and harmonize all product-related information—whether it’s marketing, sales, or technical data—into a single, unified system. This centralization ensures that all stakeholders, from marketers to engineers, have access to accurate, up-to-date product information, which is crucial for maintaining consistency and driving effective decision-making.

But Pimcore is far more than just a PIM. It’s a fully-fledged Product Experience Management (PXM) platform that encompasses a broad range of capabilities beyond basic product information management. With Pimcore, businesses can seamlessly integrate, manage, and syndicate product data across various channels, ensuring that the right information reaches the right audience at the right time. This includes not only the standard functions of a PIM but also advanced features for data optimization, real-time personalization, and content syndication.

The platform’s ability to connect with existing IT systems through its open architecture ensures that it can be easily integrated into any business environment, making it a versatile tool for organizations of all sizes. Moreover, Pimcore’s scalability allows it to handle complex product data landscapes, supporting large enterprises with diverse product lines.

Pimcore’s holistic approach to PIM and PXM has made it the most widely used product information management solution in the world today. Its effectiveness and flexibility have been recognized with numerous awards, solidifying its position as the go-to platform for businesses seeking to optimize their product data management and deliver exceptional product experiences.

features.name: Built-in PIM System
features.headline: Comprehensive Product Information Management (PIM) for Enhanced Product Experiences
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s award-winning PIM delivers integrated product data management across all channels, creating a streamlined, best-of-suite solution for optimized product experiences and seamless Product Experience Management (PXM).
features.longDescription: Pimcore’s Product Information Management (PIM) provides a comprehensive solution for managing and delivering high-quality product data across all channels, supporting brands in creating seamless and engaging Product Experience Management (PXM) strategies. As part of Pimcore’s composable suite, the PIM integrates smoothly with the platform’s data and experience management functionalities, making product information easily accessible for use across the entire Pimcore ecosystem. This award-winning PIM enables efficient onboarding, organization, optimization, and distribution of product data tailored to specific industries, ensuring that brands can deliver consistent, impactful product experiences. Pimcore’s best-of-suite approach eliminates the need for complex integrations, offering a single, cohesive platform that reduces IT complexity while maximizing productivity. This fully-featured PIM is the foundation of Pimcore’s commitment to delivering true PXM, empowering brands to manage product data and enhance customer experiences across all channels with ease.
features.description: Pimcore’s full-featured Product Information Management (PIM) application centralizes the onboarding, management, and delivery of product data for any industry and output channel. Integrated within Pimcore’s composable suite, this PIM supports a best-of-suite approach that combines data and experience management into one powerful platform, setting the foundation for a true PXM solution that meets the standards defined by leading analyst firms like Gartner and Forrester.

capabilities.name: Marketing Automation
capabilities.headline: Customizable Marketing Automation Framework
capabilities.shortDescription: Pimcore’s Marketing Automation framework is a powerful, customizable solution that leverages data from PIM, MDM, DAM, DXP, and Commerce to automate marketing across any channel, tailored to your unique B2B, B2C, or D2C needs.
capabilities.longDescription:
Pimcore’s Marketing Automation framework offers an unparalleled level of customization and sophistication, making it the perfect solution for businesses that view marketing automation as a critical component of their strategy. Unlike off-the-shelf SaaS options that may offer simplicity but lack depth, Pimcore’s framework is designed for those who need to create highly tailored marketing automation solutions that can be precisely aligned with their B2B, B2C, or D2C requirements.

By integrating deeply with Pimcore’s PIM, MDM, DAM, DXP, and Commerce modules, the framework allows businesses to leverage comprehensive data sets to drive automation across any marketing channel. Whether it’s creating personalized newsletters, automating social media campaigns, or delivering highly tailored content to individual users, Pimcore provides the tools to build a marketing automation system that fits your exact needs.

Pimcore’s open-core architecture ensures that you are not limited by pre-defined functionalities. Instead, you have the freedom to develop a solution that fully aligns with your marketing objectives, no matter how complex or unique they may be. This makes Pimcore the ideal choice for businesses that see marketing automation as more than just a convenience, but as a strategic advantage that requires a solution as unique as their brand.

features.name: Customer Segmentation
features.headline: Advanced Customer Segmentation for Personalized Marketing
features.shortDescription: Pimcore DXP’s customer segmentation and behavioral targeting capabilities allow you to create highly personalized content across any channel. Segment customers based on their behavior and actions, ensuring targeted and effective marketing automation.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s Digital Experience Platform (DXP) and Customer Data Platform (CDP) framework offer robust customer segmentation and behavioral targeting tools that enable businesses to deliver highly personalized content across any channel. By analyzing customer behavior and actions, Pimcore allows you to create detailed segments that reflect the unique preferences, needs, and behaviors of different customer groups.

These segmentation capabilities are essential for crafting personalized marketing strategies that resonate with each audience segment. Whether you’re targeting frequent buyers, new subscribers, or customers who have shown interest in specific products, Pimcore’s customer segmentation tools allow you to tailor your messaging to meet the precise needs of each group. This level of personalization ensures that your marketing efforts are more relevant, increasing the likelihood of engagement and conversion.

In the context of marketing automation, Pimcore’s segmentation tools are invaluable. They allow you to automate the delivery of personalized content, ensuring that each customer receives the right message at the right time, based on their behavior and actions. For instance, you can automatically send follow-up emails to customers who abandon their shopping carts or offer special promotions to loyal customers who frequently engage with your brand.

By leveraging Pimcore’s customer segmentation and behavioral targeting functionalities, businesses can enhance their marketing automation strategies, delivering more effective and personalized campaigns that drive better results across all channels.
features.description: Pimcore DXP, integrated with the CDP framework, offers powerful customer segmentation and behavioral targeting functionalities. By segmenting customers based on their behavior and actions, you can deliver personalized content across all channels, including within your marketing automation strategies. This ensures that your messages resonate with each audience segment, driving engagement and conversion.

features.name: Real-Time Triggers
features.headline: Real-Time Triggers for Dynamic, Personalized Marketing Automation
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s Real-Time Triggers enable rule-based marketing automation driven by customer behavior, allowing businesses to deliver timely, relevant actions—such as personalized offers and communications—that adapt instantly to customer interactions.
features.longDescription: Pimcore’s Real-Time Triggers feature enables brands to automate marketing actions based on live customer behaviors, making every interaction timely and impactful. Using a robust rule-based engine, Pimcore allows businesses to define custom triggers that drive personalized responses—such as sending special offers, personalized messages, or dynamic content—when customers perform specific actions or reach defined milestones in their journey. This feature is fully extendable, allowing brands to create custom rules and triggers tailored to their unique business goals, ensuring flexibility and precision. By responding to customer behaviors in real time, Pimcore helps brands create a more relevant, engaging experience that enhances customer satisfaction and drives loyalty. From targeting B2C audiences with flash promotions to supporting complex B2B decision-making, Pimcore’s real-time triggers deliver the right message at the right moment, maximizing conversion and building lasting connections.
features.description: Pimcore’s Real-Time Triggers feature in the CDP & DXP provides powerful, rule-based automation to drive personalized marketing actions in real time, based on customer behaviors and interactions. With customizable triggers and extendable rules, businesses can dynamically deliver relevant offers, messages, and content at the perfect moment, enhancing engagement and supporting a responsive, customer-centric experience.

features.name: Personalized E-Mail Sending
features.headline: Behavior-Driven Personalized E-Mail Sending
features.shortDescription: Enhance customer engagement by sending personalized emails through Pimcore’s DXP, tailored to individual behavior and actions. Deliver relevant content that resonates with your audience, driving higher engagement and conversions.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s Digital Experience Platform (DXP) empowers businesses to elevate their email marketing strategy by sending personalized emails tailored to each customer’s behavior and actions. This feature leverages Pimcore’s robust data management capabilities, allowing you to gather insights on customer interactions, preferences, and purchase history. With this data, you can craft highly targeted emails that speak directly to the needs and interests of each recipient, ensuring that your messages are both relevant and impactful.

For instance, you can automatically send a follow-up email to customers who have abandoned their shopping cart, offering them an incentive to complete their purchase. Or, you can send personalized recommendations based on previous purchases or browsing history, encouraging further engagement with your brand. Pimcore’s DXP allows you to automate these processes, ensuring that your customers receive the right message at the right time, without the need for manual intervention.

The personalized email sending feature is fully integrated within Pimcore’s DXP, allowing you to seamlessly manage your email campaigns alongside your broader digital marketing efforts. By delivering content that resonates with your audience on a personal level, you can increase open rates, boost click-through rates, and drive higher conversions, ultimately enhancing the effectiveness of your email marketing strategy.
features.description: Pimcore’s DXP enables personalized email sending based on customer behavior and actions. By leveraging detailed customer data, you can craft and send targeted emails that resonate with individual recipients, enhancing engagement and driving conversions. This feature ensures that every email is timely, relevant, and aligned with your customers’ interests, making your digital marketing more effective and impactful.

features.name: Real-time Segmentation
features.headline: Real-Time Customer Segmentation for Adaptive Personalization
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s Real-Time Customer Segmentation dynamically updates customer data and segments based on behavior and external triggers, enabling businesses to build and refine personas for precise, personalized engagement.
features.longDescription: Pimcore’s Real-Time Customer Segmentation enables brands to update customer data and segment assignments in real-time, responding to each customer’s behaviors and external triggers such as new data from CRM, ERP, or other connected sources. This capability supports the creation and refinement of dynamic personas, allowing businesses to tailor marketing efforts and personalized content with unparalleled accuracy. As customer behaviors change, Pimcore adjusts segment assignments instantly, ensuring that marketing automation and personalization strategies stay relevant and aligned with each customer’s current journey. By continuously adapting to the most recent customer insights, Pimcore empowers businesses to deliver highly targeted, context-aware engagements, increasing engagement and fostering loyalty through real-time, responsive personalization.
features.description: With Pimcore’s Real-Time Customer Segmentation, businesses can instantly update customer profiles and segment membership based on real-time actions and external data sources. This feature allows for adaptive persona building, creating a continuously evolving, data-driven foundation for personalization, ensuring that each customer engagement reflects their current journey and preferences.

features.name: Newsletter Integration
features.headline: Multi-Channel Push Marketing with Pimcore
features.shortDescription: Leverage Pimcore’s multi-channel capabilities for your digital push-marketing campaigns. Manage subscriptions, send personalized newsletters, and push messages to mobile and social platforms, with seamless third-party integrations and limitless customization options.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s Push Marketing and Newsletters feature takes full advantage of the platform’s multi-channel experience management capabilities, making it a powerful tool for executing comprehensive digital marketing campaigns. Whether you’re targeting customers through email, mobile, or social media, Pimcore provides the functionality and flexibility needed to engage your audience effectively.

With Pimcore, you can manage your entire subscription base with ease, using the platform’s subscription management tools to segment audiences and tailor messages. The built-in newsletter engine allows you to create and send personalized emails, leveraging Pimcore’s DXP (Digital Experience Platform) functionalities to customize content based on user behavior, preferences, and interactions. This ensures that your messages are relevant and engaging, driving higher open rates and conversions.

Sending emails directly from Pimcore is straightforward, and the platform also integrates seamlessly with third-party newsletter engines like Mailchimp or SMTP gateways, giving you the freedom to choose the tools that best fit your needs. Beyond email, Pimcore’s extensibility through Workflow Automation allows you to expand your reach to social channels and communication platforms. Imagine sending push notifications to WhatsApp, iMessage, or even updating your teams via MS Teams and Slack—all from within Pimcore.

The platform’s versatility doesn’t stop there. Whether you’re orchestrating a simple newsletter or a complex multi-channel campaign, Pimcore’s open architecture and extensive API support mean that you can create highly customized marketing workflows. In Pimcore, your marketing potential is truly limitless, constrained only by your creativity and strategic goals.
features.description: Pimcore empowers your digital push-marketing efforts with robust tools for managing subscriptions, generating and sending personalized newsletters, and pushing messages across multiple channels. With a built-in newsletter engine and the ability to integrate with third-party services like Mailchimp, Pimcore allows you to streamline your campaigns. Extend your reach to social channels like WhatsApp, iMessage, MS Teams, and Slack using Pimcore Workflow Automation. The platform’s flexibility ensures that the only limit to your marketing strategies is your imagination.

features.name: Support AI Powered Segmentation
features.headline: AI-Powered Customer Segmentation for Dynamic, Data-Driven Marketing
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s AI-Powered Customer Segmentation leverages AI and machine learning to dynamically segment customers, analyze data, and optimize segments in real time, ensuring precise, behavior-based personalization.
features.longDescription: Pimcore’s AI-Powered Customer Segmentation transforms customer data into actionable insights, using AI and machine learning to create adaptive customer segments that evolve in real time. With Pimcore Copilot, businesses can analyze and optimize customer data and segments continuously, refining targeting for maximum precision. By integrating behavioral targeting with AI-driven optimization, Pimcore allows brands to track and segment customers based on real-time interactions, ensuring that every segment remains accurate and relevant as customers’ behaviors shift. This feature empowers businesses to execute highly personalized marketing strategies that respond dynamically to customer needs, enhancing engagement, loyalty, and conversion. Pimcore’s AI-powered segmentation not only strengthens the accuracy of customer insights but also ensures that marketing efforts stay aligned with the unique, data-driven profiles of each customer.
features.description: Pimcore’s AI-Powered Customer Segmentation uses advanced AI/ML technology to continuously monitor and segment customers, creating dynamic, data-driven customer segments. Through Pimcore Copilot, businesses gain insights to optimize customer data and segments, while behavioral targeting connects seamlessly to AI, enabling adaptive marketing that aligns with each customer’s evolving journey and preferences.

features.name: Newsletter Engagement Tracking
features.headline: Advanced Newsletter Engagement Tracking
features.shortDescription: Track customer interactions with your newsletters, segment your audience based on their activities, and personalize landing pages to boost engagement using Pimcore’s DXP.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s Newsletter Engagement Tracking feature, part of its powerful Digital Experience Platform (DXP), offers businesses the ability to track and analyze customer interactions with newsletter content. By monitoring how customers engage with the links in your newsletters—whether they click, share, or ignore—you gain valuable insights into their preferences and behaviors.

This data-driven approach allows you to segment your audience based on their tracked activities, creating more targeted and effective marketing campaigns. For instance, you can identify highly engaged customers who frequently click on specific types of content and tailor future communications to match their interests. Conversely, you can re-engage less active subscribers with content designed to spark their interest.

Beyond segmentation, Pimcore’s DXP lets you take personalization a step further by customizing landing pages based on user engagement tracking. When a customer clicks a link in your newsletter, they can be directed to a landing page that reflects their previous interactions and preferences, providing a more relevant and engaging experience. This level of personalization not only enhances user satisfaction but also increases the likelihood of conversions, as customers are presented with content that resonates with them on a personal level.

With Pimcore’s Newsletter Engagement Tracking, you can transform your email marketing efforts into a dynamic, data-driven strategy that continuously adapts to your audience’s needs, ensuring that every interaction is optimized for success.
features.description: Pimcore’s Newsletter Engagement Tracking feature allows you to track customer activities based on their interactions with newsletter links. Use this data to segment your audience and personalize landing pages, enhancing the relevance of your content and driving higher engagement. Integrated within Pimcore’s DXP, this feature ensures that every customer touchpoint is optimized for maximum impact.

features.name: Marketing Automation Connectivity
features.headline: Seamless Marketing Automation Connectivity for Multi-Channel Personalization
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s Marketing Automation Connectivity integrates with third-party tools and leverages multi-channel publishing to deliver perfectly timed, personalized messages across email, messaging apps, social media, and any connected platform.
features.longDescription: Pimcore’s Marketing Automation Connectivity feature empowers brands to connect seamlessly with customers by delivering personalized messages across various channels, including email, communication apps, and social media platforms like Instagram, TikTok, and Facebook. By utilizing Pimcore DXP’s multi-channel publishing capabilities, businesses can ensure that each message reaches customers on their preferred platform, tailored to individual preferences and delivered at the optimal moment. Additionally, Pimcore’s framework supports integration with any third-party marketing automation tool, allowing brands to connect to APIs and distribute personalized content to any endpoint. This flexibility provides a comprehensive solution for engaging customers with relevant, context-aware messaging that enhances the customer journey and maximizes conversion. Pimcore’s connectivity enables brands to create a truly omni-channel experience, ensuring customers experience a seamless, cohesive journey wherever they engage.
features.description: Pimcore’s Marketing Automation Connectivity enables brands to engage customers with personalized, well-timed messages across multiple channels, including email, messaging apps like WhatsApp and Facebook Messenger, and social media platforms. With the ability to integrate any third-party marketing tools via API, Pimcore CDP and DXP provide a flexible, customizable solution for delivering relevant content across touchpoints, driving higher engagement and conversion.

features.name: Built-In Rule Engine
features.headline: Dynamic Marketing Automation Rule Engine
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s Marketing Automation Rule Engine allows you to create dynamic, personalized marketing campaigns by listening for triggers, checking conditions, and applying actions. This highly customizable engine supports a wide range of use cases, enabling precise targeting and automated responses based on customer behavior.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s Marketing Automation Rule Engine is a powerful tool within its Digital Experience Platform (DXP) that allows businesses to automate and personalize their marketing workflows with precision. By leveraging the engine’s ability to listen for specific triggers—such as customer activities, segment interactions, or target group assignments—businesses can ensure that their marketing strategies are both dynamic and responsive.

The Rule Engine operates by first identifying triggers, which could include customer activities like page visits, product views, or email interactions. Once a trigger is detected, the engine checks predefined conditions to determine the appropriate response. These conditions can range from counting activities and evaluating segment membership to analyzing custom fields that reflect unique customer attributes. This conditional logic ensures that your marketing actions are precisely targeted and highly relevant to the customer’s current behavior and context.

Upon meeting the set conditions, the Rule Engine can automatically apply various actions. These actions include adding customers to specific segments, assigning them to target groups, sending personalized emails, or triggering other automated marketing tasks. The flexibility of the Rule Engine extends to custom use cases, allowing businesses to tailor the engine’s functionalities to meet specific marketing objectives or integrate with unique workflows.

For instance, if a customer frequently visits a particular product page without making a purchase, the Rule Engine can automatically segment this customer into a “high interest” group and send a targeted email with a special offer or further information. Similarly, if a customer interacts with a specific segment of your website, the engine can track these interactions and trigger personalized content or actions based on their engagement.

Pimcore’s Marketing Automation Rule Engine also integrates seamlessly with other components of the DXP, including targeting and personalization features. By combining these elements, businesses can create highly sophisticated, automated marketing strategies that deliver personalized content and experiences across all customer touchpoints. The Rule Engine’s extensibility ensures that it can adapt to any marketing scenario, making it an indispensable tool for businesses seeking to enhance their marketing automation capabilities.
features.description: Pimcore’s Marketing Automation Rule Engine enables businesses to automate complex marketing workflows by listening for triggers, such as customer activities or segment interactions, and applying actions based on predefined conditions. The engine supports counting activities, checking custom fields, and managing segment tracking. Actions like adding customers to segments, assigning target groups, and sending emails can be automated, with the flexibility to extend these functionalities for custom use cases. This powerful tool ensures your marketing efforts are always timely, relevant, and highly personalized.

features.name: Integration of Third Party Marketing Automations
features.headline: Composable Marketing Automation with Seamless Integrations
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s integrative approach allows you to build highly customized marketing automation by seamlessly integrating third-party tools, personalization engines, and analytics services. Centralize customer data in Pimcore’s CDP, enrich it with AI, and connect any application with our workflow automation engine.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s Digital Experience Platform (DXP) offers an integrative approach to marketing automation, allowing businesses to craft highly personalized and effective campaigns by combining the platform’s powerful capabilities with third-party tools and services. This approach is built on the flexibility of Pimcore’s customizable building blocks, which can be individually tailored to meet the unique needs of your business and industry.

By seamlessly integrating with third-party marketing automation tools, personalization engines, and analytics services, Pimcore enables you to create a highly composable marketing automation ecosystem. Whether you need advanced segmentation, real-time personalization, or detailed analytics, Pimcore allows you to connect the tools that best fit your strategy. This flexibility ensures that your marketing automation system is not only powerful but also perfectly aligned with your business goals.

At the heart of this integrative approach is Pimcore’s Customer Data Platform (CDP) framework, where all customer data and profiles are centrally stored. This ensures that you have a golden, compliant record of your user profiles, enabling consistent and personalized experiences across all channels. The CDP’s robust data management capabilities are further enhanced by Pimcore Copilot, which leverages AI/ML to enrich data and drive more sophisticated personalization through generative AI.

To further extend the capabilities of your marketing automation, Pimcore’s workflow automation engine allows you to connect any third-party data or application. With integrations available for tools like n8n, you can automate complex workflows, synchronize data across systems, and ensure that your marketing automation is as dynamic and responsive as your business demands.

Pimcore’s integration of third-party marketing automation tools provides businesses with the ultimate flexibility and control, enabling the creation of a powerful, personalized, and scalable marketing automation solution that drives growth and engagement.
features.description: Pimcore empowers businesses to create a fully composable marketing automation solution by integrating third-party tools, personalization engines, and analytics services. With customizable building blocks and flexible integrations, you can tailor your marketing automation to your specific industry needs. Centralize customer data within Pimcore’s CDP framework to maintain a golden, compliant record of user profiles. Enhance automation with AI-driven insights using Pimcore Copilot and generative AI, and connect any application through our workflow automation engine, including integrations with tools like n8n.

features.name: Campaign Orchestration
features.headline: Cross-Channel Campaign Orchestration for Targeted, Automated Marketing
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s Campaign Orchestration feature uses customer data to drive automated, cross-channel campaigns that deliver the right message to the right audience, with AI-powered support for personalization across on-site, email, and advertising platforms.
features.longDescription: Pimcore’s Campaign Orchestration feature provides a powerful, data-driven solution for managing and automating cross-channel marketing campaigns. By leveraging customer data within Pimcore CDP and DXP, brands can create personalized, AI-powered marketing strategies that adapt dynamically to each customer’s journey. Pimcore orchestrates on-site campaigns, email marketing, and digital advertising on platforms like Google and social media, making it easy to deliver targeted, relevant content to specific personas and audiences. This end-to-end automation ensures that campaigns are not only timely but also highly relevant, delivering personalized messages that drive customer engagement and conversion. With Pimcore’s seamless campaign orchestration, brands benefit from increased efficiency and effectiveness, while customers experience a cohesive, engaging journey across all digital touchpoints.
features.description: Pimcore’s Campaign Orchestration feature enables brands to create, manage, and automate cross-channel marketing campaigns using comprehensive customer data. With integrated support for AI-powered automation, Pimcore allows businesses to run campaigns on-site, manage email marketing, and connect to platforms like Google Ads and social media for personalized, targeted messaging. This capability ensures that campaigns reach the intended audience with precision, driving relevance, engagement, and increased conversion.

capabilities.name: Extension & Customization
capabilities.headline: Unparalleled Extension & Customization
capabilities.shortDescription: Pimcore offers limitless extension and customization possibilities, empowering businesses to tailor every aspect of the platform to meet their unique challenges, thanks to its open-core architecture and flexible licensing.
capabilities.longDescription:
Pimcore stands out as a unique, future-proof platform that offers businesses complete control over their digital infrastructure. Unlike traditional SaaS solutions, which are often limited and rigid, Pimcore provides a fully customizable and extendable environment where every aspect of the platform can be tailored to meet specific needs and challenges. Whether it’s configuring the user interface, creating custom data management components, or integrating seamlessly with your existing systems, Pimcore’s open-core architecture and flexible full-ownership licensing ensure that there are no boundaries to what you can achieve.

Pimcore’s extensibility is backed by a robust SDK, which allows developers to create powerful extensions that enhance and expand the platform’s capabilities. The ability to enrich the user interface, add new features, or even create entirely new data management components means that businesses can shape Pimcore into a solution that perfectly fits their needs. Moreover, with powerful and well-documented APIs, as well as integration options through the Data Hub, webhooks, and workflow automation engines, Pimcore can be connected to your native infrastructure effortlessly, ensuring seamless operation across your digital ecosystem.

This composable approach makes Pimcore a true wonder in the realm of digital platforms, offering businesses the flexibility to innovate and grow without being shackled by the limitations of SaaS or legacy systems. Pimcore is designed to evolve with your business, making it the ultimate tool for tackling the real challenges of data and experience management, both now and in the future.

features.name: Customize UI
features.headline: Tailored User Interfaces with Pimcore Perspectives
features.shortDescription: Adapt Pimcore’s UI to individual user needs with Pimcore Perspectives. Customize the interface based on specific roles, tasks, and objectives, ensuring an optimized and focused user experience for every key user.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore Perspectives is a powerful feature that enhances the usability and efficiency of the Pimcore platform by allowing the entire user interface to be customized to suit the unique needs of each individual user. Recognizing that different users have different tasks, roles, and objectives within the platform, Pimcore Perspectives provides the flexibility to tailor the UI so that each user sees only the tools, data, and functionalities relevant to their specific responsibilities.

For instance, a content editor might require quick access to media assets, content templates, and publishing tools, while a data manager might prioritize data quality dashboards, import/export functions, and data modeling tools. With Pimcore Perspectives, the UI can be adjusted to display or hide certain elements based on these roles, making the platform more intuitive and less cluttered for each user.

This customization extends beyond merely organizing the UI; it allows for the creation of entirely different interfaces for different types of users. These perspectives can be easily switched between or assigned to users, ensuring that everyone in the organization can work in an environment optimized for their specific needs.

By providing a personalized and focused interface, Pimcore Perspectives not only improves user satisfaction but also boosts productivity by reducing the time spent navigating through irrelevant options. This feature is particularly beneficial in large organizations where multiple departments and roles interact with Pimcore, as it ensures that each user’s experience is streamlined and aligned with their daily tasks and long-term goals.
features.description: Pimcore Perspectives allows you to customize the entire UI to meet the specific needs of each user. By tailoring the interface based on roles, tasks, and objectives, this feature ensures that key users have access to the tools and information they need, without distraction. This personalized approach enhances productivity and user satisfaction, making Pimcore an even more powerful platform for data and experience management.

features.name: Composable and Modular Architecture
features.headline: Composable, Modular Architecture for Customizable E-Commerce
features.shortDescription: Built on a composable, modular architecture, Pimcore’s E-Commerce Framework provides flexible building blocks that allow businesses to create tailored B2B and B2C solutions, offering integration with Pimcore PIM and DXP for seamless product and content management.
features.longDescription: Pimcore’s E-Commerce Framework is engineered with a composable, modular architecture, enabling businesses to build highly customized e-commerce solutions that address specific requirements in B2B and B2C environments. Unlike standard, one-size-fits-all platforms, this architecture offers flexible, reusable building blocks that can be adapted, extended, or scaled according to unique business needs. The framework’s modularity allows for targeted enhancements, such as integrating custom components or third-party applications, while its native connectivity with Pimcore PIM and DXP ensures centralized management of product and content data across multiple channels. With API access, Pimcore supports headless commerce, providing businesses with the power to develop frontend experiences independently while maintaining a unified backend. This flexibility supports innovation and growth, allowing businesses to craft e-commerce experiences that are responsive, scalable, and fully aligned with their operational goals.
features.description: Pimcore’s Composable and Modular Architecture offers businesses a flexible framework to construct custom e-commerce solutions with reusable components, ideal for complex B2B and B2C requirements. With native integration with Pimcore PIM for product data and DXP for multi-channel engagement, businesses gain API-driven, headless commerce capabilities that extend across digital platforms, allowing for scalable, tailored customer experiences.

features.name: Multi Language UI
features.headline: Globalized Multi-Language UI
features.shortDescription: Empower your global teams with Pimcore’s Multi-Language UI. Easily translate the backend interface into over 20 languages, with support for additional custom translations and dynamic content localization.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore's Multi-Language UI feature is designed to support global businesses by offering a fully translatable backend interface, making it accessible to users in any language. Out of the box, Pimcore ships with support for over 20 languages, ensuring that the system is ready to be deployed in multilingual environments from day one. Beyond the pre-shipped languages, administrators can easily add additional translations to meet specific regional or business requirements, providing the flexibility needed to support diverse teams across the globe.

This feature extends beyond just static UI elements. It also allows for the translation of dynamic content, such as field labels, select values, data entry masks, and more. This ensures that every aspect of the user experience can be fully localized, making it easier for users to interact with the system in their native language and reducing the risk of misunderstandings or errors caused by language barriers.

By enabling the entire backend to be customized to fit the linguistic needs of your users, Pimcore’s Multi-Language UI not only enhances usability but also fosters greater inclusivity and collaboration within international teams. This comprehensive approach to localization helps businesses operate more effectively in global markets, ensuring that all users have access to the tools they need, in the language they understand best.
features.description: Pimcore’s Multi-Language UI feature enables seamless global operations by allowing the backend interface to be translated into any language needed. With more than 20 languages pre-shipped and the ability to add custom translations, this feature ensures that all users, regardless of their location, can interact with the system in their preferred language. Additionally, dynamic content such as field labels, select values, and data entry masks can also be translated, ensuring a fully localized experience.

features.name: Composable Commerce Implementation
features.headline: Composable Commerce for Tailored, Flexible E-Commerce Solutions
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s Composable Commerce Implementation provides a flexible, API-driven framework for creating advanced, custom e-commerce solutions that go beyond standard shopping carts, allowing modular deployment, integration, and full control over application design.
features.longDescription: Pimcore’s Composable Commerce Implementation provides businesses with a highly adaptable framework that allows for complete customization in e-commerce application design, moving beyond the limitations of a standard, out-of-the-box shopping cart. Its modular architecture offers businesses the ability to deploy only the components they need, tailor workflows, and integrate seamlessly with third-party systems. By taking an API-first approach, Pimcore enables headless commerce, allowing businesses to build their own unique frontend experiences while maintaining a centralized backend structure. This flexibility is ideal for businesses with complex B2B and B2C requirements, supporting custom development and scaling across digital and physical channels. With the freedom to create tailored, high-performance e-commerce experiences, Pimcore’s composable architecture allows businesses to meet specific customer needs, adapt to changing market conditions, and innovate rapidly, ensuring an e-commerce solution that is both dynamic and future-ready.
features.description: Built for businesses that need more than a one-size-fits-all e-commerce platform, Pimcore’s Composable Commerce Implementation offers a modular, API-first framework that supports advanced, custom e-commerce solutions. With flexible design, headless commerce capabilities, and seamless integration options, this framework empowers brands to build sophisticated B2B and B2C applications, adapt to complex requirements, and scale effortlessly across channels and devices.

features.name: API Driven Approach
features.headline: Fully API-Driven and Composable Platform
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s API-driven approach enables complete automation, customization, and extension of the platform. Leverage the Core API, GraphQL, and RESTful APIs for seamless data integration and workflow automation, making Pimcore highly adaptable and efficient.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s commitment to an API-driven architecture since 2009 has positioned it as one of the most flexible and adaptable platforms available for data and experience management. The API-driven approach means that every aspect of Pimcore can be controlled, automated, and extended through its Core API, offering businesses complete freedom to customize the platform according to their specific needs.

This API-driven flexibility extends to data integration and workflow automation, thanks to Pimcore’s support for GraphQL and RESTful APIs through the Data Hub. These APIs enable seamless data exchange between Pimcore and third-party systems, ensuring that businesses can integrate their existing tools and workflows with Pimcore effortlessly. Additionally, Pimcore’s Workflow Automation features allow businesses to automate complex processes, enhancing operational efficiency and reducing the need for manual intervention.

The platform’s extensive and well-organized documentation is a valuable resource for developers, providing clear guidance on how to leverage the API to extend and customize Pimcore. Whether you’re building custom modules, integrating new data sources, or developing complex automations, Pimcore’s API-driven approach ensures that you have the tools and knowledge to achieve your goals.

This approach not only makes Pimcore highly adaptable but also supports the creation of innovative, optimized workflows that can evolve alongside your business. By harnessing the power of Pimcore’s APIs, businesses can build a truly composable and future-proof digital ecosystem.
features.description: Since its inception, Pimcore has been fully API-driven, offering unparalleled flexibility and composability. Every aspect of the platform can be automated, customized, and extended using the Pimcore Core API. With additional support from GraphQL and RESTful APIs through the Data Hub, and powerful Workflow Automation features, Pimcore seamlessly integrates with third-party applications. This approach ensures that businesses can build efficient, innovative, and highly optimized workflows. Comprehensive documentation supports developers in adapting Pimcore to meet unique business needs with ease.

features.name: Complex Environments
features.headline: Support for Complex E-Commerce Environments and Large-Scale Operations
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s E-Commerce Framework supports complex e-commerce environments by integrating seamlessly with existing IT infrastructure, enabling personalized pricing, managing large product portfolios, and scaling effortlessly for high traffic and transactional demands.
features.longDescription: Pimcore’s Complex Environments feature is tailored for enterprises with sophisticated e-commerce needs, offering the ability to integrate seamlessly with multiple IT systems, such as ERPs, Order Management Systems (OMS), and CRMs, to create a unified and efficient operational ecosystem. Designed for companies handling extensive product portfolios and complex pricing structures, Pimcore enables personalized pricing, customer-specific catalogs, and advanced order workflows that align with diverse customer group requirements. The framework supports highly customizable checkout operations, accommodating unique transactional processes for B2B and B2C environments. Pimcore’s scalable architecture allows it to handle high traffic and large transaction volumes without compromising on performance, making it ideal for businesses aiming to grow and adapt to fluctuating demands. This flexibility empowers enterprises to manage their operations seamlessly, ensuring a high-quality, reliable customer experience across channels, regardless of market complexity or scale.
features.description: Pimcore’s Complex Environments feature provides businesses with the flexibility to handle intricate e-commerce requirements, including integration with multiple ERPs, CRMs, and OMS systems. With capabilities for advanced product data modeling, personalized pricing, and robust checkout operations, this feature is designed for enterprises managing large, diverse product portfolios and customer groups. Pimcore scales reliably to support high-traffic events, ensuring a seamless, high-performance experience across all channels as businesses grow.

features.name: Custom Modules & Extensions
features.headline: Unparalleled Flexibility with Custom Modules & Extensions
features.shortDescription: Unlock limitless customization with Pimcore’s support for custom modules and extensions. Modify any aspect of the platform—from UI to data types—tailored to your industry or needs, and share your innovations across Pimcore instances or in the Marketplace.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore's Custom Modules & Extensions feature sets it apart as one of the most flexible and powerful platforms available for data and experience management. Unlike traditional SaaS applications that come with a fixed set of functionalities, Pimcore is built to be fully adaptable. Every aspect of the platform can be customized, modified, or extended to meet the unique needs of any customer or industry, making it a truly bespoke solution.

With Pimcore, you can create custom modules that add new functionalities, modify the user interface to better align with your workflow, introduce new data types specific to your business, or even integrate new data sources into the Pimcore Data Hub. Additionally, you can develop new actions for the Pimcore Copilot, enhancing its capabilities to suit your specific automation and AI needs. All these modifications and extensions are made possible through the robust Pimcore Core API, which provides developers with the tools they need to build highly customized and innovative solutions.

What’s more, these custom modules and extensions aren’t limited to a single instance of Pimcore. You can bundle them and share them across different Pimcore instances within your organization, ensuring consistency and efficiency in your digital operations. Additionally, you can publish these innovations in the Pimcore Marketplace, contributing to the community and benefiting from the collective expertise of other developers.

Pimcore’s Custom Modules & Extensions provide businesses with the freedom to create a platform that evolves with their needs, making it an ideal solution for companies that require a scalable, adaptable, and future-proof digital infrastructure.
features.description: Pimcore is far from a traditional SaaS application with rigid functionalities. Its powerful architecture allows you to modify and extend any aspect of the platform to suit your specific requirements. Whether you need custom modules, new UI elements, additional data types, or unique data integrations, Pimcore’s Core API makes it possible. Create bespoke solutions, bundle them for reuse, and even share them across different Pimcore instances or publish them in the Pimcore Marketplace, providing unparalleled flexibility and extensibility for data and experience management.

features.name: Brandable Admin UI
features.headline: Whitelabel Pimcore to Match Your Brand
features.shortDescription: Transform Pimcore into your own branded platform by customizing the UI appearance, colors, logos, icons, and login screen. Perfect for OEM scenarios, combine with custom modules and extensions to create a tailored data and experience management solution.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s Whitelabeling feature provides businesses with the tools to transform the platform into a fully branded environment that aligns perfectly with their corporate identity. Whether you're an enterprise looking to maintain brand consistency across all digital touchpoints or an OEM provider aiming to offer a branded platform to your clients, this feature enables you to customize every visual aspect of Pimcore’s UI.

You can start by adapting the platform’s color scheme to match your brand’s palette, ensuring that every interaction within Pimcore reflects your company’s style. Logos and icons can be replaced with your own, creating a more cohesive and professional appearance that reinforces brand recognition. Additionally, you can customize the login screen to provide a welcoming and branded entry point for users, enhancing the overall user experience from the moment they sign in.

Whitelabeling goes beyond just visual customization. Combined with Pimcore’s Custom Modules & Extensions, you can not only tailor the look and feel of the platform but also extend its functionality to meet specific business needs. This makes Pimcore an ideal solution for OEM scenarios where offering a unique, branded platform is essential. By fully whitelabeling and customizing Pimcore, businesses can create a powerful, individualized data and experience management solution that stands out in the market.
features.description: Pimcore’s Whitelabeling feature allows you to fully adapt the platform’s UI to match your corporate identity. Customize colors, logos, icons, and even the login screen to align with your brand. This feature is ideal for OEM scenarios, where creating a seamless, branded experience is key. Further enhance the platform by integrating custom modules and extensions, turning Pimcore into a fully bespoke solution for data and experience management.

features.name: Event System
features.headline: Powerful UI Event System for Smart Extensions
features.shortDescription: Enhance and customize Pimcore’s UI with its robust Event System. Listen to and act on a wide range of interface events, enabling sophisticated integrations, custom functionality, and smart automations.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore's UI Event System is a cornerstone feature for those looking to leverage the platform’s extensibility to its fullest potential. This system enables developers to listen to and react to nearly all operations within the Pimcore interface, making it possible to extend and customize the platform to meet specific business needs. Whether you need to modify how content is managed, alter workflows, or respond to various user interactions within the interface, the UI Event System provides a powerful mechanism for injecting custom logic and functionality.

When Pimcore fires events during key operations, such as content modifications or workflow changes, these events can be captured by custom modules, third-party applications, or extensions. This flexibility allows developers to adapt the behavior of Pimcore dynamically, ensuring that the platform works in harmony with other systems and processes.

Additionally, this Event System is deeply integrated with Pimcore’s Copilot, the Workflow automation engine, and the workflow engine, enabling the creation of sophisticated and intelligent integrations. For example, you can automatically trigger custom workflows based on specific UI interactions or enhance the user experience by injecting real-time responses to user actions. These capabilities not only enhance the usability of Pimcore but also open up a world of possibilities for building smart, automated solutions that drive efficiency and innovation.
features.description: Pimcore’s UI Event System empowers developers to extend and customize almost every aspect of the Pimcore interface. By firing events during content modifications, workflow changes, and other UI interactions, this system allows custom modules, third-party applications, and extensions to listen and react, adapting Pimcore’s behavior or triggering custom functionality. Seamlessly integrate with Pimcore Copilot, Workflow automation, and the workflow engine to create advanced, intelligent automations and integrations.

capabilities.name: Flexible Business Models
capabilities.headline: Adaptable E-Commerce for Any Business Model
capabilities.shortDescription: Pimcore’s E-Commerce Framework offers modular, composable components that support a wide range of business models, from B2C to Marketplace and Subscription models. This flexible, fully customizable framework empowers businesses to create complex e-commerce solutions tailored precisely to their unique needs.
capabilities.longDescription: The Pimcore E-Commerce Framework empowers businesses to design and build highly tailored e-commerce platforms that align with any business model, including B2C, B2B, C2C, D2C, dropshipping, subscription-based, white-label, private-label, marketplace, affiliate marketing, and freemium models. Rather than an out-of-the-box storefront, this framework provides composable, flexible components that can be customized and programmed to meet specific business requirements, creating seamless integration with backend systems and supporting advanced features. This adaptability allows organizations to respond to evolving market demands, launch innovative business models, and manage complex transactions with full control over every aspect of the customer experience. Pimcore’s approach ensures that companies can build robust, scalable e-commerce ecosystems that drive growth and meet the unique challenges of today’s digital landscape.

features.name: Business Model Scalability
features.headline: Scalable E-Commerce Framework for Any Business Model
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s E-Commerce Framework provides businesses with a scalable, flexible solution to support diverse business models, including marketplaces, subscription-based commerce, B2B2X, and high-volume e-commerce, accommodating complex product configurations, pricing, and checkout flows.
features.longDescription: Designed to meet the demands of fast-growing digital businesses, the Pimcore E-Commerce Framework offers unmatched scalability for diverse business models. Its architecture accommodates digital marketplaces, subscription services, B2B2X commerce, and industry-specific e-commerce needs, providing businesses the flexibility to tailor product configurations and pricing while managing complex checkout scenarios. Additionally, it supports high-volume e-commerce, ensuring robust performance under heavy traffic. The framework’s customizable nature enables businesses to integrate sophisticated CPQ (Configure, Price, Quote) capabilities, offering customers personalized configurations and pricing options. Whether managing configurable products in a B2B environment, handling subscription renewals, or delivering a seamless marketplace experience, Pimcore’s scalable, high-performance e-commerce framework is built to adapt as business needs grow, making it a powerful solution for enterprises aiming for sustained digital growth.
features.description: The Pimcore E-Commerce Framework is built for scale, allowing businesses to expand across various models—whether digital marketplaces, subscription commerce, or B2B2X environments. It provides flexible support for industry-specific needs, configurable products, complex pricing, and tailored checkout options. This framework is ideal for companies needing a composable, high-performance platform that can handle high traffic and transaction volumes while offering extensive configurability for unique e-commerce scenarios.

features.name: Comprehensive B2B Functionality
features.headline: Powerful B2B E-Commerce Capabilities for Complex Needs
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s E-Commerce Framework offers robust B2B functionalities, including advanced pricing, multi-account management, CPQ, and complex order management, delivering a comprehensive platform tailored to the demands of sophisticated B2B commerce.
features.longDescription: The Pimcore E-Commerce Framework provides a comprehensive toolkit for B2B e-commerce, addressing the unique requirements of complex B2B sales and procurement workflows. With advanced pricing and discount management, businesses can implement flexible pricing structures and contract-based discounts that cater to specific customer segments. Multi-account management with role-based access ensures that each user in the customer organization has the right level of access, enabling streamlined account management for complex purchasing teams. Pimcore’s robust CPQ and configurator tools allow customers to explore and customize products, while product finders enhance discoverability. The framework also supports sophisticated order management, quick ordering/reordering options, and the ability to manage extensive price lists, making it an ideal solution for industries requiring detailed and tailored e-commerce experiences. With punch-out integration, Pimcore further simplifies corporate purchasing, creating a unified, efficient B2B e-commerce environment that fosters loyalty and enhances procurement efficiency.
features.description: Designed for the complexities of B2B e-commerce, the Pimcore E-Commerce Framework delivers a suite of advanced features such as configurable pricing, multi-account access with role-based permissions, and powerful CPQ (Configure, Price, Quote) tools. With capabilities like complex order management, punch-out support, quick reordering, and price list management, Pimcore enables businesses to create tailored, efficient purchasing experiences for B2B customers, empowering sales teams and streamlining procurement processes across all touchpoints.

features.name: Support for B2B2C and B2B2B Models
features.headline: End-to-End Support for B2B2C and B2B2B Models
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s E-Commerce Framework offers extensive support for B2B2C and B2B2B models, with customizable partner portals, dashboards, and marketplace integration to streamline complex, multi-layered business networks.
features.longDescription: The Pimcore E-Commerce Framework offers robust, end-to-end support for complex B2B2C and B2B2B models, equipping businesses with the tools needed to manage extended business networks effectively. By facilitating seamless integration for multi-layered networks, Pimcore enables organizations to build and manage partner-specific portals and dashboards that cater to unique partner and distributor requirements. These customizable portals provide tailored access to product information, pricing, and order management tools, fostering greater transparency and enhancing partner relationships. Additionally, Pimcore’s integrated marketplace functionality allows businesses to create and manage marketplace environments, empowering partners to reach customers directly while maintaining brand consistency. This composable, flexible solution enables businesses to scale their reach, streamline complex partner interactions, and ensure that every touchpoint in the business network operates with synchronized, up-to-date data, resulting in an optimized, cohesive e-commerce experience for end customers and partners alike.
features.description: Pimcore’s E-Commerce Framework is built to support intricate B2B2C and B2B2B commerce models, providing seamless integration for extended business networks. The platform enables the creation of custom partner portals and dashboards, ensuring each partner or distributor has access to tailored features and data insights. With integrated marketplace capabilities, Pimcore empowers businesses to deliver a unified, consistent e-commerce experience across all touchpoints within their partner ecosystems, optimizing collaboration and enhancing customer satisfaction.

features.name: Any Business Model
features.headline: Versatile E-Commerce for Any Business Model or Industry
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s E-Commerce Framework adapts to any business model and industry, integrating with backend systems (ERP, CRM, CPQ, PLM) and supporting complex B2B, B2C, and marketplace needs through customizable, composable e-commerce capabilities.
features.longDescription: The Pimcore E-Commerce Framework is a fully customizable and adaptable solution built to accommodate any business model and industry, making it far more than a typical out-of-the-box platform. It is highly compatible with complex, transactional operations, including B2B, B2C, D2C, digital subscriptions, and marketplaces, supporting an array of e-commerce and checkout processes to meet specific customer needs. Pimcore’s open, composable architecture connects easily to essential backend systems such as ERP, CRM, CPQ, and PLM, ensuring seamless data integration and streamlined operations across the entire organization. This flexibility enables businesses to execute industry-specific data modeling and implement tailored e-commerce experiences, whether for digital products, physical goods, or service-based transactions. The Pimcore E-Commerce Framework is designed to be as adaptable as it is robust, making it a fit for sophisticated commerce requirements across industries without the rigid limitations of typical e-commerce solutions.
features.description: The Pimcore E-Commerce Framework is designed for ultimate flexibility, supporting any business model, from B2C and B2B to D2C, digital subscriptions, and marketplaces. Its open architecture integrates seamlessly with backend systems like ERP, CRM, CPQ, and PLM, ensuring consistent data flow and operational efficiency. Built to support complex B2B transactions as well as traditional B2C e-commerce, it enables precise data modeling for any industry and is 100% customizable. Far from an out-of-the-box storefront, Pimcore’s composable framework empowers businesses to create tailored e-commerce solutions that fit their unique requirements and industry standards.

features.name: Multi Shop & Multi Tenant
features.headline: Multi-Shop & Multi-Tenant Support for Scalable B2B and B2C E-Commerce
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s Multi-Shop & Multi-Tenant feature enables businesses to create and manage multiple B2B and B2C storefronts within a single system, each with unique product catalogs, customer bases, and operational processes for tailored, scalable e-commerce.
features.longDescription: Pimcore’s Multi-Shop & Multi-Tenant feature provides businesses with a robust solution to set up and manage multiple B2B and B2C storefronts from a single system, allowing for comprehensive control over different market segments and regions. Each storefront can be fully customized with its own product catalog, tailored to specific customer needs and regulatory requirements, as well as distinct customer groups and order workflows to reflect local market practices. This flexible structure allows brands to efficiently address varied customer expectations while streamlining administrative efforts and scaling effortlessly. By centralizing the management of multiple shops, businesses benefit from a cohesive backend and data structure that supports individualized storefront experiences. Ideal for multi-market or multinational enterprises, Pimcore’s multi-tenant approach combines the convenience of central control with the adaptability needed to provide localized, engaging, and market-specific experiences across all stores, enhancing both efficiency and customer satisfaction.
features.description: With Pimcore’s Multi-Shop & Multi-Tenant support, businesses can efficiently manage several B2B and B2C shops within one platform, customizing each storefront with individual product catalogs, customer groups, and order processes. This capability simplifies handling diverse markets and segments while maintaining centralized control, making it ideal for global brands and multi-market businesses looking to scale and personalize their e-commerce strategy.

capabilities.name: Product & Catalog Management
capabilities.headline: Comprehensive Product & Catalog Management
capabilities.shortDescription: Pimcore’s E-Commerce Framework provides a versatile catalog management system, supporting multiple catalogs tailored for channels, regions, or customer segments. Using a centralized approach, it ensures consistent, engaging product information across all platforms, simplifying multi-channel management and enhancing the shopping experience.
capabilities.longDescription:
Pimcore’s Product & Catalog Management capability in the E-Commerce Framework allows businesses to organize, manage, and distribute product catalogs with unprecedented flexibility and efficiency. Supporting multiple catalogs, this feature enables companies to configure catalogs tailored to specific channels, customer segments, and regions, all from a centralized repository. By maintaining a single-source publishing paradigm, businesses can ensure data consistency across catalogs, reducing redundancy and minimizing manual effort. Advanced data models underpin the framework, offering extensive configurability and support for varied product types, enabling organizations to manage intricate relationships and data structures across their catalogs.

With structured catalog organization, businesses can segment products based on customer needs or market demands, ensuring that every digital touchpoint presents optimized, accurate, and compelling information. This capability also incorporates multi-lingual and multi-regional support, making it ideal for global enterprises. Combined with robust media management from Pimcore’s DAM integration, the product catalog remains visually cohesive and enriched with high-quality media assets. Overall, Pimcore’s Product & Catalog Management improves operational efficiency, provides customers with consistent product information, and enhances the overall shopping experience.

features.name: Different Product Types
features.headline: Flexible Product Type Management for Diverse Portfolios
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s E-Commerce Framework offers unmatched product type flexibility, supporting simple, configured, assembled, and customized products across mixed portfolios—including physical, digital, and service-based items—making it ideal for subscription and marketplace models.
features.longDescription: The Pimcore E-Commerce Framework provides businesses with advanced product type flexibility, allowing seamless management of mixed product portfolios that can include simple, assembled, configured, and highly customized items. Leveraging Pimcore’s powerful product data modeling engine, companies can efficiently handle diverse portfolios featuring physical goods, digital products, and service offerings, making it ideal for complex operations such as subscriptions and marketplaces. This flexibility empowers businesses to configure complex product relationships, tailor customer-specific configurations, and manage evolving product types across all e-commerce channels. Pimcore’s structured, adaptive approach ensures that businesses can scale their offerings, integrate subscription models, and easily handle the complexities of marketplace operations, providing customers with cohesive, personalized shopping experiences that align with unique purchasing needs and preferences.
features.description: With Pimcore’s advanced product data modeling engine, businesses can manage a diverse range of product types, from simple to highly customized, supporting complex portfolios that include physical products, digital goods, and services. This flexible structure is designed to accommodate subscription models and marketplace operations, providing a scalable solution for businesses with varied and dynamic product offerings.

features.name: Product Catalog Management
features.headline: Flexible and Multi-Channel Product Catalog Management
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s E-Commerce Framework offers advanced product catalog management, enabling businesses to organize, customize, and publish multiple catalogs across various channels from a single source, ensuring consistency and streamlined operations.
features.longDescription: Pimcore’s E-Commerce Framework empowers businesses to manage product catalogs with unparalleled flexibility and precision, supporting multiple catalogs that can be customized for different channels, customer segments, or regions. Using a single-source publishing paradigm, companies can maintain a centralized product information repository, ensuring consistency and reducing redundancy across all catalogs. This approach allows businesses to easily configure catalogs for specific digital touchpoints, streamline updates, and tailor product presentations to meet the unique needs of each channel. With capabilities for structured catalog organization, efficient data updates, and consistent branding across all platforms, Pimcore’s catalog management solution simplifies the complexities of multi-channel commerce. This centralization improves operational efficiency and provides customers with accurate, engaging product information, ultimately enhancing their shopping experience.
features.description: With Pimcore’s robust product catalog management capabilities, businesses can efficiently organize and present products for multiple channels using a single-source publishing approach. This flexible management system allows for customized catalogs tailored to specific channels, regions, or customer segments, ensuring consistent and optimized product data distribution that enhances visibility and customer engagement.

features.name: Media Management
features.headline: Integrated Media Management for E-Commerce
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s E-Commerce Framework integrates powerful DAM capabilities, allowing seamless media management across all commerce touchpoints to deliver engaging, consistent digital experiences.
features.longDescription: Pimcore’s E-Commerce Framework offers comprehensive media management by integrating all functionalities from Pimcore’s advanced Digital Asset Management (DAM) system. This seamless integration allows businesses to organize, edit, and deploy rich media assets—such as product images, instructional videos, and 3D visualizations—across all commerce channels effortlessly. Through centralized media storage, powerful tagging, and version control, Pimcore ensures that each asset is optimized and readily available for every touchpoint, enhancing the consistency and quality of digital experiences. The DAM integration also supports automated media transformations and workflows, so businesses can customize media formats and resolutions for different devices or regional needs without additional manual steps. Pimcore’s robust media management empowers e-commerce teams to provide visually cohesive, brand-aligned experiences that boost customer engagement and convey product value effectively.
features.description: With full access to Pimcore’s Digital Asset Management (DAM) functionalities, the E-Commerce Framework enables businesses to manage, optimize, and deploy rich media assets directly within their commerce platform. This integration ensures that high-quality product images, videos, and other media are readily available and optimized for consistent, engaging customer experiences across all channels.

features.name: Powerful and Flexible Data Model
features.headline: Unleash the Full Potential of Your Data
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s powerful and flexible data models allow you to manage and relate any entity across PIM, MDM, DAM, CDP, DXP, and E-Commerce. With advanced data types like object bricks, field collections, and key-value stores, you can create scalable, multi-lingual models that bridge data and experience management for any domain or industry.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s Powerful and Flexible Data Models are at the heart of its platform, providing unparalleled versatility in managing and relating data across various domains, including PIM, MDM, DAM, CDP, DXP, and E-Commerce. These models are not limited to products and categories but can encompass any entity, making them applicable to a wide range of industries and use cases.

What sets Pimcore apart is its ability to bridge data management with experience management, allowing for a seamless flow of information that supports both backend data operations and frontend user experiences. This is achieved through the use of advanced data types, such as object bricks, field collections, and key-value stores, which offer maximum flexibility in how data is structured and managed. These data types allow you to customize models to fit your specific needs, ensuring that your data infrastructure can grow and adapt as your business evolves.

Moreover, Pimcore’s data models are inherently multi-lingual, making them suitable for global enterprises that require content and data management in multiple languages. The platform supports more than 45 different data types, including relational and multi-medial types, which means that you can build complex, interrelated models that incorporate everything from text and numbers to images, videos, and documents.

As your data needs grow, so too can your data models. Pimcore’s scalable architecture ensures that your models can expand over time, accommodating new entities, relationships, and data types without compromising performance. This flexibility is crucial for businesses that need to stay agile and responsive to changing market demands.
features.description: Pimcore’s Powerful and Flexible Data Models enable you to manage and relate any entity, whether it’s products, categories, or other forms of data across PIM, MDM, DAM, CDP, DXP, and E-Commerce. These models bridge the gap between data and experience management, allowing for seamless integration and interaction. Advanced data types, such as object bricks, field collections, and key-value stores, provide maximum flexibility, while multi-lingual support ensures global usability. With more than 45 different data types, including relational and multi-medial types, these models can scale and evolve over time, making them suitable for any domain or industry.

features.name: Hierarchy and Catalog Management
features.headline: Flexible Hierarchy & Catalog Management
features.shortDescription: Pimcore's Hierarchy and Catalog Management feature allows you to create multiple, complex category and product hierarchies, and manage multiple catalogs effortlessly. This flexibility reduces data maintenance efforts and ensures consistent data inheritance across all output channels.
features.longDescription:
Pimcore’s Hierarchy and Catalog Management in PIM and MDM offers a highly flexible solution for organizing and managing your product and category data. This feature enables the creation of multiple additional category and product hierarchies through the use of relation attributes, allowing you to customize structures that meet the specific needs of various output channels. With no restrictions on hierarchy depth, you can build intricate networks of categories that reflect the complexity of your product offerings. Furthermore, it supports the management of multiple catalogs, ensuring that each one can be tailored to different markets, channels, or user groups.

The system’s main taxonomy serves as the backbone for data inheritance, allowing attribute values to be passed down through hierarchies automatically. This minimizes the need for repetitive data entry and reduces the overall effort required for data maintenance. By centralizing and streamlining these processes, you achieve greater data consistency and accuracy across all platforms, leading to more efficient PIM and MDM operations. Whether you are managing a global product portfolio or simply organizing complex product data, Pimcore’s Hierarchy and Catalog Management feature provides the tools you need to maintain control and flexibility.
features.description: Pimcore’s Hierarchy and Catalog Management feature empowers you to define multiple, complex category and product hierarchies using relation attributes, with no limits on hierarchy depth. You can manage multiple catalogs and tailor different hierarchies or category trees for each output channel, all while maintaining one main taxonomy for seamless data inheritance. This capability significantly reduces data maintenance efforts and ensures consistency across all platforms, enabling efficient product information management (PIM) and master data management (MDM).

capabilities.name: Product Listing & Presentation
capabilities.headline: Flexible Product Listing and Enhanced Presentation
capabilities.shortDescription: Pimcore’s E-Commerce Framework delivers advanced, customizable product listing and presentation capabilities. Featuring powerful search, AI-driven personalization, and seamless DXP integration, it empowers businesses to create tailored, immersive shopping experiences across devices and channels.
capabilities.longDescription:
Pimcore’s Product Listing & Presentation capability redefines the way businesses showcase products across digital platforms. Leveraging Pimcore’s powerful e-commerce and DXP integration, this feature supports flexible and engaging product listings, blending advanced product discovery, tailored layouts, and immersive storytelling. Search and filtering tools include full-text and attribute-based search, personalized recommendations, and guided navigation, allowing customers to find products effortlessly.
