The content-commerce fusion enables businesses to tell impactful product stories, creating landing pages and product detail pages that seamlessly combine visuals, marketing, and commerce elements.

The customizable catalog presentation layer enables businesses to design unique layouts and functionalities for web, POS, print, and more, with headless integration for personalized, context-sensitive experiences. Additionally, 2D, 3D, and AR product configurators offer interactive customization, while multi-device compatibility ensures consistent experiences across mobile, POS, and IoT devices. By personalizing and enhancing product discovery, Pimcore empowers brands to engage customers effectively, driving satisfaction and conversions across all digital touchpoints.

features.name: Product Catalog Presentation
features.headline: Customizable, Multi-Channel Product Catalog Presentation
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s E-Commerce Framework offers a fully customizable product catalog presentation layer, leveraging Pimcore DXP for flexible design, layout, and functionality across web, POS, and print, with seamless integration options for headless delivery and personalized customer experiences.
features.longDescription: The Pimcore E-Commerce Framework’s Product Catalog Presentation feature provides businesses with a versatile and fully customizable solution for displaying product information across multiple channels. Leveraging the power of Pimcore DXP, this feature allows companies to design unique layouts and functionalities for product listings, detail pages, and category navigation with advanced filtering and search options. Businesses can embed product catalogs into any digital experience using Pimcore’s renderlets, enabling consistent presentation across websites, apps, and in-store displays. Additionally, this feature supports headless delivery, allowing companies to distribute product data to any channel, including print catalogs, POS systems, and digital signage. With capabilities for personalizing catalog views based on customer preferences and behaviors, Pimcore ensures a cohesive, engaging shopping experience that maintains brand identity across every channel.
features.description: With complete customization capabilities for product listings, detail pages, and category navigation, Pimcore’s product catalog presentation layer utilizes DXP features to deliver engaging, multi-channel shopping experiences. This feature allows businesses to personalize and embed product content across web, print, and in-store displays, ensuring consistent, tailored product information across all touchpoints and a seamless, dynamic shopping experience for customers.

features.name: Content Commerce
features.headline: Seamless Content Commerce for Powerful Customer Experiences
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s Content Commerce feature combines e-commerce and DXP capabilities, enabling businesses to tell compelling product stories by seamlessly blending content and commerce across channels for an immersive, customer-centric experience.
features.longDescription: Pimcore’s Content Commerce feature allows businesses to build unforgettable shopping experiences by blending storytelling with commerce, leveraging the strengths of Pimcore’s integrated DXP and e-commerce capabilities. By combining rich content with product information, businesses can create visually compelling, narrative-driven pages that captivate customers, allowing products to become part of a broader story that enhances engagement and drives conversions. With the ability to embed product content on any DXP page, Pimcore enables “commerce everywhere”—making products shoppable across touchpoints like blogs, landing pages, and lifestyle pages. This seamless integration ensures that content and commerce work together to provide a cohesive, brand-aligned experience, improving the customer journey from discovery to purchase. For brands focused on a unique, customer-first approach, Pimcore’s Content Commerce feature turns every interaction into a meaningful, memorable encounter that maximizes engagement and fosters loyalty.
features.description: Pimcore’s E-Commerce Framework and DXP integration empowers businesses to elevate customer engagement by merging content and commerce into a unified experience. With Content Commerce, brands can tell product stories, embed product content anywhere, and deliver commerce-ready touchpoints across channels, creating an impactful, cohesive shopping journey that goes beyond traditional product listings.

features.name: Search and Filter of Products
features.headline: Advanced Search and Filtering for Precision and Personalization
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s E-Commerce Framework offers flexible, robust search and filtering capabilities—including full-text, fuzzy, and personalized search with autocomplete and attribute-based filters—to enhance product discovery and create a seamless shopping experience across channels.
features.longDescription: The Pimcore E-Commerce Framework provides a powerful and flexible search and filtering system that optimizes product discovery and personalizes the shopping experience. Supporting a variety of search indices, including OpenSearch and Elastic Search, Pimcore allows businesses to choose the best option for their needs, while integration with leading providers like Algolia, Factfinder, and Azure Cognitive offers additional flexibility. With advanced features such as full-text and fuzzy search, dynamic ranking, and autocomplete, Pimcore’s search functionalities make it easy for customers to find precisely what they’re looking for, even in large or complex catalogs. Attribute-based filters and guided navigation enhance the search experience by allowing customers to refine results according to specific criteria, while personalized search results provide a tailored experience that aligns with individual preferences and behaviors. This comprehensive approach ensures that customers experience a smooth, relevant journey, enhancing engagement and conversion rates.
features.description: Pimcore’s advanced search and filtering functionality leverages flexible search indices (OpenSearch, Elastic Search) and integrates with leading search providers (Algolia, Factfinder, Azure Cognitive) to deliver highly customizable search experiences. With options like full-text and fuzzy search, dynamic ranking, guided navigation, and personalized results, customers can find relevant products quickly and accurately, improving engagement and satisfaction.

features.name: Landingpage generator
features.headline: Dynamic Landing Page Generator for Content-Driven Commerce
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s Landing Page Generator empowers businesses to create custom, product-driven landing pages that blend content and commerce seamlessly, using Pimcore Copilot to automate page creation for a compelling, story-based shopping experience.
features.longDescription: The Landing Page Generator within Pimcore’s E-Commerce Framework allows businesses to create highly customized, commerce-ready landing pages that combine storytelling with product listings, leveraging Pimcore’s unique ability to integrate content and commerce within a unified digital experience platform. By seamlessly connecting product data to engaging content, businesses can craft targeted, story-driven landing pages that capture customer attention and drive conversions. With the power of Pimcore Copilot, landing page creation can be automated, streamlining the process and enabling rapid deployment for marketing campaigns or seasonal promotions. These pages support listings, filters, and direct links to product detail pages, ensuring that customers can navigate smoothly from content to checkout. Pimcore’s Landing Page Generator equips businesses with the flexibility to create immersive, on-brand experiences that enhance customer engagement across all digital touchpoints.
features.description: Pimcore’s Landing Page Generator enables businesses to quickly design impactful, content-rich landing pages that integrate product listings, filters, and direct links to commerce actions. With the support of Pimcore Copilot, landing pages can be automatically generated, helping brands deliver engaging, customer-centric experiences that combine storytelling and product discovery in a single platform.

features.name: Product Detail Pages
features.headline: Fully Customizable Product Detail Pages for Unique Experiences
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s Product Detail Pages combine DXP and e-commerce capabilities, enabling businesses to create highly customizable, content-rich product pages that seamlessly integrate marketing and sales elements for a tailored shopping experience.
features.longDescription: With Pimcore’s Product Detail Pages, businesses can fully customize the presentation of each product by blending digital experience management (DXP) with e-commerce capabilities, offering a powerful alternative to traditional, template-based storefronts. Using Pimcore’s DXP features, companies can embed product details on any page type—whether for storytelling, promotional landing pages, or educational content—bridging the gap between content and commerce for a more engaging shopping experience. This flexible, template-free approach allows businesses to create tailored layouts, integrate dynamic marketing elements, and personalize pages based on product type, category, or even specific attributes. By embedding high-quality media, descriptions, cross-sells, and customer reviews, brands can deliver an enriched, cohesive product experience across channels that resonates with their audience. Pimcore’s Product Detail Pages empower businesses to create sophisticated, conversion-focused pages that align with their unique brand identity and adapt to evolving e-commerce strategies.
features.description: Pimcore’s Product Detail Pages go beyond traditional storefronts by merging content and commerce, allowing businesses to design unique layouts, embed product information across any page, and customize each product page with marketing content tailored to specific products and attributes. This flexibility enables brands to build fully personalized, dynamic product pages that align with business goals and customer needs, without relying on restrictive templates.

features.name: Personalized and Contextual Shopping Experiences
features.headline: Personalized, Contextual Shopping for Enhanced Engagement
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s E-Commerce Framework empowers businesses to deliver personalized, context-sensitive shopping experiences through deep integration with DXP, CDP, and AI/ML tools, supporting custom and third-party personalization solutions for a dynamic, customer-centric journey.
features.longDescription: The Personalized and Contextual Shopping Experiences feature in Pimcore’s E-Commerce Framework equips businesses with the tools needed to deliver highly customized, adaptive shopping journeys. Leveraging Pimcore’s DXP and CDP integration, businesses can capture, analyze, and respond to customer data in real-time, creating shopping experiences that feel truly tailored. Advanced AI/ML algorithms enable assisted shopping, offering product recommendations, relevant promotions, and intuitive navigation based on individual behaviors and preferences. This feature also allows for integration with third-party personalization tools, giving businesses flexibility to implement specific e-commerce personalization software alongside or in place of Pimcore’s built-in capabilities. By uniting content, commerce, and customer insights, Pimcore’s framework ensures that each interaction is relevant, engaging, and aligned with the customer’s context and needs, supporting a seamless shopping experience that increases loyalty and drives higher conversion rates.
features.description: Pimcore’s E-Commerce Framework offers flexible, composable components to create personalized and context-aware shopping experiences that respond to each customer’s unique preferences and behaviors. Through integration with Pimcore’s DXP, CDP, and AI-powered assisted shopping, businesses can tailor interactions in real-time, with options to incorporate third-party personalization software for fully customized customer journeys that drive engagement and conversions.

features.name: Exploded Drawings
features.headline: Interactive Exploded Drawings for In-Media Commerce
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s Exploded Drawings feature enables businesses to tag and specify individual parts within complex images, allowing customers to shop for spare parts directly from interactive drawings, supporting a seamless in-media commerce experience.
features.longDescription: With Pimcore’s Exploded Drawings feature, businesses can bring in-media commerce to life by tagging and specifying individual parts within detailed product drawings, enabling customers to shop directly from interactive images. Using Pimcore’s powerful image data modeling, each component within an exploded view can be individually labeled, described, and linked to relevant product information, allowing users to zoom into specific parts, check compatibility, and add items to their cart instantly. This capability not only simplifies the process of finding and purchasing spare parts but also transforms complex images and videos into functional, commerce-driven assets that enhance the customer experience. By enabling in-media commerce within visual content, Pimcore allows customers to engage deeply with products, making it easy to purchase precisely what they need with a few clicks, whether for maintenance, replacement, or custom configurations. This feature creates a highly interactive shopping experience, encouraging conversions by turning visual exploration into actionable purchases directly within the media context.
features.description: Pimcore’s advanced image data modeling allows businesses to create exploded drawings with individually tagged and specified parts, transforming visual content into an interactive, shoppable experience. This feature enables contextual in-media commerce by letting customers shop directly from images, identifying and purchasing parts within exploded diagrams or product visuals, enhancing convenience and engagement for detailed product navigation.

features.name: Multi-device support
features.headline: Multi-Device E-Commerce for Seamless Shopping Everywhere
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s E-Commerce Framework supports multi-device e-commerce experiences, offering optimized templates and apps for mobile, POS, digital signage, AR glasses, and more, ensuring smooth, consistent engagement across all internet-connected devices.
features.longDescription: Pimcore’s Multi-Device Support feature empowers businesses to reach customers wherever they are, with e-commerce templates and applications designed to adapt to a wide range of devices. From mobile-optimized sites and PWA-powered apps to in-store digital signage at the POS, Pimcore ensures that product information, ordering, and personalized interactions are available on any screen. This flexibility extends to special interest B2B applications and even custom devices like AR glasses and smartwatches, making Pimcore a versatile solution for businesses aiming to provide a connected, accessible shopping experience. Each device is optimized to maintain brand consistency and enhance usability, ensuring customers enjoy smooth navigation, responsive design, and real-time data regardless of how they engage with the platform. By supporting e-commerce on diverse devices, Pimcore allows businesses to stay agile and customer-centric, meeting expectations across all digital and in-store channels for a truly unified shopping experience.
features.description: Pimcore’s Multi-Device Support feature enables businesses to deliver e-commerce experiences optimized for any device, including mobile, in-store digital signage, PWA-powered apps, and custom hardware like AR glasses or smartwatches. This flexible approach ensures a cohesive, responsive shopping experience, allowing customers to interact with products seamlessly across any touchpoint, whether in-store or on the go.

features.name: Advanced Product Discovery
features.headline: Enhanced Product Discovery for Personalized Shopping
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s Advanced Product Discovery feature offers powerful search, filtering, and guided navigation capabilities, along with AI-driven recommendations and personalization, to deliver a highly engaging, tailored shopping experience.
features.longDescription: Pimcore’s Advanced Product Discovery feature is designed to transform the shopping experience by providing customers with intuitive, powerful tools to locate products quickly and accurately. Featuring robust search capabilities, advanced filters, and guided navigation, this feature simplifies and personalizes the discovery journey. AI and machine learning algorithms analyze customer behavior and preferences to offer individualized recommendations, dynamic product listings, and autocomplete suggestions, creating a customized experience for each shopper. Product finders and configurators add another layer of interactivity, allowing users to specify features or configurations, which are especially valuable for complex or customizable products. Pimcore’s product discovery functionalities streamline the path to purchase, helping customers find the right products effortlessly, increasing satisfaction and boosting conversion rates across diverse product catalogs.
features.description: Pimcore’s E-Commerce Framework enhances product discovery with advanced search functionalities, smart filters, and guided navigation, providing customers with efficient, intuitive ways to find products. Leveraging AI/ML-based recommendations, personalized search, autocomplete, and product finders, Pimcore tailors each shopping experience to individual preferences, driving engagement and conversion.

features.name: Configurator Support
features.headline: Dynamic Product Configurators for Personalized Experiences
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s Product Configurators enable businesses to create flexible, data-driven customization tools, supporting 2D, 3D, and AR-enabled configurations powered by Pimcore’s data modeling engine and adaptable for integration with third-party software.
features.longDescription: The Product Configurator feature within Pimcore’s E-Commerce Framework empowers businesses to offer highly customized, interactive product experiences. Utilizing Pimcore’s advanced Data Modeling Engine, businesses can define relationships between parts and components, enabling them to build flexible configurators that adapt to specific needs or constraints. These configurations can incorporate AI/ML logic, ensuring customers are guided to compatible and optimized product combinations. With support for 2D, 3D, and augmented reality (AR), Pimcore’s configurators allow customers to visualize product variations in real-time, adding an immersive dimension to their shopping journey. The framework’s adaptability also enables integration with third-party configurator software, like Combeenation, by providing precise product data from Pimcore PIM. By blending visual and data-driven experiences, Pimcore’s configurators enhance customer engagement, helping them design and purchase products tailored to their preferences and requirements.
features.description: Pimcore’s E-Commerce Framework and DXP support the development of sophisticated product configurators, leveraging the Pimcore Data Modeling Engine to define component relationships and enable AI-driven configurations. With options for 2D, 3D, and AR experiences, and seamless integration with external software like Combeenation, Pimcore’s configurators allow customers to explore, customize, and visualize products, enhancing personalization and engagement.

capabilities.name: Price Management
capabilities.headline: Dynamic, Multi-Source Price Management
capabilities.shortDescription: Pimcore’s Price Management in the E-Commerce Framework offers flexible, adapter-powered pricing to support real-time, tiered, customer-specific, and dynamic pricing for B2B and B2C. It seamlessly integrates internal, external, and ERP-based pricing engines and supports global tax configurations, enhancing precision and engagement.
capabilities.longDescription:
Pimcore’s Price Management capability within its E-Commerce Framework empowers businesses to execute complex, adaptable pricing strategies across diverse B2B and B2C scenarios. With adapter-powered pricing, companies can integrate multiple pricing sources, from ERP systems to competitive pricing engines, ensuring real-time, precise pricing for all customer interactions. This capability supports tiered pricing, customer-specific rates, and dynamic calculations, enabling personalized, optimized pricing across various touchpoints.

Pimcore’s Dynamic Pricing Rules offer extensive flexibility for businesses to implement promotions, discounts, and customer-segment-specific offers that adapt to changing market conditions. Additionally, the framework’s Tax Management feature allows for tailored, multi-regional tax configurations, providing accurate tax calculations that support multi-tenant and global e-commerce. Vouchers and Coupons extend these capabilities by offering customizable, data-driven promotional codes with tracking and analytics, driving customer engagement and satisfaction. Altogether, Pimcore’s Price Management enables businesses to create a dynamic, responsive pricing environment that maximizes value and enhances the customer experience.

features.name: Tax Management
features.headline: Flexible, Multi-Tenant Tax Management for Global E-Commerce
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s Tax Management feature allows businesses to configure tax systems for various products, shops, and tenants, supporting tailored, accurate tax calculations across global markets and multi-tenant e-commerce environments.
features.longDescription: The Tax Management feature in Pimcore’s E-Commerce Framework provides businesses with the flexibility to create and apply diverse tax systems, accommodating complex tax requirements for multi-market and multi-tenant environments. With the ability to configure different tax rules for various product categories, shops, and tenants, businesses can ensure precise, location-specific tax calculations that align with regulatory standards across global regions. This tailored approach supports seamless tax management for both B2B and B2C operations, enabling businesses to navigate complex tax landscapes and ensure compliance with regional tax regulations. By automating and centralizing tax management, Pimcore reduces manual effort and minimizes the risk of errors, delivering a reliable and efficient tax solution that enhances the overall e-commerce experience.
features.description: Pimcore’s E-Commerce Framework offers comprehensive tax management, enabling businesses to define product-specific tax rules and set up distinct tax systems for each shop or tenant. This flexibility ensures precise, compliant tax calculations for complex, multi-market operations, supporting both B2B and B2C needs across global regions.

features.name: External Pricing Engines
features.headline: Flexible Integration with External Pricing Engines
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s E-Commerce Framework enables seamless integration with external pricing engines, ERP systems, and competitive pricing tools, supporting real-time, optimized pricing for complex B2B and B2C commerce scenarios.
features.longDescription: The External Pricing Engine feature within Pimcore’s E-Commerce Framework provides a powerful, adaptable approach to real-time price calculation by enabling businesses to integrate seamlessly with third-party pricing engines, ERP systems, and competitive pricing tools. With connections to ERP systems like SAP or Navision, Pimcore allows businesses to leverage existing, complex pricing models tailored to B2B scenarios where variables such as quantity discounts, customer-specific pricing, and contract terms play a critical role. For B2C applications, businesses can connect competitive pricing tools to monitor and adjust prices dynamically in real time, ensuring optimal pricing strategies aligned with market trends. As a flexible framework, Pimcore supports integration with virtually any third-party source, enabling businesses to select the most suitable pricing tools for their specific needs. By automating and centralizing pricing inputs, Pimcore streamlines accurate, responsive pricing processes, ensuring that businesses remain competitive and relevant across all digital touchpoints.
features.description: Pimcore’s External Pricing Engine integration allows businesses to connect to third-party pricing solutions, ERP systems like SAP or Navision, and competitive pricing monitoring tools. This flexible setup ensures precise, real-time price calculations tailored to market conditions and business needs, making it ideal for complex B2B pricing strategies and dynamic B2C optimization.

features.name: Dynamic Pricing Rules
features.headline: Dynamic Pricing Rules for Flexible, Targeted Strategies
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s Dynamic Pricing Rules enable businesses to implement complex pricing strategies, including discounts, promotions, and customer-segment-specific offers, with fully customizable rule definitions that adapt to diverse B2B and B2C scenarios.
features.longDescription: The Dynamic Pricing Rules feature in Pimcore’s E-Commerce Framework gives businesses the tools to create and manage intricate pricing strategies that adapt to a wide range of scenarios. With the ability to define custom rules based on multiple conditions, businesses can implement tailored promotions, customer-segment-specific discounts, and complex discount structures that respond dynamically to each shopper’s needs. Standard options such as percentage discounts, free shipping, and gift products are included, but the framework is fully extensible, allowing businesses to develop advanced pricing logic that supports even the most sophisticated B2B requirements. Whether for seasonal promotions, bulk purchase discounts, or exclusive offers for loyal customers, Pimcore’s rule-based approach provides the flexibility to deliver a responsive, customer-focused pricing strategy across all channels. By aligning promotions with business goals and customer preferences, businesses can drive conversions, improve customer satisfaction, and maintain a competitive edge with pricing that feels relevant and personalized.
features.description: With Pimcore’s Dynamic Pricing Rules, businesses can design intricate pricing models that support conditional discounts, promotions, and tailored offers. This flexible framework allows for rule-based actions like percentage discounts, free shipping, and gift products, making it easy to implement targeted pricing strategies for various customer segments, from individual shoppers to advanced B2B scenarios.

features.name: Vouchers & Coupons
features.headline: Flexible Vouchers and Coupons for Engaging Promotions
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s Vouchers and Coupons feature enables businesses to create single-use or multi-use codes, apply dynamic discount rules, and track usage statistics, allowing for targeted, data-driven promotions that enhance customer engagement.
features.longDescription: Pimcore’s Vouchers and Coupons feature offers businesses a robust toolset for creating and managing promotional codes tailored to various marketing goals. Companies can issue single-use codes for exclusive promotions or multi-use vouchers for broader campaigns, each supported by flexible discount rules that adjust based on pricing strategies. This flexibility enables businesses to provide customers with personalized incentives, from percentage-based discounts to fixed-amount savings, enhancing engagement and driving conversion. The feature also includes usage statistics, offering valuable insights into redemption rates, customer behavior, and promotional effectiveness. By tracking voucher performance, businesses can refine their strategies, ensuring each campaign reaches its maximum potential. Pimcore’s Vouchers and Coupons support a customer-centric, data-driven approach to promotions, delivering meaningful incentives that improve customer loyalty and foster brand connection.
features.description: With Pimcore’s Vouchers and Coupons, businesses can design flexible promotional codes—whether single-use or multi-use—with customizable discounts based on pricing rules. Built-in usage statistics allow businesses to monitor and optimize voucher performance, providing valuable insights to drive effective, engaging promotional strategies across customer segments.

features.name: Price Systems
features.headline: Flexible, Adapter-Powered Pricing for Tailored Commerce
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s flexible, adapter-powered pricing feature enables businesses to integrate internal, external, or ERP-based pricing engines, supporting tiered, customer-specific, and dynamic pricing calculations for diverse B2B and B2C scenarios.
features.longDescription: The Pricing feature within Pimcore’s E-Commerce Framework provides businesses with a robust, adaptable approach to managing diverse pricing needs, from simple calculations to advanced, rule-based scenarios. With adapter-powered pricing, businesses can integrate Pimcore’s flexible pricing framework with internal systems, ERP platforms, or external pricing engines to streamline data flow and ensure consistency. This flexibility enables dynamic pricing for real-time adjustments, tiered and volume-based discounts, and customer-specific pricing to cater to the nuanced needs of B2B and B2C models. Additionally, Pimcore supports multiple pricing systems across different shops or tenants, allowing for tailored pricing structures that align with regional markets, partner agreements, or unique customer segments. This customizable, responsive approach empowers businesses to stay competitive and meet the demands of a rapidly changing market by delivering precise, optimized pricing at every touchpoint.
features.description: Pimcore’s E-Commerce Framework offers comprehensive pricing flexibility, allowing businesses to implement custom pricing rules, real-time dynamic pricing, and customer-based rates across multiple shops or tenants. With adapter-powered integrations, companies can seamlessly connect to internal systems or third-party pricing engines, ensuring accurate, responsive pricing tailored to each unique business scenario.

capabilities.name: Inventory Management
capabilities.headline: Centralized, Real-Time Inventory Management
capabilities.shortDescription: Pimcore’s Inventory Management feature provides a customizable framework for real-time inventory visibility and complex availability calculations across multiple warehouses, drop-shipping, and third-party systems. This enables businesses to manage a responsive, efficient supply chain.
capabilities.longDescription:
Pimcore’s Inventory Management capability within the E-Commerce Framework provides a robust, centralized solution for managing complex inventory needs across e-commerce channels. Designed to support real-time inventory visibility, this feature allows businesses to synchronize data from multiple warehouses, drop-shipping providers, and other supply chain locations, ensuring efficient inventory flow and precise availability updates across all customer touchpoints.

The framework offers advanced adapters that facilitate seamless integration with third-party systems, including ERP, CPQ, and specialized inventory management software, making it highly adaptable to different operational needs. This integration capability supports sophisticated inventory scenarios, such as dynamic allocation, just-in-time inventory updates, and multi-warehouse fulfillment strategies, ensuring that customers always see accurate product availability. Pimcore’s flexible availability calculations allow for customized settings based on warehouse locations, stock levels, and demand forecasting, creating a reliable supply chain that meets customer expectations. With this powerful, scalable inventory management solution, businesses can maintain operational efficiency, improve customer satisfaction, and adapt quickly to changing inventory demands.

features.name: Support for integration of external inventory management
features.headline: Seamless Integration with External Inventory Management Systems
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s E-Commerce Framework offers flexible, extensible adapters to integrate third-party inventory management systems, ERP, and CPQ engines, supporting complex availability scenarios and real-time inventory visibility across channels.
features.longDescription: The E-Commerce Framework in Pimcore provides robust support for integrating external inventory management systems, enabling businesses to centralize inventory visibility across platforms by connecting third-party systems or existing ERP and CPQ solutions. With highly adaptable adapters, businesses can build custom integrations that reflect their unique inventory and availability needs, from simple product tracking to intricate multi-location availability scenarios. By consolidating data from diverse sources, Pimcore ensures accurate, real-time stock levels across all e-commerce channels, enhancing operational efficiency and minimizing stock discrepancies. This integration flexibility supports businesses in creating a unified inventory ecosystem that aligns with their processes and technologies, providing customers with reliable availability information and improving overall satisfaction through a transparent, efficient supply chain.
features.description: Pimcore’s Inventory Management supports seamless integration with external systems, allowing businesses to connect to third-party inventory management platforms, ERP systems, or CPQ engines for streamlined inventory handling. With adaptable adapters, businesses can manage complex availability requirements, centralizing inventory data to ensure accurate, real-time product availability across all e-commerce touchpoints.

features.name: Availability Systems
features.headline: Flexible, Centralized Availability Management for Multi-Warehouse Operations
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s Availability Systems provide businesses with a customizable framework to centralize inventory data, supporting simple to complex availability calculations across multiple warehouses and drop-shipping setups for an efficient, responsive e-commerce supply chain.
features.longDescription: Pimcore’s Availability Systems offer a robust, scalable solution for managing product availability in e-commerce environments of any complexity. Starting with basic stock data such as available units, the framework can be extended to cover multi-warehouse setups and drop-shipping integrations, enabling businesses to consolidate inventory information across locations. This flexibility allows businesses to design custom availability calculations based on operational needs, such as demand patterns, lead times, and fulfillment priority by location. With centralized data, Pimcore provides a clear, unified view of inventory, ensuring accuracy across all digital channels and supporting efficient fulfillment strategies for even the most complex setups. Pimcore’s adaptability streamlines the e-commerce supply chain, reduces overstock and stockouts, and offers customers reliable availability information, improving overall satisfaction by meeting demand with precision.
features.description: With Pimcore’s Availability Systems, businesses can manage inventory at any scale, from simple stock counts to complex multi-warehouse and drop-shipping scenarios, by centralizing inventory information and supporting adaptable availability calculations. This framework ensures accurate, real-time product availability for diverse e-commerce setups, providing seamless data flow and optimized fulfillment across channels.

capabilities.name: Cart Management
capabilities.headline: Flexible, Multi-Cart Management for B2C and B2B
capabilities.shortDescription: Pimcore’s Cart Management enables unlimited, customizable shopping carts per customer, supporting B2C and B2B needs with wish lists, project-based carts, and comparative shopping. With dynamic price adjustments and multi-carrier shipping, it offers a seamless, tailored shopping experience.
capabilities.longDescription:
Pimcore’s Cart Management capability in the E-Commerce Framework delivers a flexible, comprehensive solution for managing shopping carts tailored to both B2C and B2B requirements. Customers can create and manage unlimited carts, allowing for single or multi-cart configurations suited to personal, business, and project-based purchasing needs. Features like wish lists, comparative shopping, and project-specific carts offer customers the ability to organize and track purchases with ease, enhancing the shopping experience.

For B2B customers, Pimcore offers powerful multi-cart functionalities, including quoting and multi-level approval workflows that simplify complex purchasing scenarios and support project-based ordering. Additionally, the Price Modifiers feature allows businesses to set flexible, cart-level pricing adjustments, such as discounts, surcharges, or service fees, using a customizable, plugin-based system. The integrated shipping solution supports dynamic cost calculations, multi-carrier options, real-time tracking, and configurations tailored to specific warehouses or tenants, enabling businesses to meet a wide range of shipping needs. This robust Cart Management system empowers organizations to deliver a seamless, responsive cart experience that adapts to various customer needs and simplifies the path to purchase.

features.name: Shipping costs
features.headline: Flexible Shipping Management for Complex E-Commerce Needs
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s E-Commerce Framework provides a comprehensive shipping solution, with dynamic shipping cost calculations, multi-carrier integration, real-time tracking, and tenant- or warehouse-specific shipping configurations for seamless, scalable fulfillment.
features.longDescription: Pimcore’s Shipping feature is designed to handle the most intricate e-commerce shipping scenarios, providing businesses with dynamic, customizable tools for comprehensive shipping management. With support for complex shipping cost calculations, businesses can configure shipping rules by tenant, warehouse, or carrier, ensuring accurate costs based on location, package weight, or order value. Seamless integration with third-party shipping calculators, such as UPS, FedEx, and DHL, allows for real-time shipping rates and tracking, creating a responsive experience for customers. Pimcore’s system also supports international shipping needs, ensuring compliance with global regulations and streamlining returns to improve customer satisfaction. The framework’s flexible design enables efficient warehousing and packaging, scaling to accommodate fluctuating demand while keeping costs controlled. By centralizing shipping functions within a powerful e-commerce platform, Pimcore enables businesses to provide a fast, reliable, and optimized fulfillment experience for customers around the globe.
features.description: The Shipping feature in Pimcore’s E-Commerce Framework enables businesses to manage complex shipping requirements with support for flexible cost calculations, integrations with third-party shipping tools, multi-carrier options, and tenant-based configurations. From real-time tracking to international compliance, Pimcore’s robust shipping management optimizes the entire fulfillment process, delivering a streamlined and scalable shipping experience.

features.name: Price modifications
features.headline: Flexible Price Modifiers for Customized Cart Pricing
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s Price Modifiers feature allows businesses to apply flexible cart-level pricing adjustments, such as discounts, service fees, or surcharges, through an adaptable, plugin-based system to meet diverse e-commerce needs.
features.longDescription: The Price Modifiers feature in Pimcore’s E-Commerce Framework provides an adaptable system for managing cart-level pricing adjustments, allowing businesses to implement custom modifications like discounts, service fees, or promotional surcharges. Designed with an adapter-based architecture, Pimcore’s price modification system supports a wide range of pricing scenarios, from simple cart discounts to complex fee structures based on customer segments, order volume, or service types. This flexibility enables businesses to respond dynamically to specific pricing needs, such as applying seasonal discounts, loyalty-based incentives, or handling additional service charges. With the ability to tailor cart pricing to meet unique requirements, Pimcore’s Price Modifiers enhance the shopping experience, providing customers with transparent, optimized pricing that aligns with business goals and customer expectations.
features.description: Pimcore’s Price Modifiers offer a dynamic, adapter-based approach to modifying prices within the shopping cart, enabling businesses to apply discounts, add service fees, or create customized pricing scenarios. This flexibility allows businesses to enhance cart functionality and tailor pricing to specific customer segments, promotions, or service needs, ensuring an optimized and responsive shopping experience.

features.name: Support for B2B use cases
features.headline: Advanced B2B Cart Management with Multi-Cart, Quoting, and Approval Workflows
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s B2B Cart Management offers powerful multi-cart capabilities with quoting and approval workflows, enabling businesses to manage complex project-based carts, customer-specific orders, and multi-level approvals—tailored for sophisticated B2B processes.
features.longDescription: The B2B Cart Management feature within Pimcore’s E-Commerce Framework is designed to support the complex needs of advanced B2B environments, delivering a highly flexible multi-cart system with in-depth quoting and approval capabilities. Businesses can set up multiple carts per customer or project, each with unique configurations, approval workflows, and quote management, allowing teams to handle intricate project-based orders seamlessly. This solution enables multi-level review and approval processes, empowering companies to manage large, collaborative orders with precision and compliance. With cart storage, businesses can retain multiple carts and provide customers the option to request quotes and approvals for each, creating a customized and controlled purchasing experience. By integrating quoting and approval workflows directly into the cart, Pimcore offers a streamlined, efficient solution for handling sophisticated B2B commerce requirements, making it ideal for enterprises needing robust, scalable shopping cart management.
features.description: Pimcore’s B2B-focused cart system is built to handle the complexities of B2B commerce, supporting multiple, project-based carts, customer-specific workflows, and robust quote generation with multi-level approval. Designed for flexibility, the framework allows businesses to create custom cart configurations and review processes, ensuring seamless management of advanced B2B scenarios while enabling efficient quoting and approval capabilities for every cart.

features.name: Shopping carts
features.headline: Flexible Multi-Cart System for B2B and B2C Shopping Needs
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s Shopping Cart feature supports unlimited carts per customer, allowing for single or multi-cart setups tailored to B2C and complex B2B requirements. With capabilities for wish lists, project-based carts, and comparative shopping, customers can organize purchases seamlessly for personal or business needs.
features.longDescription: Pimcore’s Shopping Cart system delivers robust, multi-cart functionality designed for diverse shopping needs, accommodating both straightforward B2C transactions and complex B2B purchasing workflows. Customers can create an unlimited number of shopping carts, which can be used flexibly for purposes like comparative shopping, project-based purchasing, or saving items to revisit later. This feature supports custom cart management, allowing users to assign specific carts to different projects, orders, or even individual customers in B2B contexts, making it easy to track and organize various purchasing requirements. With options to save and store multiple carts, customers can effortlessly manage ongoing orders and return to unfinished carts, streamlining their shopping experience. Pimcore’s advanced cart functionality not only simplifies purchasing but also provides businesses with a versatile, customer-centered approach to managing both simple and intricate e-commerce scenarios.
features.description: The Pimcore Shopping Cart feature offers customers unparalleled flexibility with a multi-cart system designed to handle diverse purchasing scenarios, from simple consumer shopping to advanced B2B requirements. Customers can create and manage unlimited carts, assign specific carts to different projects, compare selections, and store carts for future orders, enabling smooth shopping experiences that suit both personal and business needs.

capabilities.name: Checkout & Transaction Support
capabilities.headline: Flexible Checkout and Transaction Management
capabilities.shortDescription: Pimcore’s Checkout & Transaction Support offers configurable, multi-step checkout journeys with robust payment integration options. Designed for B2C and complex B2B needs, it supports seamless ERP connections and advanced order processing protocols for efficient, reliable transactions.
capabilities.longDescription:
Pimcore’s Checkout & Transaction Support capability empowers businesses to craft a seamless, configurable checkout experience that adapts to the unique requirements of B2C and B2B transactions. With the flexibility to design single-page or multi-step checkout flows, businesses can tailor each phase of the customer journey, ensuring it aligns with brand standards and customer expectations. This feature integrates smoothly with various IT systems, offering pre-built adapters for payment providers like PayPal and Stripe, while also supporting custom payment setups for product-specific and complex B2B requirements.

In addition, Pimcore’s Commit Order Callbacks feature enables advanced ERP integration and supports OCI and punchout protocols, allowing real-time order processing and data flow within sophisticated B2B environments. By ensuring seamless order data exchange with ERP systems, businesses can improve the accuracy and efficiency of their operations, reducing manual input and facilitating a faster, more reliable checkout experience. Pimcore’s Checkout & Transaction Support enhances the overall transaction process, combining convenience for B2C customers with the robustness required for B2B workflows, creating a dynamic, versatile solution that boosts customer satisfaction and operational efficiency.

features.name: Payment Integration
features.headline: Adaptable Payment Processes for B2B and B2C Commerce
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s Payment Process feature offers flexible integration with various payment providers, supporting B2C transactions through pre-built adapters like PayPal and Klarna, and enabling custom payment setups for complex B2B requirements, including product-specific payment options.
features.longDescription: The Payment Process feature in Pimcore’s E-Commerce Framework provides businesses with a versatile approach to handling transactions, supporting both standard B2C and intricate B2B payment requirements. With pre-configured adapters for popular payment service providers like PayPal and Klarna, Pimcore covers the essentials for B2C transactions. However, its true strength lies in its adaptability: businesses can easily integrate any third-party PSP or create custom connectors, allowing for specialized B2B payment options, such as purchase orders, invoice billing, and credit-based payments. Pimcore’s system even allows for product-specific payment methods within a single cart, a common need in complex B2B purchases where different items may require different payment approaches. This capability ensures that both B2C customers and B2B clients benefit from a smooth, personalized payment experience that aligns with their unique purchasing and accounting needs, enhancing the overall transaction journey.
features.description: Pimcore’s E-Commerce Framework supports diverse payment needs with built-in adapters for popular B2C providers, while offering complete adaptability for integrating any payment service provider (PSP) or unique B2B payment workflows. This flexibility enables businesses to create tailored payment experiences, including product-specific options within the same cart, ideal for sophisticated B2B transactions and customized order management.

features.name: Commit Order Callbacks
features.headline: Configurable Order Commitment for ERP and Punchout Integration Scenarios
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s Commit Order Callbacks feature enables seamless integration with ERP systems and supports OCI and punchout protocols, ensuring smooth order processing and streamlined data flow in complex B2B environments.
features.longDescription: Pimcore’s Commit Order Callback feature is designed for organizations that require tailored order processing workflows and controlled integration with internal backbone systems such as ERP platforms. It enables the implementation of automated order handoff logic, ensuring timely and consistent synchronization of order data with backend systems to support downstream processes such as inventory updates, pricing validation, and customer account handling. Support for OCI and punchout integration scenarios allows B2B customers to initiate and complete checkout processes from within their own procurement systems, while maintaining alignment with enterprise purchasing policies. By providing a flexible mechanism for order commitment and integration, Pimcore helps improve data consistency, reduce manual processing, and support complex B2B and enterprise integration requirements.
features.description: Pimcore’s Commit Order Callback feature enables businesses to implement customized order submission processes to internal backbone systems such as ERPs, including support for OCI and punchout integration scenarios. This approach allows for controlled, near real-time data exchange, supporting efficient B2B transactions, reliable order processing, and alignment with enterprise procurement workflows.

features.name: Checkout Process Steps
features.headline: Customizable Checkout Process for Complex B2B and B2C Scenarios
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s Checkout Process allows businesses to configure each step of the checkout journey, from single-page to multi-step processes with IT system integrations, supporting both simple B2C and complex B2B purchasing needs.
features.longDescription: Pimcore’s Checkout Process feature is a powerful, fully adaptable framework that enables businesses to design the ideal checkout experience for their unique needs. Whether for straightforward B2C purchases or complex, multi-step B2B transactions, Pimcore’s checkout can be configured step-by-step, with options to integrate callbacks to primary IT systems, including ERP and CRM. This flexibility supports custom scenarios like punch-outs, where buyers can transition smoothly between external procurement systems and Pimcore’s checkout to complete orders. Pimcore’s design accommodates both single-page checkouts for streamlined B2C sales and intricate, customizable sequences for high-stakes B2B orders that require multiple verifications and approvals. By offering total control over checkout stages, including order commitment processes, Pimcore ensures that businesses can create tailored, efficient checkout journeys that drive conversions and provide a seamless, trustworthy experience for every customer type.
features.description: With Pimcore’s customizable checkout process, businesses can create a tailored checkout journey, adaptable to B2C and B2B requirements, including multi-step configurations, punch-out capabilities, and callbacks to IT systems like ERP. This framework-based approach enables companies to handle diverse transaction needs, from single-page checkouts to advanced order commits, optimizing the checkout experience for seamless customer journeys.

capabilities.name: Order Management
capabilities.headline: Customizable, Dynamic Order Management
capabilities.shortDescription: Pimcore’s Order Management capabilities offer a flexible, customizable framework for handling complex order workflows. With adaptable components for order listings, detail pages, and API-driven data access, businesses can build solutions that support multi-location fulfillment, B2B transactions, and real-time updates.
capabilities.longDescription:
Pimcore’s Order Management capability within the E-Commerce Framework provides a powerful, adaptable foundation for businesses managing complex order workflows. The Order Listings & Detail Pages feature allows companies to create user-friendly, customized pages that fit precisely with internal processes, from handling multi-location fulfillment to managing high-volume B2B transactions. This toolkit of reusable components ensures that businesses can build unique interfaces tailored to specific requirements, whether for internal teams or customer-facing order tracking, enhancing visibility and operational efficiency.

The Data Access & APIs feature offers extensive flexibility, with support for GraphQL and REST APIs through Pimcore’s Datahub, allowing secure, efficient access to real-time order data. Webhooks enable instant updates across systems, and Core APIs provide deeper, direct access to core data, facilitating custom solutions that integrate seamlessly with third-party platforms. This high level of customization ensures that businesses can optimize order workflows, automate processes, and maintain accuracy across complex e-commerce environments. Pimcore’s Order Management is ideal for companies needing an agile, scalable solution that evolves with their operational needs, supporting a cohesive, responsive, and customer-centric order ecosystem.

features.name: Data Access & APIs
features.headline: Flexible Data Access & APIs for Real-Time Order Management
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s Data Access & APIs feature provides comprehensive access to order data via GraphQL, REST, and Webhooks, enabling seamless integration with custom order management processes and real-time data synchronization across systems.
features.longDescription: The Data Access & APIs feature within Pimcore’s E-Commerce Framework offers businesses extensive flexibility in accessing and managing order data, essential for streamlining order workflows and maintaining real-time data accuracy. Through Pimcore’s Datahub, companies can leverage both GraphQL and REST APIs for efficient, secure access to order information, while Webhooks enable instant data transmission to keep systems synchronized with real-time updates. For advanced access, Pimcore Core APIs provide direct interaction with all core data, allowing businesses to customize order management solutions that align perfectly with internal systems and processes. This high level of adaptability makes it easy for companies to connect Pimcore with third-party platforms, automate order flows, and respond dynamically to changes, creating a cohesive and responsive order management ecosystem that meets the demands of complex e-commerce environments.
features.description: Pimcore’s robust API capabilities empower businesses to access order data flexibly, supporting GraphQL and REST through Datahub, real-time Webhooks, and advanced access via Pimcore Core APIs. This flexibility allows businesses to integrate Pimcore order data into custom workflows and third-party systems, enabling precise control over data flow and enhancing the efficiency of order management.

features.name: Order Listing & Detail Page
features.headline: Customizable Order Listings & Detail Pages for Tailored Management
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s Order Listings & Detail Pages feature provides businesses with a flexible framework to create custom order management applications and interfaces, supporting complex workflows with reusable building blocks for internal or customer-facing order management solutions.
features.longDescription: Pimcore’s Order Listings & Detail Pages feature empowers businesses to build customized order management solutions that align precisely with their internal workflows and customer needs. This adaptable framework offers a foundation of reusable components, allowing companies to design user-friendly order listings and detail pages tailored to specific processes, from handling multi-location order fulfillment to managing high-volume B2B transactions. By providing a toolkit rather than a rigid system, Pimcore enables the creation of both internal interfaces and customer-facing applications that streamline order tracking, enhance visibility, and improve operational efficiency. This flexibility makes Pimcore ideal for businesses that require advanced customization beyond standard order management tools, ensuring that each order management solution can evolve with business requirements and optimize complex workflows effectively.
features.description: The Pimcore E-Commerce Framework enables businesses to design fully customized order listings and detail pages, allowing for personalized workflows that meet unique order management needs. Rather than offering a one-size-fits-all system, Pimcore provides adaptable building blocks for building specialized order management interfaces, ideal for companies with complex operational requirements.

capabilities.name: Customer Account Management
capabilities.headline: Customizable, Comprehensive Customer Account Management
capabilities.shortDescription: Pimcore’s Customer Account Management enables businesses to create flexible, secure, and fully customizable customer data structures, supporting both B2B and B2C needs. With CDP integration, multi-user roles, and real-time data synchronization, it delivers seamless, responsive customer account solutions.
capabilities.longDescription:
Pimcore’s Customer Account Management capability within the E-Commerce Framework is a powerful, adaptable solution for managing diverse customer data needs across both B2B and B2C environments. The Flexible Customer Data Model & Hierarchies feature allows businesses to create customized data structures that reflect unique customer profiles, relationships, and requirements, with seamless integration to Pimcore’s CDP. This integration enables the creation of golden customer records, bringing together multi-channel data for cohesive, personalized customer interactions.

For B2B, Pimcore supports complex account models with multi-user access, customizable roles, and permission settings, facilitating secure self-service account management. Businesses can also integrate Pimcore with ERP, CRM, and external account management platforms using Datahub, Workflow Automation, and webhooks for real-time data synchronization and secure authentication. The Customer Order View feature provides a fully customizable interface that supports everything from basic order tracking in B2C to multi-level order histories for B2B clients. This comprehensive, adaptable account management solution empowers businesses to deliver enhanced customer experiences while optimizing operational efficiency.

features.name: Support for Complex B2B Account Models
features.headline: Comprehensive B2B Account Models with Multi-User Roles and Access Control
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s Support for Complex B2B Account Models provides multi-user access with customizable roles and permissions, enabling businesses to set up secure, self-service account management for complex B2B hierarchies, relationships, and workflows.
features.longDescription: Pimcore’s Support for Complex B2B Account Models provides an extensive framework for managing intricate account structures, empowering businesses to create multi-user roles and permissions that reflect each customer’s organizational needs. With robust role-based access control, businesses can define specific permissions, ensuring that each user within a customer’s organization can access only the information relevant to their role. Pimcore also supports Single Sign-On (SSO) for streamlined access and advanced security, meeting compliance standards while simplifying account access for users. Self-service account management enables customers to oversee their account details, manage roles, and assign permissions independently, making account administration efficient and flexible. By supporting complex B2B hierarchies, Pimcore ensures that businesses can provide a secure, compliant account experience, facilitating seamless collaboration and self-sufficiency for even the most structured B2B relationships.
features.description: Pimcore’s B2B Account Models feature offers businesses the flexibility to define multi-user roles, manage permissions, and establish detailed relationships within customer accounts, supporting Single Sign-On (SSO) and advanced security for seamless, compliant self-service account management. This capability is ideal for complex B2B environments, ensuring that businesses can create structured, scalable account systems that meet rigorous compliance and security standards.

features.name: Customer Order View
features.headline: Customizable Customer Order View for Tailored Tracking and History
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s Customer Order View offers a fully customizable interface for order tracking and order history, allowing businesses to adapt the view to suit both B2B and B2C requirements, from simple order tracking to complex multi-level details.
features.longDescription: Pimcore’s Customer Order View feature offers businesses the ability to design a fully customizable order tracking and history interface that meets the unique needs of each customer type. Shipped as a blueprint within the E-Commerce Framework, this view can be adapted to provide anything from simple, streamlined order updates for B2C customers to detailed, multi-level information tailored to complex B2B orders. The customizable structure ensures that customers receive order status updates, tracking information, and access to past orders in a format that aligns with their expectations and operational needs. By offering a flexible order view, Pimcore empowers businesses to create a personalized, informative order experience that improves transparency, supports customer trust, and provides meaningful insights into the order journey.
features.description: With Pimcore’s Customer Order View, businesses can provide customers with a personalized, flexible order tracking interface that includes comprehensive order history. Delivered with a blueprint for easy customization, the order view is adaptable to fit diverse needs, enabling detailed visibility for complex B2B scenarios as well as streamlined access for B2C shoppers.

features.name: Support for Integration of External CRMs & Account Management Systems
features.headline: Seamless Integration with External ERP, CRM, and Account Systems
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s integration support for external ERP, CRM, and account management systems enables businesses to synchronize data in real time through Datahub, Workflow Automation, and webhooks, allowing for seamless account management and secure authentication.
features.longDescription: Pimcore’s Support for Integration of External ERP, CRM, and Account Management Systems provides businesses with a powerful framework for seamlessly connecting third-party IT platforms to their e-commerce environment. Through flexible synchronization methods such as Pimcore Datahub, Workflow Automation, and real-time webhooks, businesses can ensure that customer account data is up-to-date and accurately reflected across systems. This integration also extends to secure authentication, allowing businesses to bridge external account management platforms natively, so users can access their accounts with familiar credentials from existing systems. By integrating ERP, CRM, and other essential systems, Pimcore enhances data integrity, reduces duplication, and supports a smooth, interconnected experience across all customer touchpoints, making it easier for businesses to deliver consistent, responsive service in complex e-commerce scenarios.
features.description: Pimcore’s E-Commerce Framework allows businesses to integrate third-party ERP, CRM, and account management platforms, with flexible synchronization options through Datahub, Workflow Automation, and real-time webhooks. This capability enables continuous data flow and streamlined account management processes, while also supporting native authentication bridges to external systems for a secure and cohesive experience.

features.name: Flexible Customer Data Model & Hierarchies
features.headline: Flexible Customer Data Modeling & Hierarchies for B2B/B2C
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s Flexible Customer Data Model & Hierarchies feature allows businesses to fully customize customer data structures and hierarchies, supporting unique B2B/B2C needs and integration with the Pimcore CDP for seamless customer management across industries.
features.longDescription: Pimcore’s Flexible Customer Data Model & Hierarchies feature provides a robust solution for businesses looking to tailor customer data management to unique industry and organizational needs. Utilizing the Pimcore Data Modeling Engine, businesses can build fully customizable data models with flexible customer hierarchies that accommodate both B2B and B2C complexities, such as multi-branch accounts, regional structures, and tiered customer groups. This customization allows organizations to create group-specific data structures, enabling segmentation and personalization that align with different customer types and business models. Furthermore, integration with Pimcore’s CDP Framework allows seamless connectivity between customer data and other digital assets, centralizing data management for a comprehensive view of each customer’s profile. This adaptability supports scalability and precision, ensuring businesses can manage customer accounts effectively, improve engagement, and leverage insights across diverse e-commerce environments.
features.description: Powered by the Pimcore Data Modeling Engine, this feature enables businesses to create custom, adaptable customer data models with hierarchical structures tailored to B2B and B2C requirements. With customer group-specific modeling and full integration into the Pimcore CDP Framework, businesses gain precise control over customer data, ensuring a scalable, industry-agnostic solution for effective account management.

features.name: Built-in CDP System
features.headline: Flexible Customer Data Platform (CDP) Framework for Unified Customer Insights
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s CDP Framework offers a fully configurable solution for creating and managing golden customer records, integrating customer data with automated triggers, actions, and personalization across all channels in a best-of-suite platform.
features.longDescription: Pimcore’s Customer Data Platform (CDP) Framework provides a robust, configurable solution for unifying customer data, supporting businesses in building golden records and creating a seamless, highly personalized customer experience. This composable CDP framework integrates directly within Pimcore’s data and experience management suite, making it the foundation for a true best-of-suite solution. With features that include real-time event tracking, behavioral triggers, and automated actions, Pimcore’s CDP Framework allows businesses to optimize the customer journey through personalized engagement and marketing automation. This integration also enables a seamless connection between customer profile management and multi-channel experience delivery, reducing IT complexities and supporting PXM (Product Experience Management) with a unified platform. Pimcore’s best-of-suite strategy gives brands a comprehensive view of their customers, enabling targeted, data-driven interactions that enhance engagement and drive conversions across any output channel.
features.description: Pimcore’s Customer Data Platform (CDP) Framework is a powerful, composable development toolkit for centralizing and optimizing customer data. Designed as part of Pimcore’s best-of-suite approach, this CDP provides the building blocks for creating comprehensive customer profiles and maintaining golden records, enabling data-driven actions and triggers to support marketing automation and highly personalized content delivery across any device and channel.

capabilities.name: Omni Channel Support
capabilities.headline: Seamless, Integrated Omni-Channel Commerce
capabilities.shortDescription: Pimcore’s Omni-Channel Support enables businesses to deliver a cohesive shopping experience across all channels, from POS systems to IoT-enabled devices. With integrated DXP capabilities, this feature ensures consistent branding, personalized interactions, and convenient, flexible purchase options anywhere customers engage.
capabilities.longDescription:
Pimcore’s Omni-Channel Support within its E-Commerce Framework allows businesses to create a seamless, consistent shopping journey across all customer touchpoints. With native integration into Pimcore’s DXP, this feature enables the deployment of e-commerce content and functionality to various channels, including in-store POS, mobile apps, IoT devices, and digital signage. This deep integration facilitates a unified “commerce anywhere” strategy, empowering customers to browse, receive personalized recommendations, and make purchases smoothly across platforms.

The feature supports diverse omni-channel capabilities, such as shoppable PDF catalogs, interactive IoT retail experiences, and clienteling for personalized in-store assistance. Additionally, the In-Store Operations Support includes BOPIS, curbside pickup, and endless aisle options, enhancing flexibility and convenience by bridging online and in-store experiences. Pick-and-pack order fulfillment and POS configurators further optimize in-store operations to align with digital offerings, creating a cohesive and engaging shopping journey that adapts to customer preferences. This omnichannel approach enhances brand consistency, fosters customer engagement, and drives loyalty by providing a flexible, channel-agnostic framework for modern commerce.

features.name: Support for In-Store Operations
features.headline: Comprehensive In-Store Support for Seamless Omni-Channel Operations
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s In-Store Operations Support integrates essential features for modern retail, including BOPIS, curbside pickup, POS management, and clienteling, enabling a seamless bridge between online and in-store shopping experiences.
features.longDescription: Pimcore’s In-Store Operations Support feature equips retailers with a comprehensive toolkit to deliver seamless omni-channel shopping experiences that connect digital and physical retail environments. With options like BOPIS (Buy Online, Pick Up In-Store) and curbside pickup, customers can shop online and collect their items at a physical location with ease, benefiting from flexibility and convenience. The feature also includes pick and pack options for efficient order fulfillment, clienteling capabilities that allow staff to offer personalized recommendations, and endless aisle features that enable customers to order products not available in-store. Integrated POS management and support for configurators on POS touch screens ensure that in-store operations are not only efficient but also aligned with the brand’s digital offerings, creating a cohesive shopping journey. By bridging the online and in-store experience, Pimcore supports businesses in meeting customer needs for a flexible, streamlined, and personalized shopping process.
features.description: Pimcore’s Support for In-Store Operations allows businesses to integrate e-commerce with physical retail, offering BOPIS, curbside pickup, POS touch screen integration, clienteling, pick and pack, and endless aisle options. This omni-channel framework enhances customer convenience, streamlining the shopping journey from online browsing to in-store fulfillment and enabling a unified experience across digital and physical touchpoints.

features.name: Omni-Channel Commerce Support
features.headline: Comprehensive Omni-Channel Commerce for Unified Experiences
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s Omni-Channel Commerce Support integrates e-commerce seamlessly across digital and physical touchpoints, with native DXP connectivity, enabling businesses to deliver consistent, personalized shopping experiences on any device or channel, from POS to IoT and digital signage.
features.longDescription: Pimcore’s Omni-Channel Commerce Support feature empowers businesses to deliver consistent, integrated commerce experiences across all customer touchpoints. Leveraging native integration with the Pimcore DXP, businesses can deploy their e-commerce content and functionality on any device or channel, from in-store POS systems and mobile apps to IoT-enabled devices and digital signage. This deep integration facilitates a unified approach to “commerce anywhere,” allowing customers to interact with personalized content, receive relevant product recommendations, and make purchases smoothly, regardless of their chosen platform. Pimcore’s flexibility extends to generating shoppable PDF catalogs and leveraging IoT for interactive retail, creating a responsive, channel-agnostic framework for modern commerce. This omnichannel approach not only enhances brand consistency but also enables businesses to meet customers wherever they are, providing a seamless, cohesive experience that supports engagement and loyalty.
features.description: Pimcore’s Omni-Channel Commerce Support allows businesses to deploy e-commerce functionality on any channel or device, thanks to its tight integration with the Pimcore DXP. This flexibility supports a cohesive customer journey across POS, IoT, apps, and digital signage, creating unified and personalized interactions, whether online or offline, ensuring that customers experience seamless “commerce anywhere” capabilities.

capabilities.name: Internationalization
capabilities.headline: Effortless Global Commerce with Localized Precision
capabilities.shortDescription: Pimcore’s Internationalization capabilities empower businesses to manage multiple, fully localized storefronts from a single platform. With multi-shop support, region-specific compliance, and product internationalization, it ensures each market segment is served with accuracy, relevance, and regulatory alignment.
capabilities.longDescription:
Pimcore’s Internationalization capability within its E-Commerce Framework equips businesses with comprehensive tools to create, manage, and optimize global storefronts with ease. The Multi-Shop & Multi-Tenant feature allows companies to operate multiple B2B and B2C storefronts tailored to specific regions, each with unique product catalogs, customer groups, and localized workflows, all managed from a single backend. This flexible structure enables brands to efficiently address regional market demands and streamline administrative processes.

For deeper localization, Pimcore’s Regional & Country-Specific Support ensures each storefront adheres to local tax structures, payment preferences, and compliance regulations, fostering transparency and trust with customers in each target market. The Product Internationalization feature further enhances this support by enabling multi-lingual product data and region-specific labeling and descriptions, aligning product information with local standards. Together, these features provide a cohesive yet adaptable framework, allowing businesses to scale internationally with tailored, compliant experiences that meet local customer expectations. Pimcore’s centralized internationalization framework maximizes operational efficiency and brand consistency, driving growth in global markets with responsive, culturally relevant commerce solutions.

features.name: Regional & Country-Specific Support
features.headline: Regional & Country-Specific E-Commerce Support for Global Compliance
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s Regional & Country-Specific Support enables businesses to localize e-commerce experiences, providing regional product catalogs, localized payment options, and compliance with regional taxation and regulatory standards for seamless global operations.
features.longDescription: Pimcore’s Regional & Country-Specific Support empowers businesses to create fully localized e-commerce experiences tailored to each target market, ensuring compliance with regional regulations, tax structures, and customer preferences. Businesses can build region-specific product catalogs, enabling customers to browse products relevant to their location, as well as integrate localized payment providers for secure, familiar transactions. Pimcore’s support for regional compliance also includes automated tax calculations and adherence to local regulatory standards, fostering a transparent, trusted shopping experience for customers worldwide. With these tools, businesses can effectively enter new markets, adapting each aspect of the e-commerce experience to meet local expectations while maintaining centralized control and efficiency. This comprehensive internationalization support helps brands build credibility, improve customer engagement, and drive conversions by aligning with cultural, legal, and logistical nuances in each region.
features.description: With Pimcore’s Regional & Country-Specific Support, businesses can offer customized e-commerce experiences by localizing content, adapting product catalogs, integrating regional payment providers, and ensuring compliance with regional tax and regulatory requirements. This capability enables brands to build trust and relevance with customers across global markets, supporting a compliant and localized e-commerce presence in any country.

features.name: Multi Shop & Multi Tenant
features.headline: Multi-Shop & Multi-Tenant Support for Scalable B2B and B2C E-Commerce
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s Multi-Shop & Multi-Tenant feature enables businesses to create and manage multiple B2B and B2C storefronts within a single system, each with unique product catalogs, customer bases, and operational processes for tailored, scalable e-commerce.
features.longDescription: Pimcore’s Multi-Shop & Multi-Tenant feature provides businesses with a robust solution to set up and manage multiple B2B and B2C storefronts from a single system, allowing for comprehensive control over different market segments and regions.
