Each storefront can be fully customized with its own product catalog, tailored to specific customer needs and regulatory requirements, as well as distinct customer groups and order workflows to reflect local market practices. This flexible structure allows brands to efficiently address varied customer expectations while streamlining administrative efforts and scaling effortlessly. By centralizing the management of multiple shops, businesses benefit from a cohesive backend and data structure that supports individualized storefront experiences. Ideal for multi-market or multinational enterprises, Pimcore’s multi-tenant approach combines the convenience of central control with the adaptability needed to provide localized, engaging, and market-specific experiences across all stores, enhancing both efficiency and customer satisfaction.
features.description: With Pimcore’s Multi-Shop & Multi-Tenant support, businesses can efficiently manage several B2B and B2C shops within one platform, customizing each storefront with individual product catalogs, customer groups, and order processes. This capability simplifies handling diverse markets and segments while maintaining centralized control, making it ideal for global brands and multi-market businesses looking to scale and personalize their e-commerce strategy.

features.name: Product Internationalization
features.headline: Product Internationalization for Global E-Commerce Compliance
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s Product Internationalization enables businesses to create multi-lingual, region-specific product data models that ensure compliance with country-specific regulations, supporting seamless global commerce.
features.longDescription: Pimcore’s Product Internationalization feature is designed to support businesses as they expand into global markets, offering a flexible framework for creating multi-lingual, region-specific product data models. By enabling businesses to tailor product information to specific languages and adapt data based on regional regulations, Pimcore ensures that customers in different locations receive accurate, compliant, and culturally relevant product details. This internationalization support includes the ability to adjust labeling, descriptions, and regulatory disclosures according to local standards, making it easier for businesses to navigate complex international compliance requirements. Whether managing product information across multiple languages or aligning with country-specific laws, Pimcore provides the tools to create a seamless, reliable, and compliant product experience for global customers, enhancing trust and accessibility in diverse markets.
features.description: With Pimcore’s Product Internationalization, businesses can adapt product data to meet diverse regional requirements by developing multi-lingual and country-specific data models. This functionality supports global compliance and provides localized, accurate product information for each market, ensuring a consistent and regulatory-compliant experience across international regions.

capabilities.name: Customer Data Ingestion
capabilities.headline: Unified, Real-Time Data Ingestion for a 360° Customer View
capabilities.shortDescription: Pimcore’s Customer Data Ingestion capabilities consolidate customer data from diverse sources into a unified profile. With real-time data processing, activity tracking, and identity resolution, businesses can achieve a comprehensive, cross-device customer view for personalized engagement.
capabilities.longDescription:
Pimcore’s Customer Data Ingestion feature within its Customer Data Platform (CDP) Framework provides a robust, API-driven solution for consolidating customer data into a unified profile. Leveraging a “connect anything” architecture, Pimcore CDP seamlessly integrates data from multiple sources—including ERPs, CRMs, BI tools, and third-party analytics—ensuring that businesses have a comprehensive view of each customer. This framework supports cross-device tracking and advanced identity resolution, creating a cohesive profile that enables businesses to understand the complete customer journey.

The Real-Time Data Processing feature allows businesses to instantly collect, process, and act on customer interaction data through webhooks, delivering targeted messaging and personalization in real time. Additionally, Pimcore’s Activity Tracking feature monitors all customer interactions, providing an up-to-date view of customer behavior and allowing for dynamic segmentation. By centralizing and unifying data ingestion, Pimcore’s CDP empowers businesses to create responsive, personalized experiences that drive engagement and customer loyalty across every touchpoint.

features.name: Real-Time Data Processing
features.headline: Real-Time Data Processing for Instant Customer Engagement
features.shortDescription: Pimcore CDP’s Real-Time Data Processing empowers businesses to deliver immediate personalization and targeted messaging by instantly processing customer behavior data through real-time data collection via webhooks.
features.longDescription: Pimcore’s Real-Time Data Processing feature enables businesses to create dynamic, responsive customer interactions by instantly processing data from current customer behaviors and engagements. Through the use of webhooks, Pimcore collects customer data in real-time, allowing businesses to analyze and apply this information immediately for personalized recommendations, targeted messaging, and timely offers. This capability ensures that customers receive content and suggestions that are not only relevant to their overall preferences but also reflective of their current context. Real-time data processing supports instant adaptability, enabling businesses to keep up with changing customer needs and deliver proactive engagement at every touchpoint. By utilizing real-time insights, Pimcore enhances the customer experience, creating a seamless journey that feels responsive, personalized, and attuned to each customer’s unique behaviors and interests.
features.description: Pimcore’s Real-Time Data Processing feature allows businesses to enhance customer interactions by capturing and analyzing data in real-time, supporting personalized experiences and responsive messaging based on current customer behavior. With real-time data collection enabled by webhooks, businesses can react instantly to customer actions, driving timely and relevant engagement that aligns with customer needs.

features.name: Activity Tracking
features.headline: Comprehensive Activity Tracking for a Complete Customer Journey View
features.shortDescription: Pimcore CDP’s Activity Tracking monitors all customer interactions throughout the journey, with API support for updating and reading segments, and seamless integration with third-party analytics and data solutions.
features.longDescription: Pimcore’s Activity Tracking feature offers businesses an in-depth view of each customer’s journey by tracking all interactions within the system, from initial engagement through to purchase and beyond. This capability allows businesses to monitor behavior patterns, understand preferences, and identify key moments within the journey. Additionally, Pimcore provides a robust API for updating and accessing customer segments and activity data, supporting seamless integration with third-party analytics and data delivery platforms. This enables businesses to enhance their data insights by combining Pimcore’s comprehensive tracking with external analytical tools, providing an adaptable, data-rich environment that supports targeted marketing, real-time personalization, and improved decision-making. With Pimcore’s Activity Tracking, businesses can create a fully unified customer view that allows them to engage more effectively and respond dynamically to customer needs.
features.description: Pimcore’s Activity Tracking feature captures customer interactions across the entire journey, enabling businesses to gain a holistic view of engagement. With API access for updating and reading customer segments and activities, and integration with external analytics and data solutions, this feature provides a complete, flexible tracking system that supports data-driven decision-making and personalized engagement.

features.name: Unified Customer Profile
features.headline: Unified Customer Profiles for a 360° View
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s Unified Customer Profile feature enables businesses to aggregate customer data from multiple sources, creating comprehensive, cross-device profiles with identity resolution capabilities. This unified view empowers companies to understand customer journeys and personalize interactions.
features.longDescription: Pimcore’s Unified Customer Profile feature empowers organizations to build a complete, cross-device view of each customer by consolidating data from multiple sources. This framework supports identity resolution, merging various identifiers such as email addresses, device IDs, and more, creating a single, accurate profile. With cross-device tracking enabled, businesses can gain insights into customer behavior across platforms, delivering cohesive, personalized interactions at every touchpoint. This comprehensive customer profile helps businesses understand customer journeys, preferences, and needs, transforming data into actionable insights that enhance engagement, loyalty, and conversion rates across all channels.
features.description: The Unified Customer Profile feature in Pimcore's CDP consolidates customer data from various channels, merging identifiers like emails and device IDs to create a cohesive, cross-device profile for each customer. This capability allows businesses to track customer interactions across touchpoints, supporting advanced personalization and a seamless customer experience.

features.name: Customer Data Integration
features.headline: Seamless Customer Data Integration for Unified Profiles
features.shortDescription: Pimcore CDP’s Customer Data Integration feature consolidates data from multiple sources into a unified profile, leveraging a “connect anything” architecture and API-driven approach to ensure seamless integration across ERPs, CRMs, BI tools, and more.
features.longDescription: Pimcore’s Customer Data Integration feature is designed to consolidate customer information from multiple sources, creating a unified, comprehensive profile that powers meaningful engagement and data-driven decisions. With a flexible “connect anything” architecture, Pimcore allows businesses to integrate data seamlessly from enterprise systems such as ERP, CRM, and BI tools, as well as from external websites or third-party applications. Pimcore’s API-driven approach ensures that businesses can tap into an extensive range of connectivity options, with integration capabilities supported by Datahub, Workflow Automation Engine, and Core APIs. This holistic data ingestion framework enables businesses to capture and synchronize all relevant customer data, providing a 360-degree view that encompasses behaviors, preferences, and interactions. By integrating disparate data sources into a single profile, Pimcore empowers businesses to deliver personalized experiences, improve operational efficiency, and gain valuable insights into each customer’s journey.
features.description: Pimcore’s Customer Data Integration feature enables businesses to aggregate customer data from diverse sources, creating a comprehensive, unified profile. Through Pimcore’s “connect anything” architecture and API-first capabilities, businesses can effortlessly integrate data from internal systems like ERP, CRM, BI, and external applications. With integration options via Pimcore Datahub, Workflow Automation Engine, and Core APIs, Pimcore supports a robust, cohesive view of each customer’s journey, enabling precise personalization and deep insights.

capabilities.name: Digital Experience Management
capabilities.headline: Unified DXP for Seamless, Personalized Customer Journeys
capabilities.shortDescription: Pimcore’s Integrated DXP combines CDP, E-Commerce, and DXP capabilities into a single platform, enabling brands to deliver personalized, data-driven experiences across all channels. With single-source publishing and easy access to product and customer data, Pimcore’s DXP streamlines content creation, enhances personalization, and ensures consistent, engaging customer journeys.
capabilities.longDescription:
Pimcore’s Integrated Digital Experience Platform (DXP) is a best-of-suite solution that unifies Customer Data Platform (CDP), E-Commerce, and Digital Experience Management (DXM) capabilities, enabling brands to deliver fully personalized and consistent experiences across every customer touchpoint. This comprehensive, configurable platform allows for single-source publishing, meaning content can be created once and distributed seamlessly across channels such as websites, mobile apps, and print catalogs.

Pimcore’s DXP leverages its composable suite of data management functions, including PIM, MDM, and DAM, allowing brands to dynamically integrate product listings, customer profiles, and digital assets into personalized content with drag-and-drop ease. This integrated approach simplifies IT structures, consolidating data and experience management into one platform, which reduces complexity and enhances data accessibility. By combining data from PIM, CDP, and E-Commerce systems, brands can create unified customer journeys that fulfill the goals of Product Experience Management (PXM), offering customers a cohesive, responsive experience tailored to their preferences. With Pimcore’s Integrated DXP, businesses can optimize every interaction, foster deeper customer loyalty, and build lasting connections across the entire digital landscape.

features.name: Built-in DXP system
features.headline: Unified Digital Experience Management (DXP) for Seamless Multi-Channel Personalization
features.shortDescription: Pimcore’s award-winning Digital Experience Management (DXP) delivers a powerful solution for personalized, multi-channel content delivery, integrating seamlessly with Pimcore’s data management for a unified, best-of-suite experience.
features.longDescription: Pimcore’s Digital Experience Management (DXP) application provides brands with a comprehensive, configurable platform for delivering highly personalized content across multiple channels and devices. This award-winning DXP enables single-source publishing, allowing brands to create and distribute content tailored to each customer’s needs, whether for websites, mobile apps, or print catalogs. Seamlessly integrated within Pimcore’s composable suite, the DXP connects directly with all data management functions, enabling brands to dynamically pull product listings, customer data, and other assets into personalized experiences. Through easy drag-and-drop linking between PIM and DXP, Pimcore supports a best-of-suite approach that simplifies IT structures and enhances data access, providing a single platform for unified, data-driven content delivery. By bridging data management and experience delivery, Pimcore’s DXP ensures that brands can optimize every customer interaction, offering a cohesive and personalized journey that fulfills the promise of Product Experience Management (PXM) and builds stronger, lasting connections with audiences.
features.description: Pimcore’s built-in Digital Experience Management (DXP) application empowers brands to create and deliver personalized, multi-channel content from a single source, accessible across any device and channel. As part of Pimcore’s composable suite, this DXP integrates seamlessly with data management and PIM functions, supporting effortless content personalization, product displays, and dynamic publishing, laying the foundation for a true Product Experience Management (PXM) solution that reduces IT complexity and enhances customer engagement.
